C:
来吧，来吧，朋友们，尽情享受这场盛大的表演。你点燃手中的引信，将一颗又一颗的太阳齐刷刷地炸上天。什么？太阳已经在天上了？别在意这些细节，请睁大眼睛，记下这璀璨的瞬间。

宇宙时代的弄潮儿总是蔑视烟花的艺术，追求永恒的人们无法理解，刹那的毁灭有何意义。你打了个响指，乐子神的火花闪过，绚烂缤纷的爆炸吞没掉他们的永恒。破坏是智慧生命的天性，连三岁小孩也能感受到愉悦。来吧，来吧，烟花里落下糖果雨，来吧，来吧，烟花里蹦出虚空鲸。

你是最伟大的艺术家，描摹灿烂的毁灭。
E:
Come and enjoy this grand show as much as you can, my friends! You ignite the fuse in your hand, sending one sun after another to the sky. What? The sun is already up there? Don't get bogged down in the details. Open your eyes and capture this scintillating moment.

The trendsetters in the universal era always hold the art of fireworks in contempt. People who seek eternity find it hard to understand the meaning of such fleeting destruction. As you snap your fingers, sparks of The Laughter flash and the dazzling explosions engulf their eternity. Destruction is an inherent trait of intelligent life, and even a child can find pleasure in it. Come on, it is raining candies from the fireworks! Come on, a void song whale has just popped out of the fireworks!

You are the greatest artist of all time! An illustrator of brilliant destruction.

C: 咔咔，咔咔，博尔卡齐的坑洞不见天日，你闭着眼睛，一阵阵的海潮声拍打在鼓膜器上，那是子嗣们的嗡鸣，跗节上钩挂着猎物的尸骸，口器尚咀嚼着战利品。咔咔，咔咔，坑洞里传来鞘翅撞击和摩擦的声音，那是子嗣们的急行军，背负香甜的血肉来到你的面前，进献给它们的母亲，它们的父亲，进献给孕育灾厄的你。\n\n咔咔，咔咔，博尔卡奇的坑洞太过拥挤，你试图挪动身体，肥硕的躯壳死死卡在了洞窟里，岩壁上尖利的凸起刺得你发疼，只好放弃，继续将送来的食物塞进嘴里，模仿血脉里的王虫，不断繁殖、繁殖、繁殖……
E: Crunch. Crunch. The craters of Borkazi see no light. You close your eyes, and waves of the tide slap on your tympanal organ — it is the buzzing of the offspring, the carcasses of the hunt hanging from their tarsi, and their jaws chewing on their spoils. Crunch. Crunch. Sounds of elytra colliding and grinding can be heard from the craters. That is the rapid marching of the offspring, bearing gifts of sweet fragrant flesh before you in offering to their mother, their father, to you that birthed and raised catastrophe.\n\nCrunch. Crunch. The craters of Borkazi are too congested. You try to move your body, but that mammoth mound of flesh is stuck in the cave, the cragged edges of its walls painfully driving into you, and so you give up, continuing to shove food presented to you into your maw, imitating the Swarm King in your blood, destined to propagate, propagate, propagate...

C:
让我来讲述一群眷爱万物的情种吧，博爱的信徒。
他们行走在每一条雅努斯开辟的蹊径，
沿途钦慕泰坦的身躯，也爱恋蚂蚁的触须。
就连悬锋战士冷漠的面庞，都被拓上一道炙热的吻印。
曳石学派的学者说，世上没有无缘无故的爱，
他们说，人是簇居的金蝶，爱是本能。
但博爱终究只是时代的一段小小插曲，
纷争的火焰燃起，征服才是永恒的主题。
柔软的嘴唇怎能敌得过刀斧的冰冷，
他们却面含笑意。
既然已爱过世间众生，也该去亲吻塞纳托斯灰黯的手背了。
E:
Let me tell you the story of those who believed in universal love and cherished all beings.
They walked every path paved by Janus.
Along the way, they admired the mighty bodies of Titans as much as the delicate antennae of ants.
Even the stoic faces of Kremnoan warriors bear the imprint of their fiery kisses.
Scholars of the Helkolithistic school argued that there was no love without reason,
That humans were but clustered golden butterflies, their love driven by instinct.
But ultimately, universal love was merely a fleeting interlude in the course of time.
As once the flames of conflict raged, conquest remained the eternal theme.
How could tender lips contend with the sharp edges of axes and swords?
Still, they smiled.
Having loved all beings in this world, they turned to kiss the black hand of Thanatos.

C:
我年幼时曾仰望过一尊雄鹰。
它挥舞钢筋铁骨的双翼，遮蔽天空，
它睁着怒火中烧的双瞳，审视大地。
那对黄金铸成的巨爪，如同天上的第二轮太阳，
后来我才知道，它是日冕不死鸟的天敌。
当我年老时，又与雄鹰相遇，
曾经统治天空的生灵，趴在尘土里奄奄一息。
翅膀满是破洞，眼睛失去光明，
连那金爪子也遍布时光的锈迹。
看来持续数百年的猎杀迎来了终局，
神鹰敌不过恶鸟的生生不息。
就当我感叹之际，鹰的身体燃起熊熊烈火，
于那金焰之中，崭新的身躯撑开双翼。
E:
When I was young, I once saw a mighty eagle.
It flapped its wings, forged from steel and iron, and blanketed the sky.
With eyes blazing with fury, it gazed upon the earth below.
Its colossal claws, crafted from gold, gleamed like a second sun in the sky.
Later, I learned that this eagle was the natural enemy of the Coronal Phoenix.
In the twilight of my years, fate reunited me with the eagle.
Once the sovereign of the skies, it lay helpless on the ground, near death.
Its wings were pierced with holes, its eyes dimmed,
And even its golden claws were covered in the rust of time.
It appeared that the century-long hunt had come to an end,
As the mighty eagle succumbed to the relentless spawn of evil birds.
As I stood there mourning its fate, the eagle's body ignited in a fiery blaze,
And from within that golden flame, a rejuvenated form emerged, spreading its wings with renewed vigor.

C: 红色诱惑
E: Red Temptation

C: 我们是牛仔
E: We Are Cowboys

C: 纯美骑士的帮助
E: Knights of Beauty to the Rescue

C: 对有机生命的刻板印象也存在于机械群体间，例如这颗与苹果合二为一的心脏——或与心脏合二为一的苹果。可惜这个问题的答案已经无从考证，因为其创作者，奥尔森博士，因被指控「太过了解有机世界」而在战争期间遭到机械帝国处理。毋庸置疑：能证明其清白的也只有有机生命。
E: Mechanical lifeforms also have stereotypes for organics. For example, take this heart merged with an apple - or an apple merged with a heart. Unfortunately, the nature of this question will remain forever inconclusive. Its creator, Dr. Olsen, was accused of being "too cognizant of the organic world" and was "resolved" by the Machine Empire during the war. Undoubtably, only an organic lifeform could have proven its innocence.

C: 星际和平公司流传着一则箴言：在谈判桌上要像特蒂西人一样冷静。这一被蔑称为「无面者」的种族常年保持着蜂巢式的社会运作制度：民众根据首脑的安排完成各项指示，共享标准与结果，作为个体的特蒂西人无需也无权思考，管理者会定期抽取个体的独立思想，将其作为一种灵感反馈给首脑——但如此团结一心的种族却没有皈依「同谐」，或许是因为首脑仍对自我意识有所眷顾吧。
E: There's a proverb passed around the Interastral Peace Corporation: "At the negotiation table, remain as composed as the Titecie people." This ethnicity, often derogatorily referred to as "the Faceless," constantly maintains a hive-like social operating system: Citizens follow instructions according to the directives of the leaders, sharing standards and outcomes. As individuals, the Titecie have neither the need nor the right to think. Managers regularly extract independent thoughts from individuals and provide them as inspirational feedback to the leaders. However, despite this unity, the race has not embraced Harmony, perhaps because the leaders still cherish their self-awareness.

C: 一位咕咕钟匠人偶然得见「末王」，她手中的钟在惊诧中摔落在地，于「末王」的过去破碎损毁。这位匠人后来加入了厄兆先锋，试图以咕咕钟来解读末王的预言。虽然她生平创造无数，却始终珍藏着这台破碎的咕咕钟。它破碎之时，匠人已经遇见末王；它破碎之时，末王却未遇见这位匠人。
E: A cuckoo clock craftmaster once encountered Terminus. The clock in her hand fell to the ground in her surprise, becoming shattered and broken in Terminus' past. The craftmaster later joined the Omen Vanguards, trying to use cuckoo clocks to interpret Terminus' prophecy. Although she went on to create countless more clocks in her life, she always treasured this broken cuckoo clock. She had already met Terminus when it broke. Terminus had yet to meet her when it broke.

C: 在「存护」的巨锤下，星体被加工为坚不可摧的墙基，而在伟力下溅起的残渣则迅速冷却，成为珍贵的天彗合金。这些克里珀敲打天彗星墙时迸射的细小碎片，在诞生之初便宣告着新一个琥珀纪的到来。几乎所有的天彗合金都被星际和平公司严加保存，只有P<unbreak>45</unbreak>以上的员工方有机会一窥它们的真容。
E: Under the colossal hammer of the Preservation, celestial bodies are processed into indestructible foundations, while the residue splattered by its immense force quickly cools, forming precious Celesticomet Alloy. These tiny shards, ejected when Qlipoth struck the Celestial Comet Wall, heralded the arrival of a new Amber Era from the moment they were created. Almost all Celesticomet Alloys are meticulously preserved by the Interastral Peace Corporation, with only employees ranked P<unbreak>45</unbreak> and above having the opportunity to catch a glimpse of their true form.

C: 据称记录了「纯美」之姿的古旧相机，被揽镜人视若珍宝。曾作为商品在银河暗网拍卖，但每次都会引来假面愚者恶意抬价，致使流拍。直到愚者们对这种恶作剧失去兴趣，它才终于被移交到揽镜人手上。此时相机内早已没有了照片，但人们似乎仍能从镜头上窥见那位星神的美貌，仿佛那是一个太阳，以美的焰火灼烧了世界，只留下恒久的印记。
E: An old camera that was purported to have recorded the figure of the Beauty, and was considered a treasure by the Mirror Holders. It was once auctioned as a commodity on the Cosmic dark web, but every auction attracted Masked Fools who maliciously raised the price until it could not be sold. It was only passed into the hands of the Mirror Holders after the Fools lost their interest in the prank. Pictures had long faded from within this camera by then, but people seemed to still scry that Aeon's beauty on the lens — as if THEY were a sun that scorched the world with the flames of beauty, leaving behind only eternal imprints.

C: 宇宙之大，总会有奇怪的东西飞来飞去，游侠的子弹就是其中之一。无名的巡海游侠花大价钱定制了一批超距子弹，向着空无的各个方向击发出去。除了游侠自己，没人知道这些子弹的轨迹，它们漫无目的地穿行在寰宇间，织成一张无形的巨网。每当他将猎物驱赶向既定的坐标，十年前击发的子弹，便会跨越十光年的距离，精准地和对方的脑袋产生交集。这是一种威慑，用无处不在的子弹警告所有人——莫起恶心。
E: With the universe being so vast, there are always bizarre objects flying around, one of them being Rangers' bullets. A nameless Galaxy Ranger spent a fortune on a customized batch of hyper-distant bullets and fired them in all directions in space. No one knows the paths that these bullets will take aside from the Ranger himself. These bullets aimlessly roam the universe forming a giant, shapeless net. Whenever he drives his prey to a set coordinates, a bullet fired ten years prior will cross the distance of ten light-years to accurately collide with the prey's skull. These omnipresent bullets are a warning and a deterrent to all — to steer clear of wicked deeds.

C: 谜语博士向来自诩为谜语大师巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉毕生的宿敌。他用二十八种语法错误和三十六种语义漂变制作出一副奥塔牌，用它们置换掉占卜师们手中的塔奥牌。紊乱的词序和话语化作无序的乱流，最终，由占卜宣判的真实，替代了似是而非的现实。当眼前的一切都迥然不同时，改变的或许并非世界，而是人们看待它的眼睛。
E: Dr. Riddle always styled himself as the archrival of Riddler Baden Babbibalo Bala. Using twenty-eight types of grammatical mistakes and thirty-six semantic changes to create a set of Towat cards, replacing soothsayers' Tawot cards with his invention instead. The chaos from the disarray of word sequences and discourse ultimately replaced the ambiguous reality with the divination's declared truth. When everything becomes jarringly paradoxical before you, it may not be the world that has changed, but the eyes of those who see it.

C: 众所周知，获得空间站「黑塔」的科研资格已成为了广大研究者的共同目标，今天我们就来采访一下空间站的主人，黑塔女士。黑塔女士，请问您成立这样一处科研绿洲的契机是什么呢？ 「东西多了，总要找地方放。」 啊，正所谓无心插柳柳成荫！智慧的黑塔女士即便是无心之举，也可以造福千万普通人。然而，总有心思邪恶之徒妄图破坏如此美妙净土，请问黑塔女士，对于上一次反物质军团的入侵，您有何想法？ 「下次别来了。」 这…如此严厉的警告，一定是成就黑塔女士的必然要素。区区反物质军团，你也敢进黑塔女士的空间站，你不配被黑塔女士放在眼里！那么我们进入下一个问题！
E: Everybody knows that qualifying as a researcher on the Herta space station is a cherished goal of the wider scientific community. Today, we're interviewing its owner, Madam Herta. First of all, can you please tell us what was your motivation for setting up a scientific research oasis like this? "I have so much stuff, and nowhere to put it." Ah, truly an unforeseen outcome! Even unintentional acts from the brilliant Madam Herta can benefit millions of ordinary people. However, evil will always strive in vain to destroy such a wondrous place. Madam Herta, what are your thoughts about the Antimatter Legion's last invasion? "Don't come back." Oh... such a severe warning. This must form an indispensable part of Madam Herta's illustrious achievements. The mere Antimatter Legion dares to invade this space station — but you don't even deserve Madam Herta's attention! Let's move on to the next question, then!

C: 她曾以为，「逐火」便是她寻找的、永不散席的盛宴。 可在那不断失却的旅途中，光芒也终如泡沫般碎裂。 她是凯撒的锋刃，她的剑尖总是蜿蜒流淌鲜血。 可当凯撒滚烫的金血滴落在她的指尖，恍惚之间，她又坠落回那孤独的深海。 「呵，为什么…我为之游动的火，由我亲手熄灭……」 在那痛苦的千年迷醉中，她逃避着那迷离光彩的泡沫，但那些已然片片碎裂的过往如今却像海草缠绕不休。 「啪嗒……」 棋子落下。执棋的君王神意自若，可王冠上时而平静时而浓烈的光焰却透露出她真实的情绪。 「我不懂如何下棋。」 「来，我教你。」 她不太熟练地拿起棋子。不过是又一场厮杀而已，她想。 「啪嗒……」  那陡然亢奋的蓝色火焰使她的身边如热泉般温暖。她随意移动着棋子，问道： 「既然终要从棋局上消失，为何它们要不停前进？」 「啪嗒……」 君主啜饮杯中蜜酿，满足地伸展着双臂，又畅然地喟叹着： 「前进本身，不已经足够快意？」 …… 千年的等待，她为逐火开辟新的天地，可也知晓那也并非最终的归宿。 「鱼儿需要的，终究只是一片栖身的海……」 在君主留下的一页记忆中，她走向清澈的海水。 ♫啪嗒♫，♫皮咔♫，♫波砰♫…五颜六色的泡沫倒影过往岁月，凝结碎裂，碎裂凝结。 「海洋的宠儿，你可有什么心愿想要实现？」 「海瑟音，你在往何处去？」 「剑旗爵，你可有想要之物？」 …… 故乡，欢宴，逐火…它们都曾在她的生命中闪耀，然后迅速化为泡影…只剩下一声叹息回荡天际。 从始至终，这便是她拥有的全部——在人世与大海中，都是泡沫破碎的痕迹。 「可它们…多么美丽……」 「♫……♫」 「♫……♫」 「♫……♫」 翁法罗斯的黎明将要升起。 在最后的泡沫破碎前，她微笑着，仿佛已唱尽…那已无需言语表达的心声。
E: She had once believed the Flame-Chase was the eternal celebration she had always searched for. But as the journey wore on and more was lost, even that shining light shattered like seafoam. She had been the Imperator's sharpest blade, her sword always flowing with blood. But when the Imperator's molten gold blood dripped onto her fingertips, she suddenly felt herself sinking again back into that lonely, silent sea. "Heh, why... did I snuff out the very flame I swam toward with my own hand..." For a thousand painful years, she had fled from those dazzling bubbles of memory, but now those long-burst fragments clung to her like swaying seaweed, impossible to shake loose. "Click." A chess piece lands on the board. Despite her perfect composure, the sovereign's crown of flames reveals what she won't, dancing between serenity and fierce intensity. "I never learned how to play." "Then I'll teach you." She picks up a piece with unpracticed fingers. Just another battleground, she thinks to herself. "Click." Suddenly, vibrant blue flames warm the air around her like hot springs. She moves chess pieces without much thought and asks: "If they're bound to disappear from the board, why bother moving forward at all?" "Click." The sovereign takes a sip of honey brew, stretches her arms with satisfaction, and sighs with pleasure: "Isn't the journey forward fulfilling enough on its own?" ... After a millennium of waiting, she forged new paths for the Flame-Chase, though she knew they wouldn't be the final destination. "What a fish truly needs is simply a sea to call home..." As a fragment of her memories unfolds, she walks toward clear ocean waters. ♫ Pop ♫, ♫ Fizz ♫, ♫ Splash ♫... Bubbles of every color mirror bygone years, forming and bursting, bursting and forming. "The ocean's dearest, do you have a wish?" "Hysilens, where are you headed?" "Dux Gladiorum, what do you seek?" ... Homeland, revelry, the Flame-Chase... each once brilliant in her life, yet all quickly fizzing out like transient foam... Only a sigh lingers across the sky. From the beginning till the end, this was all she had, in both the mortal realm and ocean depths, nothing but the fleeting traces of bubbles. "But still... how beautiful they are..." "♫...♫" "♫...♫" "♫...♫" The dawn of Amphoreus approaches. Before the final bubble bursts, she smiles, as if she has already sung everything her heart had to express beyond words.

C: 普通模式「迷离人心的虚言」
E: Normal Mode Confusing Lies

C: 赛飞儿：跃然得逞
E: Cipher: Leap to Triumph

C: 三月七：屯蒙御寇
E: March 7th: The Novice's Stand

C: 你们平安着陆雅利洛-Ⅵ，却发现此处只有冷冽的霜风和无垠的雪原向各位表示欢迎。\n毫无头绪的你回想起姬子的话：成功的开拓需要「探索」、「了解」、「建立」和「连结」…现在大概是正处于「探索」的阶段吧——\n无论如何，现在恐怕只剩下在风雪中前进，或者等星核自己找上门这两种选择了。
E: You land on Jarilo-VI safely, but now find yourselves standing in frigid winds among barren snowfields stretching as far as the eye can see.\nFeeling stuck, you recall Himeko's words: Successful trailblazers must learn to explore, understand, establish, and connect... Maybe this is what exploring looks like.\nIn any event, your options are now clear: Push through the snow or wait for the Stellaron to miraculously appear by itself.

C: 坏消息是，你的「好哥们」桑博抛弃了你，留下你独自面对银鬃铁卫戍卫官——杰帕德•朗道；好消息是，面前这位威风凛凛的军人似乎没那么死板。\n你成功说服了杰帕德，令他相信你们来自天外世界。他承诺会护送你前往贝洛伯格的大守护者之所在。\n这一切看起来是那么恰到好处…别怀疑，跟着银鬃铁卫们走就是了。
E: The bad news is that your buddy Sampo has abandoned you and left you to deal with Gepard Landau, the Silvermane Guard Captain, alone. The good news, however, is that the imposing soldier is actually quite flexible.\nYou successfully persuade Gepard by making him believe that you are from a world beyond the sky. He promises to escort you to the Supreme Guardian at Belobog.\nEverything looked perfect... There's no reason for doubt, all you have to do is follow the Silvermane Guards.

C: 经过一整天的游览，你们已经完全了解了这里的文化，距离成为贝洛伯格的公民恐怕只差去政务部摇个号了。\n你们回到了歌德宾馆，这里温暖的地髓灯光和空气中氤氲的茶香使你们感到安心。\n在正式洗漱休息之前尚有时间在酒店中转转，三月七和丹恒似乎也想和你在这里聊一聊——自由安排睡前的安适时光吧。
E: After an entire day of sightseeing, you've got a complete understanding of the local culture and are just an appointment at Belobog's Administrative Department away from becoming its actual citizens.\nYou return to the Goethe Hotel. The warm Geomarrow lights and the tea fragrance in the air make you feel at ease.\nThere's still some time to walk around the hotel before washing up and getting ready for bed. It seems like March 7th and Dan Heng also wants to speak with you — arrange your time before sleeping as you wish.

C: 克服千难万险之后，你们终于来到了寒潮肆虐的极北之地，百年来除大守护者外无人能够踏足的古代战场。\n可可利亚与布洛妮娅就在这里的某处…你们要做的就是深入禁域，找到她们。\n那灾难的源头「星核」也在前方——做好决一死战的准备吧。
E: After overcoming numerous difficulties and dangers, you have finally come to the Far North, where the Eternal Freeze is raging. For hundreds of years, no one except the Supreme Guardian could set foot upon this ancient battlefield.\nCocolia and Bronya are here somewhere... Your mission is to go deep into the forbidden zone and find them.\nStellaron, the source of disaster, also lies ahead. Get ready for a fight to the death!

C: 在救下天舶司的接渡使停云后，你们与她一路同行，试图在魔阴身横行的「流云渡」中找到离开的船只。然而形如虬枝古木，外形怪异的敌人却阻住去路。\n眼见星槎近在咫尺，岂能被挡在此处？
E: After rescuing Tingyun, the Amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission, you go with her and attempt to find an escape vessel in Cloudford, which is currently overrun with mara-struck. However, strange enemies taking the form of twisted old branches block the way.\nYou will not be stopped here when a starskiff is just within reach!

C: 按照景元所想，欲得知星核猎手的真正意图，普通的审问手法毫无作用。唯有借太卜司中名为「穷观」的法阵，鉴往知来，演算真相。\n但此刻阵基停转，符箓熄灭。景元再度使出兵法中「来都来了」之计，请你们出手相助。
E: Jing Yuan postulates that ordinary interrogations will not be effective in learning the true motive of the Stellaron Hunters. Such a goal can only be achieved using the computational algorithm named Matrix of Prescience in the Divination Commission, which can examine the past and future and calculate the truth.\nNow, the three great base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience are once again in motion. All is ready for the "interrogation."

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 你就不好奇，在你等待列车组期间，匹诺康尼的另一边发生了什么吗？现在你有机会看到了——虽然不是很科学——但好好欣赏吧。
E: Aren't you curious about what took place on the other side of Penacony while you were waiting for the Crew? Now you have a chance to see it — This can't be explained by science, so just enjoy it.

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n短暂的不适后，你发现自己已经抵达了一座荒废的旧镇。与众人交流过、准备停当后，就开始此次废弃车站下车之旅吧。
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAfter a brief moment of discomfort, you realize that you have arrived at an abandoned old town. Once you have spoken with everyone and prepared yourself, alight and begin your adventure at this abandoned station.

C: 你成功击败了那位炽热如烈焰的骑士，拿下「巨星之路」的入场券。\n你们很快就将受到知更鸟小姐的亲自接见…不对，是和你们已经离匹诺康尼大剧院和星核近在咫尺——记住仓鼠球骑士的名言：「快快快快快」！
E: You successfully defeat the knight whose passion was like a burning flame, and claim your entry ticket to the "Path of the Superstar."\nYou will soon receive a personal reception from Miss Robin herself... No, you are already within reach of the Penacony Grand Theater and the Stellaron! Remember the famous words of Hamster Ball Knight: "Go, go, go, go!"

C:
……

悲伤的囚徒：「他们说，若我们舍弃他们而另选主宰，他们必然使我们饮沸泉、食荆棘！」
恐惧的囚徒：「他们说，若我们爱自由胜过爱囚笼，便必不能下所上的床，必定要死！」

驻足的旅者：「我已替你们扫清了障碍，令你们得以不做一切你们不想做的。」
怯懦的囚徒：「可因着他们的淫威，我们必不想做他们不想让我们做的。」

驻足的旅者：「你已清偿了你应偿还的，现在你应为自己赚取财物了。」
恐惧的囚徒：「可我不应拥有任何财物，除非他们命令我拥有。」

……
E:
Woeful Prisoner: "They say that if we are to abandon them and choose a new master, they will force us to drink from boiling springs and feed on thorny vines!"
Fearful Prisoner: "They say that if we place our love on freedom over our imprisonment, we are sure to die in the bed we have made for ourselves!"

Halted Traveler: "I have already cleared all obstacles that lay before you, now you will never have to do that which you do not desire again."
Cowardly Prisoner: "But their power prevents us from doing what we want to!"

Halted Traveler: "You have repaid your debts. Now is the time for you to earn your own fortunes."
Fearful Prisoner: "But I do not deserve to have any fortune besides that which they command me to have."

...

C: 你来到了一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉…这里看起来像是筑梦边境，但如果你没记错，筑梦边境应该没有开设动物园的业务。\n看看这猴子是怎么回事吧，万一折纸大学教课的真是猴子呢？
E: You find yourself on... An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernana Monkeys! Bana bana... Bana bana... This place resembles Dream's Edge, but as far as you remember, there are no zoos in that area.\nCheck out that bizarre monkey. What if it's actually monkeys teaching at Paperfold University?

C: 进入折纸大学的第一场考试便是分配院系的「测弦考试」，虽然这场考试不计分也不会挂科，但考试二字就令人胆寒——哪怕你没上过学也是如此。\n或许在漫长的宇宙文明演化中，这种恐惧早已刻入了高等智慧生命的基因。
E: Your first examination upon joining Paperfold University is the Tuning Test, which determines your school. While this examination is not graded and cannot be failed, the term "test" evokes unease nonetheless, even if you have never attended a school.\nPerhaps such fear has long been engraved in the genes of all highly intelligent life forms in the evolution of universal civilization.

C: 筑梦艺术课开始了，所幸你的第一个任务不是跟混凝土打交道。课上的一切都很新奇，无论是想象力作画，还是你的忍者同学与猴子老师——看来这次学院之旅是离不开这两个词了。\n动手…不，动脑画出你的大作吧！
E: The Dreamweaving class has started, and thankfully, your first task doesn't involve dealing with concrete. Everything in this class feels fresh, from creative artwork to your ninja classmate and monkey mentor. It seems like these two elements are intertwined in your academic journey.\nUse your hands... or your brain to craft your own masterpiece!

C: 很快，这里的所有人都会变成与游侠缠斗的恶猿，这是他们踏入「源究丛林」时就注定的命运。你知道，他的忍道已经终结了，但你到最后也没戳破他对你许下的谎言。而你要带着这个谎言活下去，然后狩猎，狩猎至忍道的尽头。\n你的忍号是真实的，你的忍道是真实的，你脚下的路也是真实的。所以，往前冲吧。
E: Soon, all here will deteriorate into savage monkeys obstructing the Rangers, a fate sealed the moment they entered the AtaviSearch Forest. You know that his way of the ninja has ended, yet you chose not to debunk the false promises he offered you even till his end. Now, you will continue to live with this lie, then conduct your hunt. You will hunt until the way of the ninja's bitter end.\nYour name as a ninja is true, your way of the ninja is true, and the path beneath your feet is true. So, press forward.

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
E: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

C: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 经过一番战斗，我们在试炼幻境中会合，并循着厮杀声寻找纷争的源头，或许白厄就在那里。
E: We finally met up in the illusion of the trial after some fighting and followed the sound of battle to the source of Strife. Perhaps that would be Phainon's location.

C: 结束了堪称荒唐的比赛，白厄与万敌一同稍事休息。两位战士聊起火种试炼，吐露出彼此不为人知的往事……
E: Following a ridiculous contest, Phainon and Mydei stop to rest. The two warriors discuss the Coreflame trial, revealing untold stories from their pasts...

C: 与盗火行者的最终战场就在悬锋城。面对未知的强敌，众黄金裔必须全力以赴。
E: The final battle with the Flame Reaver takes place in Castrum Kremnos. Against this mysterious mighty foe, the Chrysos Heirs must fight with everything they have.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 回到创世涡心的{NICKNAME}与白厄一同归还了最后的火种，却未能按照预期中那样前往新世界，而是被来古士拉入了一场「沉浸式戏剧」之中。
E: Upon returning to the Vortex of Genesis, {NICKNAME} and Phainon returned the final Coreflame together, but rather than journeying to the new world as expected, they were pulled into an "Immersive Theater" by Lygus.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 说起来，长夜月已经帮了三月七很多了…她究竟是敌是友，或许最好的方式是面对面谈谈。
E: Come to think of it, Evernight has helped March 7th quite a lot... Whether she's friend or foe, perhaps the best way to find out is to talk face to face.

C: 说起来，长夜月已经帮了三月七很多了…她究竟是敌是友，或许最好的方式是面对面谈谈。
E: Come to think of it, Evernight has helped March 7th quite a lot... Whether she's friend or foe, perhaps the best way to find out is to talk face to face.

C: 小三月到底会怎么样…坐在那里的，究竟是小三月，还是长夜月？
E: What will happen to March... Who's really sitting there? Is it March, or Evernight?

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C: 据遐蝶和赛飞儿所说，黄金裔们在大战结束后便出现在星穹列车之中。或许，这就是史诗落幕前，最后的一次告别机会了。多和伙伴们聊聊天吧，这大概是他们此生唯一一次登上星穹列车的机会了。
E: According to Castorice and Cipher, the Chrysos Heirs appeared on the Astral Express after the great battle. Perhaps this is the last chance to say goodbye before the epic tale comes to an end. Take some time to chat with your companions, for this might be their only opportunity to ever board the Astral Express.

C: 近日，地概科的年轻科员洛奇陷入了重重心事。原来，他一直与暗恋对象保持着通讯，但这一次，对方却没有如期回信。\n考虑到二人一度相谈甚欢，以及他「刚刚表白」这一特殊时间节点，心急如焚的他请求你调查双方联络中断的因由。
E: A young researcher named Rocky from the Department of Cosmic Geography seems to have a lot on his mind lately. As it turns out, he's been keeping in contact with his crush. However, this time, the expected letter of reply from his crush never came.\nThe two never run out of things to talk about, and seeing that he had just confessed his love, he is urgently asking for you to investigate why their communications have abruptly ended.

C: 奇物「螺中笑声」受到模因病毒的感染，在空间站里大肆传播「毒鸡汤」。艾丝妲请你帮忙调查病毒的源头。\n三位可疑人员，究竟谁会是这场闹剧的起源？
E: The Curio "Crackup Conch" is infected by the memetic virus, spreading anti-motivational quotes in the space station. Asta wants your help to investigate the source of this virus.\nWhich of the three suspects caused this drama?

C: 在确定了真正的感染者后，你不禁松了口气。现在只需要将身份权限与工程师交接，你就能离开这个耽误了你不少时间的老旧机房……
E: You feel relieved after identifying the infected. Now you just need to return your identity authorization to the engineer, then leave this shabby terminal room where you've wasted so much time...

C: 基座舱段的气氛比你想象中喧闹得多，听说有位贵客即将到访，科员们都开始了繁忙的工作。从阿兰的只言片语中，你隐约猜到了来者的身份。
E: The atmosphere in the base zone seems much more boisterous than you would expect. Hearing of the imminent arrival of an honored guest, researchers all begin their busy work. From Arlan's words, you vaguely guessed the identity of the visitor.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n还是平票。压力来到布洛妮娅这边了。回去给她汇报吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nStill a split vote. The pressure is now on Bronya. Should go back and report to her.

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solve the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him about the reward — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solve the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him about the reward — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 娜塔莎告诉你诊所一直收到匿名的爱心包裹的隐秘。尽管娜塔莎并不知道背后的好心人是谁，但你和她还是决定把这位匿名人士的爱心，传递到更多有需要的人手里。
E: Natasha tells you that the clinic keeps receiving anonymous care packages. She doesn't know who is doing this, but you two decide to spread their love and care to those in need.

C: 你们成功安抚了茉莉，并让她前往「永动」机械屋暂避风头，同时也获得了证明军中腐败确有其事的口供。\n根据佩拉推测，本案的幕后黑手此时应该还在「铁卫禁区」——是时候找他们算账了！
E: After comforting Molly, you tell her to hide in Neverwinter Workshop, and get her testimony that corruption is happening in the army.\nPela speculates that the one behind this case is still in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. It's time to let them pay!

C: 行走在「开拓」命途上的人们，总会在旅途中遭遇各类奇人奇事。这些琐碎的故事不仅填满了开拓者们的日志，同时也加深了他们与各个世界之间的联系。
E: Those on the Path of Trailblaze will encounter all kinds of strange people and odd anecdotes during the journey. Not only do these trivial stories fill up trailblazers' journals, but they also deepen their connections to all worlds.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n原来对于娜塔莎一家来说，送花一事有着十分特别的涵义。\n到底该选择什么品种的花呢？娜塔莎将挑选的权利留给了你。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nIt turns out that flowers have a special meaning in Natasha's family.\nWhat kind of flower should you choose? Natasha hopes you can decide for her.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n诺尔伯特的言谈已经揭露了他既是展品贩子的不争事实。继续前进，把他捉拿归案。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nNorbert's words and actions have already revealed the indisputable fact that he is the artifact peddler. Keep going and take him into custody.

C: 丹鼎司大乱后一切申请都得重新复核，玉络虽然拒绝了你，但你得知《要药分剂》并不在书架上…或许，该去附近转转碰碰运气？
E: After the chaos in the Alchemy Commission, all applications need to be re-evaluated. Although Yuluo refused you, you found out that the Compendium of Remedies is not on the bookshelf. Perhaps, you should take a chance and look around nearby?

C: 嫌疑人已经被檀檀带走，事故收尾工作也将顺利进行，去把好消息告诉芦慧和梅姐吧。既然已经尘埃落定，芦慧也该下定决心要不要辞退梅姐了。
E: The suspect has been taken away by Tantan, and the follow-up work is well underway. Go and tell Mei and Luhui the good news. Now that the dust has settled, Luhui should also make up her mind about whether she will fire Mei.

C: 龙女总是逃脱看管，而如今地衡司人手不足，丹鼎司形迹可疑，大毫认为你才是最靠谱的那个人，希望你去看管白露。\n你好像在仙舟罗浮上听过好几套类似的说辞了，实在是难以拒绝。
E: The Dragon Lady kept slipping away from her watchers. With the lack of manpower at the Realm-Keeping Commission and the untrustworthiness of the Alchemy Commission, Dahao thinks you're the best person for the job to look after Bailu.\nYou seem to have heard similar talking points all over the Luofu, and it's difficult to turn them down.

C: 净砚小姐似乎有了新发现，真不愧是她！\n名侦探三月七已经彻底上头了，真不愧是她！
E: Jingyan seems to have made a new discovery, as expected of her!\nGenius Detective March 7th is already on the case, as expected of... her?

C: 为了精准定位因果殿中的莱恩老师，你们需要去启动大衍穷观阵阵基，定位逝者信息。\n感觉大衍穷观阵什么都可以办得到。
E: To accurately locate Master Ryan in the Hall of Karma, you need to activate the Matrix of Prescience Ultima and search for information about the deceased.\nIt sounds like the Matrix of Prescience Ultima can be used to do anything.

C: 持明族的刺客利用云吟术隐藏身形接近了你们，并发动袭击。丹恒身经百战，能够从容应付，但白露就不一定了。保护好白露！\n持明族的蜃影似乎对丹恒和白露都有主动响应，听听他们说了什么，也许能帮助你们了解多年前到底发生了什么。
E: The Vidyadhara assassins used cloudhymn magic to conceal themselves and get close to you before attacking. As a seasoned warrior, Dan Heng is more than capable of handling himself, but Bailu is another deal, and will need your protection!\nThe Vidyadhara Mirage Echo offers active responses to both Dan Heng and Bailu. Listen to what they're saying and maybe it will help you all understand what happened all those years ago.

C: 缅怀既毕，你跟随她前往鳞渊境，不知为何她兴起了寻医问药的念头。而在丹鼎司中，也许没人比那位龙女更有资格为罗浮前代剑首把脉看诊了。
E: Respects paid, you follow her towards the Scalegorge Waterscape. For some reason, she now has the desire to seek medical counsel. No one is more qualified in the Alchemy Commission than that Dragon Lady to read the pulse and diagnose the Luofu's previous Sword Champion.

C: 黑天鹅的这段梦境实在太过刺激，一上来就把你抛掷到了一个「案发现场」之中。这里有黑天鹅，有猎犬家系的执法人员，还有…桑博！？这家伙怎么会在这里？
E: This dreamscape that Black Swan has prepared is way too exciting, throwing you into a "crime scene" As soon as you enter. Here you see Black Swan, a Bloodhound Family Law Enforcer, and... Sampo!? What is that guy doing here!?

C: 在尚未踏入下一站旅程前，列车接到了来自罗浮仙舟的通讯，景元向暂无去向的众人发出邀请，参加演武仪典。
E: Before embarking on the next stop of their journey, the Express received a comms from the Xianzhou Luofu — Jing Yuan extended an invite to all wanderers to join the Wardance.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 在释放诱饵后，天击将军真正的追猎开始了。云骑军锁定呼雷的所在，开赴长乐天。而呼雷所宣告的袭击也即将开始。
E: With the bait set, the Merlin's Claw's true hunt begins. Having locked onto Hoolay's whereabouts, the Cloud Knights depart for the Exalting Sanctum. However, Hoolay's promised assault is also set to begin.

C: 为了应对呼雷似假似真的袭击宣言，天击将军决定兵分三路。她将亲自担起重责——确保星槎海、长乐天等地面的安全……仅凭她一人之力？
E: In response to Hoolay's seeming promise of an assault, the Merlin's Claw decides to split her troops into three squads. As for herself, she shall shoulder the heavy responsibility of ensuring the safety of ground locations like Starskiff Haven and Exalting Sanctum. Wait... Does she intend to accomplish this all by herself?

C: 另一边，三月七也察觉到了竞锋舰上的异样，试剑的时刻终于来临。
E: Meanwhile, March 7th has also noticed the unusual events aboard the Skysplitter. The time for her to put her swordsmanship skills to the test has finally come.

C: 高天之上，竞锋舰中，群狼环伺，猎手弯弓。罗浮仙舟的演武擂台上终于展开一场血之角逐……
E: Aboard the Skysplitter in the sky, a hunter draws their bow amid prowling wolves. The Xianzhou Luofu's Wardance arena finally plays host to a bloody contest...

C: 竟然有刺客想要刺王杀驾！这太离奇了，怎么会有人对这样一位善良的好人图谋不轨？\n必须好好问问这几位刺客，到底为什么要刺杀皇帝！
E: Assassins are after the Emperor! Unbelievable, who would do such a thing to such a kind soul?\nYou will have to thoroughly interrogate these assassins and find out why they want to assassinate the Emperor!

C: 佩德罗与你一起到尾翼视察，提出更换尾翼涂装与为飞艇命名的事项，你心中浮现了几种方案……
E: You and Pedro inspect the airship's empennage. As he raises the business of changing the empennage paint and naming the airship, several ideas come to your mind...

C: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n从这个本应疯狂的战士口中，你听到了两个未曾听闻的名字。这些事情的真相与你寻找金丝的目的并无干系，但探索未知也确实是无名客的工作——至少比一拳打死她有趣，你接这活儿总不会真的是为了战斗吧？
E: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nYou hear two unfamiliar names from the mouth of this supposedly crazed warrior. Though finding the truth behind these names has nothing to do with your objective of finding the golden thread, it is also the duty of a Nameless to explore the unknown... At least it would be more interesting than finishing her off with a single blow. You didn't just take this job to get into fights after all, right?

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——无论如何，先去找找戏剧的主人演员吧。\n「人类，你想从对方身上得到什么？」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you will even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... Whatever the case, it would be best to find the protagonist of this story first.\n"Human, what is it you wish to gain from them?"

C: 发现了一只看上去很担忧的呜呜伯，去问问它发生了什么要紧事吧。
E: You come across a Wubbaboo that looks distressed. Go and ask what's going on.

C: 一只满载着孩子们梦想的「信鸽」正在磐岩镇飞翔，在别人之前找到它，带给阿丽娜吧。
E: A pigeon that carries the dreams of children is flying around above Boulder Town. Bring it back to Alina before others find it.

C: 莉拉读了父亲的来信，她好像一眼就看透了老头儿的心思。\n她打算写一封回信，同时委托你去花店买一束「七彩虹」鲜花。
E: After reading her father's letter, Lila immediately understands his thoughts.\nShe plans to write a letter back and asks you to buy a bunch of "Rainbows" at the Florist.

C: 花已到手，不知道莉拉的信写得怎么样了。回去找她吧。
E: You have obtained the flowers. Go back to Lila to see if she has finished the letter.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n没想到，教育部的波瓦大臣居然出了一道难题来阻拦递交流程。\n那道题可真是太难了，聪颖如你居然都选错了答案——事已至此，把这个坏消息告诉雷金吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, hopes to submit his thesis on the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nHowever, Mr. Bova, the Minister of Education, tries to interrupt the submission process by demanding you to pass a quiz.\nThe question is so difficult, even someone as clever as you chose the wrong answer. Since it has come to this, tell Regin the bad news.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n没想到，教育部的波瓦大臣居然出了一道难题来阻拦递交流程。\n这种脑筋急转弯怎么难得住你？你三下五除二就战胜了对方的刁难——是时候带着好消息去找雷金了。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, hopes to submit his thesis on the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nHowever, Mr. Bova, the Minister of Education, tries to interrupt the submission process by demanding you to pass a quiz.\nA simple brain teaser like this wouldn't stop you. You answered the quiz without much effort. And now, it's time to bring the good news to Regin!

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n去上层区找到贝洛伯格教育部的官员，看看对方有没有本事把你这个天才难住。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nGo to the Overworld to find officials of the Belobog Ministry of Education and see if they are able to have you stumped.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n去上层区找到贝洛伯格教育部的官员，看看对方有没有本事把你这个天才难住。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nGo to the Overworld to find officials of the Belobog Ministry of Education and see if they are able to have you stumped.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 你再一次通过了禁区演练。\n和「副官」聊聊，领取你的奖励吧。
E: You passed the restricted zone training once again.\nTalk to the aide and collect your reward.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 「爱当轻语低喃，令无人知晓，唯有天空。」你无意间撞见一对爱侣的秘密约会，但今天两人的交流似乎不太愉快……
E: "Love should be soft whispers that none but the sky can hear." You accidentally run into a secret rendezvous between two lovers, but their conversation doesn't seem happy...

C: 黎明云崖作为供奉、景仰刻法勒的圣地，有许多令人印象深刻的景观，带希瑞雅四处逛逛、参观参观吧。
E: As a holy site dedicated to honoring Kephale, Dawncloud features many remarkable views. Show Serena around the place.

C: 两位小贩前脚刚走，汹涌的黑潮造物便接踵而来。\n再多的黑潮造物在你手下也不过一合之敌，你决定亲自上阵。
E: Right after the two merchants left, the raging creatures of the black tide come forth.\nDoesn't matter how many Black Tide Creatures come, they're all victims to fall under your bat. You decide to settle matters personally.

C: 司祭似乎有所领悟，希望这一次，心酿能够迎来新生。
E: The priest seems to have an epiphany. Hopefully, the soul brew can be rejuvenated this time.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「清玩斋」与商会建立合作关系。但「清玩斋」的老板泊阳此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Elegance Pagoda to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boyang has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。接下来，他们将正式开启本次为模拟宇宙制作的三个片段的「位面」！
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Following that, they will officially initiate the three sections of "planes" developed for this version of Simulation Universe!

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。接下来，他们将正式开启本次为模拟宇宙制作的三个片段的「位面」！
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Following that, they will officially initiate the three sections of "planes" developed for this version of Simulation Universe!

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！三个位面都在模拟宇宙中开启了。同时，黑塔想了点法子，让你通过「觐见之间」更快接近星神——这里以代码演算，模拟出历史上许多命途行者的行为，并将其封存了下来。你可以效仿他们，得到来自不同命途的「力量」——毕竟在行为中践行对「命途」的虔诚，才能够觐见星神。
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The three planes are now active within the Simulated Universe. At the same time, Herta had the idea to use the Audience Chamber to get you closer to the Aeons faster. Here, using computational data, she has simulated and saved instances of numerous Pathstriders across the span of history. You can imitate them to gain "power" from various Paths. After all, it is only through active practice of piety toward each of the Paths that one draws the attention of the Aeons.

C: 一位名叫维尔德的公司员工向你强烈推荐一款名叫《以太战线》的游戏，并对你发出参加「星际决胜庆典」的邀请。\n到底要不要去线下体验这款游戏呢？先跟三月七商量一下吧。
E: An IPC worker named Wilder is passionately promoting a game named Aetherium Wars to you, and sent you an invitation for the Interastral Tournament Festival.\nWill you go to experience this game in person? Chat with March 7th first.

C: 这一天终于来了。全宇宙的高手玩家都聚集于此，而当比赛结束后，人们将只记得一位——是你把他们都击败了。
E: The day is finally upon you. The best players from across the stars have gathered in this one place. When the championship is good and done, people will only remember one thing — how you laid all your opposition low.

C: 你与捉鬼小队的成员们翻开「罗浮杂俎」开始讨论其哪些奇闻怪事是妖物作祟。分辨的要诀是百分之九十九的常识和百分之一的直觉——有人称为直觉，有人叫它灵力。
E: You and your fellow ghost-hunters browse Ghostly Grove, discussing which rumors and anomalies might be caused by heliobi. Accurately distinguishing them requires <unbreak>99</unbreak> percent common sense and one percent intuition — some call it intuition, some call it psychic powers.

C: 在罗浮杂俎上，一则「凶宅」的帖子引起了你们的注意。桂乃芬私信发帖人之后，认为这个选题不仅与岁阳有关，还是涨粉的大好选题。你们决定去丹鼎司与发帖人见个面……
E: A post on Ghostly Grove concerning a haunted residence catches your group's attention. After Guinaifen sent a private message to the poster, she now believes this issue is not only related to heliobi but also great content that can get more fans. You decide to go to the Alchemy Commission to meet up with the poster...

C: 桂乃芬提出找个风景不错的地方录制「粉丝提问」。\n可以看看粉丝的提问，然后带着问题去星槎海找她吧。
E: Guinaifen mentions she wants to record the "Fan Q&A" at somewhere with a good scenary.\nYou can review the fans' questions, then bring the list to find her in Starskiff Haven.

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n铁皮人希望向你展示它理想中的酒吧，就去听听它的想法吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nTin Man wants to show you its dream lounge. Go ahead and listen to its ideas.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n继续去接待顾客吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nLet's continue serving the customers.

C: 进入了司令的心绪空间，好好陪它玩个痛快吧。
E: You've entered Mr. Bigwig's Emoscape. Have some fun together.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n按照它的规划，你现在必须前往「那个房间」。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nBased on its plan, you must now proceed to "that room."

C: 家族邀请你参加剧院的搜查工作，去现场看看吧。

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。

C: 打开那扇门后，摆在你面前的是数之不尽的房间…若要找到最深处的宝库，必须先解除所有封印才行…\n你做到了，米粒真的有被数完的一天。现在，是时候炫耀一下，然后亲手将宝藏收获了。
E: Opening the door, you are greeted by the sight of countless other rooms... If you want to reach the vault at the very depths, you will have to dispel every single seal...\nYou did it, you achieved the task that could rival counting every grain of sand in an hourglass! Now, it's time to show off your skills and take that treasure for yourself!

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「预言算碑」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。

C: 嗯，你没见过吗？列车时不时会来到太空站的。

C: 不得不劳烦各位多绕一点路…真的很抱歉。
