C: 据我所知，只有星际和平公司获得了流光忆庭授权的光锥化技术。不知道黑塔和流光忆庭做了什么交易，根据她的性格，多半不是走正规途径弄来的……
E: As far as I know, only the IPC possesses Light Cone technology authorized by the Garden of Recollection. I couldn't say what deal Herta made with the Garden, but knowing her, it was likely off the books...

C: 做个善良的人吧，年轻人，说实话吧！
E: Why not do the right thing and let me hear the truth!?

C: 我会考虑姬子的邀请…
E: I'll think about Himeko's offer...

C: 列车的事，你不问姬子，倒来问我？
E: The Express? Shouldn't you be asking Himeko instead?

C: 你愿意在这儿当个普通科员的话，可以问问艾丝妲，她同意我就没意见。
E: If you wanna be a researcher here, you can just ask Asta. If she's fine with it, I have no complaints.

C: 丹恒的房间……
E: About Dan Heng's room...

C: （这些都是…三月七拍的？）
E: (Did March 7th take all these pictures...?)

C: 第一步，捏住你的焦虑根源。
E: The first step is to grab a hold of the root cause of your anxiety.

C: 桌子上的一体机预安装了星际和平网络的「爱多」操作系统，是正版。
E: The computer station on the table comes pre-installed with the IPC's "Eidor" operating system. It's a genuine copy.

C: 测试「模拟宇宙」有什么好处？
E: What do I get for testing the Simulated Universe?

C: 忘了自我介绍了，我叫希露瓦，是这家机械屋的主人。
E: I forgot to introduce myself. The name's Serval, I'm the owner of this workshop.

C: 当时在克里珀堡——你注意过那位「{RUBY_B#可可利亚}大守护者{RUBY_E#}」吗？
E: Earlier in Qlipoth Fort... were you paying attention to the {RUBY_B#Cocolia}Supreme Guardian{RUBY_E#}?

C: 嫌疑人，不许乱跑！去见布洛妮娅统领！
E: Suspects! Stop running around and go see Commander Bronya!

C: 谢谢你的回答。
E: Thanks for your answers.

C: 是啥味道？
E: What flavor is it?

C: 是我们呀，帮你修过东西的。
E: It's the radiator fixers.

C: 我算出了「星核」与「裂界」有关，离真相已经很近了。可惜还没有证明「星核」是裂界的起源，就被逐出了筑城者。
E: I figured out that the Stellaron and the Fragmentum were linked, so I was already close to the truth. It's a shame that the Architects ejected me before I could discover that the source of the Fragmentum was the Stellaron itself.

C: 她还真什么都跟你说啊…啊，对了，上次我把歌德宾馆的年庆限量水壶落在这了，我带走了啊。
E: She really does tell you everything... Oh, by the way, I left my Goethe Hotel limited-edition flask behind last time I was here. Let me have a look for it. I think I left it over...

C: 再让我准备准备…
E: Let me get prepared first...

C: 当然啦。虽然在本人面前有点难以启齿，但希露瓦小姐其实一直是我的…偶像。可惜不管是天才般的头脑，还是显赫的家世，这些我一样都没有。
E: Well, it'd be a bit embarrassing to say it out loud in front of her. Even though I don't have the brain of a genius, nor was I born into an influential family, Miss Serval has always been my role model.

C: 说什么呢，茉莉？这话我可不爱听了啊。
E: What are you talking about, Molly? I don't like the sound of that.

C: …别以为我不知道你在打什么算盘！你们——尤其是你，{NICKNAME}——不许跟过来！绝对不许！
E: ... Don't think I don't know what you're up to! You guys — especially you, {NICKNAME} — you are not allowed to follow me! Absolutely not!

C: 将瓦尔特的观测结果转述给了布洛妮娅……
E: Telling Bronya about Welt's observations...

C: 也就是说，裂界的影响已经扎根过深，就算现在封印了星核，也没法即刻逆转……
E: ...Which means the Fragmentum has already taken root by this point. Even though the Stellaron is sealed, we won't be able to reverse the damage immediately...

C: 宣讲快开始了吗？
E: Is the address starting soon?

C: 没想到啊，我居然…
E: I never thought that I would...

C: 只要他们俩都认可布洛妮娅的为人，那追随「地火」的大家也就不会质疑了。
E: If those two approve of Bronya, then everyone following Wildfire won't question her either.

C: …哎，算了算了，没什么！刚才那句话你当我没说。
E: ...Forget it, it's nothing! Forget I said anything.

C: 直觉告诉我，这多半与可可利亚大人的离开有关。
E: My intuition tells me this is mostly linked to Madam Cocolia's passing.

C: 这把吉他…是我在母亲大人的遗物中发现的。
E: This guitar... I found it after going through mother's old things.

C: 这吉他是个什么来头？
E: So what's the story behind it?

C: 往事不必再提…
E: What was that "bygones" thing you said again...?

C: 大红色的邮筒，在冰冷的贝洛伯格艳如烈火。
E: The big red mailboxes are like burning torches in the frosts of Belobog.

C: 「三年前陪你看《贝城假日》的人，今年还会陪你看《星尘玫瑰》吗？」你看着宣传语陷入了沉思。
E: "Will the person who watched Holiday in Belobog with you three years ago still be here to watch Stardust Rose with you this year?" You look at the tagline and get lost in thought.

C: 放着工具的柜子。据说会制造和使用工具是人和动物最主要的区别。
E: A cabinet containing tools. It is said that the ability to make and use tools is the main difference between humans and animals.

C: 哎呀，好像还真是雕像。
E: Oh for the love of... Looks like it really is a statue.

C: 垃圾桶，没有勇气的人不得靠近。
E: A trashcan. Don't get close without courage.

C: 在队友诧异的眼神中，你憋住呼吸，如同士兵面对枪林弹雨般朝着垃圾桶冲刺前进。
E: While your astonished companions look on, you hold your breath and proceed towards the can like a soldier charging into a hail of bullets.

C: 史瓦罗自称是人类的守护者，所有无主的机器人都听他的号令。它们占据了炉心枢纽，不允许任何人靠近。
E: Svarog claims to be a guardian of humanity — all the ownerless robots obey his commands. They've occupied the furnace core hub, and they're not letting anyone get close.

C: 呣呣呣呣…行吧？好像也没啥不妥，你们就一起负责捉人吧！
E: Ummmm... sure. I guess so. Then... you guys are seeking!

C: 老大！我看他们不太聪明的样子，要不要先演示一下？
E: ...Boss! They don't seem very smart. Why don't we do a practice one first?

C: 丹恒，是什么秘密啊？
E: Dan Heng, what secret?

C: 希儿！谢谢，我还好，只是关节有两处扭伤。
E: Seele! Thank goodness. I—I'm fine, just a couple of sprains.

C: 真不要脸，居然还在打矿队的主意…看我来收拾你们！
E: Shameless. Still after the miners, are you? Time to teach you a lesson.

C: 但她其实是值得托付性命的伙伴。只要再相处一段时间，你们会明白的。
E: But you can trust her, even with your life. Stick around a bit longer and you'll see what I mean.

C: 每天都有人在耳边提醒我：「牢记你的身份，布洛妮娅」，「这有违筑城者的训诫，布洛妮娅」，「淑女不该说出如此粗鄙之语，布洛妮娅」……
E: Every day all I hear is "Remember who you are, Bronya," "This is against the Architects' Admonishments, Bronya," "Ladies shouldn't use such foul language, Bronya"...

C: 想出发了就来找我，咱们随时可以动身～
E: We can set out at any time. Just come find me when you're ready~

C: 还有事没办完。
E: There's still unfinished business here.

C: 还在铆钉镇的时候，这是我奖励给「好孩子」的奖品。孤儿院难管教的孩子实在太多，你能想象那场面有多混乱吗？我总得想点办法让那些熊孩子乖乖听话。
E: It was an award I used to give the kids in Rivet Town for "good behavior." Can you imagine what an orphanage is like with so many difficult children? I had to come up with a solution to get them to behave.

C: 我答应她，要帮助她重建上下层之间的联系。就这样。
E: I promised her that I would help her rebuild the connection between the Overworld and the Underworld, that's all.

C: 你去打听打听，看看我这「搏击俱乐部」为什么在这地下远近闻名——观众买票进来可不是为了看什么无名小卒！
E: Ask anyone and you'll learn why my Fight Club is known far and wide across the underground. People don't buy tickets to come watch some unknown amateurs!

C: 妈妈又要上班，她一个人养家很辛苦…我在这等她下班就好啦，附近的叔叔阿姨都认得我的。
E: Mummy's gotta work, she works hard... So I wait here. Everyone here knows me.

C: 哈哈，我早说过了，这就是五冠王拳王的含金量，懂不？
E: Haha, I told you so. Fighting against a five-time champ is no joke. You hear me?

C: 所以甭担心——赛程安排那都是小意思，我们拳馆的业务既全面又灵活，绝对没有疏漏。
E: So don't you worry, schedule arrangements are trivial matters. Our services are comprehensive and flexible. You will definitely be well taken care of.

C: 接下来，就是等待封锁解除的消息了。但愿布洛妮娅不会让大家等太久。
E: Now we just have to wait for the official news. I hope Bronya doesn't keep us too long.

C: 是裂界造成的吗？
E: Was it the Fragmentum?

C: …齐诺，对吧？
E: ...Zino, right?

C: 娜塔莎大夫，我们回来了…
E: Doctor Natasha, we're back...

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》讲的是什么呀？
E: What is The Adventurous Moles about?

C: 我懂了，这是小屁孩儿的爽文。
E: I see. So it's a fairy tale for naughty kids.

C: 拿出来。
E: Take it out.

C: 博识学会发言人表示：「我们无从得知琼斯学士会有怎样惊人的发现，但我们希望，他的发现将会让我们更进一步了解帝皇，并使宇宙免于再一次承受他降临时带来的恐怖。」
E: A spokesperson for the Intelligentsia Guild said, "We have no way of knowing what amazing discoveries Jones will uncover, but we are hopeful that his findings will further our understanding of the Emperor and help save the universe from the horrors that he will bring with him when he returns."

C: 以下为您展开详细报道。
E: Let's take a closer look at the details.

C: 遇到身份不明的可疑人士，做好防范是明智之举；随后的赶路，只能说她畏惧担责，想尽快把我们这个麻烦丢到上级头上去吧。
E: She did the right thing by not trusting us initially — we were an unknown quantity to her. As for the rush... my guess is she's just eager to get us out of her hair and further up the chain.

C: 我？我又怎能像符卿一样未卜先知？云骑军看守不力，我有责任。
E: Me? I had no idea he might escape! Unlike you, my gaze never travels beyond the horizon. I take full responsibility — the Cloud Knights failed in their duty.

C: 有事要办的话，还请您在局势稳定后再来吧。给您添麻烦了。
E: If you have business to attend to, please do it when the situation has settled down. Apologies for any trouble.

C: 可惜我们只能远观，过不去。
E: It's a pity that we can only admire from afar.

C: 现在情况如何？
E: How are things going at the moment?

C: 卦象涨落，兑坎之间。行舟困顿，泥足不前……
E: Our hexagrammatic position is fluctuating between the marsh and water trigrams. The vessel is stranded and the way is blocked...

C: 抱歉，我想得入神了。如果你想走，我们这就出发。
E: Sorry, I'm getting a little fixated. If you want to head out, we should go this way.

C: 快些将那些从别处洞天撤出来的病人妥善安置起来，稳定病况。
E: Hurry, find beds for the patients from the other delves and stabilize them.

C: 我是说…让他们…乖乖躺好！
E: I mean... Lay... all of them down!

C: 你好，我来申领物资。
E: Hello, I'm here to collect supplies.

C: 是啊，那孩子平日里都深居简出，怎么会跑到咱们这儿来。
E: Yes, that child's usually hidden away. What's she doing out here?

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 在下只是一介行商……
E: Not exactly my expertise. I'm just a traveling merchant...

C: 有人动了流云渡的操纵台，用货箱堵住了路。
E: Somebody used the Cloudford control panel to block the road with containers.

C: 接下来你有什么计划？
E: What are your plans after this?

C: 被你们找到啦~有了「谛听」，追踪是不是更得心应手了呢？
E: You found me~ Diting's quite handy when it comes to tracking, isn't he?

C: 一张洁白的名刺，角落印有一只展翅欲飞的鸢。落款则是「天舶司商团『鸣火』的首席代表，接渡使停云」。
E: A piece of white name card, with a bird spreading its wings at a corner. The card belongs to Amicassador Tingyun, Head Representative of the intergalactic merchant guild, Whistling Flames.

C: 显然，有人背叛了组织。
E: No wonder, someone has betrayed their club.

C: 不买！
E: Not gonna happen!

C: 嗨呀，也好。也省去我随团出使的活儿了。
E: *yawn* Of course, the silver lining is I don't have to go on as many trips anymore.

C: 冲呀！别让她跑了！
E: Quick! Don't let her escape!

C: 还差一点点，各位…欲速则不达。
E: So close and yet so far... you'll have to pick up the pace.

C: 杨叔，你看？
E: Mr. Yang, any idea?

C: 这应该只是一首打算送给某人的情诗吧？
E: Seems like a love poem to me.

C: 也不知道太卜这一仗是输是赢？
E: It's hard to tell if the master diviner won or lost here.

C: 这是一个阴谋颠覆联盟的隐秘组织。他们常年潜伏在暗处，这次星核作祟，终于忍不住露了行踪。并且，这一场灾乱与他们也有非同寻常的关系。
E: It is a clandestine organization that seeks to overthrow the Alliance. Before the Stellaron disaster, the Disciples had remained veiled in shadow for years. Their emergence reflects their intricate connection to this calamity.

C: 是你啊，丹枢……
E: Dan Shu... it's you.

C: 难怪「药王秘传」兴起叛乱，原来是与军团大君暗中勾结。她伪装仙舟人的样貌，将星核送入罗浮，让我们自相毁灭……
E: It's clear that the sudden resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus is all connected to the Lord Ravager. Pretending to be a Xianzhou citizen, planting a Stellaron on the Luofu — all part of her plan to bring about our self-destruction.

C: 竟把短生种搬来当救兵…嘿嘿，景元真是无人可用了。
E: Tsk, resorting to short-life species as reinforcements... Hehe, Jing Yuan is truly running out of options.

C: 一时间你们竟有些忐忑，不知道对寻常人类起效的成分，是否还能作用在长生种的身体上？
E: For a moment you are worried that medicine made for ordinary humans might not work on long-life species.

C: 等我们？
E: Wait for us?

C: 嘻嘻，总算有个说话的伴儿了。被这群板着脸儿一声不吭的云骑押着…嘻嘻，真无聊啊～
E: ...Finally someone to talk to. These Cloud Knights are so serious, so boring, hehe...

C: 魁首说靠着这东西，我们能为「建木」注入新生。嘻嘻，我原本是不信的。
E: The master said we could inject new life into the Ambrosial Arbor with it. Hehe, I didn't believe it at first.

C: 别被他的花言巧语蛊惑了。
E: Don't listen, his words are poison.

C: 咦…为什么？她许诺过……
E: Uh...? How? She promised...

C: 嗯，是丹鼎司没错，难怪船半路上断断续续收到几条军令，说云骑在此集结，想必是为了解决星核的问题。
E: Yep, it's the Alchemy Commission. No wonder we were getting those military broadcasts on the way over — something about the Cloud Knights gathering here, right? They're probably coming to fix the Stellaron problem.

C: 我去星槎海前，曾找一位卜者测算此次出行的吉凶。他说「随而有获」，让我不必在意去向，只要随波逐流，便能有所收获。
E: Before I arrived in Starskiff Haven, I had a diviner read my fortune for the journey ahead. He told me not to be concerned with the destination, but to seize my chances and travel with the current to reap the greatest harvest.

C: 有没有见过几个化外民？
E: Have you seen any outworlders?

C: 我得走了。
E: I need to go.

C: 之前就想问了，你怎么突然下车过来了啊。
E: Soooo what made you suddenly decide to come down from the Express?

C: 幻胧染指「建木」在即…诸位，必须抓紧时间了。
E: Phantylia will soon have control of the Arbor... Quickly.

C: 「也许」…嗯，我能理解搜肠刮肚很让人为难啦，因为我也是什么都想不起来。
E: Perhaps...? Fair enough, it's tough racking your brains all the time — I'm struggling to keep track...

C: 刚才是哪个小坏蛋想要找我来着？
E: Now, which of you little creatures wished to see me, hmm?

C: 我正有此意！
E: Way ahead of you!

C: 现在那个未来已经成真——仙舟发现了军团的企图，并且在各位的帮助下令幻胧铩羽而归。
E: Now that future has come true, the Xianzhou has discovered the Legion's intentions, and with everyone's help, has imposed a crushing defeat on Phantylia.

C: 折冲战阵只是将军所有工作中最小的一部分。应对罗浮六御，十王司的审查乃至与联盟高层博弈……
E: Subduing the enemy is one of the most minor parts of a general's work. They have to meet with the Luofu's Six Charioteers and undergo Ten-Lords Commission inspections — all while dealing with the Xianzhou Alliance's top brass...

C: 你再想想…
E: Think again...

C: 要记得来看我喔！
E: Remember to come and see me!

C: 哼哼，工造司经此一役也算受到了一番锤炼啊。只是这重建工作，真是累~煞~人~也！
E: The Artisanship Commission has come through hell and high water since the incident. Rebuilding what we lost will drain the years, our labor filled with blood, and sweat, and tears!

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，是你吗？
E: Is that you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

C: 对了，丹枢大人还好吗？有些和我一样的朋友都很关心她的近况…自从上次她为我们送完药，就再也没有音信呢。
E: By the way, is Dan Shu okay? Me and my friends are worried about her... We haven't heard from her since the last time she delivered the medicine.

C: （要出发前往下一站了，去观景车厢和大家会合吧……）
E: (Time to head to the next stop. Let's meet up with everyone in the Parlor Car...)

C: 瓦尔特先生看起来很轻松。
E: Mr. Yang, you look relaxed.

C: 一本正经地讲笑话，也算是你的看家本领了。
E: A punchline with a straight face — I suppose that's your specialty.

C: 当然，你也可以和同伴商量，甚至反过来利用我，我很欢迎——因为这也是在向我展示你们的价值。
E: Of course, you can confer with your colleagues as well, or go as far as to use me in turn — I welcome that notion. Because it will also show me your true value.

C: …不至于这么讨厌我吧？唉，看来还是得靠自己了。
E: ...You don't really disdain me that much, do you? Well, seems like I'm on my own again.

C: 星穹列车，铂金客房共四间…分别是瓦尔特•杨先生、姬子女士、三月七女士，以及……
E: The Astral Express, four platinum guest rooms... whose names include Mr. Welt Yang, Miss Himeko, Miss March 7th, and...

C: 哇，你是不是也激动得睡不着觉！我已经迫不及待想见识梦中的世界了！
E: Can't sleep from all the excitement, huh? I can't wait to experience the dream world!

C: 我为什么要走？
E: Why do I have to?

C: 就像是刚接触游泳的人，经常会因为无法准确地适应浮力而沉入水中；但只要身体习惯了水流，你便可以自如地漂浮在水面上。
E: It's like learning to swim — it's easy to sink at first when you aren't accustomed to the water, but once you get the hang of it you can float and swim on the surface effortlessly.

C: 你看，前台怎么聚了这么多人？不会刚下车又遇到麻烦了吧……
E: Hey, what's the big gathering at the concierge about? We've just arrived and there's already drama?

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: 她突然顿住了。你注意到某一瞬间，女孩的目光变得小心谨慎，直刺向你的眉心，又或是你身后的某处……
E: She abruptly freezes. In that fleeting moment, you notice a cautious shift in the girl's gaze, piercing directly into your brow, or perhaps somewhere behind you...

C: 诶哟，三月姑娘，你这就不记得我了？亏我在贝洛伯格帮了你们那么多忙……
E: Oh, Miss March! Don't you remember me? After all the favors I did for you all in Belobog...

C: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。你有想过吗？如果你可以一直这样酷下去，那为什么还要变回去呢？
E: You make a cool grunting noise. Have you thought about why you'd ever change back if you can keep being this cool?

C: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
E: Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

C: 不用看，一拳秒了。
E: I'd easily finish him off with one punch.

C: 免礼，平身。
E: You may rise.

C: 我觉得应该告诉你。
E: I think it's only right to tell you.

C: 我也一样。现实里的我有着求而不得的愿望——它太过强烈，因此我诉诸梦境……
E: And it's likewise for me. I have a wish I want to achieve so badly in the real world, but I can't. So, I want to give it a shot here...

C: 呀…一上来就被逮到啦。
E: Drat... We're caught right away.

C: 他是不是有点入戏了？但总算能过去了……
E: Seems like he's taking this winning and losing thing a little too seriously... Well, at least we finally get to go through...

C: 我有点怕镜头的，别笑话我哦。来…你拿着吧。
E: I can be a little bit camera-shy — just don't laugh at me. Here, you hold the camera.

C: （说起来，要返回现实是不是得去酒店……）
E: (Come to think of it, I wonder if I have to go to the hotel to return to reality...)

C: 找不到…哪里都找不到…
E: Can't find you... Can't find you anywhere...

C: 嗯，看来您已经完成了契约……
E: Excellent. Looks like you've held up your side of the deal...

C: 再邪恶的桶也懂得吸取教训，你这招已经无效了！现在，感受我被囚禁了一万年——整整二十个五百年——的愤怒吧！
E: Even the vilest trashcan is capable of learning to heed a lesson. Your tactics are ineffective against me now! Now, feel my ten thousand years — five hundred years times twenty — of fury!

C: …也请这些闻风而来的好奇孩子打道回府吧。
E: ...wouldn't it be lovely if these nosy newcomers found their way back home?

C: 令使？谁的令使？
E: An Emanator? Whose?

C: 我…知道啦。
E: I... know.

C: 等到那时，那不敬爱神的外邦人便知道自己不过是凡人，要坠落到阴间去……
E: When that time comes, the heathen will realize they are but a mere mortal, doomed to descend into the netherworld.

C: 「我梦见一片焦土，一株破土而生的新蕊，它迎着朝阳绽放，向我低语呢喃。」
E: In my dream, I saw a scorched earth, and a new sapling emerging from it. It bloomed against the morning sun, and whispered to me.

C: 二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
E: You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will help you safely reach the floor right below this room.

C: 「我们」？她身边还有其他人吗？
E: "Let's"? Is there someone else?

C: 她说过，这场交易和「钟表匠」有关——涉及钟表匠，就会触碰许多人的底线。
E: She mentioned that this transaction involves the Watchmaker, and that often means stepping on many people's toes.

C: 你也发现了。像是有什么东西烧起来了……
E: You've noticed it too. Like something is burning...

C: 阿弗利特的死已成定局，而知更鸟…她的惨状就在眼前。下一位牺牲者会是谁？
E: Ifrit's death was a foregone conclusion, and Robin... her misfortune was staring right at her. Who will be the next to die?

C: 至于其他问题……
E: As for the other questions...

C: 你有注意到其他异常吗？
E: Have you noticed anything else unusual?

C: 那你应该也听说过那只{RUBY_B#「何物朝向死亡」}忆域迷因{RUBY_E#}了——我替你去找橡木家系打点关系的时候，他们正焦头烂额着呢。
E: Then you must have heard about the {RUBY_B#"Something Unto Death"}Memory Zone meme{RUBY_E#} — when I graciously deigned to establish connections with the Oak Family on your behalf, they were quite in a pitiful state of disarray.

C: 死者除了知更鸟，还有另一个。具体不清楚，只知道是个偷渡犯。
E: Besides Robin, there was another body. I don't know the exact details, just that it was a stowaway.

C: 拉帝奥，我现在可以确信，家族*内部*肯定有问题。等着瞧吧，那男人的妹妹死了…他坐不住的。
E: Ratio, I'm convinced now that there must be something wrong inside The Family. Just you wait and see, that man's sister has died. He can't sit on his hands.

C: 深不见底的梦…的确，但你误会了一件事。
E: A bottomless dream... Yes, that's right. But you've made one small mistake.

C: …罢了。在分别前，我可以再问你一个问题么？
E: ...That's it. Before we split, can I ask you one more thing?

C: 二人原路返回……
E: The two return on the path they came from...

C: 同时，他还指控了那位「巡海游侠」……
E: All the while accusing that Galaxy Ranger...

C: 我们也得谨慎处理和家族的距离，切不可走得太近。与公司合作不失为一种制衡的方法，一旦任何一方另有企图，我们都有机会抽身。
E: We also need to keep a certain distance from The Family — never let them get too close. Teaming up with the IPC helps balance that out — if either side makes a move, we have the option to pull out.

C: 得来全不费工夫。就是这只八音盒——泯灭帮收到的「邀请函」……
E: It's a cinch. This music box — the "invitation" received by the Annihilation Gang... There are latent memories that linger on it yet.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 「你是否来自茨冈尼亚的埃维金氏族？」
E: "Are you an Avgin from Sigonia?"

C: 若您同意协助家族，我会把我们对星核的研究成果如数奉上。您应该很清楚，除了家族，没有任何派系愿意分享这样的知识。
E: If you agree to assist The Family, I'll share our research findings on the Stellaron. You must be quite aware that, besides The Family, no other faction is willing to share such information.

C: 看来是不愿配合啊。不过，他们直接把长官在筑梦边境的事交代了……
E: Looks like they're not going to cooperate. But, they did at least tell us that the Captain is at Dream's Edge...

C: 两位，劳驾。猎犬家系正在前方调查，闲人免进。
E: Apologies. The Bloodhound Family is running an investigation up ahead. No unauthorized personnel allowed.

C: 我知道…这不是你的真心话。
E: I... know you don't really mean that.

C: 我们也很遗憾…
E: We are sorry too...

C: 关于「蓝调的时刻」…
E: About the Blue Hour...

C: 末了，她提议坐上舢板，在近海上继续我们的对谈。我答应了，同她一起登上小船，可她却再没说些什么，只是茫然地望了海天相接的尽头许久。
E: Finally, she suggested we continue our conversation on a boat in the shallows. I agreed, and boarded the boat with her, but she never said anything, her eyes absent-mindedly gazing at the horizon for what seemed like forever.

C: 我也曾踏上旅途，在不同的世界邂逅容貌相似的「故人」，目睹他们的命运行过似曾相识的轨迹。所以，我会告诉你……
E: I, too have embarked on journeys, encountering "old friends" with familiar faces on different worlds, witnessing their destinies follow paths similar to mine. So, I will tell you...

C: 老子有的是钱，小金毛。泛星系奴隶市场最不缺你这种自以为是的小屁孩。
E: I've got stacks on stacks, blondie. The slave market is never short of self-righteous brats like you.

C: 你也要做分发金衣的王子，在烈火中熔化自己的铅心吗？
E: So, are you trying to be the prince from the tale, handing out his gold-leaf garment and melting his lead heart in the fire?

C: …你什么意思？
E: ...What do you mean?

C: 这案子估计得谈上很久，我来为各位准备些合适的饮品——量身定制，不含酒精。
E: The discussion might take quite some time, so I'll prepare some customized, non-alcoholic drinks for you.

C: 好…如果你不答应，我就在这坐着，哪都不去。给我一杯带气泡的饮料。甜的，多加冰。
E: Fine... If you don't come along, I'll just sit here and not go anywhere else. Give me a sparkling drink, sweet, with extra ice.

C: 在那群衣冠禽兽送走米哈伊尔后，我在梦中的荒野风餐露宿。有人说，美梦连泥土都渗满了糖浆…呵，可我尝到的只有坚忍的苦涩。
E: After those despicables sent Mikhail away, I found myself lost in the wilderness of my dreams. They say that even the dirt here oozes with sweetness... Heh, all I tasted was stoic bitterness.

C: 它所蕴含的意象非常简单…这不过是美梦乐园真正的滋味，仅此而已。
E: The imagery it implies is pretty straightforward... It's just a glimpse of what this dream truly tastes like. Nothing more.

C: 嚯…阵仗够大啊。追捕嫌犯时都没见有这么卖力。
E: Heh... so many of them... I've never seen anything like this, even when they're tracking down suspects.

C: 这么说来，那位只有{NICKNAME}才能看见的钟表小子也令人在意…可惜那之后就没再遇见他了。
E: Speaking of which, that Clockie who only reveals himself to {NICKNAME} is quite intriguing... It's a shame we've never met him since then.

C: …当所有人都这么以为的时候，谁又会去怀疑，那是你精心设下的又一场圈套呢？
E: ...When everyone thinks this way, who would even suspect that it was another trap you've meticulously devised?

C: 软弱的人怎么会铤而走险？
E: How could a weak person take such daring risks?

C: 再见，卡卡瓦夏。
E: Farewell, Kakavasha.

C: 因为{M#他}{F#她}是唯一一名见证了三起命案的目击证人，能够证明「梦境中不存在伤亡」是一纸空谈的最佳人选！
E: Because {F#she}{M#he} is the only one who saw all three homicides. {F#She}{M#He} is the key to proving that The Family's "death does not exist in dreams" promise is nothing but a sham!

C: 让我说得更明白些吧：我会引爆你体内的星核，在匹诺康尼制造一场小小的*意外*……
E: Let me be a little clearer: I will detonate the Stellaron in you, and cause a teeny-tiny accident on Penacony...

C: 既然目的已经达成，我想你可以更坦诚些。
E: Now that you've accomplished your goal, I think you can be a little more forthcoming.

C: …钟表匠的遗产，真正的{RUBY_B#流放之地}「匹诺康尼」{RUBY_E#}。
E: Penacony — the Legacy of the Watchmaker, the true land of exile.

C: 我从不这么认为。你也一样。
E: I don't think this, and never have. Nor do you.

C: …祝你好运。
E: ...Good luck.

C: 「…欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，卡卡瓦夏。」
E: "...Welcome to this sad world, Kakavasha."

C: 「而我们，将在下一次『卡卡瓦』的极光下重逢。」
E: As for us, we will reunite in Kakava's next aurora.

C: 看我怎么说的，放心，我刚得到这消息的时候，反应和你一模一样。
E: That's what I said. Don't worry. When I first received the news, I had the exact same reaction as you.

C: 很高兴看见你平安无事，知更鸟小姐。
E: It's a relief to see you safe and sound, Miss Robin.

C: 美梦…也把你们赶出来了吗？我想回去…但又不想回去……
E: Did you also get kicked out of the beautiful dream? I want to go back... but then, I don't want to go back.

C: 如果你真打算下死手，倒也不必给我寒暄的机会…说出你的来意，「钟表匠」的走狗。
E: If you wanted to kill me, you wouldn't give me the chance to speak... Just tell me your demands, lackey of the Watchmaker.

C: 在匹诺康尼还被叫做「边陲监狱」的年代，是「开拓」将它和群星相连。他们都是拯救了阿斯德纳的英雄，名字理应被刻在岁月的丰碑，而不是这小小的石头上。
E: When Penacony was known as a frontier prison, it was the Trailblazers who connected it with the stars. They were the heroes who saved Asdana, and their names deserve to be immortalized — not just on this small stone tablet, but in the annals of history for all of time.

C: 结、结果我被猎犬家系的发现了，他们在到处抓我…我还想把孩子们都给接过来呢！都是我不好，都是我不好……
E: But, but, the Bloodhound Family got wind of it. They're on my tail... hunting me down... I thought I could bring my kids here! It was all my fault... all my fault...

C: 究其根本，倘若人们连生存都无法保证，更遑论那虚无缥缈的平等未来。只要世间尚存「自然选择」的法则…就注定会有坠落在地的雏鸟。
E: In the end, if people can't even secure their own survival, they won't care about the illusory future of equality. As long as the law of survival of the fittest prevails... there will always be fledglings crashing to their death.

C: 你也清楚，信仰「巡猎」的派系是银河里最惹不起的一帮人。任何一个神志清醒的家伙都不敢冒充仙舟联盟或巡海游侠，这完全是在找死……
E: As you know, the faction that follows the Path of The Hunt are some of the most dangerous folks in the Cosmos to mess with. I mean, who in their right mind would impersonate the Xianzhou Alliance or the Galaxy Rangers? It's like asking for a death wish...

C: 守望？不，我是在超度它们。
E: Watching over them? No, I'm guiding them toward transcendence.

C: 女士们先生们，欢迎来到热砂分会场！这里是挑战者的盛宴，逐梦客的华典，全宇宙目光聚集的中心！
E: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Scorchsand Hall! This is where challengers thrive and Dreamchasers shine, all under the watchful eye of the entire universe!

C: 嗯，大家好，我是来自星穹列车的无名客，姬子。这几位是我的同行者。
E: Mm, hello everybody, I'm Himeko, a Nameless from the Astral Express, and these are my companions.

C: 听好了，哈努兄弟。我知道你需要一把合适的武器，我也知道它就在楼上……
E: Listen closely, Hanu. I'm aware you're in need of a suitable weapon, and I also know there's one just upstairs...

C: 让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
E: Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.

C: 但在这样的「幸福」中，人们从未战胜苦难，也永远失去了战胜苦难的机会。换一种说法…这是「逃避」。
E: But in this supposed "bliss," people won't have defeated their demons. The chance to overcome their tribulations would be forever lost to them. In other words... it is an escape.

C: 小米沙，能和我们详细介绍一下那位米哈伊尔爷爷吗？
E: Could you tell us more about your grandpa Mikhail?

C: 可这么说，小米沙不是也能看见钟表小子？他们甚至是从小一起长大的好伙伴，可米沙还没有踏上「开拓」之道啊……
E: But Misha can see Clockie, too, right? They even grew up together, but Misha hasn't started the way of the Trailblaze yet...

C: 结束？米沙，这是什么意思？
E: This is where it ends? What do you mean, Misha?

C: 接下来，就该你们作出选择了。如果下定决心，就推开那扇门，走进一位老人长长的梦吧。
E: Now, it's time for you to make your choice. Once you've made up your mind, open that door and enter the long dream of an old man.

C: {RUBY_B#「同谐」希佩}那位星神{RUBY_E#}竟会在这种时候向匹诺康尼投来瞥视…是「开拓」的传承产生共鸣了么？还是说，各位的默契连星神都能打动？
E: I can't believe {RUBY_B#Xipe, the Harmony}that Aeon{RUBY_E#} would cast a glance at Penacony at a time like this... Is it because of the resonance from the legacy of the Trailblaze? Or perhaps the bond between you is so strong that it even impresses an Aeon?

C: 我们才要为自己选择埋骨之地。
E: We have to choose where we want to rest forever.

C: 「祂拾星环陈明法度，同人群立了行事的典章。」
E: "THEY used the planetary rings to establish the law, forging a code of conduct among the masses."

C: 秩序已死！秩序已死！秩序已死！
E: The Order is dead! The Order is dead! The Order is dead!

C: 「至此便是第一幕。盛燃的战火中，『边陲监狱』逐渐走向『流放之地』。」
E: "Thus concludes the first act. Amidst a raging war, the frontier prison headed toward becoming Land of the Exiles."

C: 让我来做个介绍吧。这位是波提欧，一位「巡海游侠」。
E: Allow me to introduce him to you: This is Boothill, a Galaxy Ranger.

C: 哎，等一下，「追缉某人」这我倒是第一次听说…你们追谁能追列车上啊？
E: Wait. Hold on a sec. This is the first time I'm hearing about this "certain person"... Who are you chasing, and why would that lead you to the Express?

C: 没关系，去吧。这里由我和姬子小姐出面就可以。
E: Not to worry. Himeko and I will take care of things.
Mm...

C: 理由很简单——<color=#dbc291ff>在家族这场盛大而浮华的梦里，只有你亲历了全程</color>。
E: The reason is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>In this grandiose and ostentatious dream of The Family's, only you personally experienced the entire course</color>.

C: 公司的意见聊完了？那轮到我们了。
E: Has the IPC finished sharing all its thoughts? Then it's our turn.

C: 接下来，大家各自挑选自己想要拜访的目的地吧。然后，我们进行投票表决。
E: Next up, everyone will select the destination that they wish to visit. And then, we'll put it to a vote.

C: 海洋星球露莎卡星。
E: Oceanic planet of Lushaka.

C: {NICKNAME}和丹恒的判断不错，我也投江户星一票。
E: {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng make good points. I'll throw in a vote for Edo Star too.

C: 因为这是一件随葬品，只有为巡海游侠立下赫赫战功的英雄才配拥有。当它的光芒出现在宇宙，也就意味着一颗巨星的陨落，而它落下的方向……
E: Because it's a burial artifact, worthy only of a hero who has served the Galaxy Rangers with honor. When its light illuminates the universe, it means the fall of a hero, and in the direction it falls...

C: 不要辜负她的意志。这不是说我们此行必须赢下所有，而是我们的决心，应当与那位勇敢的女孩相配。
E: We mustn't fail her determination. I'm not implying that we must win this fight no matter what, but our resolve should match that of the courageous lady.

C: 哦，还有你从「开拓」朋友那儿收到的那段录音，它已经是这场赌桌上价值最高的筹码了。
E: Remember the recording you received from your Trailblaze friend? It's now the most valuable chip in this game.

C: 嗯，一定！
E: Yeah, you bet!

C: 家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
E: The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.

C: …哼唧！哼唧，哼唧哼唧！
E: ...Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 也许这就是我内心深处的渴望，当意识到这点时…我就知道它并不真实了。
E: Perhaps this could be a deep-seated desire inside me, and upon realizing this... I... I knew it wasn't real.

C: 你看上去好像还有些疑问。
E: It seems like you have other questions.

C: 那孩子下定决心要做的事，谁也阻拦不了——连命运都不行。至少现在他还活着，这已经是最好的结果。
E: Once that kid sets his mind to something, nothing can stop him, not even fate. Well, at least he's still alive, and that's the best outcome.

C: （那位是…知更鸟？原来她也在「晖长石号」上。）
E: (Is that... Robin? She's also here, on the Radiant Feldspar.)

C: 点到为止，对彼此都好，如果你觉得这还不够——让匹诺康尼上市的另一个目的，无非是想进一步扩大盛会之星的影响力，吸引更多宾客前来挥霍。
E: It benefits us if we both take a step back. And if that's not enough for you, I'm pretty sure that another goal of making Penacony go public is to expand the influence of the Planet of Festivities and attract more customers.

C: 嗯？尽管问吧。
E: Hmm? Go ahead.

C: 去过了。
E: Yeah, sure.

C: 那人看着精神不太稳定…
E: Seriously, they look like a total lunatic...

C: 你们刚才到底在聊什么？
E: What were you guys chatting about?

C: 我们有缘再见，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
E: May fate bring us together again, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: <size=28>四——</size>
E: <size=28>Four...</size>

C: 如果你想打倒我，那你就不得不面对「花火大人的狗」了——它们是我忠心耿耿的好伙伴，你可敌不过它们！
E: If you wish to defeat me, you'll have to face off against the great Sparkle's dogs — they're my fiercely loyal companions, and you'll never defeat them!

C: 让我试试你的斤两！
E: Let's see what you've got!

C: …好吧，其实根据剧情需要，你现在只能说一句话，所以还是拜托你尽量克制一下畅所欲言的冲动。
E: ...Well, actually, due to current plot requirements, you're only allowed to say one line. So, please try and resist the urge to share your thoughts.

C: 但别难过！我还为你准备了一份好礼——一枚梦泡——记录了我和一位美丽忆者的生死时速！如果你还没看过，那就快去找爱德华医生吧。
E: But don't fret! I've also prepared a gift for you — a dream bubble that has the thrilling life-and-death moments I shared with a beautiful Memokeeper! If you haven't seen it yet, you should hurry up and look for Dr. Edward.

C: 至于你要的虚数中子弹…呃，别打岔，我知道你根本没提过这五个字…那个炸弹不在这里啾！恐怕你只能到别处看看了啾。
E: As for that imaginary neutron bomb you want... Uh, don't interrupt me. I know you never mentioned those three words to me before... Well, the bomb isn't here, tweet! I'm afraid you'll have to look elsewhere for it.

C: 二十七分五十二秒…二十七分五十一秒……
E: Twenty-seven minutes fifty-two seconds... Twenty-seven minutes fifty-one seconds...

C: 其实…也不是完全没办法。
E: Actually... there might be another way.

C: 等待谐乐大典开始
E: Wait for the Charmony Festival to start

C: 校园果然对年轻人充满吸引力啊。
E: Campus life...

C: 好了，我们去办理入住吧。
E: Alright, let's go check in.

C: 可是犯人……
E: But... the suspect...

C: 最出圈的就是那首《睡蕉之歌》——蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: The most popular one is the Slumbernana Song. ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 哇——这里真的是学校吗？看起来比影视乐园还豪华啊！
E: Wow! Is this really a school? It looks grander than the theme park!

C: 这位同学有所不知，校庆期间大部分老师都在参加学术研讨，校长就委托美梦剧团来填补师资空缺了蕉。
E: Most of the teachers are attending the academic conference during the school's anniversary. That's why the dean asked the Sweet Dreams Troupe to be substitute teachers, bana.

C: 哎，别闹别闹，人家找的是我！
E: Hey, stop messing around! She was looking for me!

C: 真没想到能和你这样的大人物当同学，我敢打赌，你一定会被分到「谐乐学院」的！
E: I never thought I'd go to the same school with someone famous. I bet you'll be assigned to the Charmony Academy!

C: <size=36>真的假的？！</size>
E: <size=36>Seriously!?</size>

C: 做好准备了吗，我一定会为你们找到最合适的角色。
E: Are you ready? I will surely find the perfect role for you.

C: 财富学院。
E: Fortune Academy.

C: 啊…真是美味的甜品，越吃越香，好像吃不饱一样……
E: Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. It gets better with every bite. It's like I can't get enough.

C: 我就不穿，你能咋地？
E: I don't wanna wear one, so there!

C: 银什么？
E: Silver who now?

C: 邪忍一日不灭，需要我等忍侠出手的险情便日出不穷。在下造访毗乃昆尼，正是为了狩猎一匹恶徒。
E: So long as the Evil Ninja still lives, danger that requires the presence of us Ninja Heroes will never cease. The reason I visit Pinecany is to hunt down one such scoundrel.

C: 他带领邪祟为害四方，是忍之都的仇寇，亦是在下的死敌——「御猿•邪忍」是也！
E: He wreaks havoc across the universe with his fiendlings in tow. He is the enemy of the Ninja Capital and my archenemy — Evil Ninja Osaru.

C: 虽然睡蕉社从不禁止对于小猴的二次创作，但哪种类型是完全不应该尝试的？
E: Although the Slumbernana Association has never banned any derivative works inspired by Slumbernana, what kind of derivative works should you refrain from creating?

C: 时间紧迫，我就免去繁文缛节了。
E: We're in a race against time, so I'll dispense with the formalities.

C: 演艺活动我也举办过不少，这次可以说是最特别的那一档。真的能够奏效吗？
E: I've hosted several acting gigs in the past, but this is the most unusual of the lot. Will it really work?

C: 暴力开启
E: Open it with violence

C: 那个…你还是叫我三月七吧，这网名起的有点潦草了，别用啦。
E: Um... I came up with that name on the fly, so let's forget about it. Just call me March!

C: 蕉师，客户最大！客户最大！
E: Psst, BananAdvisor! "The customer is always right!"

C: 咳咳，失态了——同学们，大家可能对财富学院的新产品有些误会。
E: Ahem, pardon me... My dear students, you may have some misunderstanding about Fortune Academy's new product.

C: 我答应了令尊，会给你同样的幸福。富贵，是时候休息一下了蕉。
E: I assured your father that you'll get to be happy like him. It's time for you to rest, Richie.

C: 谐乐蕉师一定也会露出破绽，小心行事。
E: Charmony BananAdvisor is bound to slip up like the others. Exercise caution.

C: 你慢慢跟她解释吧。我先自己转一圈。
E: Yada yada, tell her my life story then. I'm gonna go check the place out.

C: 蕉…蕉蕉……
E: Bana... Bana bana...

C: 蕉蕉蕉……
E: Bana bana bana...

C: 然而波提欧给出的回应，还是远远地超出了她的想象——
E: However, Boothill's response is far beyond her expectations —

C: 苦茶大师……
E: Master Kucha...

C: 此地就是阵眼所在。依大师所言，缭乱•忍法能遮蔽邪忍的阵法。
E: This is where the matrix core is. According to Master, Dazzling Ninjutsu can overwrite the Evil Ninja's matrix.

C: 乱破，试炼已经结束了，你走吧。
E: Rappa, this trial is over. You should go.

C: 忍之都外的空气，原来是这种味道。
E: So....... this.... is how the air outside the Ninja Capital..... actually... smells like.

C: CUT——绝妙，绝妙！{NICKNAME}演员，日后你定能成为如我一般的大导演。
E: And, CUT—! Fabulous, absolutely fabulous! Actor {NICKNAME}, you'll surely become a director as great as me in the future!

C: 乱破同学，你的「忍•科学」还没完成吗？
E: Rappa, are you not done with your ninja tech yet?

C: 嗯？你不知道吗，这是现在最流行的{RUBY_B#梗}模因{RUBY_E#}。源自芮克先生的新作《银河忍法帖》！
E: Hmm? Don't you know, this is the most popular {RUBY_B#mimeme}meme{RUBY_E#} right now. It originated from Mr. Reca's latest work, the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!

C: 列车组由此深入事件核心。在这里，加拉赫向众人讲述了梦境、星核以及米哈伊尔等无名客的真相。众人终于寻得「开拓」的遗产，更因此蒙受「同谐」瞥视。
E: The Express Crew thus delves into the heart of the situation. Here, Gallagher reveals to everyone the truths about the dreamscape, the Stellaron, Mikhail, and the other Nameless. They finally uncover the legacy of the Trailblaze and, in doing so, receive a glimpse from the Harmony.

C: †能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>†
E: †Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak>†

C: 大家来这边。
E: Over here, everyone.

C: 有动静！散开，准备——
E: It's opening up! Move aside and get ready —

C: 圣女…？
E: The Holy Maiden...?

C: 星神？
E: An Aeon?

C: 还有这聒噪的声音…它响起时，心中的杀意便难以遏制。
E: And that horrible noise... I can hardly suppress my bloodlust when it sounds.

C: 我不会问这一切因何而起，也不会如你所说，伤你分毫。
E: I won't ask how this happened, nor will I hurt you like you said.

C: 但既然你想一战，那就来吧，泰坦——让我再度以死运为你合拢双眼。
E: If it's a fight you're looking for, then you will get one, Titan. I will put you to rest once more with my curse of immortality.

C: …只是，这小玩意确实十分易碎。我打算回去后稍作加工，把它缝装到羊毛毡里，这样缇安大人再活泼也不用担心打碎它了。
E: Still, this trinket is admittedly rather fragile. I will have to make some adjustments and stitch it onto wool felt to protect it. That way, no matter how much Lady Trianne runs around, it won't break easily.

C: 看来大家都解开心结了。阿格莱雅女士，你托我照顾的伤者也都已痊愈，我也该动身啦。
E: Well, it looks like everything's sorted out now! The patients have also all recovered. I think it's time for me to head back, Lady Aglaea.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 应该还有办法。我只是…有些惊讶。
E: There should still be a way in. I'm just... a little surprised.

C: 你也吓我一跳！
E: Whoa, that scared me too!

C: 平白又为你添了辛劳，风堇。
E: Thank you again, Hyacine, for your hard work.

C: 既然是命运三泰坦的造物，那说不定能借{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眼睛找到窍门……
E: Since this door is a creation of the Three Titans of Fate, maybe the eyes of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} will help me find a way to open it...

C: 因为我的计算纤悉无遗。我还知道各位已发现树庭因黑潮遭难，更误以为学者们已经全军覆没。
E: That's because my precise calculations account for every possibility. I also know that you have already discovered the cause of the calamity at the Grove — the black tide — and that you mistakenly believe that the scholars have been wiped.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「智种学派」的那刻夏尚未死灭，吾已将其救下，如今正在启蒙王座好生休养…</color>如何，可算满意否？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Anaxa the Nousporist is still alive. I saved him, and he is now recuperating at the Luminary Throne...</color> So, are you satisfied with my answers?

C: 正是。新灵感的火花每每在树庭中迸发，露水便会自此垂落，落入池中。
E: Indeed. When the sparks of inspiration burst forth within the Grove, dewdrops fall and land within the pool.

C: 呵呵，哪里的话。一根绳上，两只蚂蚱罢了。
E: Heh, you're overthinking things. We're all in the same boat.

C: 嘿嘿，不仅如此：阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
E: Heh heh, also, the spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...

C: 那我们…要怎么证明？
E: But how are we... going to prove it?

C: …就在台阶上。
E: There... On the steps.

C: 嗅嗅…会有记忆的气息吗？
E: I wonder if I'll find any memories.

C: 打通了！大家，跑快点，小小咪已经烫得跳起来了！
E: It's connected! Let's hurry! Memmy is already bouncing around due to the heat!

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 这就是我心中<color=#dbc291ff>最深的恐惧</color>。
E: Therein lies my <color=#dbc291ff>deepest fear</color>.

C: 大言不惭！你，还有悬锋诸王，你们的每一顶王冠，哪个不是从父辈的尸身摘得……
E: Enough with your words! Among all the kings of Kremnos, which one did not inherit the crown only after plucking it from the lifeless body of his father?

C: 多关心下你自己吧，救世主。除去自报家门的场合，你也从不提及故乡。
E: Worry about yourself first, Deliverer. You also never mention your hometown apart from when you need to introduce yourself.

C: …我曾经的战友们。
E: ...My old comrades.

C: …好重的热气，平时有这么热吗？
E: ...The air's really hot and heavy. Has it always been like this?

C: 可悲的「救世主」，不过如此。
E: This is all you can do, huh? Pitiable "Deliverer."

C: 听闻噩耗，第一反应竟然是……
E: This is the first thing you ask after hearing of his passing...?

C: …我只是好奇，为何{NICKNAME}阁下能不被我的力量影响？
E: ...I'm curious why you weren't affected by my power, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

C: …看来你受的打击不小。
E: ...It seems you took things pretty hard.

C: 不久后……
E: Moments later...

C: 既然这样，就让「缇安」和他们并肩作战吧！
E: In that case, let "Trianne" fight by their side!

C: 发明…我的？它有什么用？
E: I... invented it? What does it do?

C: 时间…恐怕已经所剩无几了。
E: There isn't much time left.

C: 当然，你只有在别有企图时，才会这么拐弯抹角。
E: Of course. You only beat around the bush when you have a hidden agenda.

C: 小家伙，你能办到吗？
E: Can you do it, little one?

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}阁下，如今奥赫玛内忧外患，又将你推上浪尖。
E: I apologize for tasking you to spearhead the plan once again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, but Okhema is currently beset by enemies from within and without.

C: 你也该做好准备了。
E: You should prepare yourself as well.

C: 站起来，孩子！你打得很勇敢，今天的训练就到这里。
E: Get up, my son! You showed great courage in today's training. Let's wrap it up for now.

C: 但她会在每个夜晚出现，等候在朦胧的火光中。我始终在等待梦的后续，以为她一定还会留下更多嘱托，或者指引……
E: Yet each night, she would show up, waiting by the flickering firelight. I always anticipated the sequel to that dream, believing she had more words of wisdom or guidance to offer...

C: 跟从您的指引。
E: Enlighten us with your guidance.

C: 请你一定要当上王…
E: You must become king...

C: 「宁战死，毋荣归」——我生而为悬锋人，何时惧怕过死亡？
E: "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return." As a Kremnoan, I know not the fear of death.

C: 那就拜托两位了。
E: I'll leave it to you two, then.

C: 我的好孩子…明天，妈妈就会回来。
E: Tomorrow, my sweet child. I'll be back tomorrow.

C: 这时候她应该还没成为半神吧。
E: She hadn't become a demigod yet.

C: 它更接近*我们*心中的答案。
E: It's closer to the answer within our heart.

C: 虽说记忆会模糊历史，可看这满城追缉的样子，怎么也不像是有盟友……
E: While history might be blurred by memories, seeing how the whole city is hunting her down, she clearly had no allies...

C: 但她知道，肯定会有一天，会有人回到这里，翻开尘封的记忆。
E: Yet, she knew that one day, someone would return to unveil this dust-covered memory.

C: 你听：在这片土地上，每一个时刻，每一个角落，都有人在期待这道预言兑现。
E: Listen. In every corner of this land, every heartbeat carries a prayer for that prophecy to come true.

C: 注意安全，圣女。
E: Holy Maiden, please take care.

C: 「嚯嗬嗬嗬，论妆点晖长石号的装饰品，还有什么能比号称可以实现一切愿望的杯子更加气派！」
E: "Hohohoho! What better decoration for the Radiant Feldspar than a cup said to grant any wish? Talk about grandeur!"

C: 可别把我说得像是什么灾难警报装置啊！你知道「圣杯战争」吧？广告到处都是，匹诺康尼没人不知道吧？
E: Hey now, don't go makin' me sound like some kind of walking disaster siren! You've heard of the Holy Grail War, right? The ads are everywhere. Nobody in Penacony could've missed it.

C: 随时可以拍摄！我的制片人！
E: Ready to roll, producer!

C: 现在应该安全了，御主。你没受伤吧？
E: It's safe now, Master. Are you hurt?

C: 斯科特专员！你可没说过对手实力有这么强啊？
E: Specialist Skott! You never said the enemy was this strong!

C: 与此同时，流梦礁
E: In the meantime, at Dreamflux Reef.

C: 御主…你到底在说什么啊？既然没有托付圣杯的愿望，又为何要接受令咒，踏入召唤阵，将我召来此处？
E: Master... what exactly are you saying? If you no longer have a wish to entrust to the Holy Grail, why did you accept the Command Spell, step into the summoning circle, and call me here?

C: 同时，我也不得不请各位小憩片刻……直到奥帝先生完成仪式为止。
E: And I must insist that every one of you take a break as well... until Mr. Oti finishes the ritual.

C: 你的愿望，只有圣杯能实现…
E: The only thing that can grant your wish would be the Holy Grail...

C: 哼，我刚来的时候，也跟你一样觉得自己特牛特了不起。
E: Hmph. Look. I thought I was pretty impressive too when I first arrived.

C: 太对了，哥。
E: Right on, bro!

C: 呦，{F#姐们儿}{M#小哥}，如果你也是来这里偷懒的，这儿已经满员了。
E: Hey, {M#buddy.}{F#lass.} If you're here to slack off, you're a bit too late. This place is already at full capacity.

C: 这样啊，有困难的话，找艾丝妲聊聊吧，相信她会帮你解决的。
E: Oh, I see... If things are tough, you could always talk to Asta. She's sure to help you out.

C: 所以，你想登上星穹列车？
E: So, do you want to board the Astral Express?

C: 我嘛…只是经历了一次久违的重逢罢了。
E: Me? I had... a long-awaited reunion.

C: 我只想把几小时前没办到的事继续做下去——鱼头我已经看厌了，这愿望落空的、不甘心的、老不死的头，那才叫上等的战利品呢！
E: I just wanna finish what I didn't get to do a few hours ago. I'm sick and tired of fish heads — The head of this old desperate fogey with broken dreams is what I'd call a real trophy!

C: 噗…哼哼，哈哈哈哈哈哈——
E: Pfft... Hehehe, hahahahahaha—

C: 咳咳，告别的时候，精神分析什么的就免了吧。还有，论及衣品，咱们两个彼此彼此啊，「人类的守护者」！
E: Ahem, let's skip the last-minute psychoanalysis, alright? And when it comes to fashion... You're not much better than me, "Guardian of Humanity."

C: 如果我的存在能偶尔为你照亮前路…那真是再好不过了。
E: If my existence can occasionally light the way forward for you... that would be more than I could hope for.

C: 御主，替我向未来的你问好。
E: Master, please send my regards to the person you will become in the future.

C: 在心中默念愿望。
E: Make a silent wish.

C: 那我的出场费呢？
E: What about my appearance fee?

C: 别喊了，在见面之前我盘算过许多可能，不过没想到，现场的情况却是最离谱的那个……
E: They aren't coming. I went through a lot of possibilities in my head before we got here, but I never expected to face the most ridiculous of them all...

C: 哎，和这样的家伙对战，真是毫无荣誉可言。
E: Ugh, fighting someone like this? There's no honor in it.

C: 不仅没能保护御主，被迫分散，甚至还要敌人来亲自营救我，我——
E: I failed to protect my Master, was forced to separate from her... and now, to make matters worse, it's the enemy who came to save me. I—I am...

C: 我知道你有很多话想说，但为了不破坏小小哈努行动的设定，你只能发出一声非常急切的*哼*。
E: I know you have a lot to say, but to preserve the integrity of Hanu's Adventure, all you can do is let out a very urgent *hmph*.

C: 你接着演，看我信不信。
E: Keep up your act. Let's see if I fall for it.

C: 给你个建议。趁我还没离开，用令咒杀死我，就像过去那些随意摆弄我的命运的家伙。
E: Here's some advice: While I'm still here, use a Command Spell to kill me — just like all those others who toyed with my fate.

C: 在你这样的人眼中，变节永远是个选择题，而不是是非题。
E: For someone like you, betrayal is always an option to consider, not a moral absolute.

C: 你竟敢——
E: How dare you...

C: 你被丢弃在荒野，行将就木的时候，是我为你指明生路，带你逃离死地。
E: When you were abandoned in the wild and near your end, I showed you a way to survive and helped you escape the jaws of death.

C: 那你远远望一眼不就得了。
E: Can't you just look back on it from a distance?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>「不可对鸟类态度恶劣。」</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Be kind to birds."</color>

C: 你将好看的垃圾放入了桶内以示重视，一转眼，桶中多出了更多好看的垃圾——真是聚宝盆原理的一种错误应用。
E: You insert Pleasant-Looking Trash into the bin as a sign of consideration, and in the blink of an eye, more Pleasant-Looking Trashes emerge — what an inappropriate application of the Horn of Plenty concept.

C: 哪有惊梦剧团，躲起来了？
E: The Dreamjolt Troupe? Where? Are they hiding or something?

C: 唔…啧…呼……这倒真是怪梦啊…梦着自己在大街上走了……
E: Nngh... Tsk... Phew... I'm... walking on the street...? What a weird dream...

C: 事先说好，咱们可都看着你呢，如果想拿停云小姐当人质——
E: Before you start, you should know we're keeping our eyes on you. If you even think about taking Miss Tingyun hostage—

C: 没进流梦礁，没事。
E: It's okay. You didn't end up in Dreamflux Reef.

C: 小女子说完了，希望没有耽误太多时间，我们接着上路吧。
E: Alright. No more questions. I hope I didn't take up too much of your time. Let's continue on our way.

C: 我暂交给岩明代为打理了。你也了解他的为人，不必担心。只是此人办事作风总有些激进，恐怕不太符合你一贯的行商原则。
E: I've left Yanming in charge for now. He's reliable, but he can be a bit extreme, and might not always follow your principles as a traveling merchant.

C: 为什么？
E: Why's that?

C: 麻烦您了。第一块拼图，我希望它是星空的一部分。
E: Thank you anyway. I expect the first jigsaw piece will be a part of the starry sky.

C: 为了启程。我向来认为，一个人的起点应当是他的终点。
E: Prepare for my departure. I've always believed that a person's starting point should also be his last stop.

C: 而对于「同谐」，我的态度大体相同。你也好，命途也罢，如果我曾经质疑乃至抗拒的事物，偏偏是我今后要倚仗的力量……
E: As for the Harmony, my stance remains the same. Whether it's you or the Paths, if what I once doubted — or even opposed — becomes the force I must rely on in the future...

C: 你也是我「开拓」的对象之一。
E: You are one of my Trailblazing goals.

C: 不过这次情况特殊，在做出决定前，{NICKNAME}，我想先听听你的意见。
E: But this time is a bit different. Before making any decision, {NICKNAME}, I want to hear what you think.

C: 我们可以成为朋友。
E: We can be friends.

C: 不过，在查明原因前，我建议三月七小姐不要贸然接近翁法罗斯。
E: Before we identify the cause, my suggestion is for Miss March to avoid venturing anywhere near Amphoreus.

C: 放心吧，通常都能在当地找到值得信赖的伙伴。
E: Not to worry, we have a knack for finding trustworthy friends wherever we go.

C: 你肯定也跟我一样好奇吧：那么，接下来会发生什么？
E: I bet you're as curious as I am. So! What's going to happen next?

C: 呃，黑塔女士…从狭间外面传进来的声音，您最好听听……
E: Um, Madam Herta... I think you'll want to listen to the voices from beyond this space...

C: 呵…说得也是。
E: Heh... I guess you're right.

C: 不，想都别想。
E: Nope, ain't no way.

C: 你大可言语相告，而不是用如此极端的方式。
E: A civil approach gets your message across all the same.

C: 一点都不稳妥——两位陌生的朋友，请放松放松再放松。大家都是人类，没必要弄得剑拔弩张。
E: How is this safe!? Hello, friendly strangers! Let's all simmer down and cool our jets. We're all humans here. No need for things to get so heated.

C: {M#没人觉得我俩像兄弟吗？}{F#怎么感觉你和我有点像…}
E: {M#Does no one else think we look like brothers?}{F#Why do I feel like you and I are kind of alike...}

C: 黄金裔大人，感谢你们的照拂，但请允许人们为自己选择命运。
E: I appreciate the concern, esteemed Chrysos Heir. But please respect that we have the right to choose our own fate.

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 翁法罗斯的旧神，人类曾经的信仰，如今的敌人。
E: The ancient gods of Amphoreus, once worshiped by humanity, they now stand as their foes.

C: （小心地）骑乘大地兽。
E: Carefully ride the dromas.

C: 嗯，不是幻觉。
E: Yes, it's not an illusion.

C: 这种日子什么时候是个头……
E: When will days like these finally come to an end...

C: 我们解决了一些敌人。
E: We took care of some enemies.

C: 白、白厄阁下！你终于来了，快救救大工匠，他被敌人围住了——
E: L—Lord Phainon! You're finally here. Quick, save the Grand Craftsman! He's surrounded by enemies—

C: 我可以让它安息。
E: I have the power to lay them to rest.

C: 嗯…也有只凭气息难以压制的敌人。
E: Hmm... There are also some enemies who are difficult to subdue by presence alone.

C: 灵水会为你诠释，<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的前世今生。</color>
E: The spirit water shall show you <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus' distant and recent past</color>.

C: ——曾经统治世界的泰坦众神，如今已成为腐蚀翁法罗斯的病因。某种<color=#dbc291ff>不可知的力量</color>改变了它们中的多数，招引来愤怒和疯狂。
E: The pantheon of Titans that once ruled our world has become the very affliction that eats away at Amphoreus. <color=#dbc291ff>An unfathomable power</color> changed something within most of these Titans, inducing their rage and madness.

C: 喔，是没见过的机型，但难不倒我。是这里吧？还有这里…哈！轻轻松松，我已经完全理解了……
E: Oh, this is an entirely foreign make. But that's not going to stop me! I'm guessing this here... and that... Hah! Easy-peasy, I know how to use this now.

C: 总觉得有些奇怪…
E: That was a little strange...

C: 没想到白厄还有这种爱好……
E: I never thought that Phainon had such a hobby...

C: 搞定——二位请看！
E: Got it! Please take a look!

C: …我心里只有美丽的幻想和诗歌！喔，粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
E: ...I only have beautiful fantasies and poems in my heart! Oh, Rosy Celestial Maiden, the light of Okhema...

C: 这是什么？看上去像是匹诺康尼的服装店里才会有的人台。
E: What's this? It looks like one of those mannequins in the clothing stores of Penacony.

C: 嗯…下来散散心。
E: Yeah... I came out to clear my mind.

C: 长了张狮子的脸，却软弱得像只丧魂的鬣狗。
E: The face of a lion but the courage of a soulless hyena.

C: 两位，这边这边！等你们好久啦。
E: Hey, over here! We've been waiting for quite some time.

C: 阿格莱雅女士，我们因疏漏大意打破了约定，这点无法否认。但你从未说明泄露「天外之界」可能导致的恶果。
E: Lady Aglaea, it is undeniable that we broke our agreement out of carelessness. However, you never explained to us how revealing that a world beyond the sky exists would lead to dire consequences.

C: 金色的丝线平静如初。
E: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

C: …等一下！故事可不该结束得如此匆忙啊。
E: ...Wait! This story can't end just like that.

C: 无论你们作何选择，黄金裔都会继续奔赴神谕中的宿命。
E: Regardless of your choice, the Chrysos Heirs will continue to follow the path in the prophecy.

C: 我做决定？真的假的？
E: You're letting me make the decision? Seriously?

C: 阿雅啊…你有没有发现……
E: Agy... Have you noticed...

C: …碎了。迷失。想要…完整。
E: ...Broken. Lost. Want... complete.

C: …万敌，你会觉得可惜吗？自己没有活在那个强者如云的年代。若非往日的英雄一一凋零，我也不会是你唯一的对手。
E: Kind of a shame you didn't live in that era full of strong warriors, eh Mydei? If all the heroes of the past hadn't fallen one after another, I wouldn't be the only worthy opponent you have left.

C: 终于能看见流窜的士兵了。
E: We'll finally see some soldiers roaming about.

C: 我和丹恒也还没弄清楚。
E: Dan Heng and I haven't figured that out yet either.

C: 靠一场比试决定荣耀的归属，不是敬神的表现。你我胜负未分，继续吧——
E: Deciding who gets the glory with just one competition might be disrespectful to the gods. Let us declare no victor and continue on—

C: 燥热不堪。杂念也在脑海里滋生……
E: The heat is unbearable, and all these thoughts are echoing in my head...

C: 不止命多，而且命大——我都快妒忌你了。
E: You practically have nine lives and, on top of that, you're lucky? I'm almost jealous.

C: 缇宝大人…该如何让{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}回应我们的呼唤，你有什么建议吗？
E: High Priest Tribbie... Do you have any suggestions on how we can get {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to respond to us later?

C: 记忆。你的。窥探？好奇。
E: Memories. Yours. Look into? Curious.

C: 辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。你没有受伤，我很欣慰。
E: Thanks for your hard work, {NICKNAME}. I'm very glad that you're not hurt.

C: 我是怎么加入你们的？
E: How did I join you guys?

C: 我为什么会在这里…
E: Why am I here?

C: 该收尸了……
E: It's time to clean up...

C: 我会跟在{NICKNAME}身边，保护{M#他}{F#她}的安全。
E: I'll stay with {NICKNAME} to ensure {M#his}{F#her} safety.

C: （在悲剧酿成前，要用金线缝补裂口。）
E: (The rift must be sewn shut with golden thread before disaster occurs.)

C: <size=28>…开溜！！！</size>
E: <size=28>...Run!!</size>

C: 呵…不必假装，你早就发现我的眼线了吧？
E: Drop the act. You noticed my informants a long time ago, didn't you?

C: 我也想看看，你这事事皆要亲力亲为的行事风格能坚持多久…呵呵。
E: I'm quite interested to see how long you can stick with this hands-on way of doing things... heh.

C: 「王储」？「黄金裔」？笑话！
E: Crown prince? Chrysos Heir? What a joke!

C: 要坚定，{NICKNAME}阁下…想想白厄和万敌，我们也要拿出同样的决心。
E: Have faith, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei are still fighting. We must match their unwavering resolve.

C: 那些突出地面的机关，是要我们想办法激活它们？
E: And those mechanisms protruding from the ground... Should we attempt to activate them?

C: 牺牲者的灵魂还在这大厅里彷徨…无意义的牺牲令他们蒙受冤屈，悲嚎不绝于耳。
E: The souls of the sacrificed are still wandering this hall... I hear their endless bemoaning, their senseless deaths have left them wronged, their mournful wails echo endlessly.

C: 我来拖住它吧。对于已经失去理智的眷属，死亡的气息就是能令它们沉醉的蜜霜。
E: I'll find a way to stall it. To Titankin that have lost all reason, death is as intoxicating as nectar is to bees.

C: 「勇气。」
E: "Courage."

C: 挣脱束缚，回归神躯吧。
E: Break free from your shackles and return to your divine body.

C: 不要嫌恶你的天赋，不要憎恨死亡。<color=#dbc291ff>征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，皆因万物终有逝去之时。</color>
E: Do not detest your talent and do not abhor death. <color=#dbc291ff>Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust.</color>

C: （回去见吾师吧。）
E: (I should go find teacher.)

C: …不必勉强。
E: ...Don't push yourself.

C: 火种——跟我走吧。创世涡心在等待你的回归。
E: Come with me then, Coreflame. The Vortex of Genesis is awaiting your return.

C: 很好。
E: Very good.

C: 万敌，你刚才说的「担忧」，指的是……
E: Mydei, what do you mean when you said you were "worried"?

C: 城中仍有不少雅努萨波利斯的祭司，以及他们的后裔。若别无选择，我会在这些人中征集适格者。
E: There are still many priests of Janusopolis and their descendants in the city. If I'm left with no other option, I'll try to find someone worthy among them.

C: 我相信大家的判断。
E: I trust you all to make the right call.

C: *我们*能感受到，试炼的狭间正在关闭。它的灵魂残存无多，必须在其彻底消逝前完成仪式。
E: We can feel the space of the trial closing. As there isn't much of their soul left, we'll have to complete the ceremony before their soul completely dissipates.

C: 告诉我，是哪位泰坦在统治此地？我该如何找到它？
E: Tell me, which Titan reigns over this land and how do I find them?

C: 呵，阿那克萨戈拉斯？我本以为你也跟着其他学者一道，死在那黑潮里了。
E: Hah, Anaxagoras? I thought that you had died to the black tide, just like the other scholars.

C: 你说得对，老师。我也该开始新的人生了。
E: You're right, teacher. It's time for me to start a new life.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>但愿你我皆能不辱使命，带领世人重返那没有「死亡」、「纷争」和「诡计」的黄金治世。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>May the both of us carry out our duties with honor and lead the masses back toward the Era Chrysea, a golden age with no Death, Strife, or Trickery.</color>

C: 再给我些时间。
E: I need some more time.

C: 不，应该是两枚。毕竟……
E: No, more like two Coreflames. After all...

C: 你当然没有理由，但凯妮斯有。谁能掌握{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种，谁就能掌握奥赫玛……
E: You may not, but Caenis has. Whoever gets hold of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame will get to rule over Okhema...

C: …说吧。
E: ...Go on.

C: 您还远没有衰老到那种地步，还有许多岁月可活……
E: You're not that old yet... You still have many, many years ahead of you...

C: 只有在彻悟这个道理后，你才能好好活下去。
E: You can only live your life to the fullest after understanding this principle.

C: 各位，别像只炸了毛的猫嘛，我也没那么恐怖吧，喵？
E: So, relax, you two! No need to get your hackles up. I'm not that scary, am I? Meow!

C: 这样吧！不如先让我替你收着这一屋子宝贝，咱俩来打个赌吧？
E: Tell you what, why don't I take this room of treasures as a security deposit and we make a bet?

C: 阁下…是我。
E: ...It's me.

C: 也许我们都还能抢救一下。
E: Perhaps all of us can still use some CPR.

C: 复读机？
E: Echo?

C: 小蝶…还是想创造一个没有「死亡」的世界吗？
E: Cas... Are you still trying to create a world without "Death"?

C: 说来话长…我们是来此觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的。
E: It's a long story... We're here to seek an audience with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

C: *远方传来的巨大轰鸣*
E: *A massive roar in the distance*

C: 那大概便是炼金术士口中的冥界之怒。他该有多么可怕，一定比你见到过的任何事物都更面目可憎，都更……
E: That is probably the wrath of the nether realm, as spoken of by the alchemists. How terrifying must it be? It must be more hideous than anything you've ever encountered, more...

C: 那黑潮…无穷无尽。我的死亡…只是临时。
E: That black tide... is endless. My death... is only temporary.

C: …已经牺牲了吗？
E: ...Dead?

C: 真是…太辛苦了。
E: It must have been... very tough for you.

C: 啊，人家也听到了！所以那是？
E: Ah, I heard them too! So, what are those?

C: 亡魂的世界？这怎会……
E: The world of the dead? But how...

C: 存在的意义……
E: The meaning of our existence...

C: …我会的。在那之后，我会永居冥界，让冥河回到这里，化作天上的细雨，将灵魂播撒向这片冥土……
E: ...I will. After this, I will remain permanently in the nether realm. The River of Souls shall return here and rain down from the sky, scattering souls across the earth...

C: 本次大会最后一名演讲人即将入场，决议将在之后举行。
E: The last speaker for the assembly will be taking the stage soon. The resolution will be passed after that.

C: 我永远都记得黑潮来临的那天：我的父亲希洛尼摩斯，为了他的孩子，用断剑力战到最后一刻；我的母亲奥妲塔，她为我能站在这里向诸位乞求，被怪物破开了胸膛！
E: I will never forget the day the black tide struck. My father, Hieronymus, fought with a broken sword to his last breath to protect his child. My mother, Audata... She was ripped apart by monsters, all so I might live to stand before you here and now.

C: 逐火之旅许诺的一切确凿无疑：因为预言中{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的半神，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将以他完整无缺的记忆，将我们所有人重塑在新世界中！
E: Everything that the Flame-Chase Journey promises is true! Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, the prophesized demigod who shall succeed {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, will reforge each and every one of us in the new world with his complete, intact memories!

C: 请把这当作一次特例中的特例，我会尽力而为，为了逐火之旅……
E: Please consider this a one-time exception. I will do everything in my power for the Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 而那与泰坦携手的，是一位从死者中上升，在人间更生的旅人。{M#他}{F#她}是细数岁月的黑夜，凭{M#他}{F#她}正直的名字宣告——
E: And there was one who joined hands with the Titan. A traveler risen from the dead and reborn among mortal kind. {M#He}{F#She} is the everlasting night and shall now proclaim in {M#his}{F#her} good name:

C: 她…说了什么？
E: What did she say?

C: 在说什么悄悄话呢？有没有想过，我听得一清二楚？
E: What are you two whispering about? Has it not occurred to you that I can hear everything clearly?

C: （以树庭藏书之广博，会有类似记载吗？希望有吧……）
E: (The Grove is a veritable library of knowledge... Maybe they'll have records on a similar case? Please let there be one...)

C: 如今，几乎每一个翁法罗斯人都知道「天舟」的故事。{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的身躯比天空更伟岸，它的神罚是如此无情。
E: Nearly everyone in Amphoreus has heard the story of the skyships by now. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s stature is loftier than the heavens, and their divine retribution is merciless.

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}？这是要做什么…元老院会放任如此大不敬之举吗？
E: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}? But what could Anaxa want...? Is the Council of Elders going to sit around and let such a sacrilegious act unfold?

C: 太好了，是黄泉，我们有救了！
E: Hurray, it's Acheron! Someone's coming to save us!

C: 哼，看来不用我多说了。
E: Hmph. Looks like you can see it for yourself.

C: 这比我预想中来得更早，或许是时候了：白厄，我需要你站出来，而我退居其后——
E: This has come a lot sooner than I expected, but perhaps it is time. I need you to step up, Phainon, in order for me to retreat behind the scenes.

C: 奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，与异乡人{NICKNAME}，正在向我们走来！
E: Virtuous citizens of Okhema, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae and {NICKNAME} the outlander are heading toward us!

C: 令我意外的是，他只耸了耸肩，叹道：
E: To my surprise, he shrugged his shoulders and sighed:

C: …在害怕吗？
E: ...Are you afraid?

C: 塞涅俄丝…那时的她，究竟是以怎样的复杂心情看待这一切发生呢？
E: Seliose... how exactly would she have felt to witness all this transpire?

C: 这么一来，你就无处可藏了…泰坦。
E: Now, you have nowhere to hide... Titan.

C: 伟大的塞涅俄丝，我恳求你放过一条卑微的性命！
E: Great Seliose, I beg you — spare this humble life!

C: 等等！女武神大人…请允许我同她对话！
E: Wait! Please, let me speak with Her Highness, the warrior goddess!

C: 我想让你知道：我很庆幸！庆幸自己是一位默默无闻的人子之后。
E: I want you to know that I am glad to be born as the child of a nameless and ordinary mortal!

C: …这座平台摇摇欲坠，不知道还能支撑多久。得想办法离开。
E: ...this platform is on the brink of collapse. Who knows how much longer it can hold. We need to find a way to leave.

C: 那扭曲的形态……
E: That twisted form...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我当英雄的机会…终于要来了哪。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>My moment to be a hero... has finally arrived.</color>

C: 你还是打算前往黎明云崖吗…赛法利娅？
E: Cifera... Do you still plan to go to Dawncloud?

C: 天父的博爱，已经超越了时间…延续亿万斯年！
E: Sky father's love transcends time itself, stretching across endless eons!

C: 再见，大家……
E: Goodbye, everyone...

C: 请放心将天空的权柄交给我吧。我只是一名医师，即便拥有了力量，也无法变得和你一样强大……
E: Trust me with the power of the Sky. I am merely a healer. I could never match your strength even with that power...

C: 众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然。
E: All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate.

C: 我也想遐蝶了…
E: I miss Castorice too...

C: 「盗火行者」…
E: It's the Flame Reaver...

C: 我强得可怕，根本用不着。
E: I'm so strong that I don't need your reminder.

C: 没错。然后，你们听到了脚步声——是我故意发出来的——那时，你们心里又在想什么？
E: That's right. And then you heard some footsteps. What did you think when that happened?

C: 只是出于我个人对阁下的尊敬，我希望能提供一种和平的解决方案，以保障您和同伴的人身安全。
E: Out of respect for you, I hope to offer a peaceful solution to ensure the safety of you and your companion.

C: 出事的…是阿格莱雅大人！
E: It's... it's Lady Aglaea who's in trouble!

C: 嗅…嗅嗅……
E: Sniff... sniff...

C: 八成没有。我在奥赫玛从没见过斯缇科西亚出身的家伙，连听都没听说过。
E: Probably not. I've never seen or heard of anyone from Styxia in Okhema.

C: 老实说，当时我只是惦记着元老院大老爷们的钱包，其它的事印象都不深了——这都过去多久了，得有快一千年了吧？
E: Honestly, I was only interested in the wallets of the old grandpas on the Council back then. Don't remember much else — it's been, what, nearly a thousand years?

C: 那些藏品以前确实价值连城。只是遭时间冲刷得太久，就失去了原本的样子。
E: Those relics were once priceless. But time has eroded away all that they once were.

C: 是啊是啊…又大又呆，纯纯一坨傻大个！
E: Yeah, yeah... big and dumb, just a pure lump of stupidity!

C: 不知不觉间，我们已经达成了「拖延时间」的任务……
E: While you were unaware, we already accomplished our mission — to buy time.

C: 你并不完美，白厄。多少个黎明，你的迷茫、鲁莽和多愁善感在我面前上演。沉重的过往压在你的肩上，令你一直痛苦不堪。
E: You're not perfect, Phainon. I've witnessed your confusion, recklessness, and deep sensitivity dawn after dawn. The heavy burdens of your past have always weighed you down, inflicting deep pain.

C: 是谁谋害了金织女士？
E: Who murdered Lady Goldweaver?

C: 圣城…不应该很安全吗？
E: Shouldn't the holy city be safe?

C: 不过我们这次前来，可是还有更重要的任务哦。白厄阁下已经选定了征伐{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的时日，我作为天空一族的后人……
E: But we have an even more important mission this time round. Lord Phainon has already set the date to campaign against {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Being a descendant of the Sky people, I...

C: 从今往后，你们都有各自的路要走。从这里学去的知识能帮上多少忙，全看几位参悟的本领。
E: Now, each of you will head off on your own path. How much the Grove's teachings can help you in the real world depends on how well you can put knowledge into practice.

C: 好奇怪。那匹天马和其他记忆不一样，有一股哀伤缠绕着它……
E: How strange. That pegasus was different from the other memories. It was surrounded in an air of sorrow...

C: 凭这柄长剑，英魂。
E: With this long sword, heroic soul.

C: 我直面过天空的暴君，它的怒火足以熔化天穹——并非夸大其词，因为翁法罗斯的苍天即是它的权柄。
E: I have faced down the tyrant of the sky. It is no hyperbole that their raging fire is capable of melting the firmament. Amphoreus's heavens exist because of their authority.

C: …该离开了，雅辛忒丝。露奈比斯在等你们。
E: ...We should get going, Hyacinthia. Lunabis is waiting for you all.

C: {RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的满溢之杯，壁画上描绘了它的破裂。
E: {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s Chalice of Plenty... This mural depicts its breaking.

C: 这…多么令人欣慰啊。
E: That is... quite comforting.

C: 我的意愿……
E: My wishes...

C: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
E: Dear Seliose,

C: 这边，英雄们。
E: Here, heroes.

C: 那边——你们看到了么？那些破损的结构，似乎变成了虚浮的材质……
E: Over there — do you see it? The broken structures look like they've turned transparent...

C: 到了最后关头…还是免不了正面一战。
E: In the end... direct confrontation was inevitable.

C: 黑潮造物…在黎明云崖？！
E: A black tide creature... at Dawncloud!?

C: 退回神殿里去！保护好你们的家人、朋友！
E: Retreat to the temple! Protect your family and friends!

C: 出于一些原因，我不建议这么做。
E: There are reasons for which I must recommend against such a course of action.

C: ——<color=#dbc291ff>三月小姐██ 已经█ 被██ 卷入██ 翁法罗斯█</color>
E: —<color=#dbc291ff>Miss March █████ has ████ already been ████ drawn into ███ Amphoreus██</color>

C: 怎么又换身份了？明明不久前还是从异邦漂流过来，和你订下剑艺修习契约的勇者……
E: Switching roles again? What happened to being the valiant hero from a distant shore who made that solemn pact to learn the sword...

C: 迷路迷境？
E: The Membrance Maze?

C: 原来迷迷是个组织？
E: So the Mems are like a organization?

C: …好吧，你说得对。伙伴，来——无论结果如何，就让我们共同面对吧。
E: You're right. Come on, partner — whatever the cards show, we'll face it together.

C: 那*我们*就放心啦，因为这是只有「你」才能替*我们*实现的心愿哦。
E: Then we can rest easy, because only "you" can make these wishes come true.

C: …我会铭记在心。
E: I'll hold these words close to my heart.

C: 「灾厄」…是泰坦的力量？
E: Is this "Calamity"... a Titan's doing?

C: …昔涟？
E: Cyrene?

C: 公平、正义、清白无疑的{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，角斗者已做出他们的选择——
E: {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, the fair, the just, they of unassailable integrity — the challengers have made their choices.

C: 嗯，交给我吧……
E: Yeah, just leave it to me...

C: 结局既已注定，那何不浇灭你那灼痛世间的怒火，以更具尊严的身姿拥抱自身的命运？
E: If the outcome is inevitable, then why not silence your searing rage and embrace your fate with dignity?

C: 我们只是这{RUBY_B#实验场}小小世界{RUBY_E#}的戏中人，沿着{RUBY_B#程序}神谕{RUBY_E#}的指引，一遍又一遍踏上相同的{RUBY_B#演算}旅程{RUBY_E#}……
E: We are just characters in this {RUBY_B#laboratory}tiny world{RUBY_E#}, following the {RUBY_B#program}prophecy{RUBY_E#}, stepping onto the same {RUBY_B#extrapolation}journey{RUBY_E#} over and over...

C: 只是，仅以戏中人的视角，他终究无法揭开最后一层本质。
E: But, from just the perspective of a player in the drama, he could never fully uncover the last layer of truth.

C: 但那也意味着，会向翁法罗斯投来瞥视的「星神」，肯定不止一位吧？
E: But that also means that there isn't just one Aeon who can cast THEIR glance at Amphoreus, right?

C: …伙伴。
E: ...Friend.

C: 啊…原来是个圈套。
E: Ah... I see, it's a trap.

C: 不论你相信与否，我都会告诉你，这是个错误的决定。
E: Whether you believe me or not, I'll still tell you this: You've made the wrong decision.

C: 你心底的救世主情结，已将你变得与你口中冷眼的神明并无区别。那些你誓言要拯救的人子…如今在你眼里，他们的性命恐怕与蝼蚁无异吧？
E: Your messiah complex has turned you into something no different from the icy gods you spoke of. The children of humanity you swore to save... they are no more than ants to you now, aren't they?

C: 记住我本生而为人，以免「毁灭」将我彻底吞噬。
E: Remember that I was once human, or else the Destruction will completely consume me.

C: 果然，你并非我熟悉的那位白厄阁下。
E: Indeed, you are not the Phainon I know.

C: 可惜…我没有后备选项。我只能把一切都赌在新生的白厄身上，赌他会和最初的我做出相同的选择。
E: Unfortunately, I don't have a backup plan. I have no choice but to bet everything on the next Phainon... and trust that he makes the same choice I did.

C: 你踏入了这个陌生的世界，被它沉重的命运缠住，直到这一刻。
E: You arrived in this strange world and were bound by its cruel fate up till this very moment.

C: …太好了。如此一来，这漫长徒劳的焦土中便能绽放出花朵了。
E: ...Good. In that case, even this fruitless wasteland may finally bloom with flowers.

C: 这小鬼…绝不是你我二人联手能解决的威胁…！
E: This little brat... is not a threat we can deal with just by ourselves!

C: 请回头吧——勿要惊扰它们，那众多鲜花的如泥死亡。
E: Please turn back — do not disturb these fresh flowers in their muddy deaths.

C: 我发誓，你们不会无功地死去……
E: I swear, your deaths won't be in vain...
...Hmm?

C: 咦？为什么……
E: Wait, what...?

C: 奇怪，没说过吗？嘻，那就当是人家自己的心愿吧！
E: Huh? You didn't? Teehee~ In that case, just treat it as my own wish then!

C: 白厄也是一样…
E: It was the same for Phainon...

C: 可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
E: But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.

C: 这也很重要，那也很重要，行囊装不下了……
E: This is important... and that's also important... Urk, it's not gonna fit into my bag...

C: 呵呵，看来此刻您并无心情闲谈。无妨，我只希望阁下理解：我无意与您敌对。
E: Heh, seems like you are not in the mood for an idle chat. That is fine. I simply wish for you to understand that I have no intention of being your enemy.

C: 既然谈判破裂，我们便没有继续留在观众席的必要性了。请返回剧目中，在翁法罗斯与鄙人再会吧。
E: As negotiations have broken down, there's no more need for us to remain in the audience's seat. Let's return to the theater called Amphoreus, where you will meet me once again.

C: 去吧！去云石天宫，去黎明云崖！去向所有的恶徒和懦夫，和这泥古不化的时代宣告——
E: Onward! To Marmoreal Palace! To Dawncloud's heights! Announce to all the wicked and cowardly, announce to this stagnant age...

C: 同时，也是第一次逐火之旅的尾声。
E: And also the end of the first Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 你懂什么？子民犯下再大的罪孽，也是凯撒的子民，当然需由凯撒亲手审判——
E: What do you know? No matter what sins the people commit, they are still the Imperator's people, and it's only right that they be judged by the Imperator's own hand.

C: 「断锋爵」拉比努斯与「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，他们是逐火军中强大的战士，用剑刃与风暴扫清逐火的前路。
E: "Dux Fragoris" Labienus and "Dux Brumalis" Seneca are both formidable warriors, clearing the way for the Flame-Chase with steel and storm.

C: 那是留给二位的特等席，敬请落座。
E: Those are the two spots reserved for you. Please take your seats.

C: 还没来得及向二位正式作个自我介绍：鄙人「断锋爵」拉比努斯，凯撒大人的得力干将。愿在下一场征伐中，与「救世主」一同冲锋陷阵。
E: I didn't get the chance to properly introduce myself: I am Labienus, the "Dux Fragoris," a trusted officer of the Great Imperator. I look forward to fighting alongside the "Deliverer" in the upcoming battles.

C: 捕食？
E: The hunt?

C: 再说了，如果这身华服染污，你不也会赠我新衣么？
E: Besides, if my fine clothes get stained, won't you just gift me new ones?

C: 好奇这双眼眸吗？人们常将它以珠宝相比。而我已经做好决定，要向「浪漫」换取能看清一切的眼睛。
E: Curious about these eyes? People often compare them to jewels. But I've already made my decision to ask "Romance" for eyes that can see everything.

C: 要避免和来古士正面冲突。
E: We must avoid direct confrontation with Lygus.

C: 又要跟泰坦开战了，真是期待……
E: A war with the Titans again? I can't wait...

C: 两位，怎么了？
E: What's the matter, guests?

C: 安心。蜜露并非酒酿，不会令人迷醉。
E: Worry not. Honeydew is not alcohol. It won't get you drunk.

C: 当然，我从不怀疑二位的忠诚，也定会如实传达。
E: I never doubted your loyalty. I'll pass your words faithfully on to her.

C: 没有办法，我们只能刺杀凯撒。
E: We must kill the Imperator. There's no other way.

C: 在我来到这里前…「负世」的黄金裔，是一位化名白厄的青年，他来自哀丽秘榭。
E: Before I arrived in this world... The Chrysos Heir of "Worldbearing" was a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon. He came from Aedes Elysiae.

C: 放我出去！
E: Let me out!

C: 三月七，堂堂复活！
E: March 7th, back alive and kicking!

C: 吩咐这些小家伙带你离开监牢的人，是我。
E: I am the one who commanded those little ones to lead you out of the prison.

C: {NICKNAME}，现在一定很困扰吧？你不在的这段时间，翁法罗斯发生了好多事。
E: You must be really confused right now, aren't you, {NICKNAME}? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.

C: 看来，改写结局的关键，还是回到了「负世」的火种。
E: It seems the key to rewriting the end once again lies in the Coreflame of Worldbearing.

C: 涟宝，漫长的接力终于来到了尾声，命运的最后一棒，就交给你啦？
E: Cyrie, this arduous relay is finally nearing its end. Now I'm passing the final baton of fate to you, okay?

C: 怎么又是你？！
E: You again!?

C: 当然，我也不介意再多等片刻，带你穿过前方的迷梦——来自那位典狱长的追忆。
E: Of course, I don't mind waiting a little longer. Let me guide you through this next illusion, one last memory from that prison warden.

C: 以王的权柄，置酒设宴不值一提。我将令你在胜后尽兴，与我的将士开怀畅饮……
E: Such a demand is trivial with the sovereign's authority. I'll grant you a banquet worthy of conquest, and comrades to toast beside you...

C: 没错，一颗绝对赤诚的忠心。
E: Yes. A loyal heart that will generate no betrayal.

C: 快来，一同歌颂她的功绩！
E: Come! Join us and praise her glory!

C: 重现历史吧，然后…穿过神殿的海水，来到我的身边。
E: Relive the history, then... pass through the temple's waters and come to my side.

C: 你来了，剑旗爵。
E: You're here, Dux Gladiorum.

C: 于此地，那位以典狱官自居的囚徒做出了选择……
E: It was here that the prisoner, who thinks herself the prison warden, made her choice...

C: 于此地，你自法吉娜的身躯中剜出了「海洋」的火种；也是在这里，你与那位凯撒双双登神，成为翁法罗斯的支柱。那之后……
E: It was here you gorged out the Coreflame of Ocean from Phagousa's body. It was here you and that Imperator both completed apotheosis, becoming pillars of Amphoreus. And after that...

C: 我赠予你的礼物——但愿那时你还留在身边。
E: The gift I once gave you... May you still have it when the time comes.

C: 王，与王身边的宝剑。
E: A sovereign and the sword at her side.

C: 阅读碑文。
E: Read the inscription.

C: 事已至此，仅作为对后世的敬意，我便给二位一个理性的回应吧。
E: Since things have reached this point, I'll give you two a rational answer, purely as a courtesy to posterity.

C: 关键在于「记忆」，对么？
E: The key lies in "memories," right?

C: 让人家换种更浪漫的说法吧：即便只是一次对掌的牵绊，也足以跨越时空，对吧？
E: I'm gonna make it sound more romantic. It means even a bond formed over one touch is enough to transcend space-time.

C: 我涤荡了黄金战争的污垢，弥合了纷争世以来的所有分歧；我恢复了奥赫玛的权威，让凡人和黄金裔平等站上议院的讲坛；我惩罚了一切罪恶，赞赏了一切功绩……
E: I cleansed the Chrysos War's filth and mended all the conflicts left by the Era Bellica. I restored Okhema's might and allowed mortals and Chrysos Heirs to face each other as equals in the Council. I punished all sins and rewarded all achievements...

C: 各位民众，各位元老啊，大家不要惊慌失措，都站定吧——那僭主已为野心偿债了！
E: My people! My fellow Elders! Do not panic. Stand your ground. That usurper has paid for her ambition with her life!

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 我凭什么相信你？
E: Why should I believe you?

C: 谢谢你将它带到世界尽头，不愧是「三月七」信赖的同伴。现在……
E: Thank you for carrying this Coreflame all the way to the end of the world. I expected nothing less from "March 7th's" trusted friend. And now...

C: 这么做与来古士毫无区别。
E: Your plan is no better than Lygus's.

C: 就在列车上，某个纯美骑士不请自来的那一晚……
E: It was on that night when a certain Knight of Beauty dropped by uninvited to the Astral Express...

C: 「恐怕那两位失踪的无名客，和三月七一样，受『记忆』命途影响，只有精神被卷入了翁法罗斯。」
E: "It's likely that the two missing Nameless, like March 7th, also came under the influence of the Path of Remembrance, and only their minds entered Amphoreus."

C: 我和{NICKNAME}出发时，她的状态就不太好。就算只是个梦，我也该进去探望她。
E: March already wasn't feeling very well when {NICKNAME} and I set out. Even if this is a dream, I should still check on her.

C: 问题正在于此。他们似乎对「毁灭」的行径早有察觉，但缺乏决定性的力量，无法穿透笼罩翁法罗斯的防火墙。
E: That's exactly the problem. They seem to have been aware of the Destruction's movements early on, but they lacked a decisive power and had no way to penetrate Amphoreus's firewall.

C: 既然时间有限，就赶快开始吧？
E: Since we don't have all day, let's get started, shall we?

C: 果然，答案…是「记忆」。
E: As I expected. The answer is the Remembrance.

C: 真是个好问题。因为我也很好奇呢……
E: What a good question that is. I, too, am curious...

C: 我能理解，将黄金裔们当作演算的数据，对你而言太过困难。那不妨先假设他们是活生生的人……
E: I understand it's too difficult for you to treat the Chrysos Heirs as extrapolated data. Then, why don't we assume for now that they're living, breathing humans...

C: 无论史书、日记，还是留影石机，都是「记忆」绝佳的触媒。
E: History books, diaries, and photostones are all perfect catalysts for "memories."

C: 成为你旅途上的一道阻碍，我很抱歉。
E: I'm sorry for becoming an obstacle in your journey.

C: 真的吗？那…真是太好了。
E: Really? That's... that's wonderful.

C: 醒来吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Wake up, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「可算不上多光明磊落呢♭」
E: "Not exactly the pinnacle of integrity, is it ♭"

C: 「这一切都要感谢昔涟小姐，即便被忆质裹挟，她仍在努力维系与天才们的联系。」
E: "None of this would've been possible without Miss Cyrene. Even while engulfed by memoria, she fought to stay in contact with the geniuses."

C: 这意味着，她将与流光忆庭为敌。
E: This means she's chosen to stand against the Garden of Recollection.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>█ ██ █持明 █ ██ 不朽 █ 化龙 ██ █ █起死回 █生█ ████ █</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>█ ██ █Vidyadhara █ ██ the Permanence █ dragon transmutation ██ █ █resurrec █tion█ ████ █</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「大地」饿了，只有「不朽」能填满它的胃袋！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The "Earth" is hungry, and only the Permanence can satisfy it!</color>

C: 暂时不成结论，但这道回忆显然不属于我。
E: It's too early to reach a conclusion, but this memory is most definitely not mine.

C: 别大意，忆潮变得更汹涌了……
E: Don't let your guard down. The memoria tide has become even more violent...

C: 龙尊大人，自然是有无休无止的龙师会议要开，一时半刻散不了场。不等他了。
E: As always, the high elder has endless meetings with the Preceptors that he can't get away from. Let's not wait on him.

C: 我不会回答。我会证明。
E: I won't answer it. I will prove it.

C: 哼，我只是觉得痛快！好似打造出一件良工神兵般畅快！
E: Hmph, I'm just full of joy! It feels like I've just forged a divine weapon with masterful craftsmanship!

C: 「宁如飞萤赴火，不作樗木长春」…过去，我打心底里一直这么觉得。但，多亏遇见了你们，我从未像现在这样，切实地感到自己正在活着。
E: "I'd rather leave this world in a blaze than live until the end of time..." That's what I always firmly believed in the past. But I never truly felt like I was alive until I met all of you.

C: 使用化龙妙法的，是我。发誓要将白珩带回世间的，是我。

o((•'ω´• )o "Yo. You're here.")∋

C: 所见略同。
E: I agree.

C: 初次见面，或者…别来无恙，阁下。
E: Nice to meet you, or... maybe I should ask, how have you been since we last saw each other?

C: 我的拥抱果然很温暖嘛。
E: See, I really am a heartwarming {F#girl}{M#guy} deep down.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——「智识」博识尊。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Nous, the Erudition.</color>

C: 愿尽绵薄之力。

C: 守卫翁法罗斯的十二泰坦。
E: The Twelve Titans who guard Amphoreus.

C: 歌颂「翻飞之币，赛法利娅」，您的每一次旋转映出命运的可能，令「欢愉」诡计照亮前路黎明。
E: Praise be to "Cifera, Coin of Whimsy," for your every flip reflects the possibilities of destiny, letting the tricks of Elation illuminate the path to dawn.

C: 被掩埋的过往，正是对抗「铁墓」的关键。但前提是，它真的存在。
E: The buried past is the key to stopping Irontomb. That is, if it even exists.

C: 假设「德谬歌」并不存在，你是否准备了预案？
E: Let's say the Demiurge really doesn't exist. Do you have a backup plan?

C: 为了将「智识」的神经元，改造成「毁灭」迭代的中继器，他无论如何都要将它剔除……
E: He wanted to turn the neuron of the Erudition into a relay for the Destruction. That meant getting rid of all of it at all costs.

C: 暂不飞行
E: Pause the flight

C: 我就知道，怕什么来什么……
E: I knew it. The one thing I didn't want to happen...

C: 没有黑潮、逐火，也没有「毁灭」。海的对面，是一个沐浴在阳光下的世界。
E: There's no black tide, no Flame-Chase, and no Destruction. The world on the other side of the sea is one bathed in sunlight.

C: 当然，我早有预感，提前帮你们打过招呼了。他很开心，在梦里也笑出了声……
E: Of course. I knew ahead of time and gave him a heads-up. He was happy. Even laughed in his sleep...

C: 这一次，它的光明不必再靠谎言维系。
E: This time, its light will stand without lies.

C: 「他守在这里，没准是在等我们呢。」
E: "Maybe he's been waiting here just for us."

C: 这位是…快乐三宝。
E: This is... the Joyful Marchie.

C: 那刻夏老师，给人家的分类还真精确呀……
E: Your classification is pretty spot-on, Professor Anaxa...

C: 这就是白厄留下的课题：重走来时路，将这些愿望从晶体中取出，带向决战。

C: 如果准备好了，就启动仪式吧。
E: If you're ready, begin the ritual.

C: 「到处…都是怪物……」

E: The world believed Kephale had long since perished. But they held fast, anchored by a sliver of "self," standing for a thousand years to shelter all life from the black tide.

C: 权杖曾赋予我们冰冷的名讳。
E: The scepter once bestowed upon us names of cold command.

C: 「重点不是，这家伙挡在路上了吗？」
E: "Isn't the real issue that this thing's in the way?"

C: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

C: 终于，世界内外连通了。这是翁法罗斯距离银河最近的一刻。
E: This world's insides are finally connected to the outside. This is the moment when Amphoreus is closest to the cosmos.

C: 不妨想象，阿基维利和祂的旅伴也曾站在类似的山口，不止一回……
E: It's not hard to imagine that Akivili and THEIR companions must've also stood on the precipice of many similar crises before...

C: 也要注意脚下呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: Make sure you watch your footing, {NICKNAME}.

C: 所以，为这个我们深爱的世界……
E: Hence, for this world we so deeply love...

C: 怒火，在溢出。放下！迟疑……
E: The fury. Overflowing. Put down! Your hesitation...

C: 为了保护它们，她的「自我」已经如此稀薄了么？

C: 「到此为止了吗？该死！明明还有弹药！」
E: "Is this it? Darn it! We've still got ammo!"

E: "Too many... injured... can't take it anymore..."

C: ▀█命运█▀枷锁

E: And don't lose your way ♪

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那是你的「记忆」。现在，你的心识遍布群星，让你在这条命途上走出了极其遥远的距离。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It is your "memory." Your mind now stretches across the stars, allowing you to travel farther down this Path than anyone else.</color>

E: "We. Are the sacrifice. The Garden. Used us. <color=#dbc291ff>The 'Pure Child of Anāsrava.' Abandoned us.</color>"

E: No more Aeons will interfere with this part of history. No more "blank spaces" in causality. The "present" will be set in stone and become indestructible.

C: 毕竟，你还要留下最后的心识，种下最初的种子呀。
E: After all, you still have to leave behind your final consciousness and plant the very first seed.

C: 诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著」</color>……

C: 于是，花儿在旅途的终点收梢，又在起点生根。为昨天带去「爱」的结局。

C: 当线索和脉络都已收束，下笔的轻重不再受制约时……

E: Clearly, Professor Capote is unlikely to master my speech or mannerisms any time soon... But the content is the key here!
