E: I designed a decoding program. Look — it looks like a camera, but it's actually a detector. We should be able to find hidden clues with it.

E: They call this the "Punklorde mentality." There can only be competition when there is rivalry, and there can only be excitement when there is competition. Life's a game and having fun is what's most important.

C: 听螺丝咕姆先生的意思，你接下来就要进入模拟宇宙内部调查了吧？
E: Having heard what Mr. Screwllum said, you're entering the Simulated Universe to continue the investigation, aren't you?

C: 说话了？！

E: It is a never-ending cycle of falling... and standing up again. Each time I wander closer to death, it gets me closer to the path the Beauty once walked.

C: 那一定是双非常美的眼睛。

E: ...Anyway, moving on.

C: 对了，我还有照片！
E: Exactly! A—And we even have photos!

C: 呜哇，这、这是房顶？这得要下多久的雪，才能积到这个厚度啊？
E: Huh!? So these are rooftops? How long would snow have to fall to get this thick?

C: 丹恒……
E: Dan Heng...

C: 哪有哪有，只是胡乱分析一二而已，肯定没法跟专业的人比啦。
E: Not at all, the analysis of an aficionado. I wouldn't take my word for it.

C: 既然这么定了，那我就先去房间收拾收拾行李。{NICKNAME}，等你准备好了就来找我吧。
E: Let me go pack some stuff for the trip first. {NICKNAME}, come and find me when you're ready to set off.

C: 早点解决公司的问题，咱们就能早点享受节日的氛围。准备好了就跟希儿说一声吧。
E: The quicker we handle the IPC, the faster we can get back to enjoying the celebrations. Let Seele know when you're ready to go.

C: 不管她现在在哪里、在做什么，我恳请你们替我找到她。如果公司还在试图霸占属于贝洛伯格的资产，我恳求各位阻止他们的行动。
E: Please locate her for me. It doesn't matter where she is or what she's doing. And if the IPC is still trying to take over Belobog's assets, I ask that you do everything in your power to stop them.

C: 没错。那些兵器就藏在高耸的岩壁之中。
E: Affirmative. The weapons are concealed within the towering rock formations.

C: 哦哦，我想起来了，您就是那位赫赫有名的姬子女士！我有几位同事对您崇拜极了，做梦都想和您聊上两句！
E: Oh wow, I remember now, the illustrious Miss Himeko! Some of my colleagues dream about meeting you!

C: 我逐字逐句看过了你写的信，托帕小姐。我对你的童年经历深感同情。
E: I have read your letter word for word, Miss Topaz, and your childhood experiences truly touched me.

C: 做我们这行，心地不能太善良，否则，路会越走越窄的……
E: In our line of work, having a kind heart can be more of a liability than an asset. If you're not careful, you'll end up leading yourself down a dead-end road...

C: 我们当然也希望是虚构的…可惜这些都是现实。
E: I wish it were made up... Unfortunately it's all true.

C: 哎哟，这不是小三月吗——你们怎么来啦？我听人说，你们早就坐上大飞船，开到外太空去了呀？
E: Ah! Is that little March!? What brings you this way? I heard you left to go travel the galaxy?

C: 佩拉姐姐，我要告状！彼得他，要睡着啦！
E: Miss Pela! Peter is falling asleep!

C: 知、知道了，佩拉姐姐……
E: Sorry, Miss Pela...

C: 怎么能这么想？！
E: How could you possibly consider this course of action!?

C: 哎，娜塔莎是个好姑娘，每次给我检查都特别认真细致……
E: *sigh* Natasha's a wonderful girl. She always gives me a thorough checkup...

C: 站住，你这是要去哪？
E: Hey, where do you think you're going?

C: 说得难听点，他不过是把我们当成了实验对象。病能不能治好不重要，重要的是得有人愿意傻呵呵地当他的小地鼠……
E: The hard truth is that we were just his test subjects. It didn't matter if the medicine worked or not. What mattered was having a constant stream of willing lab rats...

C: 你和她有过交流了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Did you speak to her, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嚯！你倒是理直气壮啊，直接明抢是吧？
E: Oh-ho! Playing the hero, are we? Is this a stick-up?

C: 我想参加比赛！
E: I want to join!

C: 魈魅…魈魅…不会是…水魈？不愧是{NICKNAME}呀，一下就抓住了全文的「文眼」。现在一切都说得通了！
E: Spirit... Spirit... Can it be... The Xenohydro? Well done, {NICKNAME}! You just found the "key" to the text right away. Now everything makes sense!

C: 一旦牵扯到共犯，这件事就不再是单纯的奇物收容问题，必须谨慎处理。所以，我想请你先到信中明确提到的收容舱段，探探这段言论的虚实。
E: And if there is an accomplice involved, this matter is no longer a simple case of Curio retrieval. It must be handled with caution. Therefore, I would like to ask you to go to the Storage Zone mentioned in the letter and verify the facts.

C: 只要{NICKNAME}能抓住水魈或是共犯中的任何一个，我们就能当面对质。至于那位科员是一念之差，还是有心作恶，我会作出公正评判。
E: If we can catch either the Xenohydro or the accomplice, we'll be able to interrogate them. Then I can judge whether the accomplice's motive is malicious or not.

C: 「将两只一次性动力臂严丝合缝地铰接，一旦猎物以微弱的生物震动踏入动力臂的捕捉范围，等待它们的便是在劫难逃的命运。」
E: Tightly connect the two disposable kinetic arms. Once the prey steps within range of the power arm, all that awaits them is doom.

C: 抱歉跟你说了这么多，我们还是靠人肉蹲点吧……
E: Anyway, we'd better ambush it ourselves.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得它跟「不世之材」会有关系吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you think Unearthly Marvel has anything to do with it?

C: 棒球棍，那是什么？能够定义你究竟是谁的本体？还是全宇宙只此无二的神器？
E: Baseball bat... what's that? Can you use it to prove your identity? Or is it the only one of its kind in the universe?

C: 她已经能够独当一面。
E: She'll be able to look after herself.

C: 哈！瞧，他们果然没跟进来！自由啦！
E: Hah! See, they weren't brave enough to follow us! Freedom!

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不明白吗？但我也很难解释…要是他和姐姐，他们中有一个人在就好了……
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, don't you get it? It's hard for me to explain... If only either he or my sister were here...

C: 出了这么大的事儿，你第一个想到的居然是来找我…这就是坚不可摧的友谊啊！说吧朋友，只要是老桑博能力之内的事，绝对帮你安排到位！
E: Something this big happens, and your first thought is to find... me? Now that's what I call an ironclad friendship! Tell me, my dear old friend — I'll do anything for you as long as it's within my capabilities!

C: …这是啥？看着像是什么人留下的笔记？似乎有点年头了。
E: ...What's this? Someone left some notes behind. They look old.

C: 实话说，我目前还不能确凿地指出这些图案到底是什么意思，但这大概和某种<color=#dbc291ff>「可旋转的构造」</color>有关。
E: To be honest, I don't know for sure, but it's probably related to some kind of <color=#dbc291ff>rotatable structure</color>.

C: {NICKNAME}，如果可能的话，我希望有你陪我同去。
E: If possible, I would like you to go with me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 把那株花送给哥哥的时候，我看到他露出了笑意。你肯定想不到，要让那个人笑一笑是件多难的事。
E: When we gave him the flower, he failed to hide his smile. You can't imagine how hard it was to get him to smile.

C: 妈妈…我真的有很多话想对你说。但眼下还有一件更紧急的事需要你帮忙。
E: Mom... I have so much to say to you, but there's an urgent matter that needs your help.

C: 您真的是那位医生的妹妹吗？瓦赫医生，他可是我们不少弟兄的救命恩人啊。
E: Are you really his sister? Dr. Vache saved a lot of my soldiers!

C: 那个…{NICKNAME}，这里太空旷了，我怕说话漏风。要不我带你到博物馆里面转一圈，顺便聊聊这件事？
E: I... *sigh* Sorry, {NICKNAME}, I shouldn't talk about it in the open like this. Hey – why don't I give you a tour of the museum? We can talk inside while I show you around...

C: …居然记得我的全名？！这孩子，真不简单……
E: You remember my full name!? This kid is really something...

C: 真的有必要把零件都找全吗？
E: Is it really necessary to find all the parts?

C: 我觉得可以*适当*地偷下懒…
E: Maybe we could just say we didn't find the other pieces?

C: 不瞒你说，我也觉得有些乏了。
E: To be honest, I'm a little worn out myself.

C: 那两个孩子说的话很让人在意…看来这个聚落里也有参与了展品盗窃案的家伙在活动。
E: This isn't good... If what those kids said is true, then the museum thieves have operatives working in the settlement.

C: …想想可以，如果真要上手的话，我就要叫铁卫来把你带走了！
E: ...You wanna know what happens to people who vandalize exhibits? I call the Silvermane Guards and they carry you away!

C: {NICKNAME}，佩拉，你们好。
E: {NICKNAME}, Pela, welcome.

C: 没办法，谁叫老桑博最近表现得那么安分呢？我就差每天去铁卫禁区给放哨的卫兵送早饭了，嘿嘿。
E: ...Eh-he. Well, I mean... how could you! Your old buddy Sampo is a model citizen, these days. Y'know the guards on sentry duty in the restricted zone? I deliver their breakfast every day, hehe...

C: 啊，对了，我有件事想跟您说来着：之前有位蓝色头发的先生跑来这里，给我留下了一张便笺，请我转交给博物馆的经理。
E: Oh, right! There's something I wanted to tell you: A man with blue hair came along and left a message. He asked me to pass it on to the manager of the museum.

C: 递给虎克申请表。
E: (Give the application form to Hook.)

C: 虎克大人说得对！
E: Hook the Great is right!

C: 太酷了！就这个吧。
E: Sounds cool! Let's put it in.

C: 所以，希露瓦…你其实没必要把这件事看得太重。心态放松一些，展现出自己最真实的一面，这样就足够了——如果总是小心翼翼地端着，反而容易把事情搞砸呢。
E: So, Serval... You don't have to take this too seriously. Just relax and show your true self. If you're always so uptight, you'll tend to mess up.

C: 啧，这博物馆挺气派嘛…让我想起铆钉镇的那座孤儿院了。
E: Tsk, this museum looks so posh... It reminds me of that orphanage in Rivet Town.

C: 虽然她在和我谈这件事的时候确实很紧张就是了……
E: Still, she was quite nervous when she discussed this matter with me...

C: 原来如此…那我对着简历随意提问好了了——正好，也可以趁着这个机会再深入了解一下希儿。
E: I see... I'll ask some random questions based on the resume then. This is also a great chance for me to get to know Seele better.

C: 技能特长这里写着的是…「太吓人，不予展示」？这是……
E: For skills and expertise, you wrote "too scary to specify." And that means...

C: 现在就需要你的帮忙。
E: We need your help.

C: 欸？这是什么东西，是刚才那几个家伙丢下的吗……
E: Huh? What's this... Did those guys leave it behind...?

C: 这辆怎么样？
E: How about this one?

C: 希儿要亲自动手吗？
E: Are you gonna do it yourself?

C: 快去诊所吧，别让虎克担心。
E: Head to the clinic. Don't make Hook worry.

C: 你想呀！斯薇塔姐姐说了，应该只有真正的小偷会对我们说谎。
E: Just think about it! Swetta said that only the real thief would lie to us.

C: 哦哟哟，这还真是个稀罕货！让我仔细看看……
E: Oh ho ho, this certainly is a rare relic! Let me take a closer look...

C: 嘿，瞧这效率！整个下层区，我打着地髓灯都找不到手脚比你还爽利的了！
E: Wow, so efficient! I sure can't find anyone better than you in this underworld, not even with the help of a Geomarrow lamp!

C: 走个形式而已，你别这么严肃嘛。就算是大守护者跟我做生意，我也得象征性地走个流程嘛。
E: Come on, it's just procedure, don't take it so seriously! As I said, I'd do the same even if I were dealing with the Supreme Guardian.

C: 我跑来以后才发现，这哥们把自己那宝贝三件套全给弄丢了。我是商人，又不是拾荒的，这找东西的活可不对口啊…然后我这不就想到你了，嘿嘿。
E: It was only after I sorted all this out in my head that I learned that this guy had somehow managed to lose all three pieces of his precious equipment. You see, I'm a businessman, not a scavenger. I'm not at all interested in this sort of scavenger job. So, naturally, I immediately thought of you, hehe.

C: …呵，越想越气。我选择离家出走真是个无比正确的决定。
E: Hmph, I'm angry just thinking about it. Looking back, I'm glad I left home early.

C: 假设传闻是真的，难道……
E: If the rumors are true... could it be...

C: 不愧是贝洛伯格的英雄。
E: Sounds like something the Hero of Belobog would say alright.

C: 到底是什么事？
E: More danger afoot?

C: （哎？那边那个孩子…和希露瓦描述的有点像。）
E: (Huh? That girl over there... seems like she fits Serval's description.)

C: …我完全没注意到这些细节！露营原来这么深奥吗……
E: I never even noticed! Huh, camping is a complicated science...

C: 只能回去了…可惜没找到炉具的替换件。
E: *sigh* Okay... I feel bad that we didn't find a spare component.

C: 这次也莫名其妙地消失了……
E: It disappeared again...

C: （究竟会产生怎样的效果呢？随意试试吧。）
E: (What kind of effects are they gonna make? Let's just give it a try.)

C: 嗐，别急。这不是还有{NICKNAME}帮忙嘛。
E: Calm down. We've got {NICKNAME} to help us.

C: 但是，我还是想说，玲可…我觉得你一个人去城外太危险了……
E: But I have to say, Lynx... I think it's too dangerous for you to leave the city on your own...

C: 喏，镇上口碑最好的一家。娜塔会带表现好的孩子来改善伙食。
E: Heh, the most famous restaurant in town. Natasha would bring the kids who behaved well here for a special meal.

C: 该死，怎么全是空的？怪物还会翻箱子吗？
E: Darn, how could they all be empty? Now even the monsters are gathering supplies?

C: 对、对了！市集正面的路被堵住了…你们要接着往前的话，得从商店街绕路才行。
E: Oh, r—right! The road across from the market is blocked... If you wanna go further, you'll have to go to the shopping street.

C: 到底是什么时候……
E: But when...?

C: 这些阶梯…感觉变窄了不少。
E: These stairs... they seem to have become more narrow.

C: 就快到了！没想到这里保存得还算完整。
E: Almost there! I didn't expect this place to be so well preserved.

C: 警告。警告。发现威胁——
E: Warning. Warning. Danger detected—

C: 流浪者营地有很多受伤的人，矿队也一样吧？要是大家能和平共处就好了……
E: There are a lot of people hurt at the vagrant camp, I guess the miners are no different? *sigh* If everyone could just get along, things would be easier...

C: 只有一点让克拉拉感到很奇怪——大家伙为什么会把帕斯卡错认成裂界生物呢？
E: The only thing that puzzles me is why the big fella mistook Pascal for a Fragmentum creature.

C: 它为什么会被当作裂界生物？
E: Why is Pascal being treated as a Fragmentum creature?

C: 「地火」多次尝试跟史瓦罗接触。但每次都被拒之门外，那家伙压根不打算跟我们对话。
E: Wildfire has tried many times to make contact with Svarog — without success. He has no intention of engaging with us.

C: 桑博呗。向导啊行商啊，骗子啊魔术师啊，这种活简直量身给他打造的。
E: I guess Sampo. Businessman, magician, liar, and now guide... This kind of work was made for him.

C: 老实说这真是无本万利，我要早想到这一手…嘿嘿，那就是科斯基大佬……
E: Honestly, it's a very profitable little venture. If only I'd beaten him to it... Hehe, they'd be calling me Sampo "Boss-ki" by now...

C: 简单，看见流浪者身边的机器人了吗？那都是史瓦罗的眼线，是照他的指令专门在这儿维持秩序的。
E: That's simple. You see the robots over by the vagrants? They're all Svarog's scouts — every one of them is commanded to maintain order here.

C: 病痛和饥饿在不断地呼喊他咬着牙逃离了城市中央
E: Sickness and hunger forever pursuing him, gritting his teeth leaves the city behind

C: 哈？这个铁疙瘩在说啥呢？
E: Ha? What did this bucket of bolts just say?

C: …饶命，饶命！我知道错了，我这就给你们认证！
E: ...Wait, have mercy! I'm sorry! One certification, coming right up!

C: …习以为常了。
E: ...This isn't the first time.

C: 一想到那个小姑娘独自进入裂界，我就有点担心。
E: That little girl heading into the Fragmentum all by herself... It doesn't bear thinking about.

C: 她转过去了，快跟上！
E: She turned that way, quick!

C: 史瓦罗先生说过，你愿意为我实现每个愿望，对吗？克拉拉现在最大的愿望，就是希望大家都能团结起来，像…像家人那样。
E: Mr. Svarog, you said you were willing to make all my wishes come true, right? My biggest wish right now is for everyone to work together. Like... like family.

C: 这样…这样就算成功了吗？
E: So... So we did it?

C: …我从来没有质疑过你，博士。相反，我对你们得出的成果深信不疑。
E: ...I have never doubted you, doctor. On the contrary, I am resolute in the face of this conclusion.

C: 我只是觉得…遗憾。我们的研究陷入了瓶颈，您的成果又只能被雪藏……
E: I just think... it's a shame. Our research has hit an obstacle. Meanwhile, your results will be buried in the snow...

C: 对于「地火」来说，我们还需要更多时间养精蓄锐。
E: As for Wildfire, we need more time to build up our strength.

C: 对史瓦罗来说，这就是家人的回忆。
E: They are memories of family.

C: 不感兴趣？打扰了…
E: Not interested? Sorry for bothering you...

C: …我的宝贝孙子，到底跑哪儿去了呀？哎哟哟，可真是要了我的老命了……
E: ...Then where has my darling grandson gotten to? Oh, dear me, this is dreadful... dreadful!

C: 对啊对啊，小兄弟——你爸妈哪去了？该不会是自己一个人出门的吧？
E: Yeah, tiny. Where are your parents? You didn't go out on your own, did you?

C: 鼹鼠党的老大，关键时刻绝对靠谱！
E: When the going gets smart, the boss of The Moles gets smarter!

C: 这是探针的主人让我转交给你的一百五十冬城盾，权当是追回宝贝的谢礼了。
E: The owner asked me to pass on <unbreak>150</unbreak> shield as a reward for retrieving it.

C: 七百五十冬城盾三次！成交！恭喜这位买家！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold! Congratulations to the winner!

C: 娜塔莎做的玩偶太受欢迎了。
E: Natasha's craftsmanship was very popular.

C: 老爹也这么觉得，虎克…老爹也这么觉得。
E: I feel the same way about your gift, Hook. Me and you are in the same boat.

C: 小偷？我可没有安排过什么小偷。
E: Thief? I didn't send a thief.

C: 啊，是「变量」哥哥姐姐们！
E: Ah! It's the variables!

C: 唔，克拉拉觉得…犯人应该不是喜欢垃圾堆，而是把这里当成藏身处了…啊，也有可能他在这里藏了赃物？
E: Um, I don't think the culprit actually likes waste heaps. He probably uses them as a hiding spot... Oh, maybe he hid the stolen parts here too!

C: 克拉拉…从来没见过这样异常的机器人。它…究竟是怎么回事……？
E: I—I've never seen a robot with this kind of malfunction before... What happened to it...?

C: 唔…虽然这个小机器人似乎有沟通的意愿，但说出来的内容却很混乱……
E: Although this small robot appears to want to communicate, its speech is all scrambled...

C: 啊，不愧是史瓦罗先生，是个好主意！也就是说，想修好它的话…我们就得去找一副新的机器人外壳，对吧？
E: You can always rely on Mr. Svarog to come up with a brilliant idea! So, I guess we'll have to go find a new robot shell to fix it, right?

C: ——评估结果：芯片搭载系统与新硬件不兼容导致的运行故障。
E: Assessment: The system on the chip and the new hardware are incompatible, causing the robot to behave erratically.

C: 克拉拉，告诉我：你做出这个选择，是出于什么理由？
E: Clara, please tell me how you came to this conclusion.

C: 能阻止那些糟糕「情感」的东西…就是「理性」和「责任」——这两样东西，也是克拉拉从史瓦罗先生身上获得的宝物。
E: The only things that can stop such negative emotions are rationality and responsibility. This is a valuable lesson I've learned from Mr. Svarog.

C: 这条路比你想象的还要艰难，克拉拉。你确定要这样选择吗？
E: Clara, the challenge will be tougher than you can possibly imagine. Are you sure this is the path you want to take?

C: 没必要为报废机器人付出太多。
E: There's no reason to make such a large commitment for a broken robot.

C: …的确。史瓦罗先生的出发点，从始至终都是为了克拉拉着想。
E: True. Mr. Svarog is always there for me.

C: 抱歉，我在值岗，没空聊闲天。
E: Sorry, I'm on duty, no time to chat.

C: 我全天都守在这里，怎么没听说有什么设备需要紧急检修？
E: I've been keeping watch here all day, why didn't I hear about any equipment in need of emergency servicing?

C: …报、报告长官，两天没洗了！
E: ...I—I haven't showered in two days, sir!

C: 都是陈年往事了，希露瓦，我都好久没碰黑白键了。再说，我现在一年到头守在禁区里，怕是没什么机会回城了。
E: That was a long time ago, Serval — I haven't touched a keyboard in ages. Besides, I'm stationed here all year round, I'm afraid I don't get many chances to return to the city.

C: 这么说有点见外…但你找我有事吗？要是没检查出什么情况，赶紧回城吧。这里不安全。
E: Though I don't stand on ceremony... How may I assist you? If everything's in order, you'd better head back to the city. It's not safe here.

C: 是我把你们带到这里来的，我会跟你们并肩作战。
E: I brought you guys here, and I'm standing with you till the end!

C: 上啊，打败他们！
E: Come on, let's take them out!

C: 成了！走吧，咱们该去前线了。
E: Perfect! Okay, we need to get to the front line.

C: 这只是…第一拨敌人。它们…很快就会再集结。我不能……
E: This is... only the first wave. They'll have reassembled soon... I have to...

C: 有话好好说，别动手嘛。
E: Calm down...

C: ——还有一件很严肃的事要问你，茉莉小姐。你怎么会先于我们出现在这里？理性而论，你此时最该出现的地方应该是机械屋才对。
E: Miss Molly, I do have another very serious question to ask you... How did you manage to show up before we did? If anything, you should be at the workshop now.

C: 我相信他，因为他从来没对我撒过谎。那些人的话…不重要。我只要在意他的声音就行了。
E: I trust him because he's never lied to me before. Those bad words... don't matter. All I care about is his voice.

C: 我比较悲观…但我还是会帮你。
E: I doubt if it will work... but I'll still help you.

C: 对不起，我不想冒犯…多亏了你，我才能找回这些宝贵的记忆。但这也是为了你着想……
E: I'm sorry. I didn't want to offend... It's thanks to you that I have all these precious memories back, but this is also for your sake...

C: 这是——布洛妮娅的！
E: This is... Bronya's!

C: 不得…接近……
E: You cannot... approach...

C: 我们清楚，我们非常清楚。
E: On the contrary, we know it well.

C: 当然不是白费力气，希儿。抬头看看吧，这是我有生以来第一次看到天空——是真实的天空，不是被「存护」的力量创造出来的宽慰。
E: Of course it wasn't for nothing, Seele. Look up — have you ever been able to see the sky before in your life? I mean, the real sky, not the comforting fabrication created by the power of Preservation.

C: …你要将我抛下吗？将我留在这无边无际的空虚中？
E: ...Are you going to leave me behind? Just leave me here in this endless void?

C: 那本《大事年表》就在书架上，你随便用吧。实在找不到的话就告诉我，我来帮你找。
E: That Chronicle is on the bookshelf. Feel free to have a look. If you can't find it, just let me know. I'll help you look.

C: 不过，我还是推荐你直接上「寰宇佳品」买东西，这网站的服务可是超一流的。
E: But, I still recommend that you buy things directly from Cosmo Premium. That site always has top-notch service.

C: 我已经找到资料了，谢谢你。
E: I've found the what I needed, thanks.

C: 事不宜迟，现在就发消息去问问芦慧吧。
E: I better not delay this. I'll send a text to Luhui right now.

C: 啊！星槎牌照，没错、没错、没错！我刻意去记了一下！
E: Right! The starskiff registration plate, that's right, that's right! I memorized it!

C: 迴星港的方向吗…感谢您配合我们的调查。
E: The direction of Stargazer Navalia, huh... Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 交通肇事的后续赔偿还得需要本人参与，你和那位雇主也代劳不了。
E: The matter of compensation must be taken care of by the victim herself. You and her employer cannot represent her.

C: 啊…关于这个事嘛，你放心，我不会去请别人。
E: Ah, about that... Relax, I won't recruit anyone else.

C: 咱们这些博识学会的学士必须深入各个异族文明，赢得当地人的信任；还得冒着天灾人祸，风险可不逊于无名客。
E: We scholars from the Intelligentsia Guild must deeply penetrate into alien civilizations and win their trust, while also braving any natural disasters we may encounter. It's as dangerous as being a Nameless.

C: 我明白，我明白。所以咱们就从最简单的开始，只需要一次跑腿，去一趟丹鼎司，替我捎点东西回来，可简单了。
E: I understand, I understand. We can start with the most simple task. I just need you run one errand for me. Just go to the Alchemy Commission and pick something up. It's super simple.

C: 医典借来了。
E: I got the textbook.

C: 我也不知道…
E: I don't know either...

C: （询问何为「金枝」）
E: (Ask about the "Aureate Twig.")

C: 太好了，没想到这么快就收到好消息了。
E: Excellent. I never thought I'd get such a speedy reply.

C: 我想转身就走，给你点离愁。
E: I want to bid you farewell right now to gift you an emotional departure.

C: 我欲乘风归去，旅途轻快惬意，哗哈哈哈……
E: Take me to my place of resting, carefree travels interesting... Whoo-haha!

C: 「我给你我的哲思中所能蕴含的一切悟力，」
E: "I offer you whatever insight my reflections may hold,"

C: 就是要这么直接，这就很好！
E: It's good to be direct!

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 老夫这一生，无怨无悔……
E: I... I've got no complaints or regrets in this life...

C: 不过，这个「美丽狐仙聊天」实在是可疑，他就这样去了，我会有些担心。
E: However, this Foxian Beauty Chat thing is really suspicious. I'm a little worried that he went there just like that.

C: 等等，列车现在可不就停在罗浮吗？那么能不能麻烦你……
E: Wait, isn't the Express stationed at the Luofu right now? Can I trouble you...

C: 是不是以己度人，你在仙舟待上一段时间就知道了。
E: Whether it is just my projection or not, you will find out after staying in Xianzhou for a while.

C: 幸好，这个时候你出现了。你想调查「美丽狐仙聊天」，而且你没有线索。
E: Luckily, you appeared. You want to investigate the Foxian Beauty Chat, and you don't have any clues.

C: 真的可以这样吗？
E: Can you really do that?

C: 谢谢你，及时告诉了我真相。这种骗子就应该早点吃牢饭。
E: Thank you for telling me the truth in time. Scammers like this should all go to jail.

C: 嗨，这都是误会，都是误会啊…唉？鹤运物流哪有什么快递员啊？
E: Hey now, this is just a misunderstanding, you see? And since when does Heron Express have delivery people?

C: 你现在就给我老实交代，黛青小姐姐的礼物不会被你私吞了吧？
E: Now you give me an honest answer: You're not going to steal Ms. Daiqing's gift for yourself, right?

C: 成交，{NICKNAME}。要说我怎么会对你一见如故呢，你身上充满了学会崇尚的品质——实用主义、实用主义、还是实用主义。
E: It's a deal, {NICKNAME}. No wonder I feel so close to you though we've just met. You're the embodiment of the quality that the Guild reveres — pragmatism!

C: 不过如果你愿意考虑，请抓紧一点儿。在生命的户头上，老夫的存额已经所剩不多啦。
E: Still, please don't make me wait too long. I'm afraid I don't have too much time left.

C: 开启「精准识别」模式。
E: Enable the Precise Recognition mode.

C: 如果有什么发现，务必把它带给我瞧瞧。至于眼下……
E: If you find anything, please show me. As for now...

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: （这是陶德的笔记本没错了，可里面的纸页基本都是空白的，并没有什么笔记啊，奇怪……）
E: (This is Todd's notebook, but it's empty inside. How strange...)

C: 你为什么又把这句口号重复了一遍？你听说过哪个组织的接头暗号是一模一样的……
E: Ha, repeating it back to me? What kind of organization would devise a code like that...?

C: 莳者一心，同登仙道。
E: Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Immortality's true path.

C: （后侧裤兜）
E: (Pants pockets at back...)

C: （翻翻他的上衣内侧…）
E: (Let's check his jacket pockets...)

C: 还没脱下此人的靴子，你感觉鼻尖仿佛在凑近一座闷烧的地狱……
E: Before taking off his shoes, you can feel that your nose is breathing fire from a burning hell...

C: …抱歉，白露大人。
E: ...I'm sorry, Lady Bailu.

C: 罢了罢了，燥气郁心，不利长高。不跟她置气了。
E: Hmph, enough. Being angry will stunt my growth... Let's put this behind us.

C: 男人一语不发地看着你。
E: The guy stares at you in silence.

C: 嗯嗯！
E: Uh-huh!

C: 流云渡不就是一个码头吗？
E: Isn't Cloudford a dock?

C: 你帮我逃出丹鼎司，我会帮你救人。
E: You help me escape the Alchemy Commission, I save your sweetheart.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，还有一件事要拜托你。你见识过魔阴身有多危险，要是真到了那个时候…请你一定要保护好龙女大人。
E: {NICKNAME}, I have a favor to ask you. You've seen for yourself how dangerous the mara-struck can be. If the time comes... please protect the Dragon Lady.

C: 哼，他根本没有在这里等我们，难道说又躲到别的地方了吗？
E: Ugh, he isn't waiting for us here. Did he hide somewhere else?

C: 仔细一看确实，头上有犄角，身后有尾巴……
E: Hmm... she does have horns and a tail...

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。有缘的话，咱们在星槎海的小吃摊见！再会！
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. May we meet again at the food stalls of Starskiff Haven! Bye!

C: 我已清楚了，辛苦浣溪小姐。
E: I know all that I wish to know. Thank you, Miss Huanxi.

C: 前方风波未定，此行切要小心应对。
E: It could be dangerous ahead... we should proceed carefully.

C: 小姐，我们在路上遇到了刺客。
E: We were met by an assassin on the way over, Miss.

C: 按照记载，实现龙尊传承需要执行名为「化龙妙法」的秘仪，还有被视为「龙心」的重器。一旦传承完毕，前任龙尊结卵蜕生，新任龙尊将会展露龙相。
E: According to historical records, the high elder succession involves a secret ritual known as the Transmutation Arcanum, as well as a treasure known as dragon heart. Once succession is complete, the former high elder undergoes a hatching rebirth, while the new high elder begins to display draconic features.

C: 你们…是什么人？
E: You... Who are you?

C: 按律本该让你永久入灭。可惜你实在太重要了，龙尊传承绝不能断在你的手上。
E: Our laws could have seen you executed — pity that the high elder succession could not be allowed to die with you.

C: 她已经蜕生了。
E: She's already been reborn.
...Yes.

C: 您的尾巴与龙角是什么化形术的作用吗？
E: Are your tail and horns the result of some shape-shifting magic?

C: 我们当务之急是退回安全区域，切勿逗留。
E: Our priority is to return to safety. Let's keep moving.

C: 整个行医市集，疏散居民，我们就在这里捕获扑满。
E: We'll evacuate the residents throughout the entire Healer's Market and capture the Trotter there.

C: 哦哦，您来了啊。这几位是…三月七小姐和瓦尔特先生？
E: Oh, so you are. And these would be... Miss March 7th and Mr. Yang, I presume?

C: 杨叔！我还以为你要说什么惊天秘密呢，结果就是在以貌取人。杨叔啊，以貌取人可不好啊。
E: Mr. Yang! You were going off his appearance this whole time? I thought you had some super secret thing up your sleeve! Didn't your mom ever tell you not to judge a book by its—

C: 本来就要陪三月一起胡闹。
E: With March here, it's always a delicate situation.

C: 但…更多的情况下，他们的命运有着类似的轨迹。而和这位罗刹长相肖似的人，我见过两个，他们可…并非善类。
E: However... in most cases, their fates will walk a similar course. I've seen two people who looked almost identical to this Luocha... They were not of the virtuous persuasion.

C: 是呀。我一直盼着能遇到一个难解之谜，好好发挥一下我三月七的神探天赋。
E: Yup! I always dreamed of a head-scratcher like this — a chance to showcase my detective genius.

C: 好嘞。咱们走吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Okay, let's go {NICKNAME}.

C: 真不好意思，这也是我的错。我之后会找他算账的。这五百镝，我来赔给你们吧。
E: What!? I apologize, this is my fault — I'll have a word with him later. Let me give you your money back first.

C: 那就收下这个吧，可好吃了。
E: Th—Thanks... In that case, have this instead — it's tasty.

C: 停停停…你看他那穿着打扮和优雅举止，这种人做坏事很有可能，但不会不讲公德……
E: I'm gonna stop you right there. Refined wardrobe, elegant bearing... He may be a villain, but he doesn't look like someone who'd give up on finding a bathroom, even in an emergency...

C: （这个时候，就轮到那个东西派上用场啦。）
E: (I wonder if Luocha has something prepared for this moment...)

C: 那当然行不通了…
E: Of course not...

C: 看来几位相中的罗刹先生，非但不是坏人，甚至是个古道热肠的好人啊。
E: I'm starting to think the Luocha we envisioned doesn't square with the real one... Would a villain do a good deed like this?

C: 晴霓小姐不必担心，我们经历过比这更危险的情况。
E: Don't worry, Miss Qingni. We've been in worse danger.

C: 鸟笼啊…突然想起，永狩原有一种鸟，有着漂亮的羽翼，但无法被人驯养。因为只要将它们关在笼中，它们便活不了多久。
E: A birdcage... Huh, that reminds me. Have you guys heard of the birds that live in the Ever-Hunt Plains? They have beautiful feathers but you can't domesticate them. They don't live long if you lock them up in a cage.

C: 交给我们吧！
E: Leave it to us!

C: 多谢了，将军。
E: Thank you, general.

C: 有点傻…
E: That's a bit silly...

C: 是我欠考虑了。
E: Of course, you're right, sorry!

C: 咱们一起读一读吧，也许能从日记里找到些什么。
E: Let's read it together. Maybe her diary holds the key to all of this.

C: （但这似乎不是现在该提出的话题。）
E: (...Still, it doesn't seem like something to bring up now.)

C: 可你知道，那场夺走了采翼…夺走了几十万战友的战役…我们最终是如何取得胜利的吗？
E: But do you know how we won that war? The war that took away Caiyi and the lives of hundreds of thousands of fighters?

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: 我知道你会回心转意的。谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I knew you'd come around. On the Xianzhou... you're the only person I can turn to for help.

C: 我和你是什么关系？
E: What is my connection to you?

C: 你以前跟着卡芙卡，对吗？有阵子她在执行某个任务，你就在她身边。我还记得。
E: You once followed Kafka, didn't you? There was a time when she was on a mission — you were next to her. I remember.

C: 你们来晚了，通缉犯逃去那边了。
E: You're here too late. The criminal ran thataway.

C: 噫，别再说了！在恐怖片里，出现的这人肯定是幕后黑手。
E: Ah! Stop talking! If there is someone here, they're in my bad books already.

C: {NICKNAME}这话咱爱听，杨叔…也谢谢你的解释。
E: Y'know, you're talking my language. B—But I liked your explanation too, Mr. Yang, hehe...

C: 喔…球棒侠。很豪迈的名字。
E: *chuckle* What a heroic-sounding name.

C: 救人所急的事情，交给专业的人来办——
E: Emergencies should be dealt with by professionals...

C: 在下只是一介行商……
E: Not exactly my expertise. I'm just a traveling merchant...

C: 我当时便想，动不动坠毁星槎…这样的人也能算是飞行士么？可转念又想，每次她都能化险为夷，安然生还，这份运气真是令人惊叹。
E: I remember thinking — how could an ace pilot crash-land her starskiff so many times... then I realized that every time, she made the best of the situation and got back alive. Her luck really was out of this world.

C: 白露小姐，来问诊的不是我，是我身边这位。
E: Miss Bailu, she's here for a consultation.

C: 但是你我也好，云骑也罢，帝弓的将军们…都不过是神明弈局里的棋子，我已厌倦了走在被预设的命途之上。
E: ...but in the end, whether it be you, me, the Cloud Knights, or the generals of the Reignbow Arbiter... We are all just pawns in a game of the gods. I am sick and tired of treading on a predetermined path.

C: 这封信的字迹行笔确有剑士风范。
E: The handwriting does seem like that of a swordmaster, but Blade would've gotten straight to the point.

C: 所以，列车上的那封信是你寄出的？
E: So, you're the one that mailed the letter to the Express.

C: 你趁乱潜入幽囚狱，却也无所作为。如今又宣称自己要为这场星核灾变负责，伏罪自首。
E: You took advantage of the chaos to sneak into The Shackling Prison, but seemingly took no course of action. Now, you claim that you are responsible for the Stellaron crisis and wish to surrender yourself.

C: 关于你问讯至今，却始终避而不谈的那个人…令师镜流。
E: You wish to discuss the one person you've avoided mentioning up to now... your master — Jingliu.

C: 你是一个有责任心的人，不能让它留在这里不管…干脆带它去找三月七吧。
E: Being the responsible person you are, you can't just leave it here... How about asking March 7th for help?

C: 此刻，长身玉立的少女就站在甬道尽头，如同一把脱鞘之剑，锋锐逼人。
E: At the moment, a graceful young lady was standing at the end of the corridor, like a sharp sword unleashing from its sheath.

C: 「那些与我对阵的家伙，不过一击就成了肉泥。但换做云上五骁的英雄，也许能试出这个问题的答案吧！」
E: "My opponents have all turned into balls of flesh with just one blow. Maybe the High-Cloud Quintet can help me know its true limit!"

C: 对了，你该不会趁机转身逃跑吧，大姐姐？
E: What if you're just using this as a chance to escape?

C: 人呢……？
E: Where did she go...?

C: 每个种族都会渴求慈怀药王的恩惠与治愈，无论他们是否听说过「丰饶」的名字。
E: Every species yearns for the favor and curing of Merciful Medicus, regardless of whether they have heard of the Abundance or not.

C: 他盯着你的脸瞧了半天，意识到这不过是个玩笑。
E: He stares at your face for a long time before he realizes that you're joking.

C: 你领悟到了长生的意义，这已经使你超越了那些可耻的凡人。
E: You have been enlightened to the significance of immortality. You have already surpassed those shameful mortals.

C: 相信以你的能力，只要继续这样尽职尽责，很快就能见到魁首了。
E: Keep fulfilling your duties — as you have been. With your strength, you'll have an audience with the master in no time.

C: 还有什么其他问题吗？
E: Is there anything else you'd like to know about?

C: {NICKNAME}，鉴于药王秘传已经对我们的卧底行动有所察觉，神策府这边也是时候收网了。
E: {NICKNAME}, given that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus has become aware of our operation, it's about time the Seat of Divine Foresight reeled in its net.

C: 云骑也不会特意去看「建木」啊，再说我刚来不久……
E: Clouds Knights don't visit the Ambrosial Arbor without a reason, plus I'm new here...

C: 我、我…你给我一炷香的时间考虑？
E: I—I... can you give me a moment to consider those options?

C: 就差几步路了，您不跟我们一起离开吗？
E: It's just a few steps away — you're not leaving with us?

C: 我知道该这么做，但…
E: I know what to do, but...

C: 啊，这可是我登上列车的证明。列车长亲手递给我的车票。
E: Ah, proof that I boarded the Express. The conductor gave me this.

C: 啊，这是我在贝洛伯格地底下拣到的小小战利品。发着光，还蛮漂亮的。
E: *sigh* So shiny and pretty. I picked up this little guy in Belobog's Underworld.

C: 三月七。
E: March 7th.

C: （再等等…）
E: (Wait)

C: 准备好了的话，就开始吧。
E: Whenever you're ready...

C: 我没事…就是有些难受……
E: I'm fine... Just a little light-headed is all...

C: 是吧…所以这份礼物，我也就欣然笑纳啦！
E: Well, guess I'll keep it then!

C: 黑天鹅女士的梦泡到此为止了。请问您对这次体验还满意吗？
E: That's the end of Miss Black Swan's dream bubble. Are you satisfied with your experience?

C: 可是我很感兴趣，毕竟那可是演武仪典的奖品！
E: But I am! It's the prize for the Wardance, after all!

C: 虽然神锋蒙尘、遍布裂纹，但此剑筋骨正如仙舟云骑，历战不折。只需觅工造司良工修缮打磨，便能令它重焕旧日神采。
E: Although its blade is worn and cracked, its essence remains as resilient as the Xianzhou Cloud Knights. All it needs is some repairs and polishing by the skilled craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission to regain its former glory.

C: 请这位骑士和使团成员一同，前往工造司，在那儿——
E: Now, esteemed Knight and delegation members, please head to the Artisanship Commission, where —

C: 这一切是那么猝不及防，就在一瞬间，所有声音都像被滤去一样，只有筋骨碎裂、鲜血泵出的声音被无限放大——
E: It was so sudden and unexpected. Everything went silent for a moment. All I could hear was the sound of bones breaking and blood pouring out...

C: …云璃，执事官叫你来的原因，想必你也清楚了吧。
E: ...Yunli, I'm sure you understand why the official called you here, right?

C: 有没有可能是匠人偷了剑？
E: Could it be that a craftsman stole the sword?

C: 她还在与我赌气，没有找我。若当时与你一同回来，倒是能免了嫌疑。
E: No, she was still mad at me, so she didn't come by. If she had come with you, she wouldn't be a suspect right now.

C: 几片即将凋萎的花瓣，确切的说，玫瑰花瓣。
E: A few petals, teetering on the brink of withering. More precisely, a single rose petal.

C: 因为即便过去了这么久…我依然想让那人回到故乡。
E: Because even after all this time... I still wanted my master to come back home.

C: 数百年来，石碑底下生长出一株金色的树，枝条从未枯朽。卡勒瓦拉人视它为神话存在的证明。
E: Over the centuries, a golden tree sprouted from under the monument, and its branches have never withered. We Kalevalans see it as proof of the hero's existence.

C: 我和云璃分别后，还特意发消息叮嘱了公输师傅。
E: After Yunli and I went our separate ways, I messaged Master Gongshu to inform him about the incident.

C: 黑天鹅大人，我们总算等到您了！我是此地的捕头，旁边那位则是协助我一起办案的捕快。
E: Lady Black Swan, you're here! I'm the constable, and this here assisting me is the bailiff for this case.

C: 今天本应是花火大人在金槌府邸接见手下三位勇士的日子，可当勇士们走进府邸后，看见的却是「花火大人的尸体」。
E: Miss Sparkle was supposed to receive three valiant warriors at the Goldhammer residence today but upon their arrival, all they found was her body.

C: 佐罗是花火大人部下悍将，在对抗山贼时，奋勇抗敌，<color=#dbc291ff>右手不幸被斩断了</color>。现在正在练习用左手写字和拿筷子，真是可怜啊。
E: Lefton is one of Miss Sparkle's chief lieutenants, whose <color=#dbc291ff>right hand was unfortunately severed</color> while he was valiantly fighting off the Annihilation Gang. He's now learning how to write and hold a fork with his left hand — how tough that must be!

C: …您这是什么意思？
E: ...What do you mean by that?

C: 别心急，让我再想一想吧。
E: Don't worry. Let me think again.

C: 谢谢你的夸奖，亲爱的。不过鉴于你刚才的作弊行为，这次可没那么好糊弄了哦！答错了…就接受惩罚吧！
E: Thanks for the compliment, my dear. But you can't try to fool me seeing as you've just tried to cheat! Wrong answer... accept your punishment!

C: …也就是你，「桑博」先生。尽管我一直在使用这个称呼——但它最早是你提出的。
E: ...which means it's you, Mr. Sampo. I've been using this term of address — but it was you who first came up with it.

C: 喂！黑天鹅小姐，等一等，等一等！花火大人还有最后一件事要宣布——
E: Hey! Miss Black Swan, wait up. Wait up! Miss Sparkle has one final message to announce...

C: 哦…您已经找到答案了吗？
E: Hmm... Have you solved the case?

C: 证据就是这枚戒指，对么？
E: This ring is a piece of evidence, right?

C: 竟然不行吗？看来花火小姐比我想象中还要「严谨」一些。
E: It doesn't? Looks like Miss Sparkle is more careful than I thought.

C: 果真和你说的一样，解谜就是个幌子，那姑娘纯拿咱们寻开心呢。现在怎么办，就一直被她牵着鼻子走？
E: Just as you said, solving puzzles is all just a cover for something else. That girl is toying with us. What should we do now? Just keep getting led around by her?

C: 这是什么恩将仇报…不赏我也就罢了，还要给我加活……
E: Is this what I get? No reward and a bunch of extra work...

C: 哈，我警惕性超高的，除了你，丹恒，杨叔和姬子姐，我谁都信不过。
E: Ha, I'm the queen of vigilance, thank you very much. I don't trust anyone except Dan Heng, Mr. Yang, Himeko, and you.

C: 不愧是神迹，信手造化生命。这股力量，真了不得……
E: ...Miraculous, it creates life at will. Such incredible power...

C: 那头鹿不行了，就趁现在，一鼓作气！
E: It's getting weak! Quick, finish it off!

C: 在下衷心希望，这是你我二人的永别。
E: I sincerely wish that this will be our last meeting.

C: 嗯…不好说，您先去看看情况吧。有什么事我们随时联系。
E: Hmm... I'm not sure. Why don't you check out the situation first? Just drop me a line if there is a problem.

C: 你三拳两脚击杀了几匹饿狼，正准备检查一下它们的尸首，却听见身后传来了一个优雅但怪腔怪调的女声。
E: It doesn't take you a lot of effort to finish off the hungry wolves. As you were about to check their carcasses, a graceful but sarcastic female voice comes from behind you.

C: 你好，我叫钟珊，是帮助{NICKNAME}采购这批机械生命的战略合作伙伴。
E: Hello, my name is Zhongshan. I'm {NICKNAME}'s strategic partner in the purchase of mechanical lifeforms.

C: 是指「放生机器」…？
E: Do you mean the idea of releasing machines...?

C: 插个嘴，我也这么看。
E: That's what I think too.

C: 嘶…这张照片用做视频封面，能过审吗？
E: I wonder if this thumbnail would be approved...

C: 就说冥差们被恶灵附身了…
E: We could say evil spirits possessed the spiritfarers...

C: 听到了听到了！吵死了…本大爷又不是伺候人类的珍禽异兽。
E: I heard you, I heard you! Tsk, unbelievable... What am I, her pet?

C: 传说就是因为不了解产生的。
E: Myths are born out of ignorance.

C: 人呢？糟了，藿藿也不见了……
E: Huohuo? Oh no. Where did she go...?

C: 啊，不对，不对不对不对，现在的你，连看门狗都算不上！你只是一条…「尾巴」～对吧，尾巴尾巴尾巴！
E: Oh! Forgive me! Did I say guard dog? No, no, no, that won't do... You're just a guard dog's "tail," right? Just a tail, a tail, a tail!

C: 真抱歉，藿藿，你没事吧？
E: I'm sorry, Huohuo... Are you okay?

C: 对对对，你说的对，我跑不了，这下可以信我了吧？
E: Yes, yes, you're right. I can't escape. Do you trust me now?

C: 但是，汝为什么要背叛同族？为什么要帮助镇伏汝等的仙舟？
E: I have a question. Why are you betraying your own kin? Why would you help the Xianzhou when we have sealed you for so long?

C: 一言为定！我和我的棋子们，这就来找你！
E: Deal! My pawns and I will show you no mercy!

C: 啧啧，按恚炎的说法，外面的冥差们岂不是全军覆没了？真没用！
E: Tsk, does that mean all the spiritfarers out there have fallen? What a useless army.

C: 要是我能再有用一些，尾巴就不至于牺牲自己……
E: If I were stronger, Mr. Tail wouldn't have had to sacrifice himself...

C: 现在你还能玩出什么花样来？
E: What tricks can you possibly pull as you are now?

C: 嗯，玩得很开心。
E: Yes I am.

C: 报酬方面，您不必担心…多少我都可以支付。毕竟金钱对我来说已经没有意义了。
E: As for the reward, you don't have to worry... I'll pay whatever it takes. Money has no meaning to me anymore.

C: （总之，先拿回去给她吧。）
E: (In any case, I'd better bring this back to her first.)

C: 要说撒谎，这整片梦境不就是一个家族建造出来的美丽谎言吗？醒醒吧，没人在乎你说的是不是实话，只要能吸引人买单就够了。
E: Speaking of lies, isn't this entire Dreamscape a beautiful lie spun by The Family? Wake up. No one cares if what you say is truth, as long as you can get people to foot the bill.

C: 那错的是谁？难道是我吗？
E: Then who is? Me?

C: 如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处是现实。
E: If you've just woken up from a dream, remember — this is reality.

C: 有些人能够全身心地投入美梦，抛弃掉多余的杂念；也有少数人——像柯柯娜那样的人——始终无法融入其中。
E: Some give themselves completely to beautiful dreams, and toss away unneeded distractions. There are also few — like Cocona — who can never really blend in.

C: 好了。祝您和您的朋友往后的日子里每天都有好心情，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: There we are. I wish that you and your friend be in good spirits from this day forth, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 你不好奇现实里的状况吗？
E: Are you not curious about what's happening in reality?

C: 现在，我最好先找个僻静的角落避避风头，避免再惹麻烦上身……
E: For now, I should find a discreet corner and lay low. I don't want to find myself in trouble again...

C: 你尝试着转动门把手，实则心中没抱多少希望。
E: You try turning the door handle, with only a paltry amount of hope in your heart.

C: 「你不了解我，更不了解我身边的人。你早该弄明白一件事——」
E: "You do not understand me, let alone the men by my side. There is one thing that you should have understood by now..."

C: 那位先生已经离开匹诺康尼了，他……
E: This gentleman has already left Penacony. He...

C: 别介意。
E: Do not worry.

C: 当然不会！欢迎您加入这场由莱斯利•迪恩主演的冒险，芙洛拉小姐。我向您保证，这趟旅程绝对充满刺激和挑战。
E: Of course not! Welcome to this adventure starring Lesley Dean, Ms. Flora! I assure you, this journey will be full of thrills and challenges!

C: 他是个高尚的人。
E: He is a noble man.

C: 关于「晖长石号」的所有权问题，有些事项还需要与您接洽一二呢。
E: Regarding the issue of Radiant Feldspar's ownership, there are some matters that require your attention.

C: 很好，恭喜您招到心仪的大副！
E: Very good. Congrats on hiring your desired first mate!

C: 您有什么喜欢的宠物或者吉祥物吗？
E: Do you have any pets or mascots you like?

C: 除此以外，还意外拿到了一位知名旅游博主的大力推荐。种种事项，皆已证明了我的管理准则有效性。
E: Additionally, we've also gotten a glowing recommendation from a famous travel influencer! All these events prove the effectiveness of my management guidelines.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 佩德罗吩咐船员们对空艇尾翼进行了涂装。
E: Pedro instructs the crew to paint the airship's empennage.

C: 我等不及要看了！
E: I can't wait to see it!

C: 船长，请您站在这里，让我比对着雕像看看，是否有什么细节问题……
E: Captain, please stand here beside the statue so I can see if there are any issues with the details...

C: 「球棒老板」！幸会，幸会！
E: Boss Baseballer! It's an honor.

C: 咳…告诉你吧，我在来匹诺康尼之前就听说了，有一个<color=#dbc291ff>极端危险的邪恶组织</color>已经在盛会之星扎根，准备以此处作为大本营，展开一系列危险行动。
E: *ahem*... Here's the thing — before I even came to Penacony, I'd heard about an <color=#dbc291ff>extremely dangerous evil organization</color> that's taken root on this Planet of Festivities. They're planning to use Penacony as a base for a series of deadly operations.

C: 豪言壮语虽已放出，但波提欧兄弟其实还没能掌握这个「组织」的名字。
E: Brave words, but Boothill unfortunately failed to even get the name of this cult.

C: 哪里可疑了？放心吧，我又不傻！一般的诈骗消息忽悠不了我的。
E: What's dodgy? Don't worry, I'm not an idiot! Normal scammers can't get one over me.

C: 我已经调整好了，谢谢你真诚的关心。
E: I'm feeling well now. Thanks for your concern.

C: 等会儿，你是之前的…
E: Wait a minute. Are you...

C: 别被{F#她}{M#他}骗了！巨人族都是恶念堆叠的聚合体，是狡猾的魔鬼！
E: Don't be fooled by {F#her}{M#him}! All giants harbor malicious intent. They're all cunning devils!

C: …很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
E: ...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...

C: 事态紧急，但你没法在变身的情况下掏出手机联系他们。一是因为哈努兄弟的手实在太小，二是因为我们根本没做相关的动画。
E: The situation's pressing, but you can't take out your phone to contact them when you're in Brother Hanu's body. It's partly because Brother Hanu's hands are too small, and partly because the dev team didn't make the animation for that part.

C: 他们把我的朋友抓走了！
E: They abducted my friend!

C: 原来你是这样理解的吗？
E: Is that how you interpret it?

C: 班上得如何了？
E: How's work going for you?

C: 我也想和他们一一告别。
E: I want to... say goodbye, too.

C: 先前天击将军、烛渊将军已在神策府与景元将军作别。二位将军希望轻车简从，不需要云骑军列阵过于引人注目。本来彦卿觉得独自前来临舟饯别，未免有些失礼……
E: The Merlin's Claw and the Flaming Heart have already said their farewells to General Jing Yuan at the Seat of Divine Foresight. They wanted to travel light without the Cloud Knights' escort so as not to attract too much attention. I originally thought it may be a little rude to come to bid them farewell on my own, but...

C: 拜别怀炎将军。
E: I bid you farewell, General Huaiyan.

C: 啊？所以，你们在这里站着，跟本座，嗯…一点关系都没有吗？
E: Huh? So, you all standing here has... absolutely nothing to do with me?

C: 没错。
E: Indeed I am.

C: 这份遗作手稿，是莱恩先生的梦想，我本想自己有一天能够亲手实现…可是，现在我连这样的机会都没有了。
E: That manuscript is Master Ryan's magnum opus. I thought that one day I'd be able to actualize its visions myself... But now I won't even get the chance to try.

C: 下一份。
E: Next.

C: 不想吃不打紧，那你们两个呢，想吃点儿什么？
E: It's okay if you don't wanna eat. You two, what do you want?

C: …星槎海…星槎…我只想看看星槎在天上飞。
E: ...Starskiff Haven... Starskiffs... I just want to see starskiffs soaring through space.

C: 「好的设计是实用的，越是实用的，就越是难以被察觉」，师傅常常这样说。他一生钟情星槎，希望能作出更好的星槎来。
E: "Good design is practical, and the more practical it is, the harder it is to be appreciated," is what my master always said. He's loved starskiffs dearly his whole life, and hoped to build an even better model.

C: 加油，去完成它吧！
E: Go for it, get it done!

C: 我要证明他的时间没有白费，他的时间还将我的身上流淌下去，还将在他的作品上流淌下去。
E: I want to prove that the time he's spent was not wasted. That his time spent will flow on through me, and that it will flow on through his surviving works.

C: （向后行驶）
E: (Move backward)

C: 「傻瓜飞行士系统」…驾驶辅助型金人…有这套系统装在星槎上不就好了吗？嗨，真是搞不懂现在的年轻人……
E: You have a set-and-forget pilot system... and a driving support aurumaton... Why don't you fix the system onto the starskiffs? How youngsters nowadays think is beyond me...

C: 你们还记得吗？这份手稿是「师傅的梦想」，我必须要完成它。
E: Do you still remember the manuscript is my master's dream? I have to complete it by hook or crook.

C: 我在太卜司的书库里翻阅典籍时看到过，在仙舟上，生命并没有严格意义的终结……
E: According to a book I flipped through at the repository of Divination Commission, life on Xianzhou doesn't end in a strict sense...

C: 不然你以为我说这事儿干嘛？
E: Why else do you think I'm telling you this?

C: 你们刚才在聊什么呢？
E: What were you two chatting about?

C: 我们要不去外面吧？这里的氛围不太适合说话。
E: Do you wanna head outside? It's a bit loud for talking in here.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 史瓦罗下手也够狠的。
E: Svarog hit pretty hard.

C: 你晕过去的唯一好处，就是我们不用再听你喊一遍了……
E: The one good thing about you losing is that we didn't have to hear it again.

C: 呃…没别的意思，我单纯觉得这聚落里的人没那个本事。
E: *sigh* It's not impossible, I just don't think there's anyone in the settlement capable of something like that.

C: …谁、谁在那边？！
E: Wh—Who's there!?

C: 行啊，你快去吧！咱们回头见。
E: Yeah, go ahead! We'll catch up later.

C: 评估结果：对象确实只为「切磋」而来。
E: Evaluation completed. The opposing party only came to spar.

C: 卢卡，你老实交代——你来这里是不是有什么别的目的？
E: Luka, come clean with me. Are you here for some other reason?

C: 「再次维护了公正跟和平！」
E: "...upholding justice and peace once again!"

C: 走，我们过去看看。
E: Let's go have a look.

C: 我们去织机前面等他吧。那是码头上最显眼的地标。
E: Let's wait for him in front of the loom. It's the most prominent landmark on the dock.

C: 去爬上建木之巅吧！
E: Why not climb to the top of the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 求你别说了，是我一时失察。
E: Don't remind me. I just zoned out for a moment, that's all.

C: 哦对了，上了年纪便容易忘事…旁边这位是我的徒孙，云璃……
E: Oh, I almost forgot... This is my apprentice, Yunli...

C: 爷爷…呃，爷爷哪头都不站！
E: I... um... I don't take sides!

C: {NICKNAME}，你没感到奇怪吗？仙舟人会衰老吗？我在仙舟上可是很少见到老人，就算瞧见也是些异邦人。
E: Don't you find it strange, {NICKNAME}? Do Xianzhou people age? I rarely see any old people on the Xianzhou ship, and when I do, they're usually travelers.

C: 你并没有多心。进司辰宫开始，我才意识到你所说的朱明仙舟的使者竟是朱明的将军本人。那么，曜青仙舟的使者，想必也就是那位天击将军了？
E: No, you're not. When I entered the Palace of Astrum, I realized that the messenger from the Xianzhou Zhuming was actually the Arbiter-General himself. So, the messenger from the Xianzhou Yaoqing must be the Merlin's Claw herself, I presume?

C: 步离人？
E: Borisin?

C: 我倒是有说服斯科特的经验…
E: Well, I know a thing or two about convincing Skott...

C: 向他保证你们会小心行事
E: Assure him that you will proceed with caution.

C: 你与天舶司的冲突一旦激化，不仅会给自己带来更多商业上的不便，也会为你的职业前景带来许多无形的阻碍。
E: If this conflict with the Sky-Faring Commission escalates, it won't just make things difficult for your business, but it'll also have an impact on your career down the line.

C: 金人巷的时候是我不对，我向你诚挚道歉，求求你大人不记小人过，给我一次洗心革面重新做人的机会吧！
E: I'm truly sorry for what I did in Aurum Alley. Please, just forgive me and give me an opportunity to fix things!

C: 赶紧搜查吧！别得了便宜还卖乖！
E: Just get on with the inspection! Don't act all chummy with me now that you've got your way.

C: 嘿嘿，也没那么厉害啦～
E: Hehe, it wasn't a big deal, really...

C: 这么多年过去，罗浮丹鼎司的景色依旧未曾变改。
E: All these years, and the view at the Alchemy Commission hasn't changed a bit.

C: 你还是乖乖把剑还我，恭恭敬敬地向我道歉，然后哭着鼻子回去向爷爷诉苦吧。
E: Why don't you just give me back my sword, sincerely apologize, and then go cry your eyes out to your grandpa?

C: 早些时候在司辰宫，晚辈已向炎老介绍过星穹列车的客人了。不过那时人多耳杂，只能寒暄些琐事。现在，我将三位正式引荐给炎老。
E: Earlier at the Palace of Astrum, I introduced these guests from the Astral Express to you, Elder Huaiyan, but with all the people around, we only exchanged pleasantries. Now, I'd like to officially introduce them to you.

C: 彦卿，传徒授艺的过程也是在审视自己所学，加深对技艺的理解。你做了多年弟子，是时候该换换眼界了。
E: Yanqing, teaching an apprentice is also a way of honing your own skills and gaining insights. You've been an apprentice for years, it's about time you looked at swordplay from another perspective.

C: 唤醒「信使」。
E: Awaken the Messenger.

C: 眼下你们只能靠自己的双腿追上那些犯人。
E: You'll have to run on your own two feet to catch up to those prisoners now.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了啊。
E: There you are, {NICKNAME}.

C: 丹恒，你的心真是比你平日里的笑话还冷。
E: Dan Heng, do you even have a heart? Did you lose it somewhere?

C: 这是…仙舟服饰？好漂亮呀！
E: What's this... Xianzhou clothing? It's so beautiful!

C: 假设现在有两个人，一个阴险卑鄙地站着，另一个光明正大地躺着。你们倒是说说看，那个躺着的有什么办法去控诉那个站着的「阴险卑鄙」呢？
E: Picture this: Two individuals, the one standing is full of malice, the other lying down is honorable and righteous. How can the one who's lying down label the one standing as "sinister?"

C: 我也正是为了这样的我而挥剑。
E: That's why I wield my sword.

C: 去查验货船，需要做的准备还有很多。还有，记得带走那几只箱子。
E: To check the freight skiffs. We've got a lot of preparations to do. Also, don't forget to take those crates with you.

C: 与此同时，在神策府中……
E: Meanwhile, in the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: 不就是为了建木重生的事？
E: You're here about the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection, no?

C: 复仇…这同样是一种「巡猎」。但这不意味着她就有能力将星核带入持明把守的鳞渊境。
E: Revenge... is also a form of The Hunt. However, that doesn't explain how she managed to bring the Stellaron into the Scalegorge Waterscape, which was guarded by the Vidyadhara.

C: 我担心伙伴安危，擅自行动，确有不是。但……
E: I was concerned about the safety of my companions, so I acted brazenly. I admit I was reckless at that time, but...

C: 你要扣留我们？
E: Are you imprisoning us?

C: …我没有问题。
E: ...I'm okay with that.

C: 你还好吗，丹恒？
E: Are you okay, Dan Heng?

C: 箱笼堆叠，真是碍眼。
E: Ugh, what an eyesore. This place is packed with boxes and crates.

C: 治愈将军的法子，会是你吗，呼雷？
E: Could you be the key to a cure for the General, Hoolay?

C: 是！
E: Yes, ma'am!

C: 诸位，小心！
E: Watch your back!

C: 现在，都蓝的崽子们，跟我走！
E: Now, Duran's whelps! Follow me!

C: …那该怎么办嘛！
E: ...So, what do we do?

C: 云骑将军亲履险地是常事。呼雷出逃，曜青来使遭到步离人挟持，生死不明。这桩祸事非同小可。
E: It's common for Cloud Knight generals to face danger directly. Hoolay has escaped, and the Yaoqing envoy is being held hostage by the borisin. His fate is unknown. This is a grave matter.

C: 诚如灵砂小姐所说，将百杀不死的怪物投入恒星，是个一了百了的法子。可惜……
E: Just like you said, Miss Lingsha, casting a creature that can't be killed into a star would be a way to permanently get rid of it, but unfortunately...

C: 谢我？
E: Thanking me?

C: 你敏锐地感到不远处有一道目光正死死盯着你。
E: You can sense someone staring at you from not far away.

C: 你说的不错。那么，你等来了云骑封锁港口吗？
E: Exactly as you said. So, have the Cloud Knights closed the ports?

C: …我可以告诉你关于她的一切，但是，要用一个答案换一个答案。
E: ...Fine, I'll tell you what you want to know about her, but I expect something in return.

C: 你们也许从未在战场上见过我，但一定听过我的名字。不过是谁准许你用问题来回答问题了！告诉我——
E: Perhaps you haven't met me on the battlefield, but I'm certain you've heard my name. Now, I'm asking you a question, so answer me! Tell me...

C: 伤者的血压快见底了。听见了没有，椒丘！
E: Her blood pressure is dropping. Do you hear me, Jiaoqiu?

C: 大人！负责接应的同胞发来了消息，迴星港的布置被人发现，我们现在必须立刻动身了！
E: My Lord! We've received a message. Our arrangement at Stargazer Navalia has been discovered. We must act quickly!

C: 我其实是看比赛的观众…
E: I'm just a spectator...

C: 怎么可能，你再给我好好看看嘛！是不是满分也是5？
E: Impossible! Take a closer look! Is it scored out of five or something?

C: 唉，也不知道彦卿师父那边怎么样了……
E: I wonder how Master Yanqing is doing over there...

C: 久战不利，眼下必须争分夺秒地挫败呼雷制造的闹剧。
E: We cannot allow the fighting to continue. This is now a race against time to stop this farce that Hoolay has created.

C: 步离人…他们越来越多了！
E: The borisin... They keep coming!

C: 咱们的彦卿小弟不是说要放弃守擂，选择猎狼，为将军分忧解难吗？
E: Didn't little Yanqing claim he was going to give up being the ringmaster and go on the hunt instead? Help shoulder the general's burdens?

C: 尊敬的各位来宾，各位选手，欢迎各位莅临罗浮仙舟星天演武仪典！
E: We would like to welcome all of our honored guests and contestants... to the Xianzhou Luofu's Luminary Wardance ceremony!

C: 你们…是真正的步离人吧？！
E: You're... you're real borisin, aren't you?

C: 这可是绝招。
E: That's my special finishing move.

C: 真是令人印象深刻的一剑啊…和当年被{RUBY_B#镜流}那个女人{RUBY_E#}击败时如此相似。
E: Such an unforgettable blade... So similar to the one wielded by {RUBY_B#Jingliu}that woman{RUBY_E#} who defeated me all those years ago.

C: 不要逼我……
E: Don't push me...

C: 凝梨，别停下，快跑…！
E: Neergul, don't stop, keep running...!

C: 快醒醒啊，将军！
E: Snap out of it, General!

C: 你要不来问我都快忘了这事了…这梦里什么事都可能发生，早就见怪不怪了。
E: I'd almost forgotten about it if you didn't ask... Anything can really happen in this dream — it's not really something to be flabbergasted about.

C: 吾乃御前侍卫。
E: I am an imperial retainer.

C: 哎哟，真不巧…我这才刚入梦，什么也没看见……
E: Ooh, how unfortunate... I just entered the dream, and didn't see a thing...

C: 铁柱…朕懂了，是因你善用那根铁棒，对吧？这名字倒是很有那仙舟韵味！
E: Skybatter... Ah I see, it's because you're so skillful at using that bat, right? This name does have a certain charm to it!

C: 不不不，并非什么大事。朕一直强调要以和为贵，避免冲突。那个…不过「世界尽头」酒吧的那群人啊，确实比较难缠……
E: No no no, it's not something major. I've always emphasized the importance of peace and avoiding conflict. But... those guys at the World's End bar are a little hard to shake off...

C: 什么「陛下」，你脑袋不想要了？皇帝才能叫「陛下」，我是公主，对我要称呼「殿下」！
E: Your Majesty? You wanna lose your head? You call the Emperor "Your Majesty." I'm a princess, so you will address me as "Your Highness"!

C: 哼，那你想个更好的办法嘛～再不免除赋税，边境星区可能真要造反了！
E: Hmph, you think of something better then! If we don't lift the levies in time, the frontier star district is seriously going to rebel!

C: 德奇特将军，朕打在襁褓之中时就认得你，那时你是多么英武…可现在，你竟这样可悲地抵赖自己的罪行……
E: General Daquette, I've known you since I was a babe-in-arms — you were so heroic back then... But now, here you are, pathetically denying your own crimes...

C: 为什么我会任由时光蹉跎，却丝毫没起过自我拯救的念头？难道是……
E: Why would I while my time away without the slightest thought of rescuing myself? Could it be...

C: 所以，查德威克确实是…
E: So, are you saying that Chadwick was...

C: 你先请，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: After you, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: 说真的，杜…我有些担心。你们想要的东西，那种只存在于理论构想里的「武器」…它真的有可能颠覆银河。
E: Honestly speaking, Dud, I'm a bit apprehensive about this. What you guys are seeking is a weapon that only exists theoretically... It could cause an upheaval in the galaxy.

C: …这扇门之后，女士们先生们，就是我们烹制「奇迹」的后厨。
E: ...Ladies and gentlemen, the space beyond this door is where we concoct the "miracle."

C: 宇宙并不在意我们——宇宙只是存在着，并凝望着。
E: The universe isn't concerned with our presence... It merely exists and observes.

C: 太好了…我已经太久没和人正常地对过话了。我在这里…什么都不缺，他们会满足我的任何要求…我只是没有自由。
E: Wonderful... It's been so long since I had a normal conversation with someone. I don't need anything here, as they'll get me whatever I want... I'm just deprived of freedom.

C: 我很害怕，年轻人…我害怕自己建立起来的防线会在死亡到来的一瞬完全崩塌。
E: I'm scared, youngster... I'm worried that all the precautions I've taken so far will be negated upon my demise.

C: …等等，你的意思是……
E: ...Wait, are you saying...

C: 呜呜…我的「冯恩三世」…好不容易找到了点在梦里加工美食的窍门…
E: *sob* My Vaughn III... I finally managed to get the hang of making snacks in a dream too...

C: 半透明的梦泡在乔伊的指尖凝结，变化成小鸟的形状，飞向门内。另一侧传来惊呼。
E: The translucent dream bubble coalesces on Joey's fingertip, turns into the shape of a bird, and flies through the door. A gasp can be heard from the other end.

C: 哼，要是我拒绝呢？你如果对我使用暴力，那可是猎犬对隐夜鸫的冒犯。违背「五大家系联合一心」的宗旨，你们的家主担得起这个责任吗？
E: Hmph, and what if I refuse? If you detain me using violence, that's a slight on the Nightingales, a breach of the creed of the "unity of the five major lineages." Will your family head be able to bear this responsibility?

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 家系已经失去了很多人，不能再失去任何一个了……
E: The lineage's lost many people, and couldn't afford to lose even a single more...

C: 「十二时刻梦境建设基本完成，漫长的『筑梦工程』计划圆满成功——笔者相信，这将是匹诺康尼最好的时代，伟大的『逐梦时代』……」
E: "Construction of the Twelve Hours in the Dreamscape is almost complete, and the prolonged Dreamweaver Project is a success. The author believes that this will be Penacony's finest age, the grand Age of Dreaming..."

C: 有考虑过加入「酒馆」吗？
E: Have you considered joining a tavern?

C: 我本来觉得这没什么，但有些买得起面包的公民知道之后，也过来占我的便宜，搞得人人都想吃免费的剩面包，我的生意都变差了。
E: I didn't think much of it at first, but the people who could afford them caught wind of this, and also came by to take advantage of my kindness. Everyone ended up wanting free bread, and my business suffered.

C: 你猜？
E: Take a guess.

C: 傻孩子，现在能有吃的就不错了，还奢求什么！
E: Silly child, having something to eat is a blessing in and of itself. You shouldn't be so picky!

C: 你都做了什么？
E: What did you do?

C: 帕拉滕说你被卫兵抓了。
E: Palaten said you were caught by the guards.

C: 你？你、你…真是哪壶不开提哪壶！
E: You? You, you... stop your slander!

C: 倘若每一位公民都能像他这般，那么在智慧与意志的交锋中，终会有一条清晰的道路显现。
E: If every citizen was like him, with the clash of wisdom and will, a clear path would emerge.

C: 只要黑潮的威胁还存在一天，这样的悲剧就不会结束…所以，我们必须狩猎火种。
E: As long as the threat of the black tide exists for another day, this tragedy will not cease... Hence, we have to hunt down all the Coreflame.

C: 外邦人的事，你怎么看？
E: What's your view on the outlander situation?

C: 你好，贵客，想来找某件合身的行头，还是想来寻找某个问题的答案？
E: Hello, dear customer. Are you here for an item of clothing to suit your physique? Or could it be an answer to a question that you seek?

C: 刚刚戍卫长说出那样的话，她应该心里很不好受吧……
E: I'm sure the captain's words just now really hurt her...

C: 军令已经下达，身为一个强壮的青年，他有义务捍卫圣城，乃至献出生命——这是他的命运，值得他引以为傲。
E: The military orders have been released. As a young man that is fit to fight, he has a duty to protect the sacred city, even if it costs his life. This is his fate, and he should be proud of it.

C: 阿卡迪亚…阿卡迪亚……
E: Arcadia... Arcadia...

C: 这尊雕像摆出健美的姿势，死死压住了你开拓的道路。
E: This statue strikes a bodybuilding pose, obstructing your Trailblaze path.

C: 阁下，您看我这五大三粗的样子，胡子都没刮干净，怎么也和那什么梦母不沾边吧？
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, just look at my burly build. I didn't even shave properly. How can I possibly be associated with that Dreammother?

C: 还是别了吧。
E: Let's not then.

C: 嗯？我只是来这里散心的呀——难道？听你急匆匆的声音，你是因为这个原因才过来的？
E: Huh? I was just taking a stroll... Unless? Judging by your urgent tone, you're here because of this?

C: 我会成为圣女。
E: I will be the Holy Maiden.

C: 没问题，我也正想说这事儿……
E: Sure. I wanted to suggest that too...

C: 何况为襁褓中的文明保驾护航，本就是战略投资部的天职——根据拉帝奥教授的说法，稳固银河对翁法罗斯的共同认知，一定程度上有助于它的未来。
E: Besides, safeguarding new and growing civilizations is precisely what the Strategic Investment Department was made to do. According to Dr. Ratio, establishing a consistent understanding of Amphoreus across the cosmos will aid its future, to a certain degree.

C: 在发什么呆呢？
E: What are you spacing out for?

C: 劝你别打这个主意，生命总会找到出路的。
E: Don't even think about it. Life always finds a way.

C: 上次为了检修自己攒的星系摩托，差点把机修间闯出个大洞，步了何塞•拉萨罗的后尘。
E: Last time, when I was fixing my motorcycle, I almost knocked down the wall of the maintenance room, like Hosea Lazaro did.

C: 在没有一个「正经人」带路，帮她塑造出符合人类道德标准的良好人格之前。我可不敢放任她钻研高深的理论…万一她有什么二心，那后果就不堪设想了。
E: Without a "decent person" to show her the way and shape her personality to be in line with human moral standards, I dare not let her delve into advanced theories... If she develops any deviant thoughts, the consequences could be unimaginable.

C: 总感觉你好像学废了…
E: I get the feeling you've been led astray...

C: 正在研究学习计划，请勿干扰。
E: Reviewing curriculum, please do not disturb.

C: 你想学些什么？
E: What do you want to learn?

C: 在？
E: Hello?

C: 看不出来你还挺有两把刷子的嘛！谢啦！正好我有点事…我这就去试试！
E: Looks like you're pretty good at this stuff! Thanks! I've got a meeting on right now... I'll try this out!

C: 嘿嘿，帮个忙嘛。
E: Hahaha, do me a favor.

C: 我觉得可以说…
E: How about this...

C: 所以我重新启动了信号发射器，确保远程连接的信号不会有任何问题……
E: So, I rebooted the signal transmitter, and made sure the remote access signal is functional...

C: 如果它可以四处乱窜，那岂不是整个空间站都是它的「载体」？！
E: If it can go anywhere, then could the entire space station be its receptacle!?

C: 我查到了！
E: I found it!

C: 不论是工作还是生活，我都好像搞得一团糟，周围也没有人愿意和我讲话。
E: I seem to be such a mess in my work and personal life, and no one wants to talk to me.

C: 「实验品十三号」…这名字好熟悉…之前我在我们科室里看到过诶？也就是说，我…我错过了？！
E: Experiment <unbreak>13</unbreak>... That name is so familiar... I think I've seen it in my department? In other words, I... I am missing out???

C: 那我有没有署名呢？
E: So, am I included as a co-author?

C: 乖乖，我看看啊…这效果不错，但我现在有个问题。
E: Ohhh, lemme see... This looks good. But I have an issue.

C: 时尚这玩意真奇怪，就像个轮回…啧啧！
E: Fashion is so weird. It's all a big cycle... Tsk!

C: …欸？华劳斯？
E: Huh...? Wallace?

C: 也许你该先看看这张照片。
E: Maybe you should look at this photo first.

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}也觉得很奇怪，对不对？有什么话明明可以直接和阿丽娜说的呀，为什么要这么辛苦呢？
E: Don't you find this strange? They can just come to me directly. Why bother doing all that?

C: 至于理由…哎，现在不是解释的时候！总之先快行动起来吧。
E: As for the reason... well, now is not the time to explain! We should hurry.

C: 总而言之，这次你干得相当不错，值得表扬！我会把你的事迹汇报给虎克大人的，放心吧。
E: You did a pretty good job this time and deserve some credit! I will tell Boss Hook about it. Don't worry.

C: 这不正是我们的机会吗？快，跟我去「地火」的集会所看看情况！
E: Isn't this our chance? Come on, let's go to Wildfire's Gathering Place and see what's going on!

C: 你的嗓门还不够大。
E: You should raise your voice.

C: 咳，算啦！不想说话也没什么。{NICKNAME}，快把伊妮丝姐姐的快递交给她吧。
E: Huh... Never mind! I won't blame you for keeping quiet, {NICKNAME}. Just hand over Eunice's package to her.

C: 姐姐拿好，这是你的包裹！切记，是鼹鼠党把它交到你手上的哦——下层区最酷的鼹鼠党！
E: Your package, sis, there you go! Remember! The coolest The Moles delivered it over to you.

C: 这毛病跟了我好多年了，吃多少药都根治不了。娜塔莎医生这儿的特效药都要被我吃光了，她只能通过特殊渠道帮我找药……
E: This ailment has been with me for many years, and no matter how many medications I take, it never fully goes away. I've almost used up all of Doctor Natasha's stock to the point where she has to source more medicines for me through special channels.

C: 又一天过去了，唉……
E: Another day... *sigh*

C: 布洛妮娅？！是、是我想到的那个布洛妮娅吗？
E: Bronya? ! Is it the Bronya I am thinking of?

C: 等等，你这倒是提醒了我……
E: Wait, you reminded me...

C: 这附近就有一家花店，能麻烦你们帮我带一束「七彩虹」回来吗？当然了，买花和跑腿的钱由我来出。
E: There's a florist nearby. Please get me a bunch of rainbows. Naturally, I'll pay you for the flowers and running this errand for me.

C: 得让年轻人学会自己成长。
E: Young people need to learn and grow by themselves.

C: 这是…球牡丹？是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
E: These are... Ball Peonies? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?

C: 哎，你真是让我深刻理解了什么叫「夏虫不可语冰」。
E: And you're being really unenlightened.

C: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
E: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

C: 哪次让我吃闭门羹，都是这个托词……
E: Every time I'm left out in the cold, they always give the same excuse...

C: 没有捷径！想拥有科学家的智慧，就得通过艰苦的、漫长的专业训练……
E: There's no shortcut! If it's scientific wisdom you're after, you'll have to undergo a long and hard journey of professional training...

C: …咳，刚才太激动了，希望没吓着你。话说回来，既然你都来了，那我想请你再帮个忙……
E: ...Ahem, I got a little bit excited there. I hope I didn't freak you out. Getting back on track and seeing as you're all here, I'd like to ask another quick favor...

C: 菲利普。
E: Philip.

C: 没有人可以取代这样的我…没有人。
E: Nobody can replace me when I'm like this... nobody.

C: 我不是，别乱说。
E: I didn't. Don't jump to conclusions.

C: 他确实因为翻垃圾桶生病了…
E: He did get sick from going through the trashcans...

C: （去找亚诺问问看吧……）
E: (I'll ask Amo about it...)

C: 家家有本难念的经啊。
E: Every family has its own troubles.

C: 哈哈，说出来也就觉得没什么了，谢谢你。多亏了「正当权益会社」啊——能像现在这样忙里偷闲，真是非常宝贵的机会。
E: Haha, it feels much better after I've said it. Thank you. The Rightful Rights Society is great — It's a precious chance to have a break like this.

C: 我听不懂你在说什么。
E: I don't know what you're talking about.

C: 那我为啥还能和你说话呢？难不成你也……
E: Then how come I can still talk to you? Are you also...

C: 哦！原来如此。
E: Oh! I get it.

C: 面前的铁卫如获至宝，仰天大笑。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他激动的神情。
E: The guard standing in front of you laughs heartily as if he has found a treasure. You can almost see his excited expression through his tightly secured iron helmet.

C: 总之，我想有个人在我休息的时候帮我在海滩上走一下就好了。要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下…你说这样的人哪里找呢？
E: Anyway, I need someone to help me watch over the coast when I'm on break. If any of The Unshackled's members are sighted, my replacement needs to warn them and deal with whatever they release... Do you have any suitable candidates in mind?

C: 你是放生什么的？
E: What are you unshackling?

C: 我没有做贼心虚，我只是被你吓到了！没错！
E: I'm not guilty, you just startled me! Yeah, that's right!

C: 我这人记性不好，下次见面的时候，记得和我打招呼，我们一起积攒功德！
E: My memory isn't the best, so next time you see me, make sure to say hi and we can continue to collect merit, together!

C: 波月古海，持明族，前世…真是意味深长，可是它真的应该这么重吗，要不打开看看吧？
E: The Lunarescent Depths, the Vidyadhara, previous reincarnation... Though it is a profound subject, should it really be this heavy? Why not take a look inside?

C: 落难者说自己已经过上了令人羡慕的生活，对此你应该如何看待呢？
E: The castaway says that they're living a life that would make others jealous, how are you to take this?

C: 多亏你提醒了我…要是直接开卖了，那我们茶庄就沦为普普通通的饮品店了，特色全无，那怎么行！
E: Thank you for reminding me... otherwise, I'd have started selling it, and my tea house would have been reduced to an ordinary beverage store with no special features. That's simply unacceptable!

C: 而且走起路来脚步虚浮，一路跌跌撞撞的——哦我看你现在好像没受伤，没出事就好。
E: You were walking unsteadily and stumbling, but now I see that you are safe and sound. I'm glad that nothing terrible happened.

C: 瀑布
E: Waterfall

C: 浴场方号称被法吉娜赐福过的毛巾，遇水膨胀…像一摞整齐的方砖被摆放至此。泰坦伟力，神奇至极——尽管你觉得这玩意和星际和平公司贩卖的压缩毛巾没什么区别。
E: Towels that the baths claim to be blessed by Phagousa. They expand when in contact with water... and are placed here like a neat stack of tiles. The Titans' powers are truly wondrous — even if you think that these things are no different from the compression towels that the IPC sells.

C: 趁四下无人投个硬币许愿如何？可惜云石市集总是那么热闹，让你没有合适的机会。当然——如果你真的这么做了，法吉娜会不会因此生气也是个问题。
E: How about tossing a coin to make a wish while no one's around? Unfortunately, the usual rowdiness of Marmoreal Market prevents you from doing so. Then again, if you really did it, Phagousa's wrath is also something you have to consider.

C: 培育奇美拉的装置，外形是棵繁茂的大树。「生命树种」究竟是如何在其中成长为那样古灵精怪的小生物的，问题的答案恐怕只有瑟希斯知道了。
E: The device for nurturing chimeras looks like a huge, luscious tree on the outside. Through what process did the Seed of Life manage to produce such weird little creatures within? Perhaps the only one who could answer that question is Cerces.

C: 可惜，只要受到外力压迫，仿品也难逃破碎的命运，这或许有某种寓意，你无法参透。
E: Unfortunately, so long as there is external pressure, replicas cannot avoid being broken. You're unable to decipher what this actually means as an analogy.

C: 星际和平公司旗帜鲜明地站在公义与和平的一方。岂曰无衣，与子同袍。让我们一同祝愿赛杜尼拉默星群剿匪凯旋。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation stands firmly on the side of peace and justice. The Sedounirama star cluster has our full support. Let us all wish them success in this fight.

C: 激雷乐队是来自爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ的著名乐队。这颗星球所在的恒星系曾在红巨星爆发中被彻底摧毁，但乐队成员却拒绝逃亡，用最后一场巡演展现了生命的顽强意志。
E: Sizzling Thunder is a celebrated band from Emerald-III. This planet's star system was completely destroyed by the expansion of its red giant star, but the band refused to leave their home. Through their final tour, they demonstrated their tenacious will to live.

C: 技术研发部提供的广谱疫苗已确认能有效预防「铁墓」感染。对于未覆盖医疗保障的星域，公司亦将分批次投放疫苗，请广大居民切勿惊慌。
E: The broad-spectrum vaccine developed by the Technology Department has been confirmed to effectively prevent "Irontomb" infections. For star zones without medical coverage, the IPC will distribute vaccines in phases. Residents are urged to remain calm.

C: 他妒忌，他图谋，他执迷不悟。
E: He was jealous, cunning, and foolishly stubborn.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 您这…哈…我一下子都不知道该如何追问。
E: So you... Uhh... I'm not really sure what to say to that.

C: 你记住了「曾回答过真言狮口的提问」
E: You remembered "Answering Verax Leo's Questions."

C: 人当思辨——其求知如捻线作茧，自我裹缠；唯相互砥砺、反复锤炼，智慧之蝶方得破茧，而真理自现。
E: Humankind must ponder: Is the pursuit of knowledge not like spinning a cocoon, wrapping oneself in layers? Only through mutual sharpening and repeated tempering can the butterfly of wisdom break free, and truth reveal itself.

C: 「最初的学者」曾在此指出：只有在辩论的时候，我们才算是真正的聊天。自那以后，这里就成了树庭的热门景点。
E: "The First Scholar" once declared here: only when we debate are we truly engaging in conversation. Since then, this place has become a favored gathering spot within the Grove.

C: 那位医师小姑娘年轻得很，没有给我开什么药或者施加什么祝福。
E: The young girl doctor is extremely young. She did not give me any medicine or blessings...

C: 一个人或许可以与泰坦为敌。但是却无法与一段乐声、岁月、山崖、流水与清风为敌。
E: One may challenge a Titan, but no one can truly stand against a melody, the flow of time, the cliffs, the rivers, and the gentle winds.

C: 呼呼…也就是说，钱财是最好的激励机制，富商如果愿意把钱分给大家，大家也就都愿意听他安排？
E: Phew... So, money is the best motivator? If the merchant is willing to share their wealth, everyone will follow their lead?

C: 圣烛装置上似乎有某种可以操控的按钮。
E: There seems to be a control button on the holy candle device.

C: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为美丽的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
E: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the most beautiful person in all of Amphoreus!

C: …爱猜谜的狮子？
E: ...A lion who loves riddles?

C: 衣匠颤颤巍巍地抓住记忆残晶，好一会儿才炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker trembles as it grasps the Memory Crystal Shards, taking a long moment to refine them.

C: 我不要了，再见！
E: I changed my mind. Goodbye!

C: 爷爷，你的腰还好吧？
E: Grandpa, is your back holding up?

C: 常青蔓结成你的发髻…
E: The evergreen vines weave into your chignon...

C: 岁月对所有人都是公平的。我们已经等候多时了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
E: Time is fair to all. We've been waiting for a long time, {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

C: 不出意料的，你注意到底座上有一个精巧的开关装置。
E: As expected, you notice a finely crafted switch at the base.

C: 是吗？可想想那些被你翻过的垃圾桶、反复研究的路灯，还有不知道砸了多少个的盾牌…真的不打算钻进去看看吗？
E: Really? Just think about all of those trash cans you've flipped over, all of those street lamps you've investigated over and over, the countless shields you've smashed... Are you really not going to go inside and take a look?

C: 伴随着雀跃的心情，你在木马中咕噜噜打滚，而它也不负众望，随着你的手舞足蹈一点点挪动着位置——最后，「咕咚」一声滑进了冥河。
E: With excitement bubbling inside, you roll around inside the horse, and true to form, it shifts gently with your every movement — until, with another "thud," it slides into the River of Souls.

C: 友人的话语闪过脑海——
E: A friend's warning flashes through your mind —

C: 安静的木马，曾发生在它身上的小插曲，除你之外无人知晓。
E: The quiet wooden horse. The small incident that took place upon it is known only to you.

C: 支援前线，尽一份力，我来。
E: To support the front lines and do my part, I'm here.

C: 啊…谢谢你的夸奖！
E: Ah... thank you for your compliment!

C: 你们为何渴求，为何呵护，为何毁坏，为何生活。
E: Why you yearn, why you protect, why you wreck, why you live...
██ ...█If there is ██/████***██ Tri████... I am no█ able to ██ far████ ███ ████...?" Even if ██ lets █...█ the oath to mend, make up for the sky ██/██

C: 哈哈，我就没那么省心了。我要是退休，村里一时半会可找不出能接班的老师。
E: Ha! I'm not as lucky as you are. If I retired, it'd be a while before this village found another teacher who could fill my shoes.

C: 据说命运泰坦的祭司们会长时间闭目打坐，以求进入某种通灵状态…不排除有人会在途中睡着。
E: Word is, the Fate Titans' priests meditate for hours, seeking spiritual clarity... though let's be real, some probably just doze off.

C: 巨大的龙脊骨型造物横亘在一旁。表面长满了杂草与野花，它与荒垣废墟融为了一体。
E: A massive, dragon-spine structure stretches on the side, overgrown with weeds and wildflowers. It's fused seamlessly with the surrounding ruins.

C: 眼前的妖精抬起手，开始凝聚力量——
E: The fairy at hand raises a hand and starts channeling some energy—

C: 「回家」
E: "Home."

C: 算了。
E: Never mind.

C: 鱼儿游啊游…鱼儿游啊游……
E: The fish swims and swims... and swims and swims...

C: 记忆要怎么知道我的反应？
E: How would a memory know my reaction?

C: 你，还有丹恒，你们给了三月七独一无二的回忆。假如是你们两个和她站在天平的两端充作砝码，她也会毫不犹豫地选择你们。
E: You and Dan Heng, you've given March 7th memories that are truly one of a kind. If she was placed on opposite sides of a scale from you two, she would choose you both without a moment's hesitation.

C: 不过…快充会不会有些伤机体呢？
E: Though I wonder... isn't fast charging bad for my hardware?

C: 啊，电路板，你的布线就像是瑟希斯神树的维管系统一样复杂，你的电路就像是墨涅塔心脏的冠状动脉一样精微！
E: Ah, glorious circuit board! Your wiring flows like the vessels of the sacred tree of Cerces, your circuits pulse like the very arteries of Mnestia's heart!

C: 好壮观…
E: So majestic...

C: 我准备好了！
E: I'm ready!

C: 前进吧，就算无法前进…
E: Move forward, even if I can't...

C: 我也想为英雄们留下些什么——譬如言语，譬如故事，譬如温柔的琴音嗡……
E: I also wish to leave something behind for the heroes, perhaps words, maybe stories, or even the gentle pluckings of a harp, buzz...

C: 金窝银窝，不如我的小虫窝。是谁趴在高高的金山上面？没错，就是我——
E: A nest of gold or silver is nothing compared to my little nymph den. Who is perched atop this golden mountain? That is right, it is I—

C: ——真倒霉，我逃跑…呸，散着步呢，就被只混蛋虫撞到了路边，驱动系统还摔坏了喀！
E: ...Such bad luck! I was fleeing... Pfft, I was strolling, when a rotten nymph knocked me to the roadside and broke my drive system, crrk!

C: 更轻松，更自由。
E: It's more relaxing, and freer.

C: 等你准备好了就跟我的副官聊聊吧——演习随时可以开始，我们只需要把禁区的场地快速布置一下就行。
E: Speak with my aide when you're ready — we can start the drill any time. It just takes a moment to set everything up in the restricted zone.

C: 下次吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 明白。一切服从你的安排，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Got it. Everything's been done as per your order, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 您、您如果准备好上前线了，就请跟我说一声。我、我带您去找奥列格兵长。
E: I—If you're ready to go to the front lines now, just let me know. I—I'll take you to see Captain Oleg.

C: 尊敬的{NICKNAME}，佩佩已抵达目标舱段。
E: Dear {NICKNAME}, Peppy has arrived at the designated zone.

C: 你这话什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: （味道很淡，可能不超过<unbreak>20</unbreak>个黑塔系统时。）
E: (The scent is faint, probably no more than <unbreak>20</unbreak> Herta system hours.)

C: 嘘，稍安勿躁。我是阮•梅女士的助手， 我身负管理大家的重责，我怎么可能欺骗大家呢？
E: Shh, hold your horses. I am Miss Ruan Mei's assistant, and I am responsible for managing everyone. How can I possibly lie to everyone?

C: 我们有证据！这是安保机器人提供的监控画面！
E: We have evidence! Here is the surveillance footage provided by the security robot!

C: （你是人还是我是人？你问我？我还等着听你的命令呢！）
E: (Are you human or am I human? You are asking me? I'm still waiting for your commands!)

C: 听你这意思，是说我偷了你的东西？你知道我是谁吗，我怎么会干这种事！
E: Are you suggesting that I stole from you? Do you know who I am? How could I have done such a thing?

C: 但我的过去黑暗而厚重…
E: But my past is a crushing weight, shrouded in darkness...

C: 这是什么意思…你要解释清楚，是笑话人家，还是见到人家开心？
E: What's that supposed to mean... You need to explain yourself — are you keeping an eye on me, or do you really acknowledge me?

C: 这我怎么忙得过来…
E: How can I keep up with this...

C: 又要上工了？
E: Is it my shift again?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 某位不愿意透露姓名的老板要我帮他预测出这个「天选之子」。
E: A manager who wishes to remain anonymous, wants me to help him predict the Chosen One for this lottery, now.

C: 随绘星一同回到了授事厅。
E: You go with Huixing back to the Conclave Hall.

C: 你别走，你再来一盘…
E: Wait, don't leave. Another round please...

C: 哼，下棋可不看嘴皮子功夫。快点开始吧。
E: Hmph. Chess is not a game of words. Hurry up and start!

C: 我还不是最强的？
E: I'm not the best player?

C: 奖励有区别吗？
E: Is there a difference in reward?

C: 大部分情况，人们往往倾向于更加极端的选择，你很…与众不同。
E: In most situations, people typically lean towards the more extreme choice. You are... different.

C: 出色。你超越了我的极限，引以为傲吧。
E: Outstanding. You have exceeded my limits, and you should be proud.

C: 我在说些什么？肯定是哪搞错了…狠狠敲两下…这次对了！正确的释义应该是——
E: What am I talking about? There must be something wrong... I'll just give this a good whack... There we go! The correct interpretation should be—

C: 我最擅长机械舞了！
E: I'm awesome at doing the robot!

C: 虽然心智犹如孩童，但若虫们确实拥有灵智。也正因墨涅塔与瑟希斯两位泰坦的仁慈，在那个时代，死亡曾经柔软且温暖。
E: Though nymphs possess a naive and childlike innocence, they remain sentient and intelligent. In those days, thanks to the benevolence of the two Titans Mnestia and Cerces, death was a gentle and comforting experience.

C: 嗯…有位织者非常喜欢火焰。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>有岩浆流下的露天平台边缘</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is drawn to the flames. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of an open-air platform, where the lava flows endlessly</color>. Go there and find them.

C: 就你这小身板？
E: With that sprout body of yours?

C: 或许你只是不在状态。
E: Maybe you're just off your game?

C: 元老院大殿，压根没有拱心石！
E: The Council of Elders' main hall doesn't even have a keystone!

C: 明明已经钻进了「盗洞」，一眨眼居然又回到了原处…吓、吓死我了！难道说，您是欧洛尼斯的眷从吗？
E: I saw you burrowing into the Thieves' Tunnel, but you returned to the same spot in the blink of an eye... I—It gave me a fright! Could you be Oronyx's kin?

C: 一看就是陷阱吧！谁敢靠近啊？
E: It's obviously a trap! Who'd dare go close?

C: 我来自未来。
E: I come from the future.

C: 哟，是您啊。
E: Ooh, it's you.

C: 听起来不像扎格列斯的口吻。
E: That tone doesn't sound like Zagreus.

C: 只是，翁法罗斯是个很小的世界，即使诡计多端的巴特鲁斯也渐渐发现自己没有新的角色可以扮演。但你——巴特鲁斯最好的朋友之一，却依然乐意和它游戏。
E: But Amphoreus is a tiny world, and even the tricky Bartholos ran out of roles to play. Yet you — one of their best friends — still enjoyed playing along.

C: 嘿，你宝贝的是个天才。
E: What a fudgin' genius you are.

C: 长的吧。
E: The long one.

C: 桀桀，桀桀。咱就知道你无法抗拒这种诱惑。肥美而不会抵抗的猎物，手到擒来的财宝——正是一切大盗都不会放过的机会！
E: Hehehe, hehehe. I knew you couldn't resist such temptation. Plump, helpless prey. Treasure just waiting to be claimed... No thief in their right mind would walk away from that!

C: 哎呀，那真好啊。可惜，巴特鲁斯不是天外来客，你们的黑客后门，对我来说毫无用处。
E: Oh my, that sounds nice. Too bad ol' Bartholos isn't from beyond the sky, your hacker backdoor is useless to me.

C: 恩维尔不知从哪里搬来了一张躺椅。
E: Avilius brings a lounge chair out of nowhere.

C: 如您所见，这两面炫耀狩猎成果的标本墙稍显空旷。就在去年的例行粉刷中，终于被那位凯妮斯大人下令弃置了。
E: As you can see, the two trophy walls showcasing hunting achievements are looking a bit sparse. During last year's routine repainting, Lady Caenis ordered to have them removed.

C: 不行，我不能亏。
E: No way, I'm not taking a loss here.

C: 恐怕不是这个意思…就我所知，这位卫兵始终是单身。这是求缘求错泰坦，求到{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}来了…也罢，相信伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，先试试看吧。
E: I don't think so... As far as I know, this guard has always been single. It seems they sought love from the wrong Titan and ended up at {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s temple. No matter, let's trust in the great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} and proceed.

C: 白卷的问题是——「我想找的东西在何处」，让我布置一下……
E: Its question is — "Where is the thing I'm looking for?" Let me set the ceremony up...

C: 我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
E: I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*

C: 假使世界会在英雄的眼中重塑，那从未在他们眼中出现过的我们，是否也能得到来世的接引？
E: If the world is reshaped through a hero's eyes... then what about those of us who were never seen? Will we have a place in the next life?

C: 晨昏的分界已淡，这份誓言，会随着「昏光庭院」之名传承下去。
E: The boundary between dawn and dusk fades, and this vow will live on with the name "Twilight Courtyard."

C: 空气似乎突然炎热起来，一股粘腻的风缠住你的脚腕，令你本能地觉得不适：「均衡…」一个低沉的，毫无感情的声音低语，「宇宙应当…均衡……」一个又一个回音加入低语，宛如交响。
E: The air seems to heat up suddenly, and a sticky wind grips onto your ankles, leaving you feeling intuitively uncomfortable. "Equilibrium..." Mutters a low, emotionless voice. Another whisper echoed, as if in symphony: "The universe should be... in equilibrium..."

C: …不明白。都是星神，为啥要打打杀杀呢？
E: ...I don't understand. They're all Aeons, why do they want to fight?

C: 「闷葫芦」、罗刹，咱们一起上，速战速决搞定这些家伙，救下那个女孩！
E: Silent but deadly, Luocha, let's charge in together. If we take them out quickly, we can rescue the girl!

C: 运动机杼坏了，动不了。
E: My motor is broken — I can't move.

C: 嗯，至少不算全无收获，你的行为得到了来自命途的认可。『存护』的祝福能让你获得更好的保护。
E: Well, at least this isn't fruitless. Your behavior received the Paths' approval. Blessings of Preservation can grant you better protections.

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 有一位星神出现在附近，这感觉非常熟悉；能量的漩涡席卷而来，吞没一切，构成你的每个原子都在碰撞中湮灭。燃烧的愤怒与破坏欲望将你撕扯成一道金色的伤口，那既是你的末日，也是「毁灭」纳努克的视线……
E: An Aeon materializes nearby, and you recognize the familiar sensation. A vortex of energy approaches you and engulfs everything, annihilating every composite atom of your body in the collision. Burning rage and destructive desires tear you into a golden scar that is both your doom and a glimpse from Nanook the Destruction...

C: 俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…虚拟星神和现实的命途具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。
E: The Society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to do this... The false Aeons have connected with real Paths, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini gods.

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」内容…
E: About the content of the Simulated Universe...

C: 好一阵沉默，随后是黑塔的叹息：「我还指望祂会出现呢，算啦。我这就关掉『模拟宇宙』，一瞬间的事，你不会有任何感觉。稍后我们在现实里再谈。」
E: There is a long silence, followed by a deep sigh from Herta. "I was expecting THEM to appear. Never mind. I'll switch off the Simulated Universe then. It'll only take a second and you won't feel a thing. Let's chat back in reality."

C: 黑塔？
E: Herta?

C: 你这家伙也太不靠谱了！
E: You're too unreliable!

C: 「这混账还在装，祂已经发现你不是阿基维利了。」
E: "This disgrace is still pretending. THEY've already figured out you're not Akivili."

C: 到底哪里升级了啦？
E: Just what did you upgrade?

C: 斯蒂芬给场地里加了点东西。他说：翻箱倒柜和打砸破坏是游戏必不可少的两种体验。
E: Stephen added something to the stage. He said ransacking and smashing things are two essential experiences in games.

C: 按照斯蒂芬的说法：以后的版本你会更「上瘾」，信不信由你。
E: According to Stephen, you'll be even more addicted in future versions, believe it or not.

C: 我和螺丝咕姆有个初步共识：首先，他会想办法削减虚拟阿哈的倾向性，甚至屏蔽祂的自我认知部分，但那有些危险，没准会引来真正的「欢愉」……
E: I have a basic consensus with Screwllum. First, he'll try reducing the partiality values of the simulated Aha, even going as far as blocking THEIR Intra-Cognition — but that's a little dangerous and may attract the real Elation...

C: …祂为什么一定要死？
E: ...Why did THEY have to die?

C: 那些多出来的声音是什么？
E: What are those extra sounds?

C: 「哦。」黑塔敷衍。
E: "Okay," Herta answers perfunctorily.

C: <color=#6f7cda>希佩…！/</color><color=#ad5e68>你真的有</color><color=#6f7cda>/多副面孔</color>
E: <color=#6f7cda>Xipe...!/</color><color=#ad5e68>You do have</color><color=#6f7cda>/many faces</color>

C: 「愿赌服输。」螺丝咕姆给出伟大的答案，「补充：黑塔女士的赌注是空间站。」
E: "I must honor the bet," Screwllum says righteously. "Additional info: Madam Herta's bet is the space station."

C: ——这片孤岛上除了爱与孤独外什么也没有…可悲的是它们最终成为了虫群最初的温床。
E: ...There is nothing else on this isolated island except love and loneliness... Regrettably, they will end up being the initial breeding ground for the Swarm.

C: 艾洛蒂亚城邦心理援助中心诚聘临时帮工，要求心理素质过硬；没有高薪，但有爱心。
E: The psychological assistance center of Elothea is seeking temporary helpers. While there will be no payment, the satisfaction of aiding those in need will be rewarding enough on its own.

C: 爱的味道——来自大拉铂尔星最后一位独居者：梅尔希耶兹。
E: The fragrance of love, originating from Melchidek, the last hermit on Lapole Major.

C: 此后，当人们问起时，无名客回答：那是他此生为了开拓做出的最伟大的决定。
