E: Later on, when people ask about the incident, the Nameless will reply: That was the most courageous decision he made in the name of Trailblaze.

C: 「为了均衡。」你从那没有感情的语调中琢磨出了一丝奥秘，「均衡已经发生。」
E: "For Equilibrium." You detect the tinge of a secret from that emotionless tone, "Equilibrium has already happened."

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群热血慷慨的巡海游侠。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice changes into a group of fervent and passionate Galaxy Rangers.

C: 模拟宇宙里的冗余数据太多了。你跑了那么远，只碰到过几次星神，可怜巴巴，还没什么机会搭话！
E: There's too much redundant data in the Simulated Universe. You went so far, yet you've only met the Aeons a couple of times. You worked so hard but didn't even get many chances to speak with them!

C: 好吧，结束了。干得不错，扩展终端都给你玩宕机了。
E: All right, it's over. Not bad, you even crashed the expansion terminal.

C: 我要怎么得知「繁育」的秘密？
E: How will I learn of Propagation's secrets?

C: 边星贸易战争•其二
E: Borderstar Trade War (II)

C: 接着——突然有一道火光贯穿了你！是子弹！
E: And then, a sudden ray of fire pierces through you! It's a bullet!

C: 「下个时刻还未到。」阮•梅说，「或许是受『神秘』影响，数据成了一团浆糊。我们无法推测『善见天』存在于何处。」
E: "The next moment has not arrived." Ruan Mei says. "Perhaps due to the Enigmata's effect, but the data has become a pool of glue. We cannot extrapolate the whereabouts of the Eden of Blessed Insight's presence."

C: 「鲁珀特本是台被丢在垃圾堆里的计算机，却奇迹般地产生了自我意识。」黑塔突然打了个喷嚏，「它曾一度陷入沉睡，又再次醒来——『帝皇战争』和『边星贸易战争』同时爆发、延续，成了不亚于寰宇蝗灾的惨剧。」
E: "Rubert used to be a discarded computer. It was a miracle that it developed awareness." Herta sneezes suddenly. "It was once in a slumber but managed to wake up... The simultaneous outbreak and continuation of the Emperor's War and Borderstar Trade War was almost as tragic as the Swarm Disaster."

C: 『技术部』德•维恩。
E: De Wayne from the Technology Division.

C: 双赢的局面不禁令人怀疑这背后是否另有隐情，但碍于大人物的权威，包括你在内，现场没有一个人敢提出质疑。
E: The win-win situation seems dubious, but no one — including you — dares to raise any questions against the authority.

C: 指责她。
E: Criticize her.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 你好像杀死过我。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I think you've killed me before.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我不认识你。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I don't know you.

C: 你混入博识学会的武装考古学派，搭乘科考船前往无机生命地带一探究竟。德•维恩要你记住，切不可说出自己受雇于何人。
E: You infiltrate the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild and travel to the inorganic life zone by a research vessel. De Wayne has warned you to never reveal for whom you work.

C: 药房的展柜里放满了各式各样的珍藏品，客人交付的报酬。每当心有闲暇，你便会将它们取出，仔细品味其中的故事和欢愉。
E: The display cabinets in the pharmacy are stacked full of all kinds of collectibles that customers have used as payment. Whenever you can find the time, you'll take them out and relish in the joy and the detail of each story.

C: 予以还击。
E: Fight back.

C: 前言不搭后语的。
E: I don't think the first half lines up with the second half.

C: 奔向旗舰。
E: Rush to the flagship.

C: 你降落到地上，大雨仍未停下，它们拍打到你的背上，又蒸发掉。
E: You land on the ground. Heavy rain continues to fall, smacking onto your back and evaporating into steam.

C: 时空的凹陷。
E: A depression in space-time.

C: 宇宙也会流血吗？它会哭号吗？没人能回答你的问题。为了这道伤痕，你甚至放弃了自己的生命。它是那样美丽，优雅地沉沦着，直到万籁俱寂，最后的智慧生命也崩解，也绝对不会痊愈。
E: Does the universe bleed? Does it cry? No one can answer these questions of yours. You sacrificed even your own life for the sake of this scar. It is so beautiful as it sinks in grace, until all life falls silent and the last intelligent life form is broken down into nothing. This scar will never be healed.

C: 随波逐流好了。
E: I'll just go with the flow.

C: 「交易已完成，现在，轮到博识学会展现自己的诚意了。」
E: "The deal is done. Now, it's time for the Intelligentsia Guild to show their sincerity."

C: 饶了我，我是因无知铸下大错。
E: Please forgive me. I was ignorant and made a big mistake.

C: 你登上同僚们组成的人梯，用*信标着色剂*在图书馆外壁喷涂上标语。
E: You ascend the human ladder formed by your comrades, spraying your slogan with *Beacon Coloring Paste* on the library's outer wall.

C: 「就让自命清高的大师为自己写颂歌吧！让他们以学派的名义画地为牢。我们是无能的庸人，但庸人的智慧却比智者更宽广！」
E: "Let the self-righteous masters write their own hymns! Let them imprison themselves in the name of their schools. We are incompetent Mundanites, but a Mundanite's intellect is broader than an erudite's!"

C: 「……」少女沉默片刻，「学士。和您一样，提出问题，解答问题的学士。」
E: "..." The girl remains silent for a moment. "A scholar. Like you, I am a scholar that poses and answers questions."

C: 黑塔罕见地沉默下来，她望向「不可知域」的深处，没有挪动脚步。仿佛那里有何物正等待着她，如一道谜题，呼唤天才的答案。
E: Herta falls into a moment of uncharacteristic silence. She stands perfectly still and stares into the depths of the Unknowable Domain. It's as if something is waiting there for her. Like a puzzle that calls for a genius to solve it.

C: 你头一次见他这么激动，甚至短暂性克服了群体恐惧。被波尔卡屏蔽的<color=#dbc291ff>「权杖」系统重新上线</color>。但这微小的波动在寂静领主的观测中犹如惊雷。
E: This is the first time you've seen him so agitated. He even temporarily overcame his social anxiety. The <color=#dbc291ff>Scepter system that Polka blocked comes online once more</color>, but this minute ripple pings the Lord of Silence's observations like a thundering shock.

C: 你终于理解了现状，整颗星球，所有的笑声，它们都在你的身体里，成为你的心脏和眼睛，构成机器新的使命。
E: You finally understand what has happened. The entire planet and all of their laughter are now inside your body. They have become your heart and eyes and formed a new mission for this machine.

C: 阿哈玩偶的计数器数字跳转，它达到了<unbreak>299</unbreak>。再来一下？你生活里需要发泄的地方太多了。
E: The number on the Aha doll's counter reaches <unbreak>299</unbreak>. One more? There is so much frustration in your life, after all.

C: 你抱起扁圆状的虫泡，它的养料漏出，就像一粒开了口的绿细胞。它扭动着虬曲的身体，钻进了你的皮肤里。
E: When you lift the flat, round-shaped egg sack with your hands, its nutrients leak out like a punctured green cell. Then, it wriggles its curved body into your skin.

C: 「天戈星在<unbreak>62</unbreak>光年外被『岚』的光矢摧毁。黑塔观测到这件事，并在模拟宇宙中培育我的精神体。」他手掌中捧起一团火种。
E: "Xuange was destroyed by Lan's Lux Arrow <unbreak>62</unbreak> light-years away. Herta observed the incident and nurtured my spiritual form in the Simulated Universe." A kindling emerges in the physician's hands.

C: 你面前的星体计算机正在高速运算，它上身是曲面屏幕，下身是无性别人类身体。它似乎在模拟大质量恒星的塌缩，只有你知道，你们的博弈，是一局石头剪刀布。
E: The astral computer before you, with a curved screen on top and a genderless human body at the bottom, is running a calculation at a high speed. While it seems to be simulating the collapse of a massive star, only you know that you are playing a game of rock-paper-scissors with it.

C: 星际和平公司「信仰狂热部」的大乐透发行商人出现了！
E: The lottery distributor from the Interastral Peace Corporation's Fanaticism Department is here!

C: 金碧辉煌的穹顶令你难以忘怀。在璀璨夺目的各类星系藏品围绕中…你又一次来到了「星际和平分部银行」。你把手伸进了兜里，做好了准备。
E: The magnificent glittering dome leaves an unforgettable impression on you. Surrounded by marvelous collectibles from various star systems... you find yourself at the IPC Branch Bank again. You reach into your pockets and are ready to take action.

C: 还要再来一次吗？
E: Ready for another one?

C: 你还未读完，便因激动昏了过去。
E: You pass out from excitement before you can finish reading it.

C: 「看来你的运势并不好，收下这个护身符吧，它会保护你。」占卜师长叹了口气，把带着暖意的护符放到你的手心。
E: "Seems like the odds aren't in your favor. Take this lucky charm. It will protect you." The soothsayer lets out a long sigh and puts a warm lucky charm on your palm.

C: 危险永远来自于好奇——恐怖片都这么演的。
E: Curiosity always leads to danger — You've seen enough horror movies to know this.

C: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
E: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

C: 问题一，您的出生地是？
E: Question one, where were you born?

C: 你坐在发烫的沙发上，灯光令你一时有些眩晕。菠萝面包的勇敢者游戏已步入尾声，最后的幸存者，所有人都在等待你的选择。
E: You sit on the hot sofa as the lights make you temporarily dizzy. The game of bravery: Pineapple Bread is approaching its final stages as everyone awaits your decision as the final survivor.

C: 「朋友，能给我几块金币吗？只要让我登上塞纳托斯的渡船，我愿意付给你任何东西！」他抓住你的手臂，刺骨的深寒顿时让你汗毛直竖。
E: "Friend, spare a few gold coins? As long as I am given passage aboard Thanatos' ferry, I will give you anything in return!" He grabs your arm, and a sharp chill abruptly shoots down your spine.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 等你清醒过来时，阳光已落在海面，破碎的船身里，不知何时多出了些许宝藏。作为大海对勇者的赞赏。
E: When you awaken, the sun is already pouring its light over the ocean. The shattered boat is inexplicably laden with treasures — a tribute from the sea to braves.

C: 在吕奎亚的监狱里，你的狱友正计划一出「精密」的越狱行动。
E: In the depths of Loukas' prison, your cellmate is hatching a "precise" jailbreak plan.

C: 所以它劈开吉奥里亚的堡垒，击落欧洛尼斯的繁星，剑指端坐于王座的刻法勒。
E: Thus, they cleaved Georios' fortress, cast down the stars of Oronyx, and aimed their blade at Kephale upon the throne.

C: 已经没人记得，在黄金世的尾声，世上曾有多少城邦。在礼赞尼卡多利的歌声中，锋刃高悬的移动要塞成为他们最后的噩梦。
E: At the twilight of the Era Chrysea, no one could recall just how many city-states had once thrived. In the ballads glorifying Nikador, the grim specter of the mobile armed fortresses with a hanging blade became their final nightmare.

C: 可墨涅塔早已乘着死亡与夜的西风，飞入少女的晚梦，戳穿了男人的诡计。她将匕首刺进仇敌的咽喉，并负罪割去长发，成为战场的先锋。
E: But Mnestia, riding the west wind of death and night, flies into the maiden's nocturnal dream to expose the man's deceit. She stabs a dagger into her enemy's throat, shaves her hair as a sinner, and becomes a vanguard on the battlefield.

C: 禁绝与封闭亦诞生。
E: Prohibitions and closures come into being.

C: 过去与未来被书写。
E: The past and the future are inscribed.

C: 你知道竞争者多如牛毛，而实习学者的名额才区区三人，你赶紧按捺自己躁动的内心，冷静下来思考递交哪项科研成果。
E: The competition is staggering, with countless hopefuls vying for just three precious spots. You force yourself to calm the excitement buzzing in your veins — focus. The real question is: which of your research projects should you submit?

C: 材料堆积在港口需要支付额外费用，先去港口比较好。
E: Storage fees at the port can be costly. Perhaps the materials should come first.

C: 欧洛尼斯变谜语人了。
E: Oronyx became a Riddler.

C: 一切都在塔兰顿的计算中。
E: All is within Talanton's considerations.

C: 扎格列斯背全锅。
E: It's all Zagreus's fault.

C: 当爱意和浪漫再无法抑制，它们如泉水般喷涌而出，化为漫野的金色羽翼。墨涅塔的蝴蝶飞向翁法罗斯的各方，直至那众神亦未洞晓的边陲。
E: Yet love and romance, unrestrained, burst forth like springs, flooding the fields as golden wings. Mnestia's butterflies soared to Amphoreus's farthest reaches — even to realms beyond divine sight.

C: 有斯廷法洛最为挺拔的橄榄树上，那清晨第一滴朝露滋润而成的碧绿果实；也有米拉瓦塔最勇敢无畏、胸脯宽阔的潜水者也采集不到的彩色巨蚌，如夜色般的珍珠在其中闪动。
E: There were emerald fruits nourished by the first dewdrops of dawn from the tallest olive tree in Stymphalia. Also colorful giant clams that even the bravest, most broad-chested divers of Mileutus could not harvest, with pearls dark as night shimmering within.

C: 接着世界迎来了寒冬，大地上不见了盎然的绿意，一切都变得苍白而倦怠。艾格勒为了唤醒沉睡的瑟希斯，降下风雪和冰雹，但却未曾得到哪怕些微的回应。
E: Then winter came to the world, and the earth lost its vibrant greenery as everything turned pale and weary. Aquila, attempting to awaken the slumbering Cerces, sent down snow and hail, but received not even the faintest response.

C: 于是艾格勒收获了启示——要打造只有一双眼睛的新眷属。
E: And so, Aquila received their revelation — to create a new Titankin with only a single pair of eyes.

C: 人力无法对抗神明。
E: Humans are powerless against the gods.

C: 「今天，你想听什么样的故事呢？」
E: "What kind of story would you like to hear today?"

C: 有就对了。
E: As I expected.

C: 是「八心八箭镶嵌珠宝的光锥」呢，还是「通体外露王霸之气的光锥」哇？
E: Was it the Jeweled-Studded Arrowheart Light Cone? Or was it the Domineering King's Aura Light Cone?

C: 空间站里人来人往，科员们却对宝箱的存在视若无睹。难道大家看不到这个宝箱？你不禁思索，一种原始的本能与冲动涌上心头……
E: People come and go in the space station, but the researchers are oblivious to the presence of the chest. Could it be that no one else can see it? You can't help but ponder, and a primal impulse begins to course throughout you...

C: 显然这不是终端机的密码。
E: This is evidently not the terminal's password.

C: 密保问题
E: Security question

C: 植物需要水，就像人需要吃饭一样。请你找点水来浇浇我吧！不然我会枯萎的……
E: Plants need water just as people need food to survive. Please, can you find me some water? I'll wither and die otherwise...

C: 要用心去感受，仔细听听，不像吗？
E: You have to feel it with your heart and focus. Are you getting it?

C: 除了苦涩味，没有别的味道，放下杯子，你开始思索到底什么人会喜欢咖啡。
E: It's bitter and doesn't have any other flavor. You put down the cup and start to ponder why anyone could actually like coffee.

C: 随便你。
E: Suit yourself.

C: 警告的内容与其说是警示，倒不如说是某种使用教程。你决定——
E: It's not so much a warning but a tutorial. You decide to —

C: 坐上去，按冲水键！
E: Sit down and flush!

C: 呃，我上哪知道去？我猜无非是去执行「地火」的任务，帮下层区别的镇子抵御裂界之类的吧？
E: My guess is as good as yours. I figure he probably went on some Wildfire mission to help the other Underworld towns fight against the Fragmentum.

C: 你决定结束这个令人尴尬的话题。「我们这次的任务是什么？」你咬牙，喉头含着热炭似的，浑身燥热难耐，发出的声音也变得支离顿挫。
E: You decide to steer the conversation away from the awkward topic. "What's our mission this time?" You grit your teeth, feeling as though there are burning coals in your mouth and your body is on fire. Your voice is cracked.

C: 今天对你来说应当是个好日子——就在刚才，你那总是愁容满面的部门主管将你的公司评级提升至P<unbreak>30</unbreak>了。
E: Today should have been your lucky day — your department head, whose face is always as long as a fiddle, just raised your IPC rating to P<unbreak>30</unbreak>.

C: 终有一天，我也要沐浴在这黄金色的池水中，受万人仰视。这才叫不负蝶生啊嗡~
E: One of these days I'm going to bathe in those golden waters, with thousands of people staring up at me. That's what it really means to have value in my life.

C: 吼吼，没有被那面镜子分散注意，反而朝着我走过来了吗？
E: Ho ho, you're coming straight this way. I see the mirror didn't distract you, did it?

C: 来点亮色~
E: How about a splash of color~

C: 若虫们的数量越来越多了。或许终有一天，这里会被虫鸣声填满。
E: The number of nymphs is growing. Maybe one day, this place will be filled with melodious chirping.

C: 哎…都是因为这道栅栏门！
E: *sigh* ...it's all because of this gate!

C: 哐！
E: Clank!

C: 你羞恼不已。再给你一次机会，你一定会给它点颜色瞧瞧。
E: You are embarrassed. If you are given a second chance, you'll teach it a lesson.

C: 嗯…咱们一人垫一半吧。这种机会可不是天天都能碰上的。
E: Hmmm... We'll each kick in half. This kind of opportunity doesn't come around every day.

C: 镇民们，乡亲们！瞧一瞧，看一看！又一位勇士要来挑战磐岩镇大胃王的头衔了！
E: Come one, and come all! Feast your eyes on this! We have another brave soul who has come to take on the challenge for the title of Boulder Town's Competitive Eater Champion.

C: 爽气！您这么守规矩的客人，这年头真是越来越少了…我记住您了，下次光临本摊绝对给您一个超低折扣！
E: Nice! You are a customer who sticks to the rules. Quite a rarity these days... I'll remember you. Next time you stop by, I absolutely will give you an incredible discount!

C: 该怎么做？选择在你手上，{NICKNAME}。
E: What should you do? The choice is yours, {NICKNAME}.

C: 一小时过去……
E: One hour later.

C: 我想说什么，你心里清楚！
E: You already know what I was going to say!

C: 并非真实
E: Not reality

C: 据说这幅画记载了刻法勒将智慧传给瑟希斯的过程…反正我是不信喀。
E: It is said that this painting depicts the process of Kephale passing knowledge unto Cerces... I don't believe it, anyway.

C: 哎呀，好疼！
E: Ouch, that hurt!

C: 前有宝箱…
E: There's a chest up ahead...

C: 绝无可能！
E: Impossible!

C: …但你就是喜欢*另辟蹊径*。最危险的地方就是最安全的地方——没准虎克就是发现不了你呢，对吧？
E: ...But you enjoy THINKING OUT OF THE BOX. The most dangerous place is often the safest. Maybe Hook won't be able to find you, right?

C: <size=36>吓死我们了！</size>
E: <size=36>You've scared us to death!</size>

C: 你感到恐惧，怔在原地。接下来会发生什么呢？你止不住地想，背上竟还兴奋地沁出汗来…也许，这就是捉迷藏的乐趣所在吧。
E: You feel afraid. You are frozen in place. What's going to happen now? You can't help but think about it. Sweat runs down your back as you get excited... This exhilaration must be the joy of hide-and-seek.

C: 这就对了喀！我和你说，我知道的可多了喀！小到祭司们的八卦、大到长老们的机密，都能给你讲讲喀！
E: Now we're talking! I've got so much to share! Everything from priestly gossip to the Elders' confidential matters, crrrk!

C: 我想成为一名诗人…
E: I want to be a poet...

C: 请问这位过路的旅客…您是否承认吾主的智慧盖世无双？
E: May I ask you, dear traveler... Do you acknowledge my master's unparalleled wisdom?

C: 你不会是预言请来的托吧？
E: You're not a plant hired by the prophecy, are you?

C: 我知道你说了「一只忧伤的机巧鸟」，只是我没能理解这句话的意思。
E: I know you said, "a depressed cycrane," but I don't understand what you mean.

C: 休要再提那个女人！
E: Don't mention that woman again!

C: 你听我说完，这件事儿对你也有好处。
E: Hear me out. This will benefit you, too.

C: 我同意！
E: Yes, okay!

C: 住手，不要再为我打架啦！
E: Stop, stop fighting for me!

C: 原来如此，梓桥女士需要我的帮助…可、可我还没有寻找到真正的强大。
E: Ah, is that so. Madam Ziqiao needs my help... B—But I haven't found my real power yet.

C: 你就嘴硬吧。
E: C'mon, you can admit it.
3 strales!

C: 稍等，我再想想。
E: Hold on. Please allow me to think it through...

C: 那是你想多了。
E: It's all in your head.

C: 我们并不打算把这件事闹到地衡司，毕竟多亏了你，我们实际没有蒙受什么损失。
E: We're not keen on involving the Realm-Keeping Commission here. And thanks to you, we didn't even end up suffering any damage.

C: 这柄巨锤不是吉奥里亚的造物，而是吾主根系盘结成的巨锤！被它锤一下脑袋，智慧就会源源不断地涌出…是不是很想试试呢？
E: This isn't some ordinary hammer forged by Georios — this colossal weapon is woven from my master's very roots! A single blow to the head, and wisdom will flood into you like an unstoppable tide... Tempting, isn't it?

C: 再也不敢了！
E: Never again!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「但若求助于高天」</color>，难道说其他部分不能靠常规手段获得？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"But if you seek the heaven,"</color> does that mean the other parts can't be obtained through conventional means?

C: 得问问其他玩这游戏的。
E: You'll have to ask other players who've played this game.

C: 哈哈哈哈，其实我也这么觉得。
E: Haha haha, I think so too.

C: 伸出右手。
E: Extend right arm.

C: 这就是同心相联的副作用啦，坚持住！
E: This is just a side effect of synchronization. Keep it up!

C: 炸弹把我炸飞到这儿了？！
E: The bomb blew me all the way here!?

C: 就是一个叫「摆烂真舒服」的家伙，你听听这名字，显然就不是什么正经人。
E: Someone called ComfortablySlacking. Just listen to that handle, it must not be someone serious.

C: 所以这「内部福利」，也只能在这几艘星槎上享受…偏生这星槎还经常晚点，老是让我一顿好等……
E: So this "internal benefit" can only be used on a select few starskiffs... But starskiffs are always delayed, I often had to wait so long...

C: 在此偏僻的一角，你发现了故人的踪迹。
E: In this remote corner, you discover traces of an old friend.

C: 先过一天算一天吧。
E: Let's take it a day at a time.

C: 上山喽。
E: Up the mountain we go.

C: 基于数据分析…
E: Based on data analysis...

C: 你说，真的灵验吗？
E: Do you think it really works?

C: 我也想站那么高！
E: I wanna be high up like that too!

C: 呜呜妈妈我不记得了。
E: *sobs* I don't remember, Mommy.

C: 言语化作音律…
E: Language transforms to melody...

C: 就只有这种待遇吗！
E: Only to face such discourtesy!

C: …只留下了幻影缥缈。
E: ...Is a hazy mirage.

C: 管他的…抱在身上吧！
E: Whatever... Just hold it tight!

C: 呜嗡——！
E: Urrhh!

C: 我说，{NICKNAME}啊，不是我说您…您好歹是仙舟的贵客，怎么还能掺和进这种违法活动中去？
E: I didn't want to tell you this, {NICKNAME}... You're a guest here on the Xianzhou. How did you get caught up in this kind of illegal activity?

C: 盯着我看干嘛，有事吗？
E: What are you staring at? What's up?

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你回来之后就好好休息吧，以后出门在外的，没有帕姆照顾你，你可要多加小心呀。
E: {NICKNAME}, now that you're back, please rest up good and proper. Pom-Pom won't be around to look after you when you are away, so take care.

C: （冷静分析，劝帕姆不要在意）
E: (Analyze it calmly and ask Pom-Pom not to care about it)

C: 难道是因为帕姆最近吃得有点多，长胖了把纽扣崩掉了么…不可能！绝对不可能！帕姆只吃了一点点而已嘛！
E: Could it be that Pom-Pom's been eating a little too much these days, and the button's popped off my fat belly... No way! Absolutely no way! Pom-Pom only ate a little.

C: …你怎么一副嫌弃的样子。
E: ...Don't be a hater.

C: 就是，乘客们平常养着的小动物呀？比如猫头鹰、猫和狗什么的。
E: Aren't pets easy to recognize? Such as small, common pets like an owl, a cat, or a dog.

C: 来点气泡水！
E: I'd like some sparkling water!

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 啦啦～啦～哒…哒哒哒？不对不对，唱错了。
E: La, la! La... Da... Da, da, da? Wait a minute. I've got it wrong.

C: 算了，都不熟。
E: Forget it. I'm not close with anyone.

C: 乖乖帕姆，做得好！
E: Well done, Pom-Pom! Great job!

C: 不过…这批机器人虽然是我定制的，但总感觉不太好用。在科员们的满意度调查里，它的得分很低。
E: Well... Although these robots are customized by me, they don't feel very good to use and scored very low in the staff satisfaction survey.

C: 关于「资源补给协议」…
E: About the resource supply agreement...

C: 鹤运速递，啥都能寄。
E: Heron Express — We Mail Anything.

C: 该不会是…
E: Don't tell me that's...

C: （好，那个铁卫军官的注意力转移到无人机上了。）
E: (Okay, that Silvermane officer's distracted with that drone.)

C: 唷，血气方刚！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
E: Wow, I admire your fighting spirit! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!

C: （那堆怪物后面有一座照雪灯炉…也许可以避免正面蛮干，绕后解决它们？希望还能捡到多余的核心，点燃那座灯炉……）
E: (There's a Snowshine Lamp behind that mob of monsters... Instead of facing them head-on, maybe we can skirt around the side and take them out? I hope we can get that extra core and fire up the Snowshine Lamp...)

C: 哈哈哈，年轻就是好啊！从远处欣赏你作战的英姿，对我这把老骨头来说也算是种享受！
E: Hahaha, it's good to be young! For an old-timer like me, it's a treat to watch you in action from afar!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>使用「回响发生装置」</color>应该就能锁定隐身怪物的位置，请酌情使用。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>Reverberation Generator</color> should help locate invisible monsters. Please use it wisely.

C: …突然有点不想干了。
E: ...I suddenly feel like quitting.

C: 「我笑扑满无谋，孽物少智。若我用兵，在狭隘的出口埋伏一只隐形怪物。我纵然不被所擒，也必然损耗巨大。」
E: "I laugh at the Trotter's poor tactics and the abomination's lacking guile. Were I them, I'd set an invisible creature at the narrow pass, and catch the hunters by surprise."

C: 祝您好运。请一定要平安归来。云骑常胜！
E: Good luck. Please come back safely. Glory to the Cloud Knights!

C: 这里是梦境游戏《小小哈努行动》的入口，只有变成小小哈努兄弟后才可以进入。
E: This is the entrance to Hanu's Adventure, a game in the Dreamscape. You must transform yourself into a miniature Brother Hanu first to proceed.

C: 被石头老板变小以后，爬楼梯就像攀登山峰一样困难，还是找找别的路吧。
E: After being shrunk by Boss Stone, climbing the staircase becomes as challenging as a mountain hike. Let's try another route.

C: 「四大天王」之一
E: First of the Formidable Four

C: 好哦，回家咯！
E: All right. Let's go!

C: 多么…悦耳……
E: How... pleasing...

C: 行了，快走吧。禁区本来就不是任你游荡的地方。
E: All right, you may leave now. The restricted zone is not a hangout.

C: 看这华丽的风格…大概是佩拉的作品。原来她还自己重新画了一版啊…这件事我确实不知情。
E: This gorgeous style... I presume it's Pela's work? So she even painted one version of it herself... I never knew about that.

C: …不是！我刚刚什么都没说……
E: ...No! I said nothing!

C: …开个玩笑，我知道你们是清白的。不过，在那之后，杰帕德长官应该已经安排人把通缉令都撤掉了啊——这事还是我当面向他申请的呢。
E: ...Just kidding, I know you're innocent. But after all of that, Captain Gepard should've had your arrest warrants canceled by now — I submitted an application for it in person.

C: 你已经捞不到任何东西了。但你仍可以凭着兴趣数数它们到底有多少，或者投掷硬币许个愿——如果你还有硬币的话。
E: There's nothing left for you to get. But you can still count everything out of interest, or toss a coin in to make a wish — if you have any coins left, that is.

C: 我的主人菲多拉称您能为我提供合适的数据集——在学习过程中，我会为您随机预设一社交情景，您只需根据经验作答即可。
E: My master Fidora said that you can provide me with a suitable dataset. During the learning process, I will randomly present you with a social interaction. Please answer based on your personal experiences.

C: 真好听，你能教教我吗？
E: It's brilliant. Can you teach me?

C: 你拿起了听筒，小心翼翼地把它贴到耳边……
E: You pick up the phone and carefully put it next to your ear...

C: 电话断线了。聒噪的「嘟嘟」声不断敲击着你空白的心灵。
E: The call is disconnected. The annoying beeps gnaw at your soul.

C: 没错，动手吧！就算发生了什么，也都是那个惹人厌的拳馆老板自找的——至少你能这么安慰自己。
E: Sure, do it! It's all that gym owner's fault, anyway... At least that's your excuse.

C: 好你个{F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}，还敢强词夺理。看来，今天不好好教训你一番，你是长不了记性了。
E: Don't get smart with me, {F#missy}{M#scoundrel}! Seems like I'll have to teach you a little lesson here that you won't soon forget.

C: 点进去看看。
E: Check it out.

C: 大难临头，远走高飞…
E: Flee far away, as trouble is surely imminent...

C: 为了求证你所做的一切是否有意义，你再次掀起了那落满灰尘的门帘……
E: You roll up that dusty curtain once more, seeking confirmation that everything you've done actually has meaning...

C: 我听说薪水很高的样子。
E: I heard the remuneration is high.

C: 接下来…我们去<color=#dbc291ff>授事厅</color>附近看看吧。似乎有货物是遗失在那里的。
E: Next... let's check out the area near the <color=#dbc291ff>Conclave Hall</color>. It seems that some items were lost there.

C: 谁不是为了生活呢…
E: I'm just trying to make a living here...

C: 鹤运物流想委托你到这些货物丢失的地方，用机巧鸟居高临下地搜索丢失的货物，总比人用肉眼找要可靠许多。
E: Heron Express wants to commission you to go to the place where these goods were lost and search for them with cycranes from a high vantage point. That would be much more efficient than getting people to manually look for it with just eyes.

C: 抱歉，我有些太过于不注意他人感受了，我向你道歉。
E: I'm sorry. I wasn't paying attention to other people's feelings there. I apologize.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我第一次看这样玻璃罐子装着的「鲛人泪」…而且，这正是我想要的「有一些粗糙的鲛人泪」，谢谢你啦。
E: Hahaha, this is the first time I've seen Draconic Tears inside a glass jar like this... And this is exactly the kind of authentic Draconic Tears that I'm looking for! Thank you so much.

C: 你们在干嘛？
E: What are you guys doing?

C: 没事，你慢慢考虑。
E: No problem. Take your time.

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: 你把宝箱藏哪儿了？
E: Where'd you hide the chest?

C: 你们都是怎样招募新成员的？
E: How do you guys find new recruits?

C: 你们秘社里还有些什么代号？
E: What other code names have you got in your secret society?

C: 救救孩子们！救救宇宙的未来吧！
E: Save the children! Save the future of the universe!

C: 快去找家族的警卫！
E: Quick, go and fetch The Family guard!

C: 当然，这仅是些个人拙见罢了，很抱歉没能为您提供更多有用的信息。
E: Of course, this is just my humble opinion. Sorry, I can't provide you with any more useful information.

C: 哈…不过是几只小垃圾，就被吓成这副怂样，果然是个没了我就不行的废物……
E: Ha... It's just a few pieces of trash, but enough to get scared stiff. So it turns out they really are useless without me around...

C: 这么说来，我还得多谢你把我叫醒——你可以叫我W。
E: Speaking of which, I have you to thank for waking me up — you can call me W.

C: 我们的职责就是及时摘除这些祸种，避免它们在宾客间蔓延开来。
E: Our job is to remove these blights in a timely manner and prevent them spreading between guests.

C: 那还不快去！和老头子我在这耗什么呢！
E: Then hurry off! What are you doing with a doddering old fool like me!

C: 你的职能很重要吗？
E: Is your role very important?

C: 奎茵的神色有一瞬恍惚，但随即又变回最初那种生动活泼。
E: Quinn's face looks stunned for a second, but soon returns to as lively as it was before.

C: 我的本职是个宇宙行商，经常开着飞船到处鬼混。你也可以叫我「科琳船长」。
E: I'm a traveling merchant by trade, and fly my ship anywhere I please. You can call me "Captain Colleen."

C: 这原理解释起来可就复杂了…知道{RUBY_B#台球}撞洞球{RUBY_E#}吗？就跟那个差不多，但我要打的是有史以来最精妙，最传奇的一杆！
E: This principle is quite hard to explain... Do you know {RUBY_B#Billiards}billiards{RUBY_E#}? It's just like that, but the shot I was gonna make would be the most exquisite, legendary shot in all history!

C: 浪漫一点的。
E: Make it a little more romantic.

C: 两对眼睛、皮肤光滑，有点像长了手脚的鱼——看它的样子，在宇宙中生存也没什么问题。
E: Two pairs of eyes and smooth skin, almost like a fish with arms and legs — judging by its appearance, it should have no problem whatsoever surviving in the universe.

C: 我曾经也是一个无名客——或许你已经猜到了。除了无名客，还有谁会闲到走遍宇宙呢？
E: I was once a Nameless, myself — as you no doubt have guessed. Who else could be free enough to roam around the universe but one of us?

C: 昨晚，我们和这房间里的女人打了个照面，发现她长得跟公司悬赏令上的逃犯有几分相似。
E: Last night, we met the woman in this room and discovered that she bore a striking resemblance to a fugitive on the IPC bounty hunt.

C: （小声）大哥，这家伙看起来确实不太好惹…会不会是什么来度假的大人物？
E: (Whispers) Dude, this {M#guy}{F#gal} doesn't look like a walk in the park... Are they some kind of big shot here on vacation?

C: 好在科琳船长总是留有后招：入梦之前，我在房门上架设了一台「锁闭式次元力场发生器」，将整个房间变得固若金汤——即使用激光炮轰也进不来！
E: Luckily Captain Colleen always has a backup plan: Before going to sleep, I set up my enclosed dimensional force field generator on the door so that the entire room would be impenetrable — not even under laser bombardment!

C: 你可以猜猜看，这些年来我都在做些什么。
E: Take a guess at what I've been up to for those years.

C: 这次航行结束后，我就脱队单干了。
E: After this voyage was over, I left the team and struck out on my own.

C: 那颗星球名叫奥特兰，位于遥远偏僻的边境星系。它所属的恒星被一颗星核污染，不停释放出辐射。
E: That planet was called Outerland, and it was located in a distant border galaxy. It belonged to a star corrupted by a Stellaron, and was constantly releasing radiation.

C: 总之，这法子确实保住了奥特兰一段时间…大概半个琥珀纪吧。
E: In any case, this method has indeed preserved Outerland for a period... about half an Amber Era.

C: 你不是有悬赏令吗？
E: Aren't there wanted posters out there for you?

C: 可能其他资料都丢了。
E: Maybe the other documents have gone missing.

C: 其实我不是没办法离开筑梦边境，但根据我在宇宙里摸爬滚打的经验，这一趟必定凶险异常——家族可能早就有所防范了。
E: Truth be told, I have the means to leave the Dream's Edge, but I've spent enough time here to know that the trip is bound to be perilous. The Family may have already taken precautions.

C: 那你总听说过《班尼古堡》吧？《末世班尼》呢？
E: Does the name Benny's Castle ring a bell? How about Apocalyptic Benny?

C: 现在…唉，可能人的理想和才气是真的会被燃尽的吧？
E: Now... Alas, it might be true that one's ambition and talent will one day be exhausted.

C: 一个人吗，一起喝一杯？
E: Are you here alone? How about grabbing a drink together?

C: 就这？这只能说明他单方面仇视我吧。
E: That's it? Those things just show that he's harboring a one-sided grudge against me.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 嚯，又是这玩意…说实话，我真不想再看一遍这种只会让人浪费生命的垃圾。
E: Oof, this again... Honestly, I really don't want to waste any more time on this kind of meaningless garbage.

C: 第十一次的一见钟情，我爱上的是……
E: Well, the eleventh time I've fallen in love at first sight...

C: 你听听这是什么话，太没良心了！要是没有家系，他说不定还在克劳克影城门口发传单呢！
E: Can you believe the audacity? If it weren't for the Iris Family, he'd still be out there handing out flyers in front of Clock Studios Theme Park!

C: 我可没碰他，请你不要侮辱我的职业素养——
E: I didn't lay a finger on him. Please don't question my professionalism...

C: 喂，别这么不讲礼貌——在让人迷乱的幻梦中，产生一些误会是很正常的事。
E: Hey, mind your manners! Misunderstandings are prone to happen in this confusing dreamland.

C: 当然会，我不会背叛美味。
E: Of course I'd love it. I'll never betray good flavor.

C: 不，没那么简单…那位经纪人把控着整个匹诺康尼的娱乐圈命脉，我必须想办法说服她，而不是反抗她。
E: No, it's not that simple... She holds significant sway over the entertainment industry in Penacony. I must find a way to convince her, instead of defying her.

C: 这里为啥聚着这么多人？这谁啊？
E: Why are so many people gathered here? Who's that woman?

C: 无论如何，感谢您帮我从虚伪的梦中醒来…我现在找到了内心真正的渴望，并愿意为之付出一切。
E: Anyway, thank you for awakening me from my false dreams... Now, I have discovered my true aspirations, and I'm willing to go to any lengths to pursue them.

C: 「醒醒吧，没有鸢尾花家系的宣传与包装，你和你的『纯美之歌』就是梦中无人问津的垃圾。」
E: "Snap out of it! Without the publicity and support of the Iris Family, you and your so-called Song of Beauty are just worthless trash in the Dreamscape."

C: 我知道，所以我才会一直没法忘怀……
E: I know, and that's why I've not been able to move on from the incident...

C: 你身上有一股特别的气质，和从前的我很像。有些人叫它「多管闲事」，而我更喜欢称之为——责任心。
E: You have a special demeanor that reminds me of my old self. Some label it as meddling, but I prefer to call it a sense of responsibility.

C: 人总是要朝前看的。你所谓的自责，不过是用折磨自己的方式来逃避现实罢了。
E: We can't always live in our past. Blaming yourself is just your way of escaping reality.

C: …这不重要，重要的是眼前的机遇能给你带来什么！
E: ...That isn't the point. You should focus on what this chance can bring you!

C: 对于这部电影，我打算投入重资，并亲自担任导演和编剧。感受到了吗，朋友——光明的未来在等着我们！
E: I plan to invest heavily in this movie, and I'll direct it and write the script myself. Can you feel it now, my friend? A bright future is ahead of us!

C: 哦…？怎么，你想开了？我就说嘛，怎么会有人和钱过不去呢！
E: Oh? Have you decided to take up my offer? I told you no one could resist the temptation of money!

C: 那之后我一路披荆斩棘，不知吃了多少苦、流了多少汗，终于获得了自己应有的荣誉与地位、过上了一直向往的生活。
E: Later on, I overcame obstacles along the way and earned the accolades and status I deserved through my blood, sweat, and tears. I finally got to live the life I'd always desired.

C: 你想调查的那位家族高层…
E: About that Family big shot you want to investigate...

C: 哎，如果有人能帮我把垃圾弄来就好了……
E: Alas, if only someone could help me gather the trash...

C: 「只要能把那些兵器拿到手，胜利的天平就会向我们倾斜了！」
E: "If we can find those weapons, we'll be one step closer to victory!"

C: 没办法，人类就是这么热衷于互相扇耳光。身边有木棍，他们就会使用木棍；有虚数弹，他们就会使用虚数弹。
E: Well, humans just tend to want to cause harm to each other. If there's a wooden stick at hand, they'll use it. If there's an imaginary bomb around, they'll use it too.

C: 经历过那么多事，如今我终于找到了自己的归宿——匹诺康尼。我要在这里以一个人，而非工具的身份活下去。
E: After so many twists and turns, I've finally found a place where I belong — Penacony. I want to live my life here as a human, instead of a tool.

C: 而我的母星…倘若我真回到了那里，估计也不会看到人们握手言和。
E: As for my home planet... even if I go back, I don't think I'll see the people there bury their hatchets.

C: 被命运馈赠却不自知的人，最终一定会品味失去的痛苦…我不想看到那种事情发生。
E: Those who take their blessings for granted will surely feel the pain of losing them one day... I don't want that to happen.

C: 你是哪个家系的？
E: Which family do you represent?

C: 我的职责是在家主外出期间打理公馆的事务…我不需要用笑脸应对一切事态和突发状况，特别是不期而至的访客。
E: My job is to handle affairs when the family head is absent... I'm not required to keep a smile handy for every occasion or emergent situation — least of all for unexpected guests.

C: 正因为有许许多多同你一样善良的朋友，基金会才能运营至今。金钱只是慈善事业的血管，发自内心的善意才是供血的心脏。
E: It's precisely because of so many kind-hearted friends such as yourself that the foundation is able to carry on to this day. Money merely forms the arteries of any charity, but it's kindness from within that pumps the lifeblood like a heart.

C: 关于基金会…
E: About the foundation...

C: 我看着她的棺椁，就想啊，有什么是我能做的。然后，就有了基金会。
E: Looking at her coffin there, I thought: What can I do about this? And that's where the foundation comes in.

C: 孩子，基金会出资援助他们，并非我一个人的功劳，银河里所有热爱和平和生命的人，他们的善意才是值得感激的。
E: Kid, the funding that the foundation invests isn't just coming from me. Champions of peace and life across the galaxy all deserve our gratitude for their kindness.

C: 善意，对吧？
E: Out of kindness, right?

C: 可是基金会…
E: But, what about the foundation...

C: 然后，他们会说：「请停止战争，大家坐下来和平地谈谈吧」。要我说，最适合她的工作也不是什么军火商，她就该去做个喜剧演员，和小丑们混在一起。
E: And then they'll say: "Please, put down arms and let everybody negotiate peacefully." I'm telling you, the best job for her isn't being an arms trader but rather a stand-up comedian. Just a bunch of clowns.

C: 随着钟表的指针拨动，阿图罗先生止住动作、陷入了思考。他头顶的天环仿佛都黯淡了几分。
E: As the clock's hands tick forward, Mr. Arturo stops what he's doing and sinks into thought, causing the halo above his head to dim slightly.

C: 可不是嘛！朋友，你有所不知，如今匹诺康尼正在面临前所未有的困境…简单来说，就是找不到工作。
E: That's right! Friend, you might not know about this, but Penacony is currently in the midst of an unprecedented crisis... To put it simply, there are barely any jobs available.

C: 既然如此，就从下个月开始试行全封闭式管理好了——
E: If this is the case, I'll try managing the school as an enclosed institution from next month.

C: 过去发生在这学校的点点滴滴，老鸟一直看在眼里。关于如今学生们面临的问题，老鸟也一直在思考，现在是时候给出一些看法了。
E: I've observed every little thing that has happened in this school and have given a lot of thought to the problems the students are currently facing. And now it is time I express those thoughts.

C: 就算他们中有人能成功游到对岸，那也是他们自己受益，不是我——功成名就之后肯回头帮母校一把的又有几个？都不够我操心的！
E: Even if some of them manage to make it to the opposite shore, the one who has benefited will be them and not me... After achieving success, how many of them would even be willing to return and contribute to their alma mater? There's simply too many things I need to worry about!

C: 校长啊…听起来是不是像个大官？其实也没想象中那么自在。至少在折纸大学，校长能决定的东西不是很多。
E: The dean, huh... Although it sounds like a powerful position, it is not as unrestrained as you would imagine. At least in Paperfold University, there isn't much that the dean actually has authority over.

C: 工作台的主人暂时离开了，他最好是。上面还摆着组装了一半的零件呢。
E: The owner of this workbench is temporarily absent. They better return soon, for half-assembled parts are lying strewn upon it.

C: 真没想到，最后的神秘玩家居然是虎克...哦，应该叫「漆黑的虎克大人」才对！难道这也在你的安排之中吗，乔瓦尼老哥？
E: Who could have guessed, the final mystery player was Hook... Oh, I mean Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Was this all part of your plan, too, Giovanni?

C: 呃…要是可以的话，我宁愿这辈子都不再跟她打交道......
E: Hah... If I could, I would never speak to her again...

C: 谜团似乎越来越多，但有句箴言永远适用：跟戴面具的人打交道，一定要留个心眼。
E: The mysteries seem to just be piling up, but one phrase rings true: "When talking to one who wears a mask, always keep your wits about you."

C: 不许告我的状啊，小咪。
E: Please don't tell on me, Mimi.

C: 我卖的都是我的珍～藏～，只有有缘的人才有购买资格啾！
E: I only sell pieces from my most precious collections here! Only those lucky enough to find this place are granted the rare chance to buy them!

C: 本船长有令：舵轮往左打，满舵全速前进，冲冲冲！
E: Captain's orders! Hard to port! Full speed ahead! Go, go, go!

C: 是在观景啾，别急，马上到你。
E: We're queuing to sightsee, tweet. Don't worry, it'll be your turn soon.

C: 你们站那么高，爪子不会发软吗？
E: Don't your claws go weak standing so high up?

C: 很好，这下驾驶员的招聘标准可以放宽些了。
E: Very good. Now we can relax the recruitment criteria for operators slightly.

C: 考虑到未来我们可能需要修缮更多的造物引擎…我认为这第一台成品应该起到一点带头作用。
E: Thinking of the future, we will likely need to repair more Engines of Creation in the future... I believe that the first finished product should serve as the vanguard in this.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 水洗煤。
E: Washed coal.

C: 难道说——哎呀，这样一点都不浪漫啾！
E: Unless — this is so unromantic, tweet!

C: 能请你表演下那个吗，就是那个…
E: Could you please perform that, that...

C: 啾噜噜噜~要、要被苏乐达灌满了。
E: Tweetglugglug... Th—This SoulGlad is gonna make me burst.

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 啾…恐龙先生——没有我你可怎么办呀，啾！
E: Tweet... Mr. Dinosaur... what will you do without me, tweet!

C: 钟表小子出去好久了啾。
E: Clockie's been gone a long time, tweet.

C: 流星来了，快许愿啾！
E: A shooting star! Quick, make a wish, tweet!

C: 一只赤红色的小鸟抬头望向你。你竟从一只折纸鸟身上看到了如此立体的凶狠眼神。
E: A scarlet bird looks at you with a raised head. You never thought you'd see such a convincingly fierce gaze from an origami bird.

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 嘿呀！是魔法硬币！
E: Hi-yah! It's a Magic Coin!

C: 金灿灿的颜色、花里胡哨的语气、一掷千金的习惯…你确实在*某人*身上见过相同的特点。
E: The bright golden hue, that flamboyant tone, the way you flaunt your wealth... You've definitely seen these traits in *someone*.

C: 哼哼，您也对本公子的光辉事迹感兴趣吗~
E: Heheh, I see you're also interested in my glorious feats!

C: 我要为这里带来一抹*绿色*啾！
E: I want to bring some "green" to this place, tweet!

C: 到点了，我该回去继续搭巢了。剩下的苏乐达就留给你了啾~
E: It's time for me to head back and continue building my nest. You can have the rest of these SoulGlad, tweet~

C: 啾啾！竟然是这样…没、没办法，只能拿出在下的小金库了啾……
E: Tweet tweet! I see your game... W—Well fine then, I guess I shall have to open my little treasury, tweet...

C: 哎，散了散了啾，还是老老实实去其他片场拍戏吧，啾啾。
E: Bah, show's over, tweet. Better to just quietly shoot scenes at other sets, tweet tweet.

C: 我等得都快睡着了，还是没见他回来啾。
E: I waited for so long, I almost fell asleep. And still, he's not back, tweet.

C: 再见，本小鸟要去一个不知道的地方，去做不知道的事情啾。
E: Goodbye, I'm going to an unknown place, to do something unknown, tweet.

C: 看那整齐划一的石头，那精美绝伦的雕刻，啊，我已经爱上这里了啾。
E: Look at that immaculate stone, that exquisitely elegant sculpture. Ah, I'm in love with this place, tweet.

C: 恭喜，你是第一个发现本鸟作品的人啾！
E: Congrats, you're the first one who's discovered my work, tweet!

C: 你闭嘴啾！
E: Shut up, tweet!

C: 我就是甜猿泰山，咕咕咕咕…
E: I'm a Sweet Gorilla, cuckoo-cuckoo...

C: 哎，吆喝好久也没生意啾，这里的学生不爱学习！
E: *sigh* Still no business after shouting for so long, tweet. The students here don't like to study!

C: 接下来，就是见证奇迹的时刻啾——我会让时间恢复流动！
E: Next, it's time to witness a real miracle, tweet — I'll let time flow again!

C: 小鸟坐热气球，上面空气很好啾。
E: Sitting in a hot air balloon... I find the air above so great, tweet.

C: 所以我要买下这所学堂！新规定——从今以后水池可以游泳啾。
E: That's why I'm going to buy school! New rule — from today on, all pools can be swum in, tweet!

C: 祝{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}生日快乐啾啾啾~
E: Happy birthday to you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, tweet tweet tweet!

C: 带我一个！
E: Bring me along!

C: 啾啾？现场演出，观众们不就是来看我的吗。
E: Tweet tweet? Aren't all the spectators here to see me for the live performance?

C: 唔，现在的话还是算了，它们在睡觉，咱们小点声，别吵醒它们。
E: Oh, forget it for now. They're asleep, so let's keep the noise down and try not to wake them.

C: 放心吧，我能保护自己。
E: Don't worry. I can take care of myself.

C: 我也不一定能找到…
E: I can't guarantee that I'll find them...

C: 我已经太聪明了，毁灭世界在我看来毫无意义。只有那些反物质军团的造物、泯灭帮的蠢货才想要做这样的事情…换言之，我是不屑于去做的。
E: I'm simply too smart to do something meaningless like destroying the world. Only the morons from the Antimatter Legion or the Annihilation Gang would do such a foolish thing... In short, it's beneath me to destroy the world. Absolutely not.

C: （卜算命运）
E: (Divine your fate)

C: 老板您就别逗了，咱俩都直接修改玉兆了，什么二卦不二卦的还值得纠结吗？
E: Come on! Why even bother with these rules when we've already cracked the jade abacus?

C: 那个…阿幸老板啊，这个玉兆好像坏掉了，不好意思让你白跑了一趟啊……
E: I'm sorry, A-Xing... but this abacus seems to be broken... I'm sorry for having you come all this way for nothing...

C: 这里本来就是我的「秘密窝点」，我去拿点东西，一回来就看到你站在这儿发呆。
E: This has always been my "secret lair." I went out to grab something, came back, and found you just standing there looking gormless.

C: 这是你的墓碑？！
E: This is YOUR tombstone!?

C: 有什么好奇怪的，这里都是我的衣冠冢。我们持明本来就是会蜕生的啊。你没看墓碑上写的字吗？我连蜕生的第几世都标注得一清二楚了。
E: What's so weird about it? All of this is my cenotaph. We Vidyadhara, we get our own hatching rebirth. Didn't you read the tombstone? I even wrote out every single rebirth super clearly.

C: 古琴的演奏者似乎不打算现身。既然如此，就当园中的凄风孤月有情，为你讲个故事吧——
E: The guqin's player hasn't seemed to materialize. Despite this, let me use the sentimental backdrop of the moon in this lonely garden to tell you a story...

C: 琴师会把他们当作知音吗？
E: Would the guqinist really consider them soul mates of his, too?

C: 怎么样？现在想跟我学唱戏了吗？
E: How about it? Do you want to learn one opera song with me?

C: 我为郎君炖鸡汤。
E: There's chicken soup down at the mall.

C: 如果我的登场方式不是突然出现，而是闪着火花螺旋升空，这样就没问题了嘛？没这么简单吧？
E: If my entrance is not a sudden appearance, but instead spiral off into the sky with sparks like a firework — is that okay? It's not that simple, is it?

C: 对了，你记得吗？我们已经见面<color=#dbc291ff>3次</color>了。
E: By the way, do you remember? We've met <color=#dbc291ff>3 times</color> now.

C: 里面的人还好吗…
E: Are the people inside okay?

C: 哈哈哈，就这水平还自称赌神？我看你不如改名叫玩蛇吧！
E: Hahaha! Is that all that the Ace Gambler has to offer? Why not change your name to Fool of Fools!

C: 好吧，那你多保重。
E: Okay, take care.

C: 要是您有余力，愿意继续大发善心的话…可否请您，也替他们赎回自由呢？
E: If you are willing to express your endless generosity... perhaps you would also pay for their freedom on their behalf?

C: 大家都是懂得知恩图报的人，不会让您的好意白费的。
E: They are all people who understand the meaning of repaying kindness, your gesture would not go to waste.

C: 就是演个戏嘛。情景和台词都有不少欠打磨的地方，别太较真哈。
E: It's just an act. There are still a few scenes and lines that need polishing, so don't take it too seriously.

C: 闹街彷徨梦思迷。
E: Streets bustling, lost in a dream's soft glow.

C: 别看包装有模有样，实际上那些有钱人或者酒客根本不会正眼看我一眼——
E: I might be well-packaged, but in reality, those rich folks and drinkers wouldn't even spare me a second glance.

C: 十分感谢您的帮助，善良的{F#女士}{M#先生}。如果我的事后面有进展了，我一定会想办法告诉您的。
E: I appreciate your help, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. I'll keep you posted if there are any updates on my side.

C: 哈哈哈，我们三瓶的友谊坚不可摧！
E: Haha, our friendship is unbreakable!

C: 是连苏乐达工厂都看不起的废品，低价回收来酿酒的。
E: They said that you're made from scraps that even SoulGlad Enterprise wouldn't use, recycled on the cheap to make wine.

C: 爆米花和汽水夫妇都是这里的居民，应该会对死者有所了解。另外，有个汽水和爆米花的侦探组合也到了现场，或许能为我们拓宽思路。
E: The popcorn and soda couples are residents here, they should know something about our victim. Also, there's a group of popcorn and soda detectives that will be heading to the scene. Maybe they'll have some insights that can help us.

C: 虽然他老在外面拈花惹草，也不至于搭上条命啊。
E: Just because he was always out flirting around doesn't mean he deserved to have his life taken, does it?

C: 黑塔女士…哈，要是能请得动她，算你厉害。
E: Madam Herta... Ah, I'd like to see you trying to get her to come...

C: 真不知道这种既新奇又复古的文旅项目能否重燃判官大人对生活的热爱。
E: I wonder if this kind of novel-yet-retro tourist activity would be able to reignite the judge's passion for life?

C: 呃…在我们的教义里，星神也不过是桶王的化身，有相似之处很正常！
E: Ugh... In our teachings, Aeons are just incarnations of the King of Cans. Of course, they will have some similarities!

C: 湮厄鹰来了拔毛，赤羽狼过了剥皮——「流梦帮」在此！
E: We'd pluck the Torment Eagles bald if they cross here, and skin the Redfeather Wolves if they dare to pass... We are the Dreamflux Gang!

C: 这是下一个动作，你急什么？
E: That's the one after. What're ya rushin' for?

C: 说过多少次了，苏乐达洗马桶完全是种族歧视，是对我们的污名化。
E: How many times have I said this? SoulGlad being used to wash toilets is a racist stereotype! It's defamation of our name!

C: 苏乐达企业真是没良心。
E: The SoulGlad company is heartless.

C: 嗯，承你吉言。我一定不会退缩的——一如既往。
E: Yes, I will gladly take your blessing. I'll never back down — nor have I ever.

C: 正品保证，全新无划痕，非二次包装，价钱绝对公道。数量有限，先到先得！
E: Guaranteed legit, brand-new condition, in original packaging, and at an absolutely fair price. My stocks are limited — first come first served!

C: 现在不是工作时间吗？
E: Isn't it working hours right now?

C: {NICKNAME}大人？
E: {NICKNAME}?

C: 再好好观察一下「嫌疑人甲」吧，也许对你的提问有利。
E: It's best to take some time to observe Suspect A. You may be able to find some clues.

C: 我可以高维度作弊，你输定了。
E: Any cheat you can do, I can do better. You're going to lose.

C: 感谢厚爱，请期待之后的书籍。
E: Thank you for your support. Stay tuned for more upcoming books.

C: 很好，我将以…我应该以什么罪名将它重新逮捕呢？我现在立刻查询一下。
E: All right. Then I'll... On what charge should I rearrest it? Let me do a quick check.

C: 感谢你，{NICKNAME}大人。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这不是给我俩指路的好心人吗？真巧，在这里遇见您了。
E: Hey, isn't that the kind-hearted soul who showed us the way? What a coincidence, I didn't expect to see you here.

C: 我说那是鬼，但是铁皮脑袋不相信！
E: I said that it was a ghost, but this metalhead didn't believe me!

C: 嗯？嗯？嗯？
E: Hm? Hmmm?

C: 我已经在集装箱里了，能听见我的声音吧，从这里开始，我该怎么走？
E: Can you hear me? I got into the container. Where do I go from here?

C: 请你出去！
E: Please leave the area at once!

C: 已经顾不得那么多了，你快步越至二人跟前，以迅雷不及掩耳之势扑向控制台。
E: There's no time for all this. You hurry your steps over toward the two operators and rush over to the control station.

C: 百闻不如一见，我现在就带你去见识见识，什么叫无敌的飞行表演。
E: Well, seeing is believing. I will take you to go and see a truly unbelievable flying performance for yourself.

C: 阁下多虑了，只要别打草惊蛇，那劫匪不会贸然走出这扇门。更何况人质又是一名行动不便的老者。
E: Rest assured, the kidnapper won't come rushing out of this door as long as we don't go alert them. Plus, their hostage is an old man with limited mobility.

C: 终于到我们出场的时候了。
E: It's finally time for us to take the stage!

C: 这里~
E: Hereeee~

C: 经济学需要一定的专业基础，听不懂情有可原。但画画总难不倒你吧？不就是照着……
E: Economics requires a certain level of basic understanding, so it's normal to not understand. But surely drawing's not a huge challenge for you? It's just copying...

C: 我知道，选C！
E: I know. It's C!

C: 询问绿色酒瓶。
E: Talk to the green bottle.

C: 何等激烈的竞争！三位选手明显都是有备而来，对舞台的主角位置志在必得！那么，经过紧张刺激的比拼，谁将成为最终的获胜者呢？
E: What an intense bout! These three contenders have obviously come prepared, all for the singular goal of hogging center stage! Now then, with this thrilling clash unfolding, who will become the eventual victor?

C: 请听题：请您想象一个场景，您的面前有一个盛放了一半的水的玻璃杯。
E: Please listen to the question: Let's picture a situation where you have a glass half-filled with water in front of you.

C: 好累呀。要不要躺一会儿呢？
E: I'm so tired. Maybe I should take a lie down?

C: 答案或许是——某种特殊的奇美拉？
E: Could it be... a particular kind of chimera?

C: 罚款<unbreak>50</unbreak>万。
E: It's a <unbreak>500,000</unbreak> fine.

C: 冒犯刻法勒的笑话居然还是冷笑话，幽默可真是门学问……
E: To think the joke that offends Kephale is deadpan humor, humor is certainly an art...

C: 从你为数不多的养宠经验来看，任何动物在幼崽时期都很可爱，但长大后就会发生天翻地覆的变化，认不出来都是常有的事。
E: From your limited pet-keeping experiences, any animal is super cute when it's young and small, but it undergoes extreme changes when grown, to the point where you can't even recognize it sometimes.

C: 缇宝离开后，这头狮子缓了好长一阵子才恢复精神……
E: After Tribbie leaves, this lion sulks for the longest time before regaining its composure...

C: 一位好奇的无名客，怎么会对我不感兴趣呢？
E: How could a curious Nameless not be interested in me?

C: 嗝…剩下的心愿，容我先缓缓。
E: *hiccup* Please give me some time before we come to the rest of my wishes.

C: 这都是你的功劳，呼呼。让我想想，要是在过去，在山岳尚未崩解为无数碎石的时候，我该怎么奖励你，又该如何称颂你的功绩？
E: It's all thanks to you. Let me think. *crackle* In the past, before the mountains collapsed into countless pebbles, how would I have rewarded and praised you for your deeds?

C: 你谁啊？付钱了吗你？别打扰我交接货物！
E: Who do you think you are? Have you paid? Don't disturb me when I'm trying to hand over my goods!

C: 不。正确答案是揍他！将他殴打至不敢再犯为止！
E: Nope. You should beat the person up until they promise to never repeat the mistake!

C: 我们兄弟俩也是时候远走高飞了。就此别过吧！
E: It's time for us siblings to leave this place as well. I bid you farewell!

C: 花钱还是免了…
E: Spending money is out of the question...

C: 哥哥，让{M#他}{F#她}见识下我们热血沸腾的组合技！
E: Brother, let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

C: 自从塔塔洛夫陨落，那些刁民将我等忠良驱逐出境，这度日如年的流亡生活，也不知什么时候是个头。
E: Since Tatalov's fall, those unruly riff-raff have exiled me — a loyal servant — from the borders. I don't know when this aimless and excruciating life of wandering will end.

C: 嗟，来食！
E: Ho, here's some food!

C: 就不给！
E: I'm not giving you anything!

C: 我该去哪儿来着？这里又是什么地方？我、我我我…我怎么都想不起来了！
E: Where should I go? What is this place? I, I—I... I remember nothing!

C: 你这…塔塔洛夫并没有教导过遇到疯掉的桶该如何应对……
E: You... Tatalov did not teach us what to do if we meet a crazy can...

C: 而要根除这种现象，需要每一个垃圾桶的努力。
E: If we want to uproot the problem, we need the combined efforts of every trashcan.

C: 讲些白厄的小秘密。
E: Share some of Phainon's secrets.

C: 我怎么也敲不响这个风铃…没准凭你的力气，可以把它敲响？
E: No matter how hard I try, I can't get this wind chime to ring... Maybe with your strength, you can make it work?

C: 风铃叮叮当当，就像是怦怦的心跳，好浪漫呀。
E: The wind chimes are ringing, just like heartbeats... It's so romantic.

C: 昔涟拉着你的手，爬到了大地兽背上。
E: Cyrene grabs your hand and climbs onto the back of the dromas.

C: 我们骑着它在附近遛遛弯吧，好喜欢，想多体验一下这种感觉。
E: Let's ride around some more. I'm enjoying this so much!

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「绝灭大君」。
E: Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Lord Ravager."

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: （把相机递给昔涟）
E: *hands the camera to Cyrene*

C: 好像闻得到麦香。
E: I smell wheat.

C: 看，天空一片晴朗。望着白云飘过，岁月的脚步仿佛也变慢了。
E: Look, the sky is so clear. Watching the white clouds wafting by seems to slow the passage of time.

C: 回到这里，似乎还能听见当时的欢声笑语呢。{NICKNAME}还记得这里发生过什么吗？
E: Returning here, I can still hear our laughter from back then. {NICKNAME}, do you remember what happened here?

C: {F#她}{M#他}的头发是灰色的，穿着长外套，看起来就特别厉害，从未输给过任何人，手里还经常提着一根球棒……
E: {F#She}{M#He} has gray hair, wears a long jacket and looks extremely strong. {F#She}{M#He} has never lost to anyone and is often seen with a baseball bat in {F#her}{M#his} hands...

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 木马内部比预想得还要宽敞，带着些微的温暖，你可以很轻松地舒展开身体。正当你还在研究如何躺着会更舒服时，外面忽地传来了说话声——
E: The inside of the wooden horse is even more spacious than you imagined. There is a faint warmth to it and you can stretch out comfortably. Just as you are investigating the most comfortable position to lie down in, a voice suddenly comes from outside —

C: 因此…你再次钻了进去。
E: So... you climb inside once more.

C: 确实，这匹平平无奇的木马并没能勾起你对它进行「开拓」的兴趣。但没关系，它似乎不会自己跑掉，等有空的时候再回来看看吧。
E: True, this plain wooden horse hasn't piqued your Trailblazing curiosity. No matter, though — it seems firmly planted here, so you can always return when time permits.

C: 浩瀚的宇宙中，的确有文明曾用潮汐的噪音鼓动连绵千里的极化膜产生能量。但当他们意识到可以直接收集潮汐能之后，就不那么做了。
E: In the vast universe, there were indeed civilizations that once used the noise of tides to stimulate massive polarized membranes to generate energy. However, once they realized they could directly harness tidal energy, they stopped doing so.

C: 再次感谢你，让我们不至于在黑暗里等待最后一刻的到来。
E: Once again, thank you for ensuring that we do not have to wait for the final moment in complete darkness.

C: 你意识到自己好像错过了些什么，在尚处于白昼的圣城奥赫玛。如果有机会的话，你或许可以回去再探索一番？
E: You realize you may have missed something back in the Holy City of Okhema, while it still bathed in daylight. If the opportunity arises, perhaps you could return and explore once more?

C: 唉，能找到一处可以歇脚的地方，实在太好了。
E: Sigh... Finding a place to rest is truly a relief.

C: 聊天…不喝点儿…没法聊……
E: Chat... I can't... without something to drink...

C: 它好像有点累了，并不想理你。
E: It seems a little tired, and isn't giving you any attention.

C: 汪汪…汪？汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof... Woof? Woof woof woof!

C: 不要偷偷出现在别人背后，尤其是在别人集中注意力的时候。
E: Please don't sneak up behind people, especially when they are concentrating.

C: 不过请别误会，我不是好为人师，只是喜欢和年轻人聊天罢了。
E: Please don't get me wrong. I'm not trying to lecture you. I simply enjoy talking to young people.

C: 我应该没什么想问的了。
E: I don't think I have anything to ask.

C: 你是想要打破喝咖啡的记录吗？
E: Are you trying to break the record for drinking coffee?

C: 你、你也别问太奇怪的问题！超过我认知范围的事情我没办法回答。
E: J—Just nothing too weird! I can only tell you what I know.

C: …原来你刚才是在拿我打趣吗？
E: Huh? Was that what you were doing...?

C: 哼哼，我对你还有点兴趣，有什么要问的就问。
E: Hmph, I haven't completely lost my interest in you. Ask what you gotta ask.

C: 嗯，严格来说是「上线」了，因为黑塔女士是在远程操纵着人偶。
E: Yes, but strictly speaking I'd say she's "online" now. The Madam Herta you see here is a remote-controlled puppet.

C: 我觉得我作为阮•梅女士麾下最具潜力的生命体，未来入主「界子科」是必然的事。所以就提前改个名字，以便未来和大家打成一片。
E: As the most promising lifeform under Miss Ruan Mei's guidance, I believe I'll one day lead the Department of Ecolurgy. So, I've changed my name in advance to blend in with everyone else when the day comes.

C: 你听错名字了吧？
E: Are you sure you didn't mishear the name?

C: 这种感觉…呃，抱歉，你没有「红豆冰」这种馅，我很难跟你解释清楚……
E: This feeling... Well, it's hard for me to explain to someone like you who doesn't have the filling of red bean ice...

C: 哎…阮•梅女士……
E: *sigh* Miss Ruan Mei...

C: 我对她当然不会这样说…只要她想，要我表演什么脸色都行…要是能见到她就好了。
E: Of course, I wouldn't speak to her like that... I'd talk in whatever way she desires... How nice would it be if I could meet her?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 修复工程正在推进机器人的事我知道了没事你就往边上站着别碍事，懂了吗？
E: The restoration work is in progress and I already know what happened to the robots. Don't get in my way if you don't need anything else from me, understand?

C: 没关系，现在我给你一个认识我的机会，你有什么想问的尽管问！
E: No worries. Now, I'll give you the chance to get to know me. You can ask me anything!

C: 连接中……
E: Connecting...

C: 不是的，我的名字是由后勤服务团队设定的。
E: No. My name is given by the logistics team.

C: 很高兴为您服务，下次再会。
E: Glad to be at your service. See you next time.

C: 听听小贩的叫卖…
E: Listen to the merchants' sales pitches...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」必然存在</color>，否则当我们谈论「阿卡索斯」的时候，为何能理解彼此想表达的内容？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Icatus" must exist</color>. Otherwise, when we discuss "Icatus," how could we possibly understand what each other is referring to?

C: 我就是路过的。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 我们双方都阐述了各自的立场。那么，这位智者，你要选择为哪方辩护？
E: We have both stated our view points. So, wise one, which side would you like to debate for?

C: 很超脱的想法，但你似乎并未理解我的发问。就算那位学者拥有瑟希斯的智慧，他所观察到的也仍旧是那时那刻，从他的视角出发的阿卡索斯。
E: An unconventional line of thought, but it seems that you have not understood my question. Even if that scholar had the intellect of Cerces, he would only be able to observe the Icatus from his point of view at that moment.

C: 先具体说说情况吧。
E: Give me some of the details first.

C: 您放心，德墨忒尔婶婶，无论如何我都会继续寻找，把波瑟芬妮给您带回来的。
E: Don't worry, Aunty Demetria — I'll keep searching for her no matter what. I'll bring your Possephone back for you.

C: 这个人是「生命花园」的研究员，似乎还颇有些威望。
E: This guy's a researcher at the Garden of Life and seems to have made a bit of a name for himself.

C: 啊？！真的假的——
E: Huh!? Are you serious...?

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 厄琉斯，你还记得我们的相遇吗？
E: Aelius, do you still remember how we first met?

C: 那我们先告辞啦，希望未来可以再相见！
E: We'd better say goodbye, now. Hope to see you again sometime in the future!

C: 先生，你知道我的爸爸妈妈去哪了吗？我从那天起就没再见过他们了。
E: Mister, do you know where my mom and dad are? I haven't seen them since that day.

C: 哎，实验又失败了。
E: *sigh* The experiment failed again.

C: 你将自己在记忆中所见的情形，事无巨细地复述给了眼前的男人。
E: You tell the man everything you saw in the memory, describing each moment in precise detail.

C: 然后我就想起来，灰宝不是和那刻夏老师一起去慰问过那些牺牲者的家属嘛，树庭的悲剧才过去没多久，我有点担心他们的生活状况。
E: Then I remembered that you and Professor Anaxa checked on the bereaved families before, and since the Grove incident is still recent, I'm worried about these families' situations.

C: 我习惯连轴转了，现在一下子清闲了，反而感到很不安。
E: I'm used to working around the clock, but now that I'm free all of a sudden, I have this real sense of restlessness.

C: 你给我透个底吧，那个星球安全吗？这事到底靠不靠谱？我想去考察考察。
E: Gimme the inside scoop! Is that planet safe? Is this business reliable or not? I'd like to go and investigate for myself.

C: 刚才是你在呼唤我吗？
E: Were you the one calling me just now?

C: 机会啊！好不容易找到和它相关的人了，走，我们去把他们拦下来。
E: This is our chance! We finally found someone connected to it. Let's stop them.

C: 那你们在干嘛？
E: So what are you doing now?

C: 你告诉他…我反对！再说了，《被缚的埃德加》的世界观是一个多泰坦的世界观。
E: You... told him? Objection! Besides, the world of The Shackled Edgar is polytheistic.

C: 没错，你们演员也参与创作，你为什么不对自己动手呢？
E: True, actors do contribute to the creative process. Why not direct your fury at yourself?

C: 而且不管怎么说，规矩就是规矩。哪怕看在贵宾你的面子上放她进去，这里人多眼杂，难免会被发现……
E: Also, rules are rules. Even if I let her in out of respect for you, there are so many people around that someone would surely notice...

C: 小女娃，我考你一考：刻法勒的祭仪有三个流程，怎样做的？
E: Little girl, let me test you: The Kephale ritual has three steps. How is it performed?

C: 哈哈，果然被贵宾发现了。这件事还请你替我保密…善意的谎言，有时候也很有必要。
E: Haha, you caught me. Please keep it a secret... Sometimes, a little white lie is just what's needed.

C: 后厅里还有着其他避难者？至少还有两波黑潮袭击，如果它们冲进后厅，可就糟糕了。
E: Are there other refugees in the back hall? There are still at least two waves of the black tide coming. If they break into the back hall, things could get really bad.

C: 今天是非死不可吗？
E: Do they just want to die so badly?

C: 现在好了，多亏那两位英雄带来的矛和盾，我们能用更少的人手守住这里了。
E: Things are looking up now, thanks to the lance and shield those two heroes delivered. We can now defend this area with a smaller force.

C: 关于这些矛和盾…
E: About these lances and shields...

C: 唉！要是能找到上次放我进云崖的好心守卫叔叔，偷偷和他打个招呼就好了。只是，那次已经够麻烦他了，我不想影响到他的工作。
E: Ugh! If only we can find that nice guard who smuggled me into Dawncloud last time... I would like to sneakily say hi to him. Just... I think we troubled him enough last time. I don't want to disturb his work.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你又回来啦？
E: {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, you're back!

C: 年轻的卫兵倒在地上，肢体已然僵硬，无法再挥舞起哪怕是最轻的一把武器。
E: A young guard lies stiff on the ground, his limbs completely rigid, never to lift even the lightest weapon ever again.

C: 祭司的悲泣声渐弱，你心知「照拂圣城，直到永远」是赛飞儿的谎言。谎言被戳破、信仰崩塌带来的后果，希瑞雅能接受吗？
E: The priest's sobs fade. You know the "eternal protection" was a lie that Cipher's created. When truth is revealed and faith shatters, will Serena be able to handle the following consequences?

C: 别怕，死亡也只是沉眠。
E: Don't fear death. It's just sleep.

C: 还是没味儿。
E: Still tasteless.

C: 「纵使回声褪成遗忘，那些身影也从未模糊」——百十年前，一度苏醒的海瑟音大人曾对我这样说过。
E: "Echoes of memories may fade to oblivion, but the people in them never lose their shape." Lady Hysilens spoke these words to me during a rare lucid moment a century past.

C: 谢谢你邀请克拉拉过来，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
E: Thank you for bringing me along, {NICKNAME}!

C: 如果把自动机兵部署在太空……
E: If we deploy automatons into space...

C: 这辆列车行驶于宇宙之中，潜在的危机多不胜数。而帕姆大人不仅确保了列车的安全，甚至还将车厢内的保洁、绿植的养护工作都揽到自己的职责中去。
E: The Express must have encountered huge dangers on its journey through the universe. Not only does Pom-Pom make sure that no harm comes to the crew, they even manage to find time to clean the carriages and take care of the plants.

C: …你的方子靠谱吗？
E: Can I trust your medicine?

C: 保护好身体。
E: Take care of yourself.

C: 嘘——等会儿，我在忙。
E: Shh — wait a minute, I'm busy.

C: 片刻过后，你看见她的脸上洋溢出喜悦的笑容。
E: After a while, you see a smile on her happy face.

C: 能陪我在舷窗前站一会儿吗？什么都不要说…只是陪我站一会儿。
E: Will you stand with me by the window a little while? No need to talk...

C: 有空的话，或许会培养一下后辈吧，我听说…有些年轻科员对研发仿生人的事很感兴趣。
E: I might train some students if I have the time. I heard... that some young researchers are apparently very interested in working on androids.

C: 你现在的说话方式…
E: The way you talk now...

C: 大家的阅历都好丰富，聊起天来也完全感觉不到社交压力……
E: Everyone's so knowledgeable, and super easy to talk to...

C: 我在下层区待了这么久，从来没幻想过太多——难以置信，我居然还能从这个角度远望家乡……
E: I've always lived in the Underworld and never ever imagined... I just can't believe I can look at my home from this angle...

C: 我也不知道。
E: I don't actually know.

C: 这等方寸洞天，竟还有如此风景…真是不错，甚得我心。
E: Such a minute place, and yet such splendid scenery... just splendid.

C: 祂在银河各处都留下过关于自己的传说，但那些传说也大都真伪不明。
E: THEY left many legends throughout the galaxy... though such legends are bound to be contaminated by falsehoods.

C: 当本座提起这个故事时，瓦尔特先生却说，在一个叫做「桑尔吉斯克」的地方也有类似的传说…阿基维利将永远在喷发的火山迁移到天上，拯救了万民。
E: When I spoke of this, Mr. Yang told me that a similar tale exists at a place called Sangiske... They believe Akivili moved a continuously erupting volcano into the heavens to save the people below.

C: 我猜是后者。
E: I'm guessing the latter.

C: 如此高卧不起，看辰宿流转，星汉明灭，放任一天流逝。真是再美妙不过的事情了。
E: To be here, reclining and watching shining constellations come and go as time passes one by... There could be nothing more pleasant.

C: 那里什么都没有，是你想多了。
E: I'm sure it's nothing — just peoples' imaginations...

C: 喜欢烹饪和大扫除！
E: They like cooking and cleaning!

C: 不行，只送东西不够有诚意…还是去找列车长道个歉吧。
E: No no, just giving gifts isn't sincere enough... I should personally apologize to the conductor.

C: 快跑！帕姆提着扫帚过来了！
E: Run! Pom-Pom is coming after us with a broom!

C: 不仅不笑，天天都是苦大仇深，哀哭不止的样子。
E: Not only do they not smile, they are also bitter, grumpy, and weep in sorrow all the time.

C: 做了什么梦？
E: What did you dream of?

C: 赠礼微薄，请不要介意。
E: My gift is meager. I hope you don't mind.

C: 我打算前往他陨落的地方，为他立碑，并献上一枚纯美骑士的勋章。{NICKNAME}，期待下次的相见。
E: I intend to head to the location of his passing, erect a monument to him, and confer upon him a medal of the Knights of Beauty. {NICKNAME}, I look forward to our next meeting.

C: 绒球装饰…
E: Fluff ball ornament...

C: 这团绒球可爱而独特，颇具魅力。因此被我置于肩甲上，作为荣誉的象征。
E: This fluff ball is cute, unique, and quite charming. That's why I wish to wear it on my armor, as a badge of honor.

C: 十分精准的比喻。
E: A very precise comparison.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月近来可好？可有偷懒？剑艺有没有更上一层楼？
E: How has March been lately, {NICKNAME}? Has she been slacking off? Has her swordsmanship improved?

C: 咳咳，这只是…身为师父应尽的职责而已！
E: I'm merely performing the duty required of a master.

C: 有传闻称下方区域隐藏着不可告人的秘密，有神秘怪物在此出没。你越发觉得这座空间站并没有外人想象中的那么「正常」。
E: Rumor has it that there are untold secrets hidden in the area below and mysterious monsters have been sighted. The more you think about it, the more you realize that this space station is not as "normal" as outsiders think.

C: 好舒服，要是有被子就好啦。
E: This is comfy. I wish I had a blanket.

C: *吧唧吧唧…吧唧…*
E: *Smacking lips*...

C: 吃得好饱，呼呼！
E: All full. Whew!

C: 但我对得起自己啊，我问心无愧就好，管别人呢？
E: At least I can live with myself — my conscience is clear. I don't care what others think.

C: 噢，现在我知道是谁了，可我俩没什么来往啊。
E: Ohh, now I know who he is. But we've never even spoken to each other.

C: 看的出来，唉，人和人之间怎样才能正确地传递信息呢？我遇到这种事情越多，越觉得笔杆子乏力。
E: I can tell. *sigh* What's the best way to convey information to another person? The more I come across questions like this, the more I realize how tired our writers must be.

C: 我也没见过你啊。
E: I've never seen you before either.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 没有。不是气话，就是没有——贝洛伯格就这么大，几百年来就这么些食材翻来覆去地做，再怎么排列组合也做不出新菜色了。
E: Nope. I'm not mad at you. I'm simply stating facts. Belobog is not a huge place with a huge variety of food. The same ingredients are used for hundreds of years. Quite literally every possible combination has been used at some point.

C: 那当然，我手上很多项目都需要和克里珀堡里的大人物打交道，就连现任的大守护者我也见过几面。
E: Of course! I'm working with influential figures in Qlipoth Fort on a number of projects. I've even met the current Supreme Guardian a few times.

C: 辛苦你了，再见。
E: Have a nice day. Bye.

C: 我这是合理地提意见，懂不懂？贝洛伯格能不断变好，就是因为有我这样的有志青年在不停地提出种种真知灼见！
E: Hey, I'm making a reasonable suggestion, alright? Belobog is getting better because of people like me — people who keep offering their insight!

C: 这叫哀其不幸、怒其不争，明白？算了，跟你这种人掰扯不清，咱还是接着看新闻吧。
E: It's just common angst, don't you get it? Never mind. Let's just continue reading the news.

C: 跟法院里的工作相比，这活计简直就是浪费时间……
E: Compared to working in the court, this is a waste of time...

C: …你疯啦？！就凭我？不行不行，法律可是神圣的，我这种小法官可配不上这职位……
E: ...Are you out of your mind!? Me? No way. The law is sacred. A small judge like me isn't worthy of a role like that...

C: 毕竟到头来，大家还是要吃饭的嘛。要是真把正经矿队都排挤走了，光凭那些流氓地痞根本养不活自己。
E: After all, they've got mouths to feed. If they really got rid of all the professional mining teams, those hooligans won't be able to make a living.

C: …怎么说？难道是来找我谈生意的？看你这样子，也不像啊。
E: ...Then are you here for business? You don't look like a businessman.

C: 难道你已经改邪归正了?
E: So you're on the right path now?

C: 盯着烟雾放空一段时间，休息够了，这人的记忆力和专注力自然就上去了。非常合理，非常科学，我可没糊弄人啊！
E: Let your mind relax for a while, get enough rest, and your memory and focus will naturally improve. It's logical and scientific. I'm not fooling anyone!

C: 真是太好了！我正找你们呢！…咦，铁卫姐姐和你不在一起吗？
E: How wonderful! I was looking for you! ...Huh, is that Guard lady with you?

C: 加入「地火」的可都是热心肠的好人哪，奥列格可不会允许游手好闲的小混混加入组织。我有个侄子也在里边工作呢，听说每天还挺忙的。
E: The people who join Wildfire are all kindhearted, good folk. Oleg wouldn't let any lazy good-for-nothings join. I have a nephew who works for Wildfire, he says they are really busy every day.

C: 知道。
E: Yes.

C: …小声些，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Keep your voice down, {NICKNAME}.

C: {NICKNAME}，不管她在你们眼里是什么形象，可可利亚大人都是我唯一的亲人。我之所以能成为今天的布洛妮娅…很大程度上归功于她的教导。
E: {NICKNAME}, no matter what she might look like to you, Madam Cocolia was my only living family. Everything that has made me into the person I am... I owe it to her teachings.

C: 幸好她现在能站在我们这边…这就叫因祸得福吧？贝洛伯格经历了一番重大的考验，但也因此获得了一位强大的盟友。
E: It's a relief that she is on our side now... I guess this is what you'd call a blessing in disguise, right? Though Belobog experienced a great trial, it also gained a powerful ally because of it.

C: 没错，我就是这么强。
E: That's right. I have the power!

C: 希望你们的探索有所进展，{NICKNAME}，也希望病痛远离你们的旅程。
E: I hope your exploration will make progress, {NICKNAME}, and your journey will be free of pain.

C: 但我没有听到什么抱怨的声音。我想，下层的每个人都知道自由来之不易，值得好好珍惜。
E: But I haven't heard any complaints at all. I think everyone in the Underworld knows that freedom is hard-earned — and worth cherishing.

C: 我和妈妈又聊过几次，她会想办法为下层区居民提供就医支持。不过，对于那些已经习惯了我的治疗方式的患者来说…要做出改变大概很困难吧？
E: I've been talking it over with Mom, and she'll do her best to give medical support for the Underworld people. But will all those patients who're used to my style... be able to make that change?

C: 有关「地火」的未来…
E: About the future of Wildfire...

C: 和你聊天总是很开心，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's always a pleasure to talk with you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯…如果我说舍得，你会信吗？
E: Well... would you believe me if I said yes?

C: 不过，这其中的原因我并不想和人说…还希望你能多理解一下啦。
E: I'm sorry, I'm not ready to talk to anyone about the reasons behind my decision... I hope you can understand.

C: 我刚进来没多久。
E: I just got here.

C: 哎，算了…收拾了一整天，顺势休息会也好。
E: Alas, forget it... It's time I take a break after all the work.

C: 我就陪你聊聊天吧。找我有什么事吗？
E: I'll keep you company then. What can I do for you?

C: 杰帕德戍卫官是个非常可靠的人——仅指承担公职的部分。
E: Captain Gepard is a very reliable person... as far as carrying out his public duties is concerned.

C: …你想让我说什么啊？！
E: ...What do you want me to say!?

C: 住在这里的大家，都有一技之长…比如，维修机械之类的。
E: The people who live here all have their own skills... Like mechanical maintenance and such.

C: 我想和史瓦罗聊天…
E: I wish to talk to Svarog...

C: 机械聚落——由于裂界蔓延，流浪者围绕载人竖井自发形成的小型聚落。
E: The Robot Settlement — With the spread of the Fragmentum, vagrants made camp around the manned well shaft and soon formed a small gathering.

C: 每一个体都将以基地网络的指令为最优先，而来自基地网络的指令绝无威胁人类安全的可能。
E: Each machine will prioritize the base network's directives, which have zero probability of compromising humanity's safety.

C: 但这仅仅是一种可能性——我无法准确观测人类情感可能引发的各种变化。这意味着该问题的答案掌握在克拉拉手中，而不是我。
E: But this is only a possibility — I cannot accurately determine the changes brought about by human emotions. The answer to this problem will be left in Clara's hands, not mine.

C: 病痛和饥饿在不断地呼喊他咬着牙逃离了城市中央
E: Sickness and hunger forever pursuing him, gritting his teeth leaves the city behind

C: 十平米的悲伤被写在{F#她}{M#他}的本子
E: Ten square feet of sadness written down in {F#her}{M#his} notebook

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Oink, oink oink~

C: 你的举动让扑满很不满，它也该得到尊重。
E: The Trotter is very displeased with what you have done. It deserves respect, too.

C: 咕…呜~
E: Groo... hoo~

C: 怎么样？能过试音吗？
E: How was that? Think I could pass the audition?

C: 说来听听？
E: Like what?

C: ...应该叫外星人才对？
E: ...Should we call them "aliens"?

C: ~举起帽子和酒杯吧~
E: Raise your hats and glasses high~

C: 贝洛伯格的大英雄……
E: The hero of Belobog...

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{NICKNAME}。
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {NICKNAME}.

C: 喔，这不是外来者{NICKNAME}么！欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。
E: Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME} the Outsider? Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum.

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 这位客官，不好意思打扰你一下，看您的样子应该是化外民游客，有没有什么特别的食材、做法能告诉我吗？
E: Hello, guest. Sorry to bother you, but I noticed from your attire that you are an Outworld traveler. Do you have any unique ingredients or recipes that you can tell me about?

C: 每周四，咱这儿会搞一个「怪味星期四」，出一些特殊口味的「怪味菜」。这也是为了给仙舟的老饕们增加一些变数和乐趣。
E: Every Thursday, we've got an "Odd-taste Thursday" event, where we serve some dishes with rather interesting flavors. It's to provide some variety and fun for Xianzhou gormandizers.

C: 从此之后，咱就立志要开一家与他们背道而驰的饭馆：量大管饱、物美价廉！咱们这家尚滋味，就是这个梦想的结晶啦！
E: That's when I determined to run a restaurant that goes completely opposite to everything they stood for. I want big portions, quality food, and low prices! I'm telling ya, Spices Supreme is that dream come true!

C: 下次再来吃吧…
E: I'll come back later...

C: 好多人都怕咱生气，不敢跟咱提这茬…其实这有啥的，我高兴还来不及呢！
E: My friends were afraid to tell me about it because they thought I'd get angry.... but I'm actually happy!

C: 这本《厌作人间语》如何？这是小店老板写的志怪小说集子。
E: How about this one here, "Otherworldly Delights"? It's a collection of short supernatural stories written by the boss here.

C: 我只是听说过「说书」是一种深具传统的表演形式，具体也不太了解。不过，老板假借说书人的身份，也许只是方便在茶馆里打听志怪故事而已。
E: All I know is, storytelling is a traditional form of performative art. I don't know much else. But perhaps the boss is using his gig as a storyteller to hang out at the teahouse and hear all kinds of supernatural and weird tales.

C: 关于仙舟上的志怪故事…
E: About supernatural tales aboard the Xianzhou...

C: 你这不是答非所问吗…
E: You didn't answer my question...

C: 我不过是一介看店小童，写书出书的事我哪能决定…哎…要问就问那些编辑去吧，反正我这里还没到货呢。
E: As a mere bookstore assistant, I have no say in the writing and publishing of readables... Alas... They should pester those editors instead. Anyway, I have no stock of those readables here.

C: 到底该用哪个字啊…今天找我有什么事吗？
E: Which word to pick... How can I help you today?

C: 这个我熟，电子游戏。
E: I know this. You mean "video games," right?

C: 后来，一只机巧鸟飞到了我的牢房前，扑腾着扔下了几包奇巧零食，说要购买我挠下来的毛。
E: Then one day, a cycrane flew to my cell and dropped a few packets of Trick Snacks on the floor. It said it wanted to buy the fur I had scratched off.

C: 虽然我本来就不喜欢打架啦…但即使是猎群里的那些暴力份子，也时不时地要去和其他猎群、丰饶民，甚至泯灭帮交换些资源的。
E: I may not enjoy fighting, but even the more violent members of the pack have to go trade resources with other packs' members, other Denizens of Abundance, or the Annihilation Gang.

C: 你的货都是从哪来的？
E: Where do you get your goods?

C: 这饼画得也太过分了…
E: Isn't that asking for too much?

C: 我有事，下次再来。
E: I have things to take care of. I'll come back again another time.

C: 哎，这地衡司就只有放在地上的快递箱还有点儿生活气息了。
E: *sigh* The only way the Realm-Keeping Commission feels alive is through all the courier parcels on the ground.

C: 现在是考虑这个的时候吗？
E: Is now really the time to be thinking about that?

C: 客人慢走，阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！
E: Take care! The Arma Correctional Group will always be at your service!

C: 这你或许有所不知——其实，在这长乐天行商是要申领牌照的，并非谁人都能来掺和一手。
E: You might not be aware of this — but you need a permit to sell goods in Exalting Sanctum. Not just anyone can do it.

C: 再说了，成年人自己承担责任，我这不还是没成年吗？
E: Besides, only adults have to take responsibility for themselves. I'm not an adult yet, remember?

C: …很可疑，只是询问一下。
E: ...That's suspicious. I'm just asking.

C: 景元怎没和我提过有一贤弟…
E: Jing Yuan never mentioned any brothers to me...

C: 反正就这么着，我是填饱了肚子，店家们也通过我免费做了宣传。结果，到头来他们竟然还指责我吃霸王餐！要我说，他们才是狼心狗肺……
E: Anyway, that's it! I'm just getting myself fed, and the shopkeepers get free advertising out of me. Alas, some of these guys even accuse me of dining and dashing! If you ask me, these are the real scoundrels...

C: 每天站在那里的浴铁都是不同的人，但你从来都不会发现。因为他们训练严明，每个人都被训练成了一模一样的性格。
E: The Yutie standing there changes every day, but you'd never know it. They're all trained to act the same and assume the same personality.

C: 无论如何，请允许我代表我个人对你说一句——非常，非常感谢你。
E: Anyway, please allow me to say this personally: Thank you very, very much.

C: 我警告你不要靠近我啊！我我我我我可是很凶的！你见没见识过什么叫判官夺命笔？信不信我一笔写死你！
E: I'm warning you, don't come any closer! I—I—I... I'm dangerous, you know! Have you ever heard of the Judge's Death Sentence Brush? I'll wipe you out with one brush stroke, just wait and see!

C: 那大人您请自便，有需要再喊我。
E: Then please feel free to look around, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. Call me if you need anything.

C: 怎么我感兴趣的全是机密？
E: Why is everything I'm interested in confidential?

C: 案牍库可以说是幽囚狱的信息中枢。幽囚狱里这么多要犯，身份信息可全都存储在咱们这案牍库里呢。
E: The document office is the Shackling Prison's central hub. The personal information of all these prisoners in the Shackling Prison are all stored in our document office.

C: 凭我的工作经验来看，您确实也不像是上当受骗的受害者。
E: Based on my experience, you don't really look like a victim of scamming.

C: 但后来，景元将军担心他因为征战经历会提前引发魔阴身，便希望他来这长乐天做地衡司执事官，不必再经历生死别离的痛苦。
E: Later on, General Jing Yuan was worried about him getting struck with early-onset mara due to his combat experiences and hoped he could accept a sinecure position as a Realm-Keeping Commission official in the Exalting Sanctum — and keep him from the pains of life and death.

C: 你说话有些太端着架子了。
E: You're behaving a little big for your britches.

C: 您没事儿吧。
E: Are you alright?

C: 想陪你聊聊天…
E: I just want to chat with you...

C: 可我所见到的却仍然只是沧海一粟…咳咳…我的旅途还未结束…如今却即将带着遗憾死去…我贪婪长生？没错，不过我更贪婪旅行者的使命。
E: But all I've seen is still but a drop in the ocean... *cough*... My journey is not yet complete... But I will die soon with regrets... Am I greedy for longevity? Yes, but I'm greedier for the calling of a traveler.

C: 唉，怎么说呢…最近的烦恼比之前少多了，但还是有不少的。
E: Hmm, how do I put it... There's less trouble than before, but it's still there.

C: 什么文件？我也排队！
E: What documents? I'm getting in line too!

C: 你不会也看什么《守护星槎海》吧？那节目只是一知半解，没讲对。
E: Let me guess, you're a fan of Protecting Starskiff Haven, right? That program is so superficial. They get it all wrong.

C: 我们埃伊加文明，几千年前是一群各自为政的星际牧民，在「领航天蛾」的导向下，在许多行星之间逐水草而居。很多时候，也会为了些资源兄弟阋墙。
E: Thousands of years ago, our Aigaian civilization was just a group of interstellar herders who did things our own way. Under the guidance of the Navigator Moth, we'd live a nomadic lifestyle across several planets. In many cases, internecine quarrels would break out over resources.

C: 你手上的这批货要怎么办？
E: What are you going to do with your batch of goods?

C: 直到后来，「埃伊加汗国」的雄主普朗克•埃伊加可汗觉得，大家同文同种，也都信仰「存护」，何不统一成一个强大的联盟呢？
E: Until one day, the almighty Planck Aigaia Khan, hero of the Aigaian Khanate, realized an ambition — with everyone utilizing the same language, culture, and all worshiping the Preservation, why not unite under a powerful alliance together?

C: 老爷你好，你也是来自仙舟外的行商吗？我叫麦尔彦，主要从事的是赛伯邑超导合金的分发和销售，如果老爷感兴趣的话，我们可以聊聊。
E: Hello there boss, are you also a traveling merchant from beyond the sky? My name is Maryam, and I'm mostly involved with the distribution and sales of Cybercity superconducting alloys. Let's talk if you're interested.

C: 你是什么人肉录像机？
E: Are you some kind of biological recorder?

C: 不信的话，您可以去码头上打听打听，我的货物损毁率绝对是业内最低的！
E: Why, if you don't believe me, then just ask around over at the jetty. My damaged goods rate is easily the lowest in all of Cloudford!

C: 谁是闲人？我可得批评一番。
E: Who do you mean by "lazybones"? I'll have to give them a good talking-to.

C: 可可爱爱，人畜无害。
E: She's cute and wouldn't hurt a fly.

C: 我在太卜司压根就没有认识的人，真搞不懂他们怎么会这么问，简直像十王司的问询一样，恨不得连小时候认识谁都要从你嘴里挖出来……
E: I don't know anybody at the Divination Commission at all. I have no idea why they'd ask me such a question. It's just like an interrogation by the Ten-Lords Commission. They'll even grill you about who you were hanging out with in childhood...

C: 我还得继续守着店铺，继续开张…时刻注意那些危机的苗头是否复燃……
E: I have to stay here and keep the store open... and watch out for signs of the crisis making a comeback...

C: 若有人触犯了「不赦十恶」的条律，吾等就要随判官出巡罚罪。
E: If someone breaks any of the Ten Unpardonable Sins, then we accompany the judge outside of the Commission to investigate and carry out the appropriate disciplinary procedures.

C: 是相当不好。话又说回来了，又有哪个持明目睹圣地遭难，心情会好呢？
E: That's putting it lightly. But then again, which Vidyadhara would be in good spirits after witnessing the desecration of our holy site?

C: 鳞渊境现在怎么样？
E: How is Scalegorge Waterscape these days?

C: 心情确实不太好。这该从何说起呢…唉…我从头给您讲吧。
E: Indeed. I'm not feeling too good. How should I explain this? Hmm... let me start from the beginning.

C: 这不就喜提越狱罪了么，他们便给我找了看守更严密的监狱。但那地方也没有趣多少，我一没忍住又跑了出来。
E: Obviously, that got me arrested for jailbreaking, so they got a prison with tighter security for me. But that place was just as boring. I couldn't help but escape again.

C: 卜者都是要解决具体的问题，面对占卜要始终保持客观、理性、冷静、平和的方式去处理它，否者占卜就会变成主观臆断。
E: Diviners deal with specific issues. We have to maintain an objective, rational, and calm approach to prevent the result from becoming our subjective opinion.

C: 熟悉我的人都知道，真志摩介绍的工作薪水管够，关键得看有没有赚钱的本事。
E: Everyone knows my jobs pay plenty of dough — as long as you've got the skills to do them.

C: 个人推荐金人巷里的店子，比如说那家「尚滋味」餐厅，去的好像都是罗浮本地人，好吃不贵，做法又很独特，我个人是强烈推荐你去吃吃看的。
E: Personally, I'd recommend the stores in Aurum Alley. For example, Spices Supreme is a restaurant only frequented by the locals. I strongly recommend you to try the unique and affordable dishes there.

C: 细说一下「创意星期四」…
E: Please tell me more about Odd-taste Thursday...

C: 下次再来吃吧…
E: I'll come back later...

C: 地衡司的监管部门和税率都要求，敝庄出售的「是」且「只能是」茶。希望客人能知悉。
E: According to the regulations issued by the Realm-Keeping Commission, we can only sell TEA to customers. I hope you can understand, dear customer.

C: 我听明白了，客人是在担心小小茶庄的生意。
E: Ah, dear customer. You're worried about my business.

C: 这家小小陈机铺，就是给人心和旧物的一点自留地。总有一些难以替代的东西需要这样的旧物翻新的服务。
E: This little store is a place reserved for old things and weary hearts. After all, there are some things that can never be truly replaced, and they need a place to mend.

C: 我要收旧物。
E: I want to buy some second-hand stuff.

C: 可到了罗浮，买房还得走置业手续，说什么「你们持明每次蜕生完就把房产搁在那儿，纯属浪费」，嘁，那还不是他们地衡司做的蜕生登记服务不到位嘛！
E: But here on the Luofu, you've got to go through a whole lot of nasty real estate paperwork. The officials have lines like, "You Vidyadhara just abandon your real estate after each rebirth! What a waste of resources!" Tsk! They say that because their Realm-Keeping Commission is so incompetent at registering hatching rebirth!

C: 我的玉兆模组上几乎没有保留那个时代的数据，仅仅留下了一些修改痕迹——据说是为了抹除寰宇中「反有机方程」的可能性。
E: My jade abacus module retains almost no data from that era except for a few traces of modifications, presumably to eradicate the very existence of the Anti-Organic Equation in the universe.

C: 感谢您的光临，再见！
E: Thank you for your patronage. See you next time!

C: …我不擅长闲聊，客人有什么事吗？
E: ...I'm not good at small talk, dear customer. What can I do for you?

C: …看来音乐能做到的事也是有限的。
E: ...It seems music is not the remedy for all troubled souls.

C: 你们竟敢要我的奇巧零食？
E: How dare you covet my Trick Snacks!

C: 当初为什么加入药王秘传？
E: Why did you join the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus back then?

C: 阿合马擅长用监狱里的小垃圾，制造出能大大提升监狱生活品质的产品。他确实心灵手巧，搞些小手工绰绰有余，但也就仅限于搞些小手工了。
E: Arma excels at making products that can greatly improve one's carceral quality of life out of the trash lying about in prison. While he's no doubt a deft hand at creating trinkets, that's really all that he's good at.

C: 没其他事了，那你去忙吧。
E: That's all from me. I'll leave you to work then.

C: 听说将军擅长下棋？
E: Are you good at chess?

C: 没事，随便聊聊。
E: I just want to have a chat with you.

C: 现在还不是执勤时间，我只是闲着随便逛逛，顺便看看有没有机会「日行一善」。
E: It's not my shift yet, I'm just killing time and seeing if there's a chance to do a good deed while I'm at it.

C: …你先别说话，听我解释，虽然我人在牌馆，但实际上我没有打牌，只是在观察打牌。
E: ...Please, hear me out. Although I'm at a games parlor, I'm just observing the games without playing.

C: 不聊了，拜拜。
E: That's it for today. Bye.

C: 对了，你找我有什么事啊？
E: By the way, what can I do for you?

C: 这算是什么药？
E: What kind of prescription is that?

C: 总能看见她出现在任何地方。
