E: I always see her all over the place.

C: 嗯，我这里还有些要处理的事情，请一路小心。
E: Yeah, I've still got some things to take care of here. Take care!

C: 我也想变身成机巧鸟或金人…
E: I want to transform into a cycrane or aurumaton too...

C: 我是银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 你不会真的把我装进去了吧？
E: You didn't really trap me inside, did you?

C: 救命啊，我什么都会做的！
E: Help me, I'll do anything!

C: 你是做什么工作的？
E: What do you do for a living?

C: 以下内容引自《十王刑统》：「一司，秉烛守夜，勾摄魔邪。二司，威罚罪囚，靖平域内。三司，业报公允，天年有尽。」
E: The following is quoted from the Ten Lords' Penal Code: "The first division keeps vigils at night and evils at bay. The second division punishes the criminals and pacifies the territory. The third division ensures fairness in the Karmic Wheel and life expectancy."

C: 好哇，我现在就去问问他。
E: All right then, I'll ask him right now.

C: 原本想联系神策府士兵护送将军离开的，结果云骑军大人们一到，将军就精神奕奕地离开了，刚才的倦意就像不存在一样。
E: We arranged for the Seat's soldiers to help the general head back, but as soon as those Cloud Knights arrived, the general became energized and quickly left, as if the weariness were never there.

C: 细说。
E: Do go on.

C: 想和掌柜的再聊聊。
E: I wish to chat with you a little longer.

C: 不知道这件物品至今没被赎回，是不是在下的罪过。
E: I still wonder if it was my fault that this item hasn't been redeemed.

C: 想知道你和老板娘的关系。
E: Tell me more about your connection to the owner here.

C: 唉，现在想想，这段人生历历在目，真过瘾。就可惜好景不长啊。
E: *sigh* Now that I think back on those vivid memories, that part of my life was truly exhilarating. Alas, good things never last.

C: 要不了多久，云骑军的巡狩部队就来了。他们几乎将那座山的山头削平，确保步离人没逃出去。
E: Not long after, the Cloud Knights' hunting squad arrived. They practically leveled the mountain, ensuring the borisin couldn't escape.

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，你看着它的完美的弧线，坚毅的线条，怎么会说恶心呢？
E: Just look at these beautiful curves and solid lines, {F#lass}{M#lad}. Why would you ever call them gross?

C: 「宁可三日无粮，不可一日无茶。」也就是说，仙舟人就算饿着肚子也必须喝茶，我也喝过一些茶，全都没有什么热量，这种说法可真是有点儿意思。
E: "I'd rather have three days without food than go one day without tea." I mean, the Xianzhou natives have to drink tea even if they're starving. I've drunk my fill of tea, too — and zero calories, too. It's a pretty interesting turn of phrase.

C: 想打听一点儿仙舟趣闻。
E: I want to ask you about some Xianzhou trivia.

C: 我倒是听说了一件趣事，这还是我从那位天舶司主司大人那里打听而来的。
E: I heard an interesting rumor from the head of the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 要是能证明它比公司所用的纳米机器更有效…仙舟的「息壤」也必将造福于银河。前提是，仙舟人愿意。
E: If we can somehow prove that it's more effective than the IPC's nanomachines... Xianzhou's Fallow Earth could certainly benefit the cosmos if the Xianzhou people agree to it.

C: 「仙舟」？你是说仙宫是吗？
E: Xianzhou? You mean the Celestial Hall?

C: 寄件？
E: Delivery?

C: 对吧？从你们化外民的视角来看，比仙舟民本身要清楚得多。我老是听一些本地老害说「仙舟是一成不变，死气沉沉的」，我可不同意。
E: I know, right? You Outworlders have a much clearer perspective on this stuff than the Xianzhou natives. I'm always hearing old cranks say "Xianzhou is lifeless and never changes," but I disagree.

C: 的确，我的工作就是这样缺乏趣味。但是整个仙舟的交通系统想要运转顺畅，就需要千千万万个我这样的人，去做这样无聊的工作。
E: Indeed, my work is pretty boring. But if the entire transport network of Xianzhou wants to function correctly, then it needs thousands of people like me to carry out these boring duties.

C: 嘘！这可不是在客栈门口随便谈论的话题。
E: Shh! This isn't something that should be casually discussed in front of an inn.

C: 如果能有无限的寿命，我想走遍整片星空，你能理解我吧。
E: If I had infinite life, I would travel through the entirety of the universe. You get that, don't you?

C: 谢谢你！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！春分也觉得自己进步了~
E: Thank you {F#miss}{M#sir}! I think it sounds better, too~

C: 要这么说的话，你很强咯？
E: You must be very strong then?

C: 我认识一位迷路的令使。
E: I know an Emanator who has lost her way.

C: 如果你也怀抱同样的责任感，你也应该加入我们…不过，我好像在你身上感受到了「存护」的力量，难道说你已经是我们的一份子了吗？
E: You should join us if you feel the same way. I can sense Preservation's power in you. Are you one of us already?

C: 理论的巨人，行动的矮子。
E: All talk, no action.

C: 文化创意小商品嘛，买了也不贵，还能留作纪念，谁会不喜欢呢？
E: These cultural ornaments aren't expensive, and they make great souvenirs. Who wouldn't like 'em?

C: 所以这个特别观赛渠道，指的就是任何不需要门票也能进入会场的方法。
E: So, this special viewing channel actually refers to any way that I can get you into the venue without using a ticket.

C: 我会罚你们配合地衡司去…
E: I'll send you to cooperate with the Realm-Keeping Commission...

C: 当然正宗啦，苏乐达™在竞锋舰开设官方旗舰店的目的，就是为了让每位观众都能喝到原汁原味的苏乐达。
E: Of course it's authentic! The reason SoulGlad™ set up an official flagship store on Skysplitter is to ensure that the audience gets to enjoy the most authentic SoulGlad.

C: 嗯…鼻行兽算不算？
E: Um... does a Nosewalker count?

C: 那个…我不看比赛？
E: Um... I don't watch competitive sports.

C: 你放心，没事的，这都是常规操作。你帮我完成采访，我也会给你提供一些方便的，咱们是互惠互利。你知道媒体舆论吗？你想要的我都有……
E: Relax, it'll be fine. It's all part of the routine. If you help me with the interview, I'll provide you assistance in other ways. It's a win-win situation. I'm sure you've heard of how the media can influence public opinion, right? I can give you everything you dream of...

C: 南帝有可能永远来不了了…
E: The Southern Emperor may never be able to come...

C: 所以，你都教什么？
E: Er, so what are you teaching?

C: 不必担心，我们门派的学员，在出师前都会熟读仙舟刑法，保证行为不会超出正当防卫的范畴——如果徒弟出事了坐牢，就不能说是我的徒弟！
E: Don't worry, the students of my school will thoroughly study Xianzhou's criminal law before graduating. They will ensure that their actions stay within the boundaries of justifiable self-defense. If a disciple gets into trouble and ends up in jail, they are not considered my disciple!

C: 怎么老是你啊？
E: Why is it always you?

C: 那一定就是你的死亡，你命不久矣。
E: It has to be your death. You are not long for this world.

C: 煞火。
E: Burnie.

C: 镇妖塔轻轻浮起，你想要与哪位岁阳对话？
E: The suppression towers float gently. Which heliobus would you like to talk to?

C: 你们拎着一个鸟笼来鳞渊境，是我挡在了你们面前！
E: You people came to the Scalegorge Waterscape once with a birdcage, and I was the one who blocked your path!

C: 看在你先前打的那么用力的份上，让人家想想…
E: Mm, you certainly pummeled me hard enough before, so let me think...

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 诸位少在外面闲逛！
E: Everybody, please don't wander around outside!

C: 就能在犯罪前将其抓捕。
E: We could arrest people before they even commit a crime.

C: 那就少数服从多数呗。
E: Then the minority accedes to the majority.

C: 听说工造司薪资很高…
E: I heard they pay very well at the Artisanship Commission...

C: 凭啥啊？我们要加班！
E: Wha—!? But we're working overtime!

C: 可能工作性质不同…
E: We do have different job descriptions...

C: 哇，修了这么久，那你会修星槎吗？
E: Oh, that's a long time. So do you know how to repair starskiffs?

C: 你看到了吧？那棵树…它长起来了！
E: Can you see it? That tree... It's growing!

C: 让我再想想吧……
E: I need some time to think about it...

C: 你老家的那个童话？那个用残剑拯救数百人的「长剑骑士」？
E: Are you talking about your hometown fairy tale? The one about the "Longsword Knight" that rescued hundreds of people with a battered sword?

C: 哈哈哈哈哈…至是，工程已毕——喏，收好了。
E: Hahaha... Well, it's done. Here, take good care of it.

C: 我…会教芙缇尼…认字。
E: I... will teach Futini... how to read.

C: 这个词是…「幸运」？
E: This word is... "fortunate"?

C: 呵…有浪漫之处，亦有不便之处。
E: Heh... It has its romantic aspects, as well as its inconveniences.

C: 我要吃——饭！
E: I need to eat! Food!

C: 但是，只有到了明天我们才能知道，过去埋下的｢种子｣，究竟会开出怎样的花，结出怎样的果实。
E: But only until tomorrow will we know what kind of flowers will bloom and what kind of fruits will bear from the "seeds" we planted in the past.

C: 搭档，也来尝尝我爸妈的手艺吧。
E: Partner, come try my parents' cooking.

C: 放心，大家都在你身边。
E: Don't worry, we're all here by your side.

C: 看来这场庆功宴，要持续很长一段时间了，哈哈！
E: Looks like this victory feast is gonna last for quite a while, haha!

C: 不用再隔着树枝才能牵手，也不用再避讳拥抱。遐蝶姐姐，你还有什么想做但不能做的事吗？
E: We don't have to hold hands through a branch or avoid hugs anymore. Castorice, is there anything else you want to do but haven't been able to?

C: 正好，瞧，这是昏光庭院的新产品——小伊卡限量周边！本来已经被抢完了，幸好我自己还留着一个，灰宝就把它捎回家吧！
E: Perfect timing! Look, this is Twilight Courtyard's new product, Limited Edition Little Ica merch! They were all sold out, but luckily I kept one for myself. Here, Grayie, take it home with you!

C: 我再帮你联系白厄吧。
E: I'll get in touch with Phainon for you again.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈——害怕？
E: Haha hahaha, scared?

C: 我真只是偷个快递而已…
E: I'm really just someone who stole a delivery package...

C: 有假不休是会销假的！
E: Vacation days that are not taken will expire!

C: …等下…
E: ...Hold on...

C: …我要怎么才能做到像你那样呢？
E: ...What do I have to do to become someone like you?

C: 当然可以，我们皮皮西人虽小，但是五脏俱全。
E: Of course! Us Pepeshi may be little, but we have all the internal organs one needs!

C: 谢谢您的配合。祝您观礼愉快。
E: Thank you for your cooperation. We wish you an enjoyable time at the ceremony.

C: 你俩也是遇上了黄牛？
E: You two met some scalpers too?

C: 别说了，刚补完票。
E: I just made up for my ticket money.

C: 作者对仙舟传统纸本水墨材料与技法的深耕，使其艺术作品在保留了传统审美的前提下展现出独属于此刻的视觉感受和当代纬度
E: The author's in-depth study of Xianzhou traditional ink, paper materials, and techniques allows this piece to maintain traditional aesthetics, while displaying a unique visual perspective and also the scope of contemporary work.

C: 据说是为了某个人，穿上了厚厚伪装，染上了疯狂，变成了狼人模样。
E: It is said that they wore a disguise for someone and were infected with a certain madness that turned them into a werewolf.

C: 你蒙对了，定时炸弹恼人的声音停了下来。
E: You guessed right — the annoying sound of the time bomb has stopped.

C: 一个人的一生中，也许会迷惑，也许会恐惧、会埋怨。但他/她只要扣响舰船上的炮塔，就会从中收获信心与力量，他/她会始终热爱帝弓信仰，他/她会始终热爱多炮塔！
E: In one's life, there may be confusion, fear or resentment. But as long as they fire the ship's turrets, they will gain confidence and strength. They will always cherish the faith in the Reignbow and love having multiple turrets.

C: …也不会怎么样吧？
E: ...It would be fine, I suppose?

C: 都准备好了！
E: They are all ready!

C: 毕竟咱们是来做宣传的。
E: After all, we're here for the publicity.

C: 攻守并重，名不虚传。
E: Perfect in offense and defense... a repute truly lived up to.

C: 回家以后，我要努力健身。
E: Once I'm home, I'm gonna work out.

C: 我就是报个暑期兴趣班！
E: I thought I signed up for a summer hobby class!

C: 「鹤运速递，啥都能寄。」——鹤运物流宣传广告。
E: "Heron Express — We Mail Anything." It is an advertisement for Heron Express.

C: 这块方形玉兆还没有录入任何信息，因此并未装入算机当中。
E: As no data has been entered into the square jade abacus, it is not fixed on the calculation device.

C: 检索「因果」的阵基，可以从古往今来无数事件中勾连出与检索对象相关的因果。
E: This is a base terminal of karma. It can filter the karma relating to your target by searching from all the events that have taken place in the past and present.

C: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「许多世界均自信于发达的科技所向无敌，尤其是公司所辖之处。但『铁墓』证明了他们的盲目乐观。」
E: "Many worlds, especially those under the corporation's control, believe that advanced technology has made them invincible. However, Irontomb has proven them wrong."

C: 同学，你一定不懂吧？
E: Oh, you don't get it, do you?

C: 我的手机呢？
E: Where's my phone?

C: 罗浮上似乎还有名为「红梅佳缘」的同类型公司。长生种社会竟也有如此庞大的婚恋交友市场吗？
E: There seems to be a similar dating agency named "Bonds of Love" in the Luofu. Is there such a high demand for matchmaking in the long-life species?

C: 不能将这些危险的东西留在原地。你打定主意，将箱盖合上，把危险带走。
E: You can't just leave something so dangerous lying around like this. You decide to close the lid and carry the danger away.

C: 「我等…誓不背叛丹枫大人！」他与最后的龙尊近卫们迎向弩矢和扑面而来的黑暗。
E: "We... will never betray Master Dan Feng!" Together with the last remaining high elder guards, he braces himself to face the incoming arrows and darkness.

C: 「别、别过来！」它好像在对你说话。它在发颤。
E: "D—Don't come closer!" It seems to be talking to you while shivering.

C: 问卷中详细调查了应试者的性别、年龄、收入、职业、以及每个月为游戏投入的金钱数额及动机，可惜应试者似乎根本没打算认真填写——因为这是一张白卷。
E: The survey includes detailed questions about the respondent's gender, age, income, occupation, and the amount spent on video games each month and the motivation for spending. It is a shame that the respondent doesn't take the survey seriously, as it is not filled out.

C: 骗人也走点心吧，这什么玩意。
E: What a lazy con. This is ridiculous.

C: 许久之后，你听见一声叹息——苍老、疲惫，怅然若失。
E: After some time, you hear a sigh... They sound old, tired, and dejected.

C: 「柠檬汁、红鱼子，酸甜可口、老少皆宜。」
E: "Lemon juice, fish roe, sweet and sour for all ages."

C: 匹诺康尼街边的自助商车。不知为何总有人试图闯进车厢，看看里面究竟有什么。
E: A roadside self-serve shopping truck in Penacony. For some reason, people keep trying to barge into the car to see what is inside.

C: 你原打算敲敲姬子的房间门，但终究没有忍心去打扰她。
E: You planned to knock on the door to Himeko's room but decided not to bother her in the end.

C: 你试着拽了拽门把手——纹丝不动，看来杨叔的安全意识很高。
E: You give the knob a twist, but the door doesn't budge. Looks like Mr. Yang has a high safety awareness.

C: 脑力工作需要更多的休息时间，这间酒吧就是专门为此而建。
E: Work of the mind requires even more rest, which is what this bar was specifically designed for.

C: 即便不再有人需要办理入住，家族依旧妥善保养着梦中的柜台，以免某天需要将它用作最后的防线。
E: Even if there's no one else to check in, The Family still maintains the reception in the dream, in case it needs to be used as the last line of defense one day.

C: 相比于盐和胡椒，梦中最不可或缺的调料是爱。
E: Rather than salt and pepper, love is the key ingredient in a dream.

C: 你陷入思索，不曾察觉这只苍老的猎犬已经杳无踪迹。
E: Lost in thought, you fail to notice the absence of the grizzled Hound.

C: 什么样的行为会被家族制裁？
E: What kind of behavior is sanctioned by The Family?

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈……
E: Ha... Hahaha...

C: 下次还要来和我分享证书的快乐啊。
E: Don't forget to return and share more fun with certificates with me.

C: 我、我…不是笨罐！我、我…有自己的名字！我的名字是…是……
E: I, I... am not Piggy Bank! I, I... have my own name! My name is... it is...

C: 那座剧院可太棒了！我在现实里从没见过这么宏伟的建筑，这是只属于梦境的奇迹，所有人都该去那看看。
E: The theater is amazing! I've never seen such a grand building in real life. It's a wonder only reserved for the Dreamscape — everyone should go see it once.

C: 没关系。这些不是你需要在意的事。
E: It's fine. You need not be concerned about such things.

C: 很有趣，对吧？简直就像在撰写一部精妙绝伦的小说——脱颖于现实，自由却并不狂乱，又因剔除了冗杂无章而显得愈发剔透动人。
E: Interesting, no? Like writing an elegantly compelling story — removed from reality, free but devoid of chaos, rendered even more exquisite by stripping down the disorderly impurities.

C: 不过听了您的描述，比起琳琅满目的奇物，我倒是觉得那些黑塔人偶和忆泡更有趣些。
E: But after hearing your elaboration, compared to the dazzling Curios of wonder, these Herta puppets and the Memory Bubbles are far more interesting.

C: 少女的喉咙中滚出一声幼猫似的呜咽。
E: A kitten's mewling wail escapes the girl's throat.

C: 来嘛，这是后续调查的启动资金，请您务必收下哦。
E: Come on, this is the initial funding for the subsequent investigation. Please take it.

C: 我向他递出了加入俱乐部的邀请，他欣然赴约。但…他的现实身份，居然是步离人！
E: I gave him an invitation to come and join the club, and he gladly accepted. But... who would've known his true identity is a borisin!

C: 唔咕，找我有什么事吗？
E: Uh-oh, what do you want from me?

C: 呜？呜呜！
E: Woo? Woo-woo!

C: 就该用蛋糕塞住他们的嘴！
E: Should stuff their mouths full of cake instead!

C: 我感受到了，这就是家族的美梦。它也许不能满足所有人的期待，但至少能深深地打动一部分人。
E: I can feel that this is The Family's dream. It might not meet everyone's expectations, but at least it can leave a deep impression on some of the people.

C: 为什么骂我？
E: Why are you scolding me?

C: 说到底，不管是「美梦剧团」还是这些家伙——不过都是供人玩乐的物件罢了！
E: In any case, regardless of the Sweet Dreams Troupe or these items, they are just things for human entertainment!

C: 迎着维塔利诧异的目光，你肆意感受着脆筒在你唇齿间留下的甜蜜。
E: As Vitali stares at you in bewilderment, you willfully taste the sweetness of the crunchy cone on your lips.

C: 为什么爱一定要成为枷锁呢？为什么爱总要把人们捆绑在一起，逼迫他们互相依赖，一生一世都不能将视线从对方身上移开？
E: Why must love become a shackle? Why must love bundle people together, forcing them to depend on each other so that they can never take their eyes off each other for the rest of their lives?

C: 没见过。
E: ...Didn't see her.

C: 听说是他创建了匹诺康尼。
E: I hear that he created Penacony.

C: 在过去的一个琥珀纪里，众多富豪名流都曾雇我为他们制作钟表。
E: In the last Amber Era, many of the rich and famous would employ me to create timepieces for them.

C: …如果疼感造成的冲击过于强烈，你就会从梦中惊醒。换个角度来看，应该没人想在梦境里目睹一场惨烈的车祸吧？
E: ...If the impact of the pain is too intense, you'll be startled awake from your dream. In other words, I'm guessing no one in the Dreamscape really wants to witness a horrific car crash?

C: 嗯？之前不是刚给你指明过吗，又要找新的人？
E: Hmm? Didn't I just tell you that earlier? Looking for someone else?

C: 那回见。
E: I'll see you again.

C: 唉，仔细想想…我所做的一切应该都是徒劳啊……
E: Alas, upon reflection... It seems that everything I've done has been in vain...

C: 要是你也愿意成为我的粉丝——更准确地说，派对搭子——我就可以和你分享我源源不断的<color=#f29e38ff>「艾迪恩代币」</color>，让你在梦里尽情畅玩。
E: If you were willing to become my fan — Or, my party partner, to be more precise — I can share my endless <color=#f29e38ff>"Aideen Tokens"</color> with you, so you can play to your heart's content inside the dream.

C: 好啊，下次如果有时间，可以聊聊你对二次元的理解。
E: Alright. If you get time, you can talk to me about your understanding of anime.

C: 飞船可能对你来说太复杂了，那说点你更熟悉的——马桶。我虽然没用过，但我知道，一个马桶最重要的是什么？舒适、清洁、便利。设想一个完美践行实用性原则的马桶吧！
E: Perhaps a spaceship is too complicated for you. Let me talk about something you're more familiar with — a toilet. Though I have never used one, I understand what the most important facets of a toilet are. Comfort, cleanliness and convenience. Let's imagine the perfect toilet that implements the principles of practicality!

C: 我其实和他不熟…
E: I don't know him that well...

C: 假期…我的假期…又泡汤了！
E: My holiday... My vacation... Gone to waste again!

C: …怎、怎么可能！我、我可是来自安…南安亚伯星的商人，在宇宙富豪榜上排名没有五百也有一千！
E: ...How, how could it be! I... I'm a successful merchant from Ab... Abenela! And I'm within the top <unbreak>1,000</unbreak>, or maybe even top <unbreak>500</unbreak> wealthiest individuals in the entire universe!

C: 酒店每间客房内都配备特殊「入梦池」，引导客人前往指定梦境。
E: Each room is equipped with a specialized "Dreampool" to guide our esteemed guests into the Dreamscape.

C: 此外，请勿轻信「量子穿梭机」、「忆梦安眠饮料」等非官方入梦道具。
E: Please do not trust any unauthorized dreaming devices such as the "Quantum Shuttle" or the "Sweetdream Drink."

C: 「泰科铵机动球」可是风靡全宇宙的竞技项目！
E: Taikiyan Roboball is the most popular sport in the entire universe!

C: 我们不仅负责守卫现实中的酒店，还肩负着守护梦境的职责——致力于对抗噩梦、清理梦中的怪物，以保证来客的安全，维护匹诺康尼的和谐与稳定。
E: Our primary duty is to ensure the safety of the hotel and its guests in both reality and the Dreamscape. In the Dreamscape, we fight nightmares and eliminate monsters, ensuring the safety of our guests and maintaining order in Penacony.

C: 听公司的高个子说，这和你们的什么「降落伞」原理一致。不过我只凭身体就能做到，厉害吧？
E: The tall guys in IPC mentioned that it's akin to your "parachute," and I can do it with my body. Pretty impressive, right?

C: 再摸摸。
E: Pet Jno again.

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 苏乐达好处都有啥，谁说中了就送他！
E: What's special about SoulGlad? Whoever answers correctly will get SoulGlad for free!

C: 嘿，这位{M#少年}{F#少女}，你一定也想驾驶大机器人吧！恶夜钻钻娃超可动素体一定能让你美梦成真！
E: Hey {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.}, you must have wanted to try piloting a giant robot! The Diamond Doll action figure can help you realize your dream!

C: …我的钱不够用了。
E: ...I'm running out of cash.

C: …我的时间不多了。
E: ...I'm running out of time.

C: 豪华飞车（黑）
E: Luxury Speedster (Black)

C: 你和湛蓝爵士面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
E: You come face-to-face with Dr. Blues, but it does not look like it's going to speak anytime soon.
...Hey.

C: 您真是一点就通，没错，我们遵循的就是如此经典的设计套路。
E: I'm glad you catch my drift. That's right. We always do things here the old-school way.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 我终究不是真正的「铎音」，没法将告解者的苦恼尽数消化……
E: Ultimately, I'm not a true Bronze Melodia, and am unable to fully assuage all the burdens of those who confess...

C: 哈，你也这么觉得吗…也对…人嘛，总得学会活得现实点儿。
E: Ha, you feel that way too... That's true... We all have to learn to be more realistic about our life goals.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 动画中的友谊总是那么纯粹，那么美好。哈努兄弟永远是钟表小子的好伙伴，没有争吵、没有背叛、没有…算了，没什么。
E: The friendships portrayed in animations are always so pure and beautiful. Hanu is always a good companion of Clockie's. They don't fight, betray each other, or... forget it.

C: 先不聊了。
E: Talk to you later.

C: 皮皮西头顶的绒球突然蔫了下来，仿佛一根枯草般搭在脑壳边缘。
E: The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head suddenly droops down and rests on the edge of his head like a withered weed.

C: 其实我可羡慕你这样的人了，自由自在、无拘无束，想去哪就去哪，既没有负担也没有顾虑……
E: Honestly, I really envy people like you. Completely free, no restraints, going wherever the wind takes you, no burdens or worries...

C: 呃…这、多谢你的好意，但现在不行，我不能随随便便答应你。
E: Uhh... Umm, thank you for the kind offer, but I cannot right now. I cannot just casually agree to something like that...

C: 美梦小镇是个美丽又和平…个鬼啊！
E: Dreamville really is a beautiful and peaceful... Ah, who am I kidding!

C: 你以为我是真的傻吗？
E: Do you really think I'm stupid?

C: 隐夜鸫雕像很想注视你，但它没有眼睛。
E: The Nightingale Statue wishes to stare at you, but it has no eyes.

C: 想听听你对怪物们的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about monsters.

C: 用于服务的自动道具…它们真的拥有灵魂，能够感受快乐，欣赏艺术吗？
E: Automated machines for service... Are they truly capable of possessing souls, experiencing pleasure, and appreciating art?

C: 哎，会这么说也是因为…我对音乐的爱不会改变。
E: Look, I'm saying all this because... my love for music will never change.

C: 啊，星穹列车……
E: Ah, the Astral Express...

C: 现在先休息一下吧。哦，对了，布莱茨，记得检查下你的琴——最后一句稍微有点跑调。
E: Now let's take a breather. Oh yeah — Blite, remember to get your piano checked. That last line was a little out of tune.

C: 我只是热砂分会场的灯光控制员，平时的工作就是操作这些设备，给现场炒热气氛，致谢名单里都不会出现我的名字……
E: I'm just the lighting controller at the Scorchsand Hall. My work involves operating this equipment and warming up the crowd. You'll never find my name in the credits of anything...

C: 所以我现在就躺平咯。在这地方和大伙聊聊天，唠唠家族的闲话，也挺舒服的。
E: So, I'm out of the game now. I'm pretty cozy just chatting with people around here and gossiping about The Family.

C: 我没和他们正面接触过，但相关的事在流梦礁里听了不少。米哈伊尔为建设这颗星球做了这么多，现在却只能隐姓埋名地藏起来，就离谱！
E: I've never met any of them face-to-face, but I've heard a lot about them in the Dreamflux Reef. That Mikhail did so much work to construct this planet and now, he hides himself away in complete anonymity? Ridiculous!

C: 哈哈哈，都去死吧！
E: Hahaha, we're all going to die!

C: 说真的，{M#哥们}{F#姐们}，这几天我在想…我干脆要不就住在这儿，不回去了。
E: If I'm honest, {M#mister}{F#miss}, I've been thinking the past few days... Maybe I should just live here and not bother going back?

C: 然后，他们就开始说车轱辘话，试图教会我上流社会的*礼仪*。等我学明白了这套组合拳，想要继续深挖创作素材时，才发现这已经是他们的毕生所学了。
E: Then, they'd talk in circles and attempt to teach me the manners of high society. After I understood that combo and tried to dig for more creative inspiration from them, I realized that this was all they had to show for their entire lives.

C: 说起来，前阵子我在街边买到个小纪念品。瞧着挺可爱的，我就多买了几只——谢谢你陪我聊天，就送你一个作谢礼吧！
E: Come to think of it, I saw some small souvenirs in a street-side store a while ago. I thought they looked cute, so I bought a few extra... Thank you for talking with me. Have a thank-you gift.

C: 再见啦。说不定有朝一日，你也能成为船长呢，哈哈。
E: See you! Who knows, maybe one day I can become a captain, too! Haha.

C: 不，我倒没有抱怨，只是觉得有点…没劲。
E: No, I'm not complaining. I'm just a little... defeated.

C: 原本以为最火的「黄金的时刻」会足够有新意，谁曾想那地方跟其他都市星球没什么区别——都太城市化了。
E: Originally, I thought that the Golden Hour that everyone loves so much would be exciting enough for me. What I didn't expect was that it would be no different to any other urban planet... Far too urbanized for me.

C: 忧虑笼罩了梅隆的脸庞，仿佛田地上空的乌云。
E: Worry begins to cover Mellon's face like dark clouds over a field.

C: 最近到底发生了什么……
E: What's going on these days...

C: 她是「钟表匠」的伙伴，在灾难中的岁月为美梦无私奉献，留下诸多珍贵的手稿，而后籍籍无名地死去。
E: She was the Watchmaker's companion and selflessly dedicated herself to the dream during years of disasters, leaving behind numerous precious manuscripts, yet she passed away without any recognition.

C: 可恶的剽窃者，你们不能欺瞒所有人！
E: Evil plagiarists, you cannot fool everyone!

C: 他的工作完成了，但我的事业还在继续。
E: He's completed his job, but my career is still ongoing.

C: 不过最近来了不少像你这样的年轻人，但愿未来会变好一些吧。
E: But these days we've seen quite a few youngsters like you coming through, so hopefully things will get better in the future.

C: 咦？
E: Huh?

C: 太好了，可以提前杀青了——记得拿好「谢礼」，慢走不送。
E: Excellent, we can wrap up early. Don't forget to take this gift, and don't let me keep you.

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 可恶，法院竟然没有判定「苏萨水」侵权！
E: Bah, the court did not rule Sousa Juice guilty with copyright infringement!

C: 哦~那这些精心设计的小玩具定不会令你失望呀~
E: Ohh, then these exquisitely designed toys won't let you down!

C: 有机生命的快乐与无机生命的快乐，究竟是不是同一种快乐呢……
E: The joys of organic and inorganic beings... Are they the same type of joy...?

C: 哎呀！是吧，那么多有情感的小家伙在梦中挣扎，真是让人心疼！
E: Oh no! These poor souls, full of emotion, struggling in a dream. It's utterly heart-breaking!

C: 我知道。
E: I know.

C: 嗯？那是什么东西？
E: Eh? What are those?

C: 我出自世代侍奉家族的血脉，因为我的先祖是一位「第Ⅱ音级」的大家长，亲迎过{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「无限夫长」{RUBY_E#}的意志。
E: I was born into a bloodline that has served The Family for generations, because my ancestor was a scale degree II grand guardian, and had personally ushered in the will of the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony} Eternal Centurion{RUBY_E#}.

C: 与诸位聊天是件非常愉快的事，我们有缘再见。
E: I've had a great time talking to all of you. We'll meet again if destiny permits.

C: 实不相瞒，我也曾遇到过「不死之人」。
E: To tell you the truth, I've met an "Undying" before, too.

C: 当我第一次看到自己的信用点多出一个零时…
E: But the first time I saw the extra zero at the end of my credit total...

C: 是啊…是啊，我也有过容易热血上头的时候。
E: Yes, I've had my overly rash moments.

C: 打个招呼
E: Say hello.

C: 你这钱来路合法吗？
E: Is the money legal?

C: 还好我人脉广，不然真要交代在里面了！
E: Thankfully, I have enough friends to get me out of prison.

C: 你，可千万不要告诉别人！我的眼线可是遍布银河的。
E: As for you, don't tell anyone else about this! I've got eyes and ears across the cosmos.

C: 为什么只有我走出了森林……
E: Why am I the only one who made it out of the forest?

C: 我想活下去……
E: I just wanted to survive...

C: 我最讨厌那种自以为是的所谓「名流」了，呸！
E: I can't stand those pretentious, so-called elites, ugh!

C: 你知道吗？有些人真以为我是个愚蠢的花瓶，甚至有人想着法儿羞辱我，说我拜金……
E: Believe it or not, but some people think I'm actually a dumb trophy wife! They constantly try to belittle me, calling me a gold digger...

C: 哈哈！我就知道，我的眼光不会错的！
E: Haha, I knew it! My instincts are always right!

C: 我想想，我有份不错的工作…嗯，还有当我老婆经纪人的副业，有个刚结婚的漂亮老婆…我啥都有，日子还长着呢，一步步来，什么都会有的。
E: Let's see, I've got a well-paying job, I double as my wife's manager, and I'm married to a beautiful woman. I really do have it all. And with so much life ahead of me, the best is yet to come.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子说要去<color=#dbc291ff>晒星光</color>，但它的头很大，恐怕又被卡在哪里了啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a child who said that it was going to <color=#dbc291ff>bask in the starlight</color>. However, since its head is very big, perhaps it's gotten stuck again somewhere, tweet~

C: 谢谢您的夸奖，汪。应该的，汪。
E: Thanks for the compliment, woof. I'm just doing my job, woof.

C: 我们给您单独留了一套以作您成为船长的贺礼。
E: We saved a set for you as a celebratory gift for your appointment as captain.

C: 咳咳…现在是营业时间，我们还是聊点别的吧。那、那个！调饮师达夫竭诚为您服务！
E: Ahem, maybe we should talk about something else. I'm getting paid for this, after all... Uh, h—how are you doing? Drinksmith Dahf's at your service!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: …我要点餐。
E: ...I want to place an order.

C: …你好，{F#小伙子}{M#小姑娘}，你是谁来着？
E: ...Hello, {F#girl}{M#boy}. Who are you?

C: 苜蓿草家系现任家主，奥帝•艾弗法先生。我和他有过几次愉快的同席，彼此相谈甚欢。
E: Mr. Oti Alfalfa, the current head of the Alfalfa Family. We were both at the same events a couple of times, and I had a few pleasant exchanges with him.

C: 虽然参展的大部分都是学生作品…但我们学院的教学质量可是声名远扬！
E: Although the majority of our displays are going to be student works... The quality of our school's education is known far and wide!

C: 这也是我选择进入筑梦学院的原因…哈哈，虽然学到的东西和这个完全不搭边……
E: This is also why I chose to come to Dreamweaver Academy... Haha, although everything I learn here is completely unrelated...

C: 那封信落款的署名，来自于一部有名的怪奇小说，而小说衍生的同人广播电台最近恰巧开播了。
E: The name signed on that letter comes from a famous horror novel, the fan radio station for which just so happened to start broadcasting recently.

C: 你这不是没有任何烦恼吗！
E: Doesn't this mean you never had any troubles to begin with?

C: 我要求取消财富学院的独立地位，划归到筑梦学院管辖内！
E: I request that Fortune Academy's independence be revoked, and returned under the oversight of the Dreamweaver Academy!

C: 那就快点说，我还赶着去看学生的表演呢。
E: Make it quick then. I'm in a hurry to watch a student performance.

C: 先把补考过了吧，好歹混个文凭出来，要是真的过不了…唔，那也没办法……
E: Let me get past the make-up exam and get a degree first. If I really can't pass... Well, then there's nothing much I can do about it...

C: 我在学校做生意认识了这么多厉害的校友，积累的经验和人脉迟早用得上——反正只要努力，哪怕赚不了大钱，也总有办法养活自己和老爹的！
E: When I was doing business in school, I met so many fellow students and alumni in high places. The experience and connections I've accumulated will definitely come into use — I believe that as long as I work hard, even if I can't make a lot of money, I'll still be able to support myself and my old man!

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: 哎哟，我这老毛病又犯了，整天盯着挣钱二字胡思乱想，差点忘了当下最要紧的事儿。
E: Oh no, old habits die hard. I've been obsessing over making money again, and I almost forgot about what's most important now.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: You were looking for me?

C: 你来得正好，我想请你帮忙给我写一段同学寄语，正发愁该去哪儿找你呢！
E: Just in time. I was going to ask you to write a graduating message to me. I was fretting over where to look for you!

C: 哦对，这是乱破同学给我起的「忍号」，差点忘了……
E: Oh right, this is the ninja name Rappa gave me. I almost forgot...

C: 答案很显然是后者。一个调饮机器人，不应该被自己的型号所束缚。
E: The answer is obviously the latter. As a drinksmith robot, I should not be constrained by my model.

C: 来点「妙趣横生」的笑话。
E: Tell me some witty jokes.

C: 学到很多。
E: A lot.

C: 想要成为盛会巨星吗？赶快来报名吧！注册只需一秒，成功却是永恒。
E: Yearning to become a Festive Superstar? Then you better sign up now! Registration is just a second, but success is forever.

C: 探查模式，启动！
E: Exploration mode activated!

C: 嗯嗯，谢谢您的理解，以后请不要再犯了。
E: Okay, thank you for your understanding. Please don't do it again next time.

C: 你说得我都有点不好意思了…
E: You're making me feel a little embarrassed...

C: 快自己爬出来！
E: Just come out already!

C: 嗯？怎么不算呢？
E: Hmm? Why wouldn't it?

C: 你可以去球笼里跑步。
E: You can go for a run inside the Spheroid.

C: 好想吃半价钟表披萨…
E: I'm really craving some half-price Clockie Pizza...

C: 这个字…也太小了吧！
E: These prints... are way too small!
Whoa!

C: 球笼竞速了解一下！
E: Interested in Spheroid Race?

C: 三猎犬带一个隐夜鸫。
E: Three Bloodhounds, with a Hermit Thrush.

C: 必须经过细致计算…
E: I need to calculate this carefully...

C: …我想了很久，要不我们还是分……
E: ...I've been thinking about this. Maybe we should just break...

C: 嗯，我也喜欢海胆味的那支，看起来特别滑稽。
E: Yeah, I prefer the sea urchin flavor, too! It looks so funny!

C: 这位小姐…
E: Miss...

C: 不仅会支付违约金。
E: Not only will they pay the penalty...

C: 我是公司派来的代表！
E: I am a representative sent by the IPC!

C: 家族总在给她派活。
E: The Family keeps giving her extra work.

C: 有希米亚影业看上的选手吗？
E: Are there any contestants that Himemia Films is particularly fond of?

C: 叛徒的罪证就藏在大剧院中，一切蛛丝马迹都不能放过。
E: The evidence of the traitor's crimes is hidden in the Grand Theater. Don't overlook anything.

C: 作为著名的青年企业家…
E: As a renowned young entrepreneur...

C: 我听人说那泳池里有什么东西，总之…挺危险的。
E: I heard someone saying there was something in the pool. Anyway, it was... pretty dangerous.

C: 曲子…我听不出来，应该是原创作品吧，挺有才的。
E: This melody... I can't tell what it is. It must be an original piece. Quite the prodigy.

C: 「晖长石号」的服务水平真是让人失望，连这么点小事你们都办不到，到底是怎么在干活的？
E: The Radiant Feldspar's level of service is truly disappointing. You lot can't even accomplish such a trivial matter. How do you even get anything done?

C: 夫人，您说得对，是我们服务不周，我们现在已经为您重新预约了，之后的安排请您稍安勿躁，会有专人与您联系。
E: Madam, you're right. Our service has been inadequate indeed. We've already rescheduled your reservation. Please do not be worried about the upcoming arrangements, for we will assign someone to get in touch with you.

C: 这下满意了？
E: Are you satisfied now?

C: 你有什么内幕消息吗？
E: You got any inside info?

C: 在忆域死亡能报保险吗？
E: Can I buy life insurance for Memory Zone deaths?

C: 看啊，多美的景色…
E: Look, such a beautiful view...

C: 线上聊~
E: We'll chat online!

C: 船长还会继续招人吗？
E: Is the captain going to keep hiring people?

C: 早跟你们说过吧，苏打豆汁儿可不是一般人能消受的……
E: I told you, not everyone can accept mung bean soda...

C: 我记得是…波、波奇？
E: I remember... Bo-Bocchi?

C: 你发觉自己似乎很难将这简单的草稿与金碧辉煌的大剧院等同起来——这就是艺术天分的差距么，看来还是使用球棒会更适合你。
E: You struggle to equate this simple draft with the magnificence of the theater. Is this the difference in artistic genius? It appears that you're still more suited for the ball bat.

C: ——呜哇啊啊！
E: ...Uwaaahh!

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 这个故事告诉我们：要量力而行，不要盲目攀「灯」没有把握的山峰。
E: This story reminds us to act within our limits and not to recklessly chase the "light" without thought to your actions.

C: 这架微型星槎的载重量不足一个帕姆，还是不要指望用它做逃生舱了。
E: This micro starskiff has a payload capacity of less than one Pom-Pom, so it's best not to expect it to serve as an escape pod.

C: （拍拍它的脑袋）
E: (Pat it on the head)

C: 每一场伟大冒险的背后，都离不开大地兽的身影！你好，陌生人，看你的眼神，你也像我一样喜欢大地兽，对吗？
E: No grand adventure is complete without a dromas! Hey there, stranger. Judging by that glint in your eyes, you're a fan of dromas just like me, right?

C: 向您再次致歉！尽管这店还没开过十年。近期光顾小店的顾客十有八九都是冲着这个系列来的，一直缺少库存。
E: My apologies once again! Even though my shop has been around for a decade, most recent visitors have been on the lookout for my Chrysos Heir Dolia, and I've never managed to keep enough in stock.

C: 金丝绸。
E: Golden silk, please.

C: 汤的口感就像它的用料一样，丰富且具有层次感：豆类的软糯、果干的醇甜、芋头的柔韧，以及果冻的清新爽滑。
E: The texture of the stew is as intricate as its components: The tenderness of the beans, the gentle sweetness of the raisins, the creamy yam, and the refreshing smoothness of the jelly.

C: 这一杯秘酿是经过烧制的陶土的味道，粗糙，却又带着几分厚重感，像是树庭的哲学家们会喜欢的味道，也许是哲学家们需要这样的手段激发哲思——
E: This ambrosia has the taste of fired clay — rough, yet with a certain heaviness, like something philosophers from the Grove would appreciate. Maybe they need this kind of taste to spark philosophical thought—

C: 自我介绍，我是，达利安，吉奥里亚的子民。以前是厨子，现在是卫士。
E: Let me introduce myself. I'm Dorian, a child of Georios. I used to be a cook, and now I'm a guard.

C: （我想问的差不多了。）
E: (That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)

C: 打听外部城邦的事
E: Ask about other cities.

C: 不会，愿您在云石天宫里洗去疲惫，客人。
E: You're not. May your fatigue be washed away in Marmoreal Palace, good guest.

C: 您的名字会永远记录在云石天宫的历史上——愿法吉娜庇佑您，客人。
E: Your name will forever be remembered in Marmoreal Palace's annals — may Phagousa protect you, good guest.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 哈哈，你先别气，他那个系列确实是卖得太好，忙不过来了。
E: Haha, there's no need to get so worked up. That series sold really well. He just can't keep up with the orders.

C: 哪能啊，这么说吧——你在奥赫玛的这段时间运气非常不错，就算遇到些波折，最终也都会化险为夷。
E: No way, how about this — you've been very lucky during your time here in Okhema. Even if you encounter a few setbacks, you'll ultimately overcome them in the end.

C: …你这占卜，它准吗？
E: ...This divination of yours... is it accurate?

C: 喜欢俯瞰众生的感觉？
E: Do you like the feeling of looking down on the world?

C: 所有人的生活都是这样——醒来睁开眼睛，思考第一顿饭要吃什么；吃完了第一顿饭稍微做点自己的事，又开始为第二顿饭发愁…直到最后上床睡觉，然后开始新的循环。
E: Everyone's life is the same: Wake up, open your eyes, think about what to have for breakfast, eat that, catch up on personal affairs, then start worrying about what to have for your second meal... All the way up until bedtime, when the cycle starts again.

C: …虔诚的烟火气，它独特的美丽就来源于此。古代有些贤者会说什么「无知是福」——大概也就是这种意思吧？
E: ...That's the essence of devout warmth and its unique charm. Some sages of old would say "Ignorance is bliss"... is that what they meant?

C: 当然！你想听什么？我想想啊…就从我手头的研究说起吧？
E: Sure! What would you like to know? Let me see... How about starting with my current research topic?

C: 疑似含有微量泰坦神力的泉水，说不定能让植物开口说话、提升产量，又或者是发生了什么变异呢？
E: I am speculating that this spring water may contain traces of the Titans' power: Who knows if it might just make plants talk, or boost their yield, or cause some other kind of mutation?

C: 泪葱是什么玩意儿？
E: What exactly are these tear onions?

C: 「至今我仍然无法忘记她——金血般的眼眸与永夜色的长发。我看着她行于雅努斯的道路上，歌颂着欧洛尼斯的神秘，直至迎来塞纳托斯的拥抱，那便是我最珍贵的回忆——」
E: "I still cannot forget her to this day... her eyes like golden blood and her long, evernight hair. I watched her walk the path of Janus and sing of the mystery of Oronyx until the day she met Thanatos' embrace. My most precious memories..."

C: 讲讲躺椅的历史吧。
E: Tell me about the history of the lounger.

C: 说来惭愧，我只是跟黑潮打过照面，没有亲自同那些怪物作战。但那次经历让我难以忘怀……
E: Though I am ashamed to say it, I have only ever come across the black tide in passing. I never personally crossed swords with the monsters of the black tide. Though I will never forget that experience...

C: 这倒不奇怪。奥赫玛人从来都不擅长对抗性运动，只热衷于雕刻、舞蹈和诗词——悬锋人在这些方面也不差。
E: It is not surprising. Okhemans have never excelled at competitive sports, only immersing themselves in sculpting, dance and poetry, though Kremnoans aren't too shabby at these either.

C: 啊哈，您一定是来自遥远的异邦的贵客，在这奥赫玛，谁人不知老希这「希吉拉与他的翻飞之手铺子」名头啊！
E: Aha, you must be a guest from afar. Here in Okhema, everyone knows of my famed shop, Hygilos and his Whimsy Hand!

C: 我只是路过。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 适度的沉醉让你变得健谈。难道是瑟希斯附体？你变得博学，你的风趣又逗得众人大笑，不知不觉你的身边围满了青睐有加的听众。
E: An appropriate level of inebriation makes you chattier. Could you be possessed by Cerces? You become erudite, your witticisms tickle the crowd's roaring fancies, and before you know it, you're surrounded by your avid, admiring listeners.

C: 呵…若我说，我曾在梦中与你相见，你愿意相信么，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}？
E: Hah... If I said that we met in a dream once, would you believe me, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}?

C: 帕西提亚将指尖搭上你的耳背，天外之音轻柔地传入你的耳中。
E: Pasithea places her fingertips against the back of your ear, and the echo from beyond the world softly flows into your ears.

C: 我曾听说过雅努萨波利斯鼎盛期的辉煌往事。作为「奥赫玛同盟」的重要议事场所，雅努萨波利斯曾是一座富裕安宁的城邦。
E: I once heard of Janusopolis' glorious past during her height of power. As an essential Council venue within the Okhema Alliance, Janusopolis was once a prosperous and peaceful city.

C: 我对这种辩论没有兴趣。
E: I have no interest in this kind of debates.

C: 但想要证明某个事物不存在，需要从根本上进行否定，无论现在或未来，都没办法找到任何证据。因此，这并非事实层面的不存在，而是概念层面的不可能。
E: However, if you wish to prove that something does not exist, you have to fundamentally deny the possibility — Indicate that there is no possible way for us to ever find evidence of its existence, whether in the present or the future. Therefore, this does not equate to non-existence on a factual level. It equates to conceptual impossibility.

C: 比如说，当我画奥赫玛的集市时，我不会去关注水果的颜色，而是专注于集市的喧嚣、人们的欢笑、讨价还价的热闹。
E: Take, for instance, when I paint the marketplace in Okhema, I don't focus on the colors of the fruit. Instead, I capture the buzz of the crowd, their laughter, and the vibrant bartering.

C: …咦？哦！我认得你，异邦的勇士阁下！这可真是太荣幸了！
E: Oh! I recognize you, great warrior of the outlands! This is truly an honor!

C: 嘿嘿，你是不是也想知道我在这里做什么呀？
E: Hehe, are you curious about what I'm doing here?

C: 据说在悬锋人的故乡悬锋城，城外深不见底的壕沟上悬着几条碗口粗的巨大铁链子——那些挑战体力与勇气的人，就会在那几条铁链子上玩折返跑。
E: It's said that in the homeland of the Kremnoans, Castrum Kremnos, there are massive iron chains, each as wide as a bowl, suspended over the bottomless trenches outside the city. Those who challenge their strength and courage will perform shuttle runs on those chains.

C: 跑两圈
E: Run two laps.

C: 明白了！您以凡人之躯行走在城邦中，这件事还不方便向世人明说。
E: I understand! You walk among the city's people in mortal form, and it's not yet time to reveal this truth to the world.

C: 就跟你说到这里，没看见我正忙着呢。忙着享受生活也是在忙！
E: I've said enough. Can't you see I'm busy? Enjoying life is still a form of work!

C: 什么事…怎么还是你啊？
E: What is it... why is it you again?

C: 也不知是该怪他们特立独行，还是该夸他们懂得生活了。谁让这旁边就杵着全翁法罗斯最好的休憩处呢？
E: I don't know whether I should blame them for being so unconventional, or praise them for knowing how to enjoy life. After all, right next door is the best resting place in all of Amphoreus.

C: 不多打扰了。
E: I won't disturb you any longer.

C: 美好的事物容易被摧毁，艺术总是伴随着苦难。墨涅塔的祝福，也是诅咒啊。
E: Beautiful things are destroyed easily, and art is always accompanied by misery. Mnestia's blessing is also a curse.

C: 确实是真事，但…嗯…应该没关系，我来试试吧。
E: Yes, I really can... Hm... It should be fine. I'll try playing it.

C: 这位朋友，我见你颇有资质，有没有兴趣了解一下我们的学派？
E: My friend, you look competent. Are you interested in learning more about our school?

C: 好吧好吧，最近我们有活动折扣，你既然不愿意那就算了…真可惜啊。
E: All right, fine. We've got a discount on right now. If you don't want some, don't worry about it... A pity.

C: 现在我们喝的蜜酿是法吉娜信徒的手笔。当年尼卡多利被法吉娜羞辱，便勒令它献上城邦居民的鲜血，不然就亲手去取……
E: The honey brew we're drinking now is a creation of Phagousa's disciples. Back when Nikador was humiliated by Phagousa, the former ordered the latter to offer their citizens' blood as an apology, or they'd personally drain the blood from the people...

C: （拿出记忆残晶）
E: (Take out the Memory Crystal Shard)

C: 不至于吧，我觉得你的脸还是很好看的，值得一看。
E: That's not true. I think you're quite handsome. Definitely worth a second look.

C: 这，这是何物？来命运三相殿奉上贡品、求取神谕的人潮比法吉娜的海浪还要汹涌，可是我至今未曾见到与这相似的东西……
E: Wh—What is this object? The waves of people that come and make offerings to the Temple of the Three Fates dwarf even the waves of Phagousa in their volume. Yet, I have never seen an item like this before...

C: 但你要知道，如果我不拿，那些贡品的下场会如何？不是被祭司偷偷吞了，就是堆起来全丢进海里。合适吗？不合适啊！
E: But think about it — what would happen to those offerings if I didn't take them? They'd either be secretly pocketed by the priests or tossed into the sea. Does that sound right to you? Absolutely not!

C: 咦，是吗？方便问一问阁下，是在何时、因何事，产生了什么样的印象变化呢？
E: Oh? Really? If I may ask, when and because of what did your impression change?

C: 「金织」与智种学派贤人的宿怨无需隐瞒，但我向你陈述的并非偏见，而是坊间对他最广为流传的画像。而他真正的面相，要由你自己判断。
E: The grudge between the Goldweaver and the Sage of Nousporism needs no concealment. However, what I've described is not prejudice, but rather the image of him most widely known in the public eye. His true nature? That's for you to judge.

C: 想听听缇安……
E: I want to hear about Trianne...

C: 你…不回来了么？
E: You're... not coming back?

C: 我会为吾师她们忧虑，曾对万敌心怀忌惮，也总替白厄未来将负的重担而不安。
E: I worry for my teacher and the others, I was once fearful of Mydei, and I am always uneasy about the weight of the burden that Phainon will carry in the future.

C: 你有什么爱好？
E: Have any hobbies?

C: 鼓励、希冀，还有渴求与祈祷…我的肩上，背负了太多不可辜负的东西。
E: Encouragement, hope, yearning, and prayers... The heavy burdens my shoulders bear are ones that I cannot possibly let down.

C: 这里的人说话都好无聊啊，我上辈子做了什么要惩罚我一个年轻人来这种地方上班…幸好有你{NICKNAME}，能陪我随便聊会天吗？
E: The people here are so dull. What did I do in a past life to deserve this punishment — working in this place with nothing but old men for company? At least there's you, {NICKNAME}. Would you keep me company for a bit and just... talk?

C: 我没听懂，就当您是将群星当作了故乡吧。
E: I'm not sure I understand, but I'll take it that you see the stars as your homeland.

C: 谁想要你的签名啊？
E: I'm not here for your autograph.

C: 我就是掷铁饼的世界第一人——怎么可能有人拒绝得了我的魅力嘛！
E: That makes me the world's top discus thrower! How can anyone resist my oozing charm?

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，没人比我更懂「奥凯纳斯运动会」了。
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, no one understands the Okeanas Games better than I do.

C: 我听过不少人劝我不要这么张扬，可是这碍着他们什么事了吗？完全没有，他们只是在嫉妒我，我没有义务听命于这些缺乏魅力的家伙。
E: Many have advised me to turn it down a notch, but I've never gotten in their faces about it, not at all! They are just jealous, and I am not obligated to take advice from charmless folk.

C: 然而他自己却发现「人在弥留之际，油尽灯枯，身体和大脑都变得不可靠了。」最后他的遗言仅有一句「如果我们再相逢…」便猝然结束。
E: However, he himself discovered that "at the moment before death, one's body and mind become unreliable as the candle burns out." In the end, his last words ended abruptly with, "If we meet again..."

C: 你可以随时回来找我。
E: You can come back any time.

C: 但看到还有这么多人坚持相信着刻法勒，我就知道必须继续坚持下去。至少，我还能为其他人做点什么…我们都是彼此的光，这可是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的教诲。
E: But I know I must persevere, seeing so many others hold onto their faith in Kephale. At the very least, I can still do something for others. We are all each other's light — This is what {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} teaches us.

C: 能和我说说你的事吗？
E: Can you tell me about yourself?

C: 不错的功绩，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: A fine achievement, honored guest. Now, I will begin unraveling one of the many prophecies.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: …冥界？
E: ...the nether realm?

C: 「再创世」要来了，你……
E: "Era Nova" is coming, you...

C: 抱歉…也许我不该说这些。
E: Sorry... I shouldn't burden you with such grim thoughts.

C: 也许，这是留在天空的风堇姑娘，给病人们最后的礼物吧。
E: This must be Miss Hyacine's farewell gift to the afflicted, bestowed from her new home in the sky.

C: 唉，我得赶紧养好伤。继续休息下去也不是个事啊，有那么多人盼着我出场呢！
E: *sigh* I need to heal fast. I can't just lie around forever — there are so many people counting on me to show up!

C: （{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，如果你还能见到金发姐姐，能替我向她道歉吗？）
E: ({F#Miss}{M#Sir}, if you'd ever see the blonde lady again, can you apologize to her for me?)

C: 迷迷，好悠闲，好开心~
E: Mem, so chill, so happy~

C: 披索又惹你生气了？
E: Did Piso tick you off again?

C: 但我觉得吧…外面的世界挺大的，去看看也好。你瞧，我打了一辈子的猎，但恐怕网子里的鸟到过的地方都比我多。
E: But if you had to ask... it's a big world out there. Worth seeing a bit of it. I've hunted all my life, but I bet the birds caught in my snares have seen more than I ever will.

C: 估计就在最近了。
E: It'll probably be soon.

C: 记得：你也一定要用真心对待他们，别让他们难过、失望哪。
E: Just remember to treat them with the same kindness. Never let their hearts go cold or hopes turn sour, okay?

C: 不过，我还是希望他们有天能走出村子，去外面的世界看看啊。
E: Still... I do hope that one day, they will step beyond the village and see the world for themselves.

C: 虽然迷境里的餐厅荒废很久了，但我从小就梦想成为服务员迷。每天都能端着热乎乎的菜肴，吃不限量的员工餐，这一定是世界上最好的工作迷！
E: Even though the restaurants in the Maze have long been closed, I've always dreamed of being a server, memi! Carrying hot dishes fresh from the kitchen, unlimited staff meals every day — that must be the best job in the world, memi!

C: 种萤得萤…
E: You reap what you sow...

C: 去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
E: Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游吧？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 如天空一般庇佑弱小的族群，使他们不必畏惧命运的无常。
E: Protect the weak like the Sky, so that they need not fear the unpredictability of fate.

C: 啊，我的意思是…在这方欢宴中！嘿嘿……
E: I, I mean... in this feast! Heheh...
Snore— Roar— Snore—

C: 「是谁通晓有关蜜酿的一切？」斯缇科西亚的公民笑哈哈。「当然是真言狮口！」他们断言道。
E: "Who knows everything about honey brew?" The citizens of Styxia laughed. They asserted firmly, "Why, of course it's Verax Leo!"

C: 真想和它们一起飞翔啊，那样或许我也能变成金色了嗡~
E: I wish I could fly alongside them. Perhaps then, I'll become golden in color too~

C: 迷！你好好擦桌子，等把手脚练得麻利些，我就安排你去端菜迷！
E: Mem, keep wiping those tables. Once your hands move fast enough, I'll have you serving dishes next, mem!

C: 大家好迷姆迷姆~这里是哆徕徕迷~
E: Hi everyone, mem-mem~ This is Doreremem~

C: 确实，奇美拉可是很挑的，要是换我拿三天前用木杆钓的那条腰一样粗的鱼去喂，估计它都不愿意吃。
E: Yeah, chimeras are picky. If I fed it the fish thick as my waist that I caught three days ago with a wooden rod, I'm guessing it probably wouldn't eat it either.

C: 啊？践行时上哪钓的？啊不是，我就问问，我家那奇美拉说不定会喜欢吃点不一样的。
E: Eh? Where did you fish during the Action Hour? Ah, I'm just asking. My chimera might just like something different.

C: 真的假的？我家乡的城邦，满打满算也只有一千年的历史…奥赫玛的历史原来这么悠久啊。
E: Really? With all things considered, the city back in my hometown has only roughly a thousand years of history... Okhema has such a long-standing history.

C: 不是…为啥就咱们这么特殊啊，也没见其它学派有过什么入门考核…那个投石索也太难扔了吧……
E: That's not what I mean... Why do we have to do this? I never saw any entrance exams for the other Schools... And that sling is way too heavy to swing...

C: 黄金裔…没那么特别。
E: Chrysos Heirs... not that special after all.

C: 大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
E: Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.

C: 抱歉，预约已经满了。
E: Sorry, our reservations are full.

C: 咕咕，这些小调皮就麻烦你了。
E: Hoot hoot, I'll be leaving these little rascals to you.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个灵力很强的孩子似乎能看见未来，或许它又在<color=#dbc291ff>某个指示路牌上</color>替人占卜呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child with strong psychic powers who seems to be able to foretell the future. Maybe they're at <color=#dbc291ff>some signpost</color>, helping others with divination again.

C: 珍稀物种的表达方式与思考逻辑，与成年人类是不相同的。
E: Their ways of expression and thinking are very different from human grown-ups.

C: 嗯？您怎么欲言又止，不会是我记错了吧，应该不会啊…还是您也有什么事要交代我吗？
E: Yeah? Do you have something to say? Did I miss something again... Or do you have an order for me?

C: 做秘书，最重要的就是完成方方面面的维护。工作的涵盖范围肯定就会广泛一些，边界也会相对模糊……
E: As his secretary, the most important thing is to keep track of everything. The scope of work can be large and the lines can be blurry sometimes...

C: 但是我敢用自己的灵魂发誓，我从未在这件事上有所懈怠。每一天，我都在为了推广拟态保护协会而努力！
E: But I swear on my soul that I never treated this matter with any less importance. Every day, I work hard to promote the Mimicry Protection Association!

C: 这个……我也说不准。毕竟本琥珀纪，只有她一个人有幸前往丰饶星域。
E: Well... I'm not sure. After all, she's the only lucky one who got to visit the Abundance Segmentum in this Amber Era.

C: 又是你？这次又想问些什么？先告诉你，我可是很忙的。神启的消息还需要我去探索调查！
E: You again? What do you want to ask this time? I'm very busy! I need to investigate the divine message!

C: 只要能给我一个相同的机会，我一定也能在空间站留下属于我的传说……
E: As long as I am given the same opportunity, I'm sure I will be able to create my own legend on the space station...

C: 拜托，可不可以不要在休息的时候讲工作？
E: Oh, come on, can you please not talk about work while I'm taking a break?

C: 这年轻时候的爱情就是炽热，我怀疑伯纳德那老东西，就是在洛奇身上，看到了自个儿年轻时候的影子吧，嘿。
E: Young love is always full of passion. I guess Bernard just saw his younger self in Rocky, haha.

C: 任何外部攻击都是难以击垮空间站的，这一点我深信不疑。
E: I had no doubt that any external attack will be unable to destroy the space station.

C: 这场入侵对密卷科影响是最大的吗？
E: Does the Department of Insight suffer the most from this invasion?

C: 你在忙着拯救这个世界，我不应该在此时此刻请求你帮我找一篇论文。
E: You're busy saving the world. I shouldn't be asking you to help me find a thesis paper right now.

C: 本以为是风儿无心间扯动了我的金线，原来是你在撩拨我的心弦。又见面了，贵客。
E: I thought it was just the wind unintentionally tugging at my golden thread, but it was you plucking at my heartstrings all along. We meet again, honored guest.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 在这黄金之树的幽影下，你像一位真正的哲人王，沉思了片刻——谁说世界的核心一定藏在智慧之树的顶端？不妨沿着枝脉向下而行吧。
E: Under the shadows of the golden tree, you paused like a true Philosopher King in contemplation. Who says the world's core must lie at the crown of the Tree of Wisdom? Perhaps it's worth following the branches downward instead.

C: 可别这么说，猎手小姐，瞧你那有力的线条、健美的曲线——优雅、太优雅了！
E: Miss Archer, please don't say that! Those powerful contours and athletic curves you have are simply magnificent!

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 我爱你们，豹贝们！
E: I love you all, my little Seal-buns!

C: 好搭档，那你也表演一下那个吧，就是……
E: Hey partner, why don't you do that thing too, you know...

C: 虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
E: Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.

C: 得闲时来我的肩膀上坐一坐，一起离那片星空更近一些吧。
E: When you have time, come and sit on my shoulder. Let's get a bit closer to those stars together.

C: 嗯…恭喜，贵客。这样一来，此地便不再有未完之事了。
E: Hmm... congratulations, honored guest. With this, there's nothing left unfinished here.

C: 那位英雄终于拥抱了真我，迸发出耀眼的光芒……
E: That hero finally embraced their ego, erupting in brilliant radiance...

C: 当一个生物跃升成为星神后，祂就会拥有「命途」的执掌权；祂可以任意搬运该命途中的虚数能量，同时也被「原动力」所束缚。
E: Upon ascending to Aeon-hood, that being gains power over the Paths, free to choose the allocation of imaginary energy however THEY wish, while suffering the restrictions of the "Primum Mobile."

C: 这样就算不能和你们同行，至少能分享你们的冒险经历。
E: Although I cannot travel with you, I can at least share your adventures.

C: 但直到亮斑越变越大，我意识到有些不对劲……那东西径直穿过大气层，没有被烧尽，而是冲我所在的地方飞了过来。
E: But it wasn't until the spot grew bigger and bigger that I realized there was something wrong... That thing pierced straight through the atmosphere without burning up, and flew straight at me.

C: 在那之后，瓦尔特就和我们一起旅行了。
E: Welt joined up with us after that.

C: 哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似目标物件。本次搜索已结束，即将进入休眠模式……
E: Beep, beep, beep! Potential target object detected. The current search has concluded, entering sleep mode...

C: （看来货箱的谜题和这里货架上的摆放有关系…）
E: (It seems that the riddle on the crate has something to do with the things on the shelf here...)

C: 辛苦你了，该上实践课了，我这就准备场地…你也收拾停当后就来找我吧。
E: Thanks. It's almost time for a demonstration. I'm going to prepare the demo site... Come find me after you've tidied things up.

C: 看我的！
E: I got this!

C: 你怎么收到这个徒弟的？
E: How did you meet your current apprentice?

C: 嗯？你问这小子啊…这说来话长了，这小子可怜得很哪。
E: Hmm? You mean the kid... Well, that's a long story. He's had a pretty tough life so far.

C: 我有些问题想问…
E: I still have some more questions...

C: 滴、答！受不了了！我不想再扮演钟表小子了，我不想再伺候你们这些难缠的宾客了！
E: Tick, tock! I can't take it anymore! I'm never playing Clockie again, and I refuse to serve your pestering whims ever again!

C: …我，我都说了些什么啊。我怎么会变得这么自私、无情？
E: ...Wh—What in the world was I saying? How did I become so selfish and uncaring?

C: 滴答，天啊，我居然说出了这么多的粗鄙之语！
E: Tick-tock, oh my! I can't believe I said so many bad words!

C: 唔…味道怎么样？我是不是有点…嗯，过头了？…想吃什么是宾客们的自由，我不该干涉的。
E: Hmm... How's the taste? Did I go a little... umm, overboard? ...It should be up to each guest to decide what they want to eat. I shouldn't have interfered.

C: 嘿嘿…宾客，你是想换房间吗？想不想换个更有趣的地方？
E: Heehee... Dear guest, want to change rooms? Move somewhere else that's more interesting?

C: 总之，既然您都来了…能麻烦您稍微花点时间，帮我看看这个「星芒战幕」吗？
E: Anyway, since you're here... Can I trouble you to take a moment and have a look at this "Stellar Flare" for me?

C: 太感谢您了，{NICKNAME}大救星！请一定拿着这些——这是我向科室申请的一些小小礼物，不成谢意！
E: Thank you so much, {NICKNAME} — you're a lifesaver! Please take these — just a few small gifts from our department. I owe you one!

C: 我这儿还有些小东西…请您收下吧。
E: Here are some small rewards... Please, take it.

C: 停！打住！怎么又是那个晦气的老头子？都说了快了快了马上画完，还催！
E: Stop! Stop that! That wretched old man again!? I told him, soon, soon — I'll finish it soon! Quit bugging me!

C: 雷比尼淡然地离开了。
E: Rebini leaves, indifferently.

C: 《戈利尔的黄金之声》。
E: Goliards's Golden Sound.

C: 让我们开始吧！
E: Let's start!

C: …这确实是个客观的评价。
E: ...This is indeed an objective evaluation.

C: 但…这怎么可能？这可都是贝洛伯格学院历史书里的内容，白纸黑字，明明白白。
E: But... how's that possible? The description is taken from the history textbooks of the Belobog Academy. Everything is in black and white.

C: 一幅油画作品，描绘了磐岩镇的街头景色。
E: An oil painting depicting the streets of Boulder Town.

C: 妈妈被岁阳附身了？我、我该怎么办？
E: Mom is being possessed by a heliobus? Th—Then what should I do?

C: 也许我们可以把驭空大人单独约出来？
E: How about we ask Madam Yukong to come out alone?

C: 几位，我有种直觉，驭空大人没有被附身。
E: Everyone, my intuition is telling me that Madam Yukong isn't being possessed.

C: 喂喂，别这么绝情呀，你先听我说完嘛！
E: Hey, don't be so merciless. At least listen to what I have to say!

C: 你收起了相机，呜呜伯似乎在表达不满。
E: You pack up your camera and the Wubbaboo seems displeased.

C: 好像是你。
E: It looks like you.

C: 竟、竟然一眼看穿了我的想法……
E: ...Eh-he, was it that obvious...?

C: 你们好…小秘书，听说你们在码头和公司的人打赌了，没还上欠款就要当面学狗叫？
E: Good to meet you all... Miss Secretary, I heard you made a bet with the IPC... and if you lose you have to bark like a dog?

C: 为什么不用玉兆来计算？
E: Why not use a jade abacus to calculate the routes?

C: 你们别在意，{F#她}{M#他}只是嘴上说说而已。
E: Don't mind {F#her}{M#him}, {F#she}{M#he}'s talking silly again.

C: 我还有云骑的任务在身，得先走一步了。得空的话，我会来金人巷帮忙的。
E: I have a mission from the Cloud Knights, so I have to leave for now. If I have time, I'll definitely come back to Aurum Alley to help out.

C: 你好，公司这家伙。
E: Hello, IPC goon.

C: 精致的陶瓷花瓶。年代久远，体态均匀，瓶身上自然形成的纹理独一无二。这些瓷器大多昂贵并且容易碎裂，它不应该出现在这样的小小货运港里。
E: Intricate porcelain vase that can be dated to the distant past. Its well-balanced proportion and the naturally-formed patterns on its body make it stand out from the rest of its kind. Such an expensive and brittle vase shouldn't have been sent here.

C: 那是你们自己的问题，不关我的事，对吧？
E: That's your problem, not mine!

C: 我们被算计了，没有办法。
E: He fooled us. That's all there is to it.

C: 小秘书已经解释过来意，你们是想要学会在与人争论时占据上风，对吗？
E: Miss Secretary said that you want to learn how to get the upper hand in an argument. Is that right?

C: 公司将码头租给商会，然后商会经营不善，以便彻底破坏商会积累的信誉？
E: You're saying the IPC leased the dock to the Merchant Guild — who mismanaged it — in order to destroy the Merchant Guild's credibility?

C: 你们少血口喷人了，我为什么要搞小动作？你们这破码头，既没有商铺合作，又频繁出现事故，这跟我有什么关系？
E: Don't be so slanderous! Why would I stoop so low? What do the frequent accidents at this dock have to do with me?

C: 再说了，我又不参与码头发货，难不成还能是我买通了码头工人吗？真是好笑。
E: Bah! I'm not even involved in shipping operations — how could I possibly buy off a dock worker? The absurdity!

C: 我不会放弃我为金人巷打造的图景，更别说卸下职责了。
E: I won't give up the vision I've built for Aurum Alley, let alone step down from my duties.

C: 你真不是骗咱们去打白工吗？
E: You aren't tricking us into doing free work, are you?

C: 我是真心诚意想要帮各位解决问题的。各位的实习工资，会由我来支付的。
E: I truly want to help you — and you'll receive compensation for your work.

C: 明曦，该你们发言了。
E: Mingxi, please ready your statement.

C: …你想说「过去的做法不能直接适用于现在」，因为「那时的环境和现在完全不一样」——我终究还是得出了你们的论点。
E: ...I see what you are saying. While criticizing you for making flawed comparisons, I myself also made the mistake of believing that what worked in the past could be copied to serve the present.

C: 你为什么不去？
E: Why me?

C: 这也太普通了吧。
E: That's too generic.

C: 鹤运物流上有记录显示，这箱快递就是「阿丰」寄出去的，你怎么说？
E: Records from Heron Express show that this container was sent by a person named "A-Feng." What do you have to say about that?

C: 现在「与码头建立合作」和「让青雀小姐放弃开病假证明」已经是一件事了。
E: "Making a deal with the docks" and "getting Miss Qingque to give up her quest for a medical certificate" are now the same thing.

C: 让我看看，你都找到了些什么…要是这些证据有用的话，我也会从旁协助你的。
E: What did you find? Let me have a look.... If these pieces of evidence can help, I'll try to assist you from the side.

C: 就算是仙舟有着丹鼎司的制药技术，但治病时还得讲究对症下药…所以，化外民也不是想开药就能开药的，需要丹鼎司的药方。
E: Even with the pharmaceutical tech of the Alchemy Commission, you still have to find the right cure when treating people... So Outworlders can't just get medical prescriptions just because they want something. They need that prescription from the Alchemy Commission.

C: 那我们就放轻松，把这个请假流程简化一下。
E: We should relax and just keep this whole leave application process straight and simple.

C: 可是这本《速查》上并没有你的这个「不打牌我就要死了综合症」！
E: But this quick diagnosis booklet doesn't have your "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome" listed!

C: 这是上一次用过的病假证明……
E: This is the medical certificate that was used last time...

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 哈——？你说这个谁懂啊，快拿回去吧。
E: Ha...? What's this about? Get that out of here.

C: 过去不能和现在直接对比。那时的环境和现在完全不……
E: You can't draw simple parallels between then and now using absolute numbers. The trading volume you mentioned may not look impressive today, but it was huge relative to...

C: 这几位云骑很可疑。
E: These Cloud Knights seem suspicious.

C: 请出示你的证件。
E: May I please see your credentials?

C: 放心，您说得轻巧，我飞得更轻巧，「左转」压根不在话下！
E: Don't worry. I'm as deft at flying as you are with word. "Turn left" is a cinch!

C: 你抬起头，这才发现一直跟在你身旁的小机巧鸟早已不知去向何方了。
E: You raise your head, only to discover the cycrane that has been following along with you all the way has somehow disappeared.

C: 你在金人巷。
E: You're in Aurum Alley.

C: 好，听你的，我们走吧。
E: Alright, you got it. Let's go.

C: 所以我说！就是这样！
E: You see? That's what I said!

C: 真是个好东西啊，看起来以后也可以用这招来进行战斗训练了。史考特真是难得办了件人事。
E: What a fantastic treasure. Looks like we can use these moves to train our combat skills in the future. Scott really has put together something rare here.

C: 能给我讲讲比赛规则吗？
E: Can you please tell me about the tournament's rules?

C: 我想参加比赛！
E: I want to join!

C: 第一轮的实验，主要围绕「反物质军团」中的「虚卒•践踏者」进行。课题就叫作…我想想…就叫作《浅析践踏者四足是否受力均匀》。
E: The first round of experiments mainly revolves around the "Voidranger: Tramplers" of the "Antimatter Legion." The research title shall be named... Let me think... It shall be named "A Brief Analysis of Force Distribution on Quadruped Tramplers."

C: 雪堆下面似乎露出了盔甲的边缘一角。
E: A piece of armor sticks out from underneath the Snow Drift. This feels familiar.

C: 这次的地方已经给你标注好了，你多上点心，可别漏了什么关键线索！
E: I've marked the location for you this time. Pay attention and don't miss anything!

C: 虽然没有找到异常现象，但也不算收获全无——至少也算亲自感受了一下地髓的硬度。
E: You didn't find the anomaly, but it's not completely fruitless — at least you found out just how hard geomarrow is.

C: 可怖的威胁话语从你的嘴里倾泻而出。
E: Terrifying threats spill out of your mouth.

C: 你隐隐约约感受到身旁有路过的人在偷偷地看你，可当你想要用眼神捕捉时，对方却又快速而胆怯地消失了……
E: You feel like people who are passing by were giving you sneaky looks, but when you try to spot who those people are, they slipped out of sight...

C: 我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
E: I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?

C: 我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
E: I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?

C: 哎呦老朋友别走别走别走——来玩玩吧！说不定老板看着热闹高兴了涨涨工资，我就能早日脱离服务员生涯了！
E: Hey, my friend, don't go, don't go just yet — come and join the fun! If the boss sees the place buzzing and gets in a good mood, I might snag a raise and bid farewell to my waiter days soon! You never know!

C: 我们所做的一切终究是如幻泡影，美好生活仅能在梦中觅得。
E: Everything we've done is just an illusion. The pursuit of a better life is only possible in a dream.

C: 我想揭露梦境酒店的真相！
E: I want to expose the truth of the hotel in the dreamscape!

C: （手动换台）
E: (Switch the channel manually)

C: 之前不是都见过面了？别太拘谨，放松。这里是冷清了点，不过正好，适合无所顾忌地谈话。
E: Didn't we already meet before? You should loosen up a bit. The place is quiet, but that's okay — we can say whatever we want here.

C: 别慌，我来教你。
E: Don't panic. Let me show you what to do.

C: 汪！下次带我出去玩好不好？新来的调饮师，以后还要再陪我哇！
E: Woof! Take me out to play again, all right? Be sure to hang out with me again, drinksmith!

C: （没想到舒翁曾经是「美梦剧团」的管理员，难怪她会如此在乎怪物们……）
E: (Siobhan was once the administrator for the Sweet Dreams Troupe. How unexpected. No wonder she has such a soft spot for monsters...)

C: 希望…你能喜欢上这里。
E: I hope... you enjoy it here.

C: 该去哪里找呢？
E: Where should we start?

C: 可以开始了吗？我做好准备了。
E: Shall we begin? I'm ready.

C: 感觉帕姆是不是有点多？
E: It seems like Pom-Pom comes up a bit often?

C: 哈哈，就知道您会喜欢！
E: Haha, I knew you'd like it!

C: 我又看到了那位黄金般赤诚的钟表小子，看来您已经找到一份隐藏起来的宝物了……
E: I see Clockie with his golden sincerity again. Looks like you've found a hidden treasure already...

C: 不过，看来您已经凭借自己的实力找到了宝物之所在。这份线索交给您，或许能对您的寻宝之旅有所帮助。
E: However, it seems you managed to find the treasure all by yourself. This clue is for you. Maybe it'll help you along your treasure-hunting journey.

C: 受众的反馈已经给出了答案——你们无用的挣扎只是在搞砸自己的口碑。
E: Now, your audience's feedback is your answer — you are shooting yourselves in the foot with your futile effort to turn things around.

C: 「哈努兄弟，你该怎么办？你还能怎么办？」
E: "What are you gonna do, Brother Hanu? What can you do?"

C: 完全没懂…
E: Lost... I'm completely lost...

C: 不，我真不是……
E: No, I'm really not...

C: 哦哦哦——拍摄助手来了！场景已经布好，就差你了！
E: Oh oh oh — the camera assistant is here! The set's all ready, we're all waiting on you!

C: 重拍一次吧。
E: Let's reshoot that.

C: 嗷，嗷嗷，汪呜——
E: Arf, arf arf, arooo...

C: 那你意思意思。
E: Then show me a token of your appreciation.

C: 咕噜噜，别这么说呀，您一定能从中学习到新的「导演技巧」！
E: *gurgle* Don't be like that. You'll definitely learn plenty of Directorial Skills from this!

C: 我听说现在的十二梦境就是他主持设计的，他也是「折纸大学」的第一任校长，真是了不起的家伙！
E: I heard he was the lead designer for the Twelve Dreamscapes and the first dean of the Paperfold University. What an incredible individual!

C: 于是这次我们决定把它做得更*复古*一点儿——请看这边。
E: So this time, we decided to make things just a tad bit retro — check this out.

C: 如果说在故事的结尾，小浣熊跳入黑洞，战胜宇宙间所有的敌人，终于获得了选择自己梦想中最强球棒的机会…
E: If, at the end of the story, the little raccoon gets to jump into the black hole, defeats all its enemies in the universe, and finally gets the chance to choose the ultimate bat of its dreams...

C: 闹鬼了？
E: Oh, no! Spooky!

C: 在我这，二位需要用精湛的「肢体语言」诠释我描绘的故事情境。
E: Here, you two are required to skillfully utilize body language to portray the story context I've laid out for you.

C: 此时——你应该做出怎样的举动来「逗笑」她？
E: At this moment, what should you do to make her laugh?

C: 一个白手起家的富豪，竟然用如此轻蔑的态度对待自己曾经的同伴，使我心中不由得感到愤怒！
E: A mogul who went from rags-to-riches treating a former companion with such disdain — it just makes my blood boil!

C: 两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！看到这样的结局，我心里也充满了希望。
E: Two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them! My heart brims with hope at the sight of such an ending.

C: 总算是胜利了…我们去下一关吧。
E: We've finally succeeded... Let's head to the next challenge.

C: 感觉很刺激。
E: Pretty thrilled.

C: 演员\n 引导员 饰 倒霉蛋1号\n安全检查员 饰  倒霉蛋2号
E: Cast\nGuide  as  Unlucky Fool #1\nSafety Inspector  as  Unlucky Fool #2

C: 「我们演下去，片刻间如醉如痴，扮演生命而不想到喝彩。」
E: "We will keep playing our roles, drunken and foolish in the moment, playing at life but never thinking to celebrate it."

C: 真想坐下来好好品尝一下啊，但现在时间紧急…我们边走边吃吧！
E: While I'd really like to sit here and sample these, time is of the essence right now... Let's eat while we walk!

C: 这场战斗当时也没这么难啊？
E: This battle didn't feel so intense at that time.

C: 你究竟是什么人？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 你有什么目的？
E: What do you want?

C: 受命运眷顾，他们出了一位先知。先知将不属于这个时代的知识带给了札乌姆，自此，被科技武装的他们有资格与公司坐在谈判桌上。
E: Blessed by luck, a prophet emerged, bringing knowledge ahead of the star system's time to Zaum. Starting from then, they had been equipped with cutting-edge technology that put them on the negotiation table with the IPC.

C: 在交流中，这位先生提出了一个优美的类比：星神和凡人就像函数方程式的两端，只需解明一端的未知数，就能求出另一端的答案。
E: During our discussion, that gentleman offered a beautiful analogy: Aeons and mortals are like the two ends of a functional equation. By solving the unknowns at one end, we can discover the answer at the other.

C: 呸呸呸，谁稀罕你那破机甲！
E: Pfft! As if anyone wants your junkyard scrap mechs!

C: 这剧情既视感也太强了…
E: Feel like this has happened before...

C: 云璃师父请讲！
E: Please go ahead, Master Yunli!

C: 两位师父，我们还是先考试吧。
E: Let's focus on the test, masters.

C: 三月，你还有些其他的本事吧？
E: Do you have any other tricks up your sleeve, March?

C: 彦卿师父，和你交手…我真的能打赢吗？
E: But Master Yanqing, facing you in a duel... do I really stand a chance?

C: 你不会是把他给夺舍了吧？
E: You didn't possess him, did you?

C: 别担心藿藿，我没有被附身，{F#她}{M#他}在逗你呢。
E: Don't worry Huohuo, I'm not possessed, {F#she's}{M#he's} just pulling your leg.

C: 哎哟…小怂包还敢顶嘴了。要是老子附在你身上，你登上演武仪典的擂台，绝对不会输给神策府里那个黄毛小子！
E: Ooh... The timid fry's got a sharp tongue. If you were in the Wardance ring and I possessed you, you'd have to try really hard to lose to that brat from the Seat of Divine Foresight!

C: 我甚至没看到她拔剑，时间好像静止一般，而我只看到一道绿色火光闪过。
E: I didn't even see her draw her sword. Time seemed to freeze, and all I saw was a flash of green fire.

C: 感觉这人的童年已经没救了…他「最扭曲的欲望」根本不在这里。
E: Jeez, this guy is simply hopeless... His most twisted desires aren't here at all.

C: 哈哈，那还真是…古道热肠的勇士啊……
E: Haha, well... they do sound like... a brave soul...

C: 三月七，你是我认识的第一个，和我一样卑鄙无耻、残酷无情、不择手段的人。这一次，是你更卑鄙无耻、更残酷无情，更不择手段！我输得心服口服！
E: March 7th, you're the first person I've ever known who's just as despicable, cruel, and as heartless as me. But this time, you outdid yourself, being even more vile, more ruthless, and more unscrupulous than ever! I accept my defeat!

C: 竟然还唱了两遍。真有服务精神。
E: He actually sang it twice. Talk about being committed to providing a service.

C: 差点就被你给绕进去了。今天本来是…是来决斗的，不是来和你辩经的。
E: Well, you almost got me. I'm here to... have a duel, not to debate with you.

C: 我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。
E: I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here.

C: 原来是这样，哈哈，鄙人明白了。十五日之约确实紧促了一些，三月小姐有这样寻药的想法也不难理解……
E: So that's the case, haha, I understand. A fight in fifteen days is a rather tight schedule. It's no wonder Miss March seeks the medicine...

C: 不过嘛…我听说罗浮仙舟有一张药方，但这药方不是给人开的，而是给「深山密林中的蛇」开的。
E: But... I hear that there is a prescription aboard the Xianzhou Luofu that isn't given to the public, only to the snake in the deep woods.

C: 哎，既然你俩都不喝，鄙人就勉为其难地喝下吧。
E: *sigh* Since the both of you won't drink it, I shall drink it with great reluctance.

C: 啊，就这么个事儿吗？
E: Huh? That's it?

C: …坏消息不会是那个「金人司阍」没了吧？
E: ...Please don't tell me the bad news is that the Aurumaton Gatekeeper is gone.

C: 虽然不知道刚才那算不算成功，但现在肯定是失败了…公输师傅，「阿休」是什么？
E: Although I can't be sure whether we succeeded, now I'm certain it's a failure... Master Gongshu, what's A-Xiu?

C: 我们当然是来找你的呀。
E: We're here to see you, of course!

C: 这么邪门的剑谱它强吗？
E: Would such an evil sword art be strong?

C: 时间差不多了，今天就先忙到这里吧，下班下班！两位辛苦了，我们再抓个人去打牌吧！
E: It's getting late, let's leave it here for today. It's time to clock out! Good work you two, let's see if we can find someone to join us for a game of jade!

C: 仅用短短一两刻钟的时间，这体验有些太漫长了。
E: That seems like a long story for something that only took about half an hour?

C: 梦境治疗怎么和垃圾桶沾边？
E: What has being a Dreamscape healer got to do with trashcans?

C: {NICKNAME}，多谢你了。有了这些照片，我去收容那些忆质就方便多了。
E: Thank you so much, {NICKNAME}. These pictures will make collecting and containing the memoria much easier.

C: 估计爱德华医生也想不到，这可是我翻垃圾桶时获得的灵感呢。
E: I bet Dr. Edward never would have imagined that I got this inspiration while trashcan diving!

C: 据小桶宝力先生所说，这些黑影生物与他来自于同个世界……我有个疑问——过去贝洛伯格从未遇上类似的入侵事件，如今它们为何要来这里胡作非为？
E: According to Mr. Litter Pony, these shadowy creatures hail from the same world as he does... I have a question. Belobog has never experienced an invasion like this before. Why would they be here causing trouble now?

C: 这是我转生成为复读机的起点。
E: This is the story of how I was reborn as The Echoer.

C: 举手之劳。
E: Piece of cake.

C: 托帕小姐，「石心十人」中最可爱的一位，我很喜欢她。
E: Miss Topaz is the cutest among the Ten Stonehearts. I like her.

C: 等比赛正式开始之后，我的食谱就很固定了——糙米、玉米、荞麦、水煮鸡胸肉、水煮牛腿肉、水煮鱼肉、水煮虾肉……
E: After the tournament officially started, my diet has been pretty much the same — brown rice, corn, buckwheat, boiled chicken breast, boiled beef shank, poached fish, boiled prawns...

C: 现在还有其他比赛吗？
E: Are there other competitions happening?

C: 我一定可以打败彦卿！
E: I WILL DEFEAT YANQING!

C: 那可不行！卢卡哥哥答应虎克了，要赢得决赛，把虎克也带上，去外面的世界看看！
E: That won't do! Luka promised Hook that he has to win the final and take Hook up there to see the stars beyond!

C: 伊戈尔甚至有可能参加过演武仪典。仙舟人的寿命很长，那对他们而言并不算太久以前的事。
E: Maybe Igor even attended the Wardance. The Xianzhou people have long lives, so it wouldn't be something that happened long ago for them.

C: 原来是我的粉丝，对不起，让你们失望了。
E: Ah, my fans... Sorry to have disappointed you.

C: 就算心情再怎么不好，高质量的蛋白质也是无辜的。
E: No matter how bad my mood is, high-quality protein is never to blame.

C: 你真够磨蹭的，快点！
E: Stop wasting time! Hurry up!

C: 溜了溜了。
E: I'm out.

C: （别想那么多了，卢卡！想想玛吉，重要的，永远是挥下一拳！）
