C: 我怎么会干这种事，就算我敢这么做，地衡司也不会放过我的，在咱们仙舟上开店可得遵守规章制度。
E: Come on! How could I even do that? Even if I wanted to, the Realm-Keeping Commission wouldn't let me get away with it. All the stores on the Xianzhou ship have to follow the rules and regulations.

C: 「星际决胜庆典」是什么？
E: What's the Interastral Tournament Festival?

C: 请两位尽管向我提问吧——有关大赛会场和「星际决胜庆典」，你们有什么想要了解的内容吗？
E: Feel free to ask me about the Interastral Tournament Festival and the venue. Is there anything in particular you'd like to know?

C: 当然！看到底下的巨大圆盘了吗？等到庆典锦标赛正式开幕时，这里就会成为以太战线玩家们证明自己实力的舞台了。
E: Indeed! Have you seen the big circular platform down below? When the championship commences, this space will serve as the arena for Aetherium Wars players to showcase their skills, and where they'll vie for supremacy.

C: 为什么不要？
E: You don't want it?

C: 咦？这个小家伙，是在害怕吗？
E: Huh? Looks like the little guy's scared...

C: 欸？总感觉有点普通……
E: Uh... That's like naming your cat "cat."

C: 啊，总感觉好复杂……
E: It seems kinda complicated...

C: 当然，「武器试验场」已经是过去式了——现在它是「星际决胜庆典」的大赛会场。
E: Haha, don't worry, you won't find any "weapon testing" going on here. Now it's the venue for the Interastral Tournament Festival!

C: 等会儿等会儿！这都哪儿跟哪儿啊，你被反物质军团的虚卒附体了是吧？
E: Geez, did you join the Antimatter Legion when I wasn't looking?

C: 乔瓦尼？他在搞什么名堂？
E: Giovanni? I wonder what he's up to...

C: 确实不错。
E: I have to agree!

C: 我也很痛快！
E: The exhilaration is mutual!

C: 又让他们给逃了…哎，有种预感，这还不会是最后一次……
E: They managed to get away again... Ugh, I have a feeling this won't be the last we see of them...

C: 没什么啦，顺路的事而已。你想找我们聊什么？
E: No problem, we were in the area anyway. What did you want to discuss with us?

C: 嗨呀，你还没明白嘛！来，让本姑娘告诉你——
E: C'mon, you still haven't figured it out?

C: 加油，目标是圆满完成旅行！
E: Ready? Time to add the finishing touch to our journey!

C: 做得好！接下来请随我继续前进——
E: Task completion: Satisfactory. Maintain forward progression.

C: ——就是现在！
E: ...Now!

C: 在它的嗥叫中，你似乎能听出一分赞许、一分不甘、一分对于失败的遗憾、一分渴望变强的决心。
E: From its barking, you feel a sense of praise, a hint of resentment, an inkling of regret at their defeat, and a sprinkle of determination to grow stronger.

C: 不愧是我的好{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！你这实力，已经和我不相上下了——我说，回头要不和我一起在长乐天卖艺吧？有二位在，我保证场场演出座无虚席！
E: Ever thought about joining me in Exalting Sanctum? With our skills combined I'm sure we'd be great together — there wouldn't be an empty seat left!

C: 你们的胜率曾一度跌落至<unbreak>14.93%</unbreak>，但你们成功凭借自身的策略逆转了如此不利的局势。毫无疑问，你们有着争夺冠军的潜力。
E: At one point, your chance of victory decreased to <unbreak>14.93%</unbreak>, yet you successfully managed to change the course of a detrimental situation through strategic adjustment. It is evident that you have the potential for championship contention.

C: 好了，闲话就先聊到这里…还请二位专心准备接下来的总决赛，祝你们成功加冕！
E: Alright, let's leave it at that for now... I want you both to be well-prepared for the final.

C: 没问题，从此处电梯向下即可抵达比赛场地。
E: Please take this elevator down to the arena.

C: 我觉得是。
E: I think so.

C: 哼，哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 所以你们最后一次是在哪里见到的白露大人？
E: So where did you last see Lady Bailu?

C: 我们要把这个「灵异事件」的调查报告发到网上，来吸引更多粉丝为我们提供关于岁阳的消息……
E: We're going to make a post about this "paranormal incident" online to attract more followers — it'll help us get more intel.

C: 您真把我们当成与阳世不通音信的幽冥来客么？这份天真可爱得紧。
E: Did you really think we were messengers from another plane visiting the world of the living? Hehe, how cute of you.

C: 谁知道呢？浮烟不是说阿灼是小孩子心性吗？就试试看吧。
E: Who knows? Cirrus said that Luxie is kinda childlike — it's worth a try.

C: 只是来找你撒气。
E: Just came to vent some anger.

C: 虽然像是夸我，但听着…哎嘿，就当是在夸我吧。
E: That sounds like a compliment, but at the same time... Eh, I'll just take it as a compliment.

C: 哪有什么注定的未来？
E: Since when is the future predetermined?

C: 我看到了，你们将我…收入了囚牢里……
E: I've foreseen what happens next... you're going to imprison me...

C: 那就不打扰了，接下来咱们也该回绥园把犀焰封禁起来了。
E: We won't delay you any longer. We need to go to Fyxestroll Garden and seal Keralum away.

C: 对！今天就先解散吧，判官大人也是，可别把自己给累坏了。
E: Right! Let's call it a day. And you too, Judge Hanya — don't work yourself to death.

C: 青雀啊青雀，对于你而言，人生可以有看似无穷多的选择。那是因为，你的每一种选择，与你的每一天同样都是毫无意义的虚度。但对我来说，选择将会带来截然不同的后果。
E: Qingque, Qingque... For you, life may have a seemingly infinite number of choices. That is because your choices are simply different ways of slacking off and wasting time — they are of no consequence to anything... but for me, choices come with very real consequences.

C: 妖物，你呀你，完全不懂人类。
E: Creatures like you don't understand humans.

C: 眼下是彦卿自由支配的时间。趁此良机，我想在这座剑阵中向「熔炬」老师求教参详所学。
E: This is my own time. I came here to learn from Master Apyra... to learn from these swords.

C: 是彦卿任性…还请几位陪我一起对上几招！
E: But I want to fight you... and we're just getting started!

C: 藏形敛意，不受其扰。
E: Conceal your form and hide your intentions, don't fall for their distractions.

C: 这并非岁阳编织的幻境迷障，而是封闭了五感，将人类彻底与外界的信息隔绝。这样一来，连能融入幻境的火铃也毫无用武之地了。
E: This isn't just a heliobus illusion, it's a complete sensory barrier — cutting off the individual from the outside world. In this case, even the Harmonic Chime won't work.

C: 在此之前，我应当先遵照约定，将你们这些车前小卒，杀个片甲不留！
E: Before that happens, I should keep my end of the bargain: Destroying you without leaving a trace.

C: 你们…我记得你们……
E: H—Hey... I remember you...

C: …我…我没有装可怜……
E: I—I'm not trying to make you feel sorry for me...

C: 你们…太过分了…
E: You're... You're all so mean!

C: …别胡思乱想了，现在该怎么办？
E: ...Stop overthinking, Huohuo. What should I do now?

C: 来吧，化外民{M#小兄弟}{F#小丫头}，来一场酣畅淋漓的对弈吧！你准备好了吗？
E: Bring it on, outworlder, let's have a hearty game of chess! Are you ready?

C: 嗯…请再给我们一些时间吧，那之后…我会乖乖和你走的。
E: Yes... Please give us a little more time, and then... I will dutifully go with you.

C: 我已经无法忍受了…
E: I can't take it any longer...

C: ——自本座被岁阳害得大大丢脸以后，咱们司部里又出现了一桩怪事。
E: ...Since that time the heliobi greatly damaged my reputation, another strange phenomenon has occurred in our department.

C: 来一局帝垣琼玉吧？
E: How about a game of Celestial Jade?

C: 开箱！
E: Mystery boxes!

C: 你正犹豫着该如何脱困，忽然有人急促的拍打门扉，闯了进来……
E: As you consider how to escape, there is a hurried knocking on the door as someone charges in...

C: 没错，钻进我下属的脑瓜里，种下这等遥不可及的愚妄幻想，不可饶恕！
E: That's right, digging into the mind of my subordinate and planting unrealistic and foolish fantasies like this is unforgivable!

C: …你们听到了吗？是冤魂！
E: ...Did you hear that? It was a vengeful spirit!

C: 具体的坐标我发给你们了，麻烦你代我和那家伙见面吧，拜托了。
E: I'll send you the coordinates. Please help meet that guy for me, please.

C: 呜嗷啊啊啊……
E: Aghhhh...!

C: 那个通话的事，很抱歉，是我玉兆坏了，老是有杂音。还好现在见到你。夜深了，你还是先回家吧，一个人在外面晃太久也不好。
E: I'm sorry about that call. My jade abacus got broken and everything was static. Good thing I'm seeing you now, then. It's getting late, and you should go home. It's no good hanging around outside when it's this late.

C: 十王司的判官…也不会飞啊。
E: Being a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission... doesn't really let you fly.

C: 将三月七的求助告知了瓦尔特。
E: You tell Welt about March 7th's request.

C: 唔…呃呃呃呃呃！
E: Uhh.... ughhhhh!

C: 我得遵守仙舟的规矩…
E: I shall obey the laws of the Xianzhou...

C: 是这样的，最近我收到了一个包裹，打开一看，里面是罗浮杂俎网站寄来的「订阅奖励银牌纪念」。
E: Basically, I got a parcel recently. And when I opened it, there was a Silver Subscription Commemorative Medallion from the Ghostly Grove website.

C: 那谁来拍照呢？
E: Who's going to take the photo, then?

C: 那是台本，一定不是真的！
E: It's a script, definitely fake!

C: 真是个难忘的夜晚，不是吗？我还打算再待一会。就让我再说最后一句吧——
E: A truly unforgettable night, no? I plan on staying a bit longer. Just let me say this one last line...

C: 毕竟只是捕风捉影而已。
E: It's just tilting at windmills, nothing more.

C: 怎么培育？
E: Nurturing how?

C: 方才的培育还顺利吧？有需要帮忙的地方吗？
E: Did the nurturing go well? Do you need any help?

C: 根据过往经验，造物们不介意被塞进背包里，但从长远考量，它们需要睡眠用品。
E: Based on past experiences, creations don't mind being carried in a backpack, but they will need sleeping supplies in the long run.

C: 变异发生后，身体特征也随之改变。
E: The mutation then changed the creation's physical traits.

C: 如果你能将它们带到我这儿来，那就更好了。有足够的样本，就能破译它们身体特征的秘密。
E: It would be very good if you could bring them to me. With sufficient samples, the secrets of their physical traits can be decoded.

C: （转述刚才发生的事）
E: (Tell it what just happened)

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}，你能不能想想办法，看看怎么培育出这些稀有造物，空间站的研究就差这最后一块拼图了。
E: So, {NICKNAME}, can you think of a way to nurture these rare creations? This is the last piece of the puzzle remaining for the space station's research program.

C: 我相信你一定行。
E: I believe in you.

C: 呼噜呼噜！
E: *snoring*

C: 像刚才那样，和人有来言有去语的对话，我可是第一次见到啊！
E: But that kind of back-and-forth conversational dialogue that I saw just then? That's the first time I've ever seen that!

C: 我没其他问题了。
E: No further questions.

C: 没啥意思？唉，也不奇怪…无名客还是见多识广啊，在下手里的小玩意儿是满足不了您咯·～
E: Not at all? *sigh* That's no surprise... The Nameless is vastly experienced. Nothing I have in my humble possession could hope to satisfy you~

C: 它不是这么说话的吧？
E: Wait, that's not how he usually talks, right?

C: 行啊，就让我来给你们做个示范！都看好了啊！
E: Alright! Let me show you how it's done! Watch this!

C: 到、到！
E: I... I'm here!

C: 欺负它们只会显得你很没用。
E: Taking it out on them only makes you look pathetic and useless.

C: 稍等？等多久？收房费的时候怎么就不等了，家族催款的时候怎么就不等了？
E: A moment? How long is that exactly? The Family never waits when they're charging for our room or collecting money, but I have to wait!?

C: 「所谓*异常*，对我们而言才是自由。」
E: "To us, *abnormality* means freedom."

C: （被传送到了奇怪的地方。这里是…梦境酒店？）
E: (He teleports me to a weird place. Is this the... hotel in the Dreamscape?)

C: 如果你还打算躲在这个破酒吧，陪那群怪物玩过家家游戏的话——就别怪鸢尾花家系没给你留位置！
E: If you're planning to keep hanging out in this shabby lounge and play house with those monsters... don't blame the Iris Family for not saving a spot for you!

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 啦欧啦欧啦欧啦欧…呼，累死了，好久没干过这种重体力活了。
E: Huff... huff... That was exhausting. It has been a long time since I've done such intense physical labor.

C: 只要大家在一起，就不怕那坏人过来欺~
E: If we stick together, we won't need to worry about the bad guys~

C: 呼。杯子越深，情义越真！就爱你这种能懂我的，嗝。
E: Ah, the deeper the goblet, the truer the friendship! I love that you can understand me. *hiccup*

C: …为什么说这个？
E: ...Why are you saying that?

C: 人家最近也正发愁呢，黑暗的梦境酒店里，总感觉有些什么吓人的东西在蠢蠢欲动，可想找个安静的地方走走，就只能去那儿呀。
E: It worries me, too. I've always felt something creepy lurking deep within the hotel in the Dreamscape, but if I want a quiet place, there's not much of an alternative.

C: 小、小点声！闹这么大动静，让它发现了怎么办！
E: H—hey! Keep your voice down! What if she hears it!?

C: 在这个破烂的酒吧里，谁都得听我的，整天调饮料有什么前途，要是选择站在我这边，我保你后面能过得顺心！
E: Everyone in this lousy lounge takes orders from me! What's the point of mixing drinks all the time? Stay on my side, and I'll ensure you a happy life!

C: 给我来个<color=#dbc291ff>超大杯、特别甜、味道特别刺激的饮料，还得有漂亮的分层！</color>要是哪点没达到要求，我都不会付钱！
E: Give me something in an <color=#dbc291ff>extra large glass, very sweet, and tastes super intense. And it's gotta have pretty layers!</color> I'm not paying if any of my criteria are not met!

C: 想清楚点，这件事对你也有好处。你要是让我开心，我就会常来光顾这家酒吧，你也能拿到更多小费。
E: Think about it: It's beneficial for you too. If you make me happy, I'll drop by more often, and you'll make more tips.

C: 结束后来旁边找我！我在这里等着！
E: Meet me there when you're done! I'll be waiting!

C: 唉，追寻这种问题的答案，就像在车站等一艘不会到来的船，永远得不到结果。
E: *sigh* Seeking answers to such questions is akin to waiting at a station for a ship that will never arrive.

C: 就喜欢您这样的气势！人家也要朝这个方向继续努力！
E: That's what I like about you! I should have the same attitude!

C: 是哪种秘密？
E: What kind of secret?

C: …跟您说这个，是因为人家也藏着不少秘密，犹豫要不要讲出来。
E: ...I'm sharing this with you because I'm also holding onto many secrets, and I'm hesitant to reveal them.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 哼。我想也是。
E: Hmph, I kind of figured.

C: 你在酒吧待的时间不算短，看出来了些什么？
E: You've been in this lounge for some time. What have you noticed?

C: 家人…是指「美梦剧团」吗？
E: A real family... like the Sweet Dreams Troupe?

C: 和您聊天的感觉真愉快，感谢招待，人家还会再来光顾的呀！
E: It's always a pleasure chatting with you. Thank you for your hospitality, I'll come back soon!

C: 最近酒吧里来了不少顾客，变得热闹了，虽然有点吵，但也算是好事吧。给我来份<color=#dbc291ff>超大杯，有松弛感的饮料，口感清爽点</color>，辛苦。
E: The lounge's been getting quite a few customers lately. It's getting bustling. It may be a little noisy, but that's a good thing. I'll have an <color=#dbc291ff>extra large, uplifting drink with a refreshing taste</color>, thank you.

C: 我在和亲爱的调饮师进行私密聊天，你不准插话！
E: I'm having a private conversation with our dear drinksmith here. Mind your business!

C: 我很好相处的，处不好在自己身上找找原因哇！
E: I'm pretty easygoing. If you don't get along with me, maybe the problem lies with you!

C: 呃，就度假地而言，「盛会之星」应该都是智慧生命的首选吧……
E: Um, when it comes to vacations, any intelligent life would choose the Planet of Festivities, right...?

C: 你好
E: Hello

C: 开始
E: Begin

C: 做得好
E: Nice job

C: 你<rhythm>好
E: He<rhythm>llo

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪汪汪  汪  汪
E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof  Woof

C: 准备开始正式拍摄吧！
E: Prepare to begin the photography proper!

C: 恐怕还不起噢。
E: Even with your help, I still might not be able to pay it back.

C: 终于找到了，为了这剩下的半截报表，差点连这条小命都没保住。
E: Finally, I almost got myself killed for the other half of the document.

C: 瞧，这是本次活动的初始街机，简称「初号机」。您可以使用本台机器进行身份信息录入，从而获得自己的专属ID卡。
E: Now, if you look over here, you'll find the first arcade machine of this event, Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>. Register your personal information on it, and you'll receive your own ID card.

C: 怎么样——惊不惊喜、意不意外？
E: Surprise! Didn't see that coming, did you?

C: 喂，别欺负老实人了你……
E: Hey, quit teasing nice people.

C: …啧，真羡慕你。那{NICKNAME}你先继续吧，我在这里指导指导流萤。反正后面的流程都大同小异，我也没什么兴趣。
E: Tsk, wish I were you. Anyway, {NICKNAME}, feel free to go on ahead. I'll stay behind to teach Firefly a few tips and tricks first. The mechanics in the later stages are pretty much all the same anyway, so I'm not too keen on playing anymore.

C: 恋爱养成游戏…是什么类型的游戏？要不也带我一起玩吧？
E: Romance games... what kind of games are those? Can you show me how to play them?

C: 看模样是个挺阳光的小伙子，怎么背地里……
E: He looks like a decent guy. How could he be scheming behind the scenes...

C: 卢卡选手！我只是来和你打个招呼而已，你竟然不讲武德，暴起伤人！
E: Luka! I just came to say hello, and you attack without honor!

C: 卢卡下去吧！下去吧！下去吧！
E: Luka, get off the stage! Off the stage! off the stage!

C: 彼时有博识学会的智者效仿仙舟金人，造出十三套动力甲，并悉心改良了金人格斗术用于盟助仙舟——这，便是铄某人所用古武术之由来。
E: Back then, the wise men of the Intelligentsia Guild modeled their creations after the Xianzhou's aurumaton, crafting thirteen sets of powered armor and meticulously refining aurumaton combat techniques to aid the Xianzhou — this is the origin of the martial arts I practice.

C: 公司的手段好吓人…
E: The IPC's methods are quite frightening...

C: 可当我把资料和「不可知域」内的历史进行比对，却发现，到处是缺漏和虚构。
E: But when I compared the data with the history in the Unknowable Domain, I discovered that there are numerous omissions and fabrications throughout.

C: 就这么定了——多来收集「权杖」的数据，保证你会看到不少刺激的好东西。
E: Then this settles it. Do come and collect more Scepter data. I guarantee that you'll see many exciting things.

C: 你明白，除你们之外，再也没有其他人踏入过此间，而那些人都不会是这行冰冷刻字的作者。
E: You understand that, besides you all, no one else has ever set foot in this space. And those people wouldn't be the authors of such a bleak declaration.

C: 正好小三月也没经过试炼，我稍后去准备一下，明天下午就让你先挑战一次这「杨叔十八机兵阵」。
E: Which reminds me — March hasn't cleared it yet either. I'll set it up a little later — tomorrow afternoon you can be the first one to give it a shot.

C: 不再渴念脚下的大地，而是将远方的群星当做自己的故乡。
E: Your home will no longer be the places you know and love, but the distant stars.

C: 以及最重要的——成为无名客，意味着往后你承担的职责远大于收获。
E: Above all else... Becoming a Nameless means the responsibilities you'll bear far outweigh the rewards you'll reap.

C: 不会啦～只是大家一起宣誓而已，很简单的。
E: Of course not! We're just gonna to recite a simple oath together.

C: 我倒不介意。
E: It doesn't bother me, though.

C: 辛苦啦，{NICKNAME}乘客。今天早点休息吧！
E: You've done well today, {NICKNAME}. Get an early rest tonight!

C: 而一个睡前故事，则如同关机前长按待机键般至关重要。
E: And a bedtime story is just as crucial as holding down the power button before shutting down.

C: 我在整理智库条目时，也是如此。
E: It's the same when I'm organizing entries in the data bank.

C: 我的购物车里还有好多居家热门好物呢，需要的话，我分享链接给你~
E: I have lots of popular home items in my shopping cart. If you need, I can share the links with you~

C: 没想到小小的附属城镇里居然还有这种地方，当时的建筑工艺可真发达。
E: I can't believe such a place could be located within a tiny ancillary town... The architectural craftsmanship of those days was truly advanced.

C: 奥赫玛祖上还挺阔？
E: Okhema's ancestors must have been quite wealthy?

C: 诚然，故事整体的真实性有待考量，但其阐述了一个颇具评估价值的论点——人们认知中大地兽的体型，绝不是这一物种所能达到的极限。
E: Well, the story may be questionable, but it makes an interesting point. The dromas sizes we've seen are nowhere near what that species is truly capable of growing into.

C: 不知为何，这未来的超•极•大地兽长得有点…萌？
E: Strangely enough, this future Super Dromas looks surprisingly... cute?

C: 呜！呜嗡…（嘻嘻…好痒啊…）
E: Grumph! Grumph... (Hehe... that tickles...)

C: 那么，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，先不要乱动，姐姐帮你检查一遍身体。
E: Well then, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, don't move while I check you over.

C: 让我们看看人工队的表现。
E: Let's see how the human translator handles it, shall we?

C: 你怎么瘪了？
E: Why did you shrink!?

C: 拜托了，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，如果掉在地上的蜜饼能复原的话……
E: Please, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas. If honey cakes that fell on the ground can be fixed...

C: 在想什么呢？
E: Thinking hard over there?

C: 嗯…好吧，我知道啦。那个，旅团对接人有封信托我交给你们。
E: Hmm... alright, I get it. Anyway, the troupe liaison left a letter for you.

C: 下次一定。
E: Next time, I promise.

C: 哈哈，虽然我还是听不懂它的话，但这句我倒是理解了。欢迎你！分团的第一次考核任务是在三周后，到时直接来找我们就好。
E: Haha, even though I still can't understand what it's saying, I got that part at least. Welcome aboard! The first assessment mission for the Regiment is in three weeks. Just come find us when it's time.

C: 最开始，我碰见还是蛋的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大时，就知道这孩子气运不凡，将来必成一番大业。现在看来，果真如此。
E: When I first met Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, I knew this kid, even still an egg at the time, had extraordinary charisma and was destined for greatness. Now it seems that I was absolutely right.

C: 既然都说到这份上——
E: Well, since you insist...

C: 材料没带着吗…我这会儿不太方便走开，要麻烦你去取过来了，真不好意思。
E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

C: 您误会了，这不是让您痛击神秘人的意思。
E: You misunderstood. I'm not telling you to bash the mysterious person.

C: 糕点用完了该怎么办呢？
E: What if I run out of pastries?

C: 嗯。本次赛事还会持续很长时间，挑方便的时候来玩就好咪。
E: Alrighty. The event will be running for quite a while, so just drop by whenever it's convenient for you!

C: 仲裁官会搭建一座桥梁，令你们在虚拟的搏斗中交换{RUBY_B#虚数能}能量{RUBY_E#}，就像沙漏的两端，最终达成和谐一统。
E: The Arbitrator will build a bridge, allowing you to exchange {RUBY_B#Imaginary Energy}energy{RUBY_E#} in virtual combat, and like the two ends of an hourglass, ultimately achieving harmonious unity.

C: 告诉我更多关于仲裁官的事。
E: Tell me more about the Arbitrator.

C: 「妖精们与世隔绝，却向往人类的生活。它们想模仿村民，举办一场宴会，却唯独缺少了最重要的人。」
E: "The fairies, though hidden away from the world, dreamed of living like humans. They tried to hold a grand banquet, just as the villagers would. But one thing was missing: the most important person."

C: （…好吧，见到什么人都不奇怪。我完全接受这个设定了。）
E: (...Alright, whoever appears now, I won't question it. I've completely embraced this world's logic.)

C: 做大、做强？
E: Be bigger and better?

C: 早听说悬锋城的基建速度极为惊人，还真是…百闻不如一见啊。
E: I've heard the construction in Castrum Kremnos is ridiculously fast, but seeing it in action... really puts things into perspective.

C: 要不让昔涟来担任？
E: Would you like to take the job, Cyrene?

C: 办得不好要负责任的哦？
E: You'll be held responsible if it doesn't go well, you know?

C: 甜蜜蜜节，可是，没有甜的材料！
E: A Sweetie Festival needs sweet ingredients!

C: 嗐，要真说垄断，你们餐馆也不遑多让，哪有资格批评我呀。
E: Oh, if we're talking monopolies, your restaurant is just as guilty. So stop judging.

C: 那缇宝干了啥？
E: And what about Tribbie?

C: 缇安，看到了。缇宝，一直在农田里玩！
E: Trianne saw it. Tribbie was out playing in the fields all day!

C: 近期举办的甜蜜蜜节更是广受好评，就连我也偷偷去光顾过。迷！千言万语汇聚成一句话…好吃！
E: The recently held Sweetie Festival was another big hit. Even I sneaked over for a bite. Mem! Words can't do it justice... It's just that good!

C: 制作烤饼的小麦，是由餐馆的农林专家，经过反复拣选与实验，得到的优良品种。
E: The wheat used for these pancakes was carefully selected and cultivated by the restaurant's agricultural expert. Only the best made the cut after countless trials.

C: 「迷！过来只是吃饭，太没意思！需要情绪价值！能让我开心的话，可以多给点钱迷！」
E: "Just coming here to eat is sooo boring! I need emotional value! Make me happy and I'll tip more! Mem!"

C: 那么，我便先行告退了。
E: Well then, I'll be taking my leave.

C: 停！现在是开会时间，别把话题带偏啦。
E: Enough! Save it for after the meeting. Stay on topic.

C: 迷！居然敢无视我们！所有的王之妖精，尽情发泄你们的{RUBY_B#食欲}怒火{RUBY_E#}迷！
E: Mem! Ignoring us!? All fairy Overlords, unleash your {RUBY_B#appetite}fury{RUBY_E#}! Mem!

C: ——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，白厄主厨！
E: Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon! Chef Phainon!

C: …阵仗不小啊。知道无法胜过我，打算用人海战术么？
E: ...Quite the turnout. Can't beat me in the kitchen, so you're going for strength in numbers?

C: 趁还来得及。赶紧投敌迷！记住，要投敌！
E: Hurry to our side while you still can! Defect to Mydei, mem! Mark my words: Defect to Mydei!

C: 评审员只有三位，不可能出现平票的情况。
E: With only three judges, there's no chance of a tie.

C: 多雇点妖精来种地怎么样？
E: What if we hire more fairies to work the fields?

C: 哎…事到如今，也只有这个办法了。
E: *sigh* At this point, that might be our only option.

C: 你们，来帮我准备炼金药水。
E: Come, help me prepare these alchemical concoctions.

C: …交给我，包各位满意！
E: Leave it to me, and I'll make sure everyone's happy!

C: 表扬你！
E: You nailed it!

C: 宴会的意义就是请客吃饭。
E: A feast is all about treating your guests to good food.

C: 真希望它能继续下去。
E: I wish it didn't have to end.

C: 恭喜贵餐馆顺利通过评审，收录进迷其林美食名单中。
E: Congratulations. Your restaurant has officially passed the review and is now featured in The Memchelin Gourmet Guide.

C: 书名我都想好了。
E: I've even thought of the perfect title for the book.

C: 那是自然。我的剑技便是由剑旗爵所授，所有黄金裔中，唯有她最为熟悉宴会之事。餐馆管理方面，有不少知识需要向她请教。
E: Naturally. My swordsmanship was taught to me by none other than Dux Gladiorum herself. Among all the Chrysos Heirs, she's by far the most versed in hosting banquets. When it comes to running a restaurant, there's much I still need to learn from her.

C: 退休后过上慢生活，这可是我的人生理想，真心的，不骗你。
E: It is! This is my dream for retirement, slow and peaceful. I swear I'm not lying.

C: 侍女道来神话中的奥秘，一道学士求解的禁忌谜题。\n自旅途间得知的真相，前往书中将其写下。
E: The servant tells of the mystery within the myths, and a scholar seeks to answer a forbidden puzzle.\nThe truths learnt during your travels. Head to the book and write it down.

C: 来生的侍女
E: Servant of the Afterlife

C: 「本来呀，*我们*还有许多。」\n「其他人只是…先走一步。」
E: "Initially, there were many more of us."\n"The others have merely... gone one step ahead."

C: 「缇宝大人、缇宁大人，请别再哭泣。」\n「不用忧心，我们一直信赖着你们。」
E: "Lady Tribbie, Lady Trinnon, please don't cry."\n"Do not worry. We trust you always."

C: 民众的鼓励呈递真心，\n黄金裔的陪伴始终如一，\n母亲的拥抱温暖每个梦境。
E: The people's encouragement rings sincere,\nThe Chrysos Heirs' companionship lasts through the years,\nAnd Mother's embrace warms up every dream.

C: 待她归返，身无分文，满腔愤懑——\n「我向贼神立誓，定要把他们的口袋掏空！」
E: She returns penniless and furiously seethes —\n"I vow to the god of thieves that I will eventually empty those people's pockets!"

C: 欧洛尼斯把新的名字送给你，\n可你慧黠的新伙伴总爱用昵称打趣。
E: Oronyx gives you your new name,\nbut your quick-witted partner prefers teasing you with nicknames.

C: 一缕恨意自烈阳中滋长。\n世界崩毁…被岁月的乱流冲荡。
E: Hatred flares from the heart of the blazing sun,\nand the world falls apart, carried off by the chaos of time.

C: 你为织者刻下「美」的墓志铭。\n你记录孩童的笑声如何温暖别离。
E: You inscribe "beauty" on the weaver's gravestone,\nrecording how a child's laughter warms the final goodbye.

C:
酣梦将巨龙的耳目遮掩。
在它沉睡之时，
艾格勒已经睁开百只眼眸，
法吉娜也拨弄着嬉笑的浪。
E:
Sweet dreams had smothered the giant dragon's eyes and ears,
And as they slept,
The hundred eyes of Aquila had already opened,
And Phagousa had begun to stir the playful waves.

C: 自睁目以来，\n巨龙便极少再度沉眠。
E: Ever since they opened their eyes,\nThe giant dragon rarely returned to slumber.

C: 行军前夜，巨龙却收到密信。
E: On the eve of the march, the Giant Dragon receives a secret message.

C: 「她曾在我耳畔低语。」\n「她曾拯救我的性命。」\n「她送过我一颗冰晶！」
E: "She once whispered in my ear."\n"She once saved my life."\n"She gifted me an ice crystal!"

C: 「仙舟只是统称，这艘星舰名叫『罗浮』。」\n——丹恒
E: "Xianzhou is just a general term. This starship is called 'the Luofu.'"\n— Dan Heng

C: 曾经向我们挥拳的大块头，\n如今已是贝洛伯格复兴的希望。
E: That big guy who once raised his fists against us\nIs now the hope for Belobog's revival.

C: 听说我曾经被封在这块冰里，\n满宇宙到处飘？
E: I heard I was once frozen in this ice block,\nDrifting all over the universe?

C: 而后黄金战争的浪潮，\n席卷大地——
E: Then the waves of the Chrysos War,\nWashed over the world...

C: 旧人再度相见，\n新友也来相逢。
E: Old friends met again,\nAnd new friends came in greeting.

C:
这是一座欢宴的都市，
空中回荡着永不消弭的歌声。
黄金裔、半神、凡人，
都从四面八方赶来赴宴。
E:
This was a city of festivities,
Where never-ceasing songs eternally filled the air.
Chrysos Heirs, demigods, and mortals
All came to feast from the four corners of the world.

C: 如今成为天空的少女，\n牵起曾为天空的「少女」。
E: The girl who has now become the Sky,\nTakes the hand of the "girl" who once was.

C: 它为自己打造化身……\n赐予生命的呼吸，\n令金色的神血流淌。
E: They made clay figures in their likeness...\nBestowed upon them the breath of life,\nand allowed the golden divinity of their blood to course through.

C: 「国君想要扩张领土？把权力和国土放上赌桌吧！凡人想要神权？和神明投骰子去吧！」
E: "A ruler wants to expand their territory? Put power and land to the bet! A mortal seeking divine authority? Go roll the dice with the gods!"

C: 「吾儿，还记得母亲名字取自悬锋初代建城者歌耳戈吗？传说有人在其生前便立碑作传，歌耳戈发现后，亲自抹去了碑上的文字。悬锋人崇尚古制，自此，无字方能传述至伟功业。也有一说：后代无人认为自己的功绩超过那位建城者，因此莫敢为自己题字。代代流传下，竟演变成悬锋人武德充沛、轻视文字。这也是母亲送你去树庭进修的原因，希望你学成归来，为悬锋带回文化革新之风。至于学派，母亲支持你的选择。」
E: "My child, do you remember how my name comes from Gorgo, the first founder of our city? Legend has it that someone erected a monument in their name while they were still alive. When Gorgo discovered it, they personally erased all the text from the stone. The Kremnoans revere ancient customs, and since then, only blank stones could tell of great deeds. There's another theory: No descendant believed their achievements could surpass that founder, so none dared inscribe their own deeds. Over generations, this somehow evolved into Kremnoans being perceived as martial powerhouses who look down on the written word. That's also why I sent you to study at the Grove. I hope you will return to bring the winds of cultural revolution to Kremnos. As for which school to choose, Mother supports your decision."

C: 「无妨。毕竟，仅此一次……」
E: "Wouldn't hurt. After all, it's just this once..."

C: 「我…我既然来了，就不能对病人视而不见！」
E: "I... I can't just turn a blind eye to patients now that I'm here!"

C: 可是一介医师，又能做什么呢？风堇冲进被黑潮席卷的城邦，救下幸存的孩童，却也遭遇黑潮怪物层层包围。
E: But what could a mere physician do? Hyacine rushed into the city-state engulfed by the black tide to save the surviving children, only to find herself surrounded by monsters from the black tide.

C: 「还有我！我想要几束安提灵，用来装点我的小铺。我的回礼是时令水果，全是前几天刚收获的，可新鲜了！」
E: "Me too! I'd like a few bunches of Antila flowers to decorate my little shop. In return, I'll give you some seasonal fruits. They're super fresh, just harvested a few days ago!"

C: SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>
E: SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>

C: 注意：各视角下【界域定锚】解锁状态相互独立，不同视角下的同一【界域定锚】需要分别解锁。

In the <color=#f29e38ff>Supergiant Star</color> difficulty, you will face 9 waves of enemies, and the enemies will become stronger every 3 waves. You can claim rewards separately after eliminating the third and sixth waves of enemies.

E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} the Flip button to dodge obstacles and opponents. If you dodge right before you're about to crash into a roadblock, you will trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Turbo Dash</color> and experience a short period of invulnerability.

C: 点击选中挡板，<color=#f29e38ff>消耗电量</color>可以<color=#f29e38ff>开启挡板</color>，<color=#f29e38ff>关闭挡板</color>可以<color=#f29e38ff>返还电量</color>。

E: Interacting with the <color=#f29e38ff>Bubble Tower</color> again will <color=#f29e38ff>retrieve</color> the Bubble Charges you are currently carrying, and will also make the converged <color=#f29e38ff>Bubble Bridge collapse</color> and return to their original state.

E: You will occasionally discover some <color=#f29e38ff>scattered dream bubbles</color> in the map. Due to them being <color=#f29e38ff>unconnected to passable platforms</color>, these dream bubbles cannot form Bubble Bridges.

C: 对回溯中的装置<color=#f29e38ff>再次点按回溯按键，可以中断回溯，让风场反转</color>。可以利用这一特性，站在平台上对装置进行回溯或是中断回溯来切换气流方向，从而随平台前往另一位置。
E: While a device is Rewinding, <color=#f29e38ff>tap the Rewind button again to interrupt the Rewinding, reversing the wind current</color>. With this function, stand on the platform, Rewind devices or interrupt their Rewinding to change the direction of the wind, and move to another location with the platform.

C: 这给了一些人可乘之机。倘若家族真有叛徒，现在就是行动的最佳时机。
E: This creates an opening for some people to exploit. If there really is a traitor in The Family, now would be the perfect time to make their move.

C: 「但只有走近了，才知道那颗心多么魂不守舍。」
E: "But only when you get close do you realize how restless that heart truly is."

C: 嗯，一言为定。
E: Mm-hmm, it's a deal.

C: 更何况，在这梦境边缘，我也可以……
E: Besides, here at the edge of the dreamscape, I can also...

C: 哦？是「格拉默军规」？她违背过那些禁令？
E: Oh? The Glamoth Regulations? She broke those prohibitions?

C: 不必急于一时，之后揭开真相也不迟。
E: No need to rush things. There's still time to reveal the truth later.

C: 我会的，多谢。
E: Got it, thank you.

C: 可惜，命运还是和她开了一个玩笑，忆质的转变如此迅速，她甚至没机会稍加说明。
E: Unfortunately, fate still played a cruel trick on her. The memoria transformed so quickly that she didn't even have a chance to explain.

C: ——我知道那冰冷的铠甲里是谁。
E: ...I know who is inside that cold armor.

C: 人选？艾利欧终于得到结论了？
E: Candidate? So Elio finally came to a conclusion?

C: 不过流梦礁与世隔绝，在这里有什么方法能知道外面的情况吗？我想确认一下哥哥的状况。
E: But Dreamflux Reef is so isolated... Is there any way to know what's happening outside? I want to check on my brother's situation.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>十二时刻存在异常，我们怀疑「梦主」的真面目。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>There are anomalies in the Twelve Hours. We are suspicious of the Dreammaster's true identity.</color>

C: 好了，你呀…还是那么喜欢多管闲事。
E: Alright, you... still can't help sticking your nose into everything, huh.

C: …一句口信？你不觉得有些可笑吗？
E: ...Just a message? Don't you find that a bit ridiculous?

C: 有时间的话，我也可以…帮你回味下我们的第一次相遇。
E: If you have time, I can... help you savor the memory of our first encounter.

C: 被他选为献唱者的知更鸟，我也焚去了她的疑心，确保万无一失。
E: As for Robin, whom he chose as his songstress, I burned away her doubts too, leaving nothing to chance.

C: 等等，你是因此才将她困入忆域？
E: Wait, is that why you trapped her in the Memory Zone?

C: 已经不重要了，我们错过了阻止他的机会。
E: It doesn't matter anymore. We've missed our chance to stop him.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>45</unbreak>█乐园终将跌入愁苦人世，黎明一旦升起，便要坠毁于白昼。凡是金的，怎可能光华长留？」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>45</unbreak>█Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow, and once dawn breaks, it will shatter in the light of day. How could anything golden abide in glory forever?"</color>

C: 直接告诉你？那不成，我可遭了不少罪呢。
E: Tell you straight up? No way. I went through hell and back for this.

C: 恐怕就是这个意思。
E: I'm afraid so.

C: 他似乎没能如愿。
E: It seems his wishes didn't come true.

C: 我会阻止他的。
E: I will stop him.

C: 我不认为它能够成为任何事的借口。
E: I don't think it can be used as an excuse for anything.

C: 我敬佩你的觉悟，既然你不介意牺牲——
E: I admire your resolve. Since you don't mind sacrifice...

C: 是么？「同谐」使{RUBY_B#星核}恶癌{RUBY_E#}遍布寰宇，为何便能得逞？
E: Oh really? How did the Harmony succeed in spreading its {RUBY_B#Stellarons}cancer{RUBY_E#} across the universe then?

C: 您的勇气如真金般辉耀，然而——
E: Your courage shines like pure gold. Even so...

C: 其原因，将是最后一道「律令」，以此，我等将一切交于你手——
E: That reason shall be the final "divine law." And with this, we entrust everything into your hands...

C: 「梦主」在那时就已经知道，星核其实是「同谐」命途的造物吗…而且，是遵从家族的命令，才被迫操纵星核？
E: Did the Dreammaster already know back then that the Stellaron was actually a creation of the Path of Harmony... Was he forced to manipulate the Stellaron under the Family's orders?

C: 无人配得上幸福
E: None worthy of felicity.

C: 我会让所有人醒来！
E: I'll wake everyone up!

C: {RUBY_B#醒来的人们}飞翔的鸟儿{RUBY_E#}低头俯视，会发现坠落之后，生命也仍有希望持续。
E: When {RUBY_B#the waking ones}a soaring bird{RUBY_E#} looks down below, it discovers that even after falling, life still holds hope to continue.

C: 先找到自己所爱…
E: First, find what I love...

C: 在面对黑暗的时刻，平凡人从来不需要感到卑微——毕竟，他们总是发现，自己早已是如此崇高与光明。
E: In the darkest moments, ordinary people never need to feel small. After all, they always discover that they've already become something noble and bright.

C: 哈——那就赌一把好了，走，今天正适合多喝几杯。等我真醉了，你就知道自己错得离谱。
E: Ha! Let's make an actual bet then! It's the perfect day for a few drinks. Once I'm actually drunk, you'll see just how wrong you are.

C: …没人会，「剧本」已经写下了那一天。
E: ...No one will stop you. It is already written in the "script."

C: 然而流萤的目光再也没有移动过——她眼中的神采，已然完全消失了。
E: However, Firefly's eyes never move again. Every spark of life in her eyes has already gone.

C: 「抵达此处之人，必有非凡的胆色。执掌命运的三相神会赐你奖励，它将是你的传奇之始。」
E: "Those who have reached this place possess extraordinary courage. The Gods of Three Fates who govern destiny shall bestow upon you a reward, which marks the beginning of your legend."

C: 你脑中似有顿悟，像是被光照透的窗。
E: An epiphany dawns in your mind, like sunlight streaming through a window.

C: 开个玩笑啦。这些小家伙是瑟希斯的恩赐，等你们磨合的时间更长些，说不定它就会自动出现在你面前。
E: Just kidding! These little ones are Cerces's blessing. Once you spend more time bonding with them, they might just show up in front of you on their own.

C: 等不及要进行对战了！
E: I can't wait to battle!

C: 不是每只奇美拉都能坐上这张解说台的，这是我奋斗得来的结果！
E: Not every chimera gets to sit at this commentator's desk... I worked my tail off to get here!

C: 要是工作太久的话，奇美拉积攒的怒火就要席卷整个翁法罗斯了，很可怕的。
E: If the chimeras work too long, their pent-up rage will sweep through all of Amphoreus. That's terrifying.

C: 被<color=#f29e38ff>召唤</color>的奇美拉在加入战斗前，会展示在<color=#f29e38ff>召唤队列</color>。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>summoned</color> chimera will be displayed in the <color=#f29e38ff>summon queue</color> before joining combat.

C: 这里可以打开<color=#f29e38ff>加速</color>功能！
E: You can activate the <color=#f29e38ff>SPD Boost</color> function here!

C: 队伍编成•大丽花
E: Added to Team With The Dahlia
